source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT TOP 1000
  H.ORNO [OrderNumber]
, H.ORTP [OrderType]
, H.WHLO [Warehouse]
, CASE H.ORST
    WHEN '05' THEN '05 | Quote'
    WHEN '20' THEN '20 | Registered'
    WHEN '22' THEN '22 | Reserved'
    WHEN '23' THEN '23 | Reserved / Allocated'
    WHEN '24' THEN '24 | Reserved / Picking'
    WHEN '26' THEN '26 | Reserved / Delivered'
    WHEN '27' THEN '27 | Reserved / Invoiced'
    WHEN '33' THEN '33 | Allocated'
    WHEN '37' THEN '37 | Allocated / Invoiced'
    WHEN '44' THEN '44 | Picking'
    WHEN '46' THEN '46 | Picking / Delivered'
    WHEN '47' THEN '47 | Picking / Invoiced'
    WHEN '66' THEN '66 | Delivered'
    WHEN '67' THEN '67 | Delivered / Invoiced'
    WHEN '77' THEN '77 | Invoiced'
    WHEN '79' THEN '79 | Invoices / Deleted'
    WHEN '90' THEN '90 | Deleted'
    WHEN '99' THEN '99 | Deleted'
    END [OrderStatus]
, H.CUNO + ' | ' + O.CUNM [CustomerNameFull]
, H.ORDT [OrderDate]
FROM M3.OOHEAD H LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSMA O ON H.CUNO=O.CUNO
WHERE H.DIVI='TLC' AND ORDT>'8/1/2024'

content.query:
/*

This document contains standards for how to create files in the data lake.  

ERP / Server  Database	 Abb   Server                        ID
DistOne       LIVE       ADC   AC-ERP1.adcraft.com           DistOne
Apprise       LIVE       APR   AVPBI01.avantiproducts.com    AppriseLIVE
Avanti        DW         ADW   AVPBI01.avantiproducts.com    AvantiDW
Avanti        WH         AWH   AVPBI01.avantiproducts.com    AvantiWH
NetSuite      VT         NET   AVPBI01.avantiproducts.com    NetSuiteVT
ECVisual      DC24       EDA   ECS-VSQL3.westbend.local      ECVisualDC24
ECVisual      VFIN       ECV   ECS-VSQL3.westbend.local      ECVisualVFIN
ECVisual      VMFG       ECM   ECS-VSQL3.westbend.local      ECVisualVMFG
MAS           VT         MAV   MASSERVER01.vt.local          MASVT
MAS           GWT        MAG   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  MASGWT
Syspro        CompanyA   SCA   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyA
Syspro        CompanyG   SCG   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyG
Syspro        CompanyK   SCK   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyK
Syspro        CompanyL   SCL   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyL
Syspro        CompanyO   SCO   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyO
Syspro        CRMLive    SCR   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCRMLive
WBVisual      DCSPARKS   WDS   WBS-VSQL3.westbend.local      WBVisualDCSPARKS
WBVisual      DCPARIS    WDP   WBS-VSQL3.westbend.local      WBVisualDCPARIS
WBVisual      VMFG       WBM   WBS-VSQL3.westbend.local      WBVisualVMFG
Infor CSDE M3 M3         M3    CloudERP                      M3

Schema	Source System	Division / Brand
ADC - Distribution One - AdCraft
ADW - Avanti DW - Avanti
APR - Apprise - Avanti
AWH - Avanti WH - Avanti
ECM - Visual VMFG (EC) - Consumer
ECV - Visual VFIN - Consumer
EDA - Visual DCMS (DC24) - Consumer
M3  - M3 - ALL
MAG - MAS GWT - GWT
MAV - MAS VT - Vinotemp
NET - Netsuite - Vinotemp
SCA - Syspro Company A - AFS
SCG - Syspro Company G - GWT
SCK - Syspro Company K - Kold Draft
SCL - Syspro Company L - Zeroll
SCO - Syspro Company O - Omega
SCR - Syspro CRM - AFS
SLS - Salsify - ALL
WBM - Visual VMFG (WB) - Westbend
WDP - Visual DCMS (DCPARIS) - Consumer
WDS - Visual DCMS (DCSPARKS) - Consumer

Examples of File Name Conventions

Data Lake File Name                    SQL External Name Name
/ERPDatabase/OriginalDBFile.parquet  > ABB.OrignalDBFile
/AppriseLIVE/ap-ctl.parquet          > APR.ap-ctl
/SysproCompanyG/ApBank.parquet       > SCG.ApBank
/ECVisualVMFG/CUSTOMER_ORDER.parquet > ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER

------ Data Inventory

Folder	          Notes
AdCraft	          Distribution One ERP (Not Full Set of Data from that System - Source is Progress DB)
AppriseLIVE	      Aptean Apprise ERP
AvantiDW	      Some BI Files from Tableau over Apprise
AvantiWH	      Some BI Files from Tableau over Apprise
ECVisualDC24	  Visual DCMS Avondale Database
ECVisualVFIN	  Visual VFIN Database
ECVisualVMFG	  Visual VMFG Database
M3	              M3
MASGWT	          Sage MAS Database for Old GWT
MASVT	          Sage MAS Database for Old Vinotemp (Not Done Yet)
NetsuiteVT	      NetSuite ERP (Migrated to M3 - There is a folder called Backup which has ALL files Backup)
SysproCompanyA	  Syspro ERP (We have Multiple Instance for Different Parts of our Operation)
SysproCompanyG	  Syspro ERP
SysproCompanyK	  Syspro ERP
SysproCompanyL	  Syspro ERP
SysproCompanyO	  Syspro ERP
SysproCRMLive	  Syspro CRM
WBVisualDCPARIS	  Visual DCMS Paris Database
WBVisualDCSPARKS  Visual DCMS Sparks Database
WBVisualVMFG	  Visual VMFG (Historical for Westbend)


--List Views on System
SELECT s.name, o.name, definition
FROM sys.objects o
INNER JOIN sys.sql_modules m ON o.object_id = m.object_id
INNER JOIN sys.schemas AS s ON o.schema_id = s.schema_id
WHERE type = 'V' and s.name='SLS'

--List of External Tables
SELECT s.name AS SchemaName,
       t.name AS TableName,
       t.location as DataSource,
       t.type_desc AS TableType
FROM sys.external_tables AS t
INNER JOIN sys.schemas AS s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
WHERE s.name = 'SLS'

*/

--Creating an external table for a parquet file in the data lake

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [ECM].[aaedicustomer] (
	[row_id] int,
	[TradingPartnerID] nvarchar(4000),
	[CUSTOMER_ID] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_850] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_860] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_810] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_856] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_856_NEEDS_INVOICE] nvarchar(4000),
	[Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_UPC] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_GTIN] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_BUYER_SKU] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_VENDOR_ITEM_NO] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_BUYER_CAT_NO] nvarchar(4000),
	[VALUE_ADD_CUST] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_PRICE] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_SKU] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_UCC] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_SCC_14] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_SHIP_LABEL] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_MP_LABEL] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_STORE_ID] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_WHSE] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_OTHER] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_856_CONSOL_SHIPTO] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_810_CONSOL] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_810_CONSOL_JIT] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_856_CONSOL_JIT] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_812] nvarchar(4000),
	[VISUAL_EDI] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'ECVisualVMFG/aa_edi_customer.parquet',
	DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseParquetFormat]
	)

-- Creating a view over a file in the data lake.

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW [ECM_aa_edi_customer] AS
    SELECT *
    FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/ECVisualVMFG/aa_edi_customer.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP (10) *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/AdCraft/Database of Sales*.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
            PARSER_VERSION = '2.0', 
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]

-- CMSUSR Script


SELECT

, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DIVI') AS [divi]

, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CUNO') AS [cuno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DEPT') AS [dept]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FACI') AS [faci]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.WHLO') AS [whlo]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DTFM') AS [dtfm]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.REPF') AS [repf]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PHNO') AS [phno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TFNO') AS [tfno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ADR1') AS [adr1]

, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CFI3') AS [cfi3]

, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TIZO') AS [tizo]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TLVA') AS [tlva]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PATC') AS [patc]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TXID') AS [txid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.RGDT') AS [rgdt]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.RGTM') AS [rgtm]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LMDT') AS [lmdt]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CHNO') AS [chno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CHID') AS [chid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DCFM') AS [dcfm]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LMTS') AS [lmts]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.EQAL') AS [eqal]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USTA') AS [usta]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ULTP') AS [ultp]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FRF6') AS [frf6]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FRF7') AS [frf7]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FRF8') AS [frf8]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.EUID') AS [euid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CSYS') AS [csys]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PWHS') AS [pwhs]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.EMAL') AS [emal]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DEVD') AS [devd]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.accountingEntity') AS [accountingentity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationNumber') AS [variationnumber]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.timestamp') AS [timestamp]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.deleted') AS [deleted]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.archived') AS [archived]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/CMNUSR_*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]
WHERE   JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.deleted')='false' and
           JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CONO') 
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DIVI') 
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USID')
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationNumber') in (

SELECT     JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CONO') 
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DIVI') 
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USID')
         + MAX (JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationNumber')) AS [IncludeKey]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/CMNUSR_*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]

GROUP BY   JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CONO')
         , JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DIVI')
         , JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USID')
)

SELECT 
JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono') AS [company]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.clno') AS [clno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ecln') AS [ecln]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber') AS [variationnumber]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/ACLHED*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]
WHERE JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber') in (

--SELECT JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono') as [Company], JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.clno') as [Claim], MAX (JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber')) AS [variationnumber]
SELECT MAX (JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber')) AS [variationnumber]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/ACLHED*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]
WHERE JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono')=752 
GROUP BY JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono'), JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.clno'))

-- CREATE OR ALTER VIEW [M3_MITBAL] AS

SELECT
  JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono') AS [company]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.whlo') AS [warehouse]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.itno') AS [item number]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.stqt') AS [on-hand balance approved]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.quqt') AS [on-hand balance for inspection]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rjqt') AS [rejected on-hand balance]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.alqt') AS [allocated quantity - basic u/m]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.aval') AS [allocatable on-hand balance]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.plqt') AS [picking list quantity - basic u/m]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.comg') AS [container management]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.almt') AS [allocation method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.stmt') AS [storage method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.spmt') AS [issue method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sttx') AS [note]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.orqt') AS [ordered quantity - basic u/m]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/MITBAL*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]

--View Create for M3.OCHEAD

DROP VIEW M3_OCHEAD

CREATE VIEW M3_OCHEAD AS 

SELECT * 
FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCHEAD.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
WHERE
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records 
  and CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + WHLO
      + CAST(REPN as VARCHAR(10))
      + CUNO
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in ( 
          SELECT
            CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
          + WHLO
          + CAST(REPN as VARCHAR(10))
          + CUNO
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
          FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCHEAD.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
          GROUP BY CONO,WHLO,REPN,CUNO
          )

----------------------- Create View for FCHACC
DROP VIEW M3_FCHACC  
CREATE VIEW M3_FCHACC AS 


SELECT 
  *
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FCHACC.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + DIVI 
      + CAST(AITP as VARCHAR(3))
      + AITM
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + DIVI 
            + CAST(AITP as VARCHAR(3))
            + AITM
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FCHACC.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'

        ,L1.AICL AccountGroup

        ,AIT3+' - '+L3.TX40 Dimension3

        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTXT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ACQT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.DCQT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.UNIT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ACAM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.DCAM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.DBCR
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CUCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CRTP
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ARAT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CUAM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TGCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.THCC
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TCRT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TCAR
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TCAM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AT04
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTP1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CVT1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTP2
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CVT2
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CVT3
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CVT4
        ,M3_FGLEDG.BSCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.FTCO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VATR
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VRNE
        ,M3_FGLEDG.SERS
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ARCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL2
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL3
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL4
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL5
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TXID
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RGDT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RGTM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.LMDT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CHNO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CHID
        ,M3_FGLEDG.APCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.APRV
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ECAR
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VRNO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.LMTS
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VSNO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTPQ
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTD1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CRAU
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CRAY
        ,M3_FGLEDG.MIGI
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VOTP
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RERF
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RRCB

FROM M3_FGLEDG LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L1 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT1=L1.AITM and L1.AITP=1
               LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L2 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT2=L2.AITM and L2.AITP=2
               LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L3 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT3=L3.AITM and L3.AITP=3
               LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L4 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT4=L4.AITM and L4.AITP=4
               LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L5 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT5=L5.AITM and L5.AITP=5

SELECT *
, '7/31/2024' as Month, case when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 1 then 'Current'  
when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 31 then '1 - 30'  
when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 61 then '31 - 60' 
when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 90 then '61 - 90'  
when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 181 then '91 - 180' else '180 +' end as [Age Bucket]
FROM v_AP_Aging_Test2 
where [Accounting Date] < '2024-09-01'



select *
from v_AP_Aging_Test2
where [Accounting Date] < '2024-09-05'

SELECT          'Munoz' as Responsible
,               w.WAREHOUSE as WarehouseCode
,               w.name as WarehouseName
,               i.item as PartId
,               i.descr as PartName
,               SUM(wi.QTY_OH) as Qty
,               SUM(QTY_OH*AVG_COST) as InventoryValue
FROM            ADC.warehouse w
JOIN            ADC.wa_item wi on w.warehouse = wi.warehouse
JOIN            ADC.item I on wi.item = I.item
where           1=1 
and             wi.company_it = 'AD'
AND             I.company_it = 'AD'
AND             W.company_it = 'AD'
AND             wi.qty_oh <> 0
GROUP BY        w.WAREHOUSE, w.name, i.item, i.descr

SELECT      i.item
,           i.descr
,           i.um
,           i.product_line
,           i.upc1
,           i.vendor
,           i.ship_length
,           i.ship_width
,           i.ship_height
,           i.weight
,           AVG(WI.list_price) as msrp
,           AVG(WI.std_cost) as std_cost
FROM        ADC.ITEM I
JOIN        ADC.wa_item WI on i.item = WI.item
WHERE       I.COMPANY_IT = 'AD'
AND         WI.COMPANY_IT = 'AD'
GROUP BY    i.item
,           i.descr
,           i.um
,           i.product_line
,           i.upc1
,           i.vendor
,           i.ship_length
,           i.ship_width
,           i.ship_height
,           i.weight

SELECT          DISTINCT C.customer as [Customer ID]
,               C.name as [Customer Name]
,               oh.name as [Sub Name]
,               OH.[order] as [Order Number]
,               OH.delivery_date as [Req Delivery Date]
,               OL.item as [Item Number]
,               OL.descr as [Item Description]
,               OL.q_ord as [Order Quantity]
,               OL.price as [Unit Price]
,               OL.q_ord*OL.price as [Total Price]
FROM            ADC.oe_head OH
JOIN            ADC.oe_line OL on OH.[order] = OL.[order]
JOIN            ADC.customer C on OH.customer = C.customer
WHERE           OH.company_oe = 'AD' and C.company_cu = 'AD'
AND             delivery_date >= '2021-01-01'
AND             upper(oh.name) like '%AMAZON%'

CREATE VIEW BI_CustomerCreditLimit
 --drop view BI_CustomerCreditLimit

AS

    SELECT 
        CL.PYNO AS [Customer Number],
        CL.ODIN AS [Overdue Invoice Amount],
        CL.OINA AS [Outstanding Invoice Amount],
        CL.OVNI AS [Order Value not Invoiced],
        CL.NOOD AS [Number of Overdue Days],
        CL.OWOR AS [Outstanding without Risk],
        CL.OVWR AS [Order value without Risk],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.LIND), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.LIND), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.LIND), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Last Invoice Date],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.RGDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.RGDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.RGDT), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Entry Date],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.LMDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.LMDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CL.LMDT), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Change Date],
        CL.CHID AS [Changed by],
        CL.PTRA AS [Pending Transfer Amount],
        CL.PYGR AS [Credit Group]
    FROM M3.CCUCRL CL

CREATE VIEW     BI_CustomerMaster
-- drop view BI_CustomerMaster
as
SELECT          DISTINCT A.[Customer Number]
,               COALESCE(B.[Customer Name], C.[Customer Name]) AS [Customer Name]
,               COALESCE(B.[Aligned Customer Number], C.[Aligned Customer Number]) AS [Aligned Customer Number]
,               COALESCE(B.[Aligned Customer Name], C.[Aligned Customer Name]) AS [Aligned Customer Name]
,               COALESCE(B.[Customer Group], C.[Customer Group]) AS [Customer Group]
,               COALESCE(B.[Country], C.[Country]) AS [Country]
,               COALESCE(B.[Customer Channel], C.[Customer Channel]) AS [Customer Channel]
,               COALESCE(B.[Customer Type], C.[Customer Type]) AS [Customer Type]
,               COALESCE(B.[Order Type], C.[Order Type]) AS [Order Type]
,               COALESCE(B.[Account Manager], C.[Account Manager]) AS [Account Manager]
,               COALESCE(B.[Sales Rep], C.[Sales Rep]) AS [Sales Rep]
,               COALESCE(B.[Budget Group], C.[Budget Group]) AS [Budget Group]

FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT *
FROM
(
    SELECT          distinct CUNO as [Customer Number]
    FROM            M3.OCUSMA
    
    UNION ALL

    SELECT          DISTINCT Customer_Number as [Customer Number]
    FROM            M3.CustomerMaster
) Z
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,               OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A230 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A230 END AS [Aligned Customer Number]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A030 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A030 END AS [Aligned Customer Name]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A430 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A430 END AS [Customer Group]
,               OC.CSCD AS [Country]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A530 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A530 END AS [Customer Channel]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A630 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A630 END AS [Customer Type]
,               NULL AS [Order Type]
,               CS.TX40 AS [Account Manager]
,               CS2.TX40 AS [Sales Rep]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A730 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A730 END AS [Budget Group]
FROM            M3.OCUSMA OC
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA' AND A330 = ''
LEFT JOIN       M3.CMNUSR CS ON OC.RESP = CS.USID
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON OC.SMCD = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'SMCD'
) B on          A.[Customer Number] = B.[Customer Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          Customer_Number AS [Customer Number]
,               Customer_Name AS [Customer Name]
,               Aligned_Customer_Number AS [Aligned Customer Number]
,               Aligned_Customer_Name AS [Aligned Customer Name]
,               Customer_Group AS [Customer Group]
,               Country AS [Country]
,               Customer_Channel AS [Customer Channel]
,               Customer_Type AS [Customer Type]
,               Order_Type AS [Order Type]
,               Account_Manager AS [Account Manager]
,               Sales_Rep AS [Sales Rep]
,               Budget_Forecast_Group AS [Budget Group]
FROM            M3.CustomerMaster
) C on          A.[Customer Number] = C.[Customer Number]

CREATE VIEW BI_CustomerPriceLists
-- drop view BI_CustomerPriceLists

AS

SELECT
    OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name],
    OC.CFC8 AS [Price List Market],
    CS.TX15 AS [Delivery Terms],
    2 AS [Priority],
    PLT2.PLTB AS [Price List Tab],
    PLT2.PRRF AS [Base Price List],
    PRL.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    PRL.SAPR AS [Customer Price],
    PRL.LMDT AS [Change Date],
    PRL.CHNO AS [Change Number],
    PRL.CHID AS [Change By],
    PRL.FVDT AS [Valid From],
    PRL.LVDT AS [Valid To],
    MM.SAPR AS [Sales Price],
    CASE
        WHEN PRL.LVDT < CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Expired'
        WHEN PRL.FVDT > CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Future'
        WHEN PRL.FVDT <= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) AND PRL.LVDT >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Current'
        ELSE 'Review'
    END AS [Price List Status]

FROM M3.OCUSMA OC
JOIN M3.OPRMTX PLT2 ON OC.PLTB = PLT2.PLTB AND OC.CUNO = PLT2.OBV1 AND PLT2.PREX = 2
JOIN M3.OPRBAS PRL ON PRL.PRRF = PLT2.PRRF
LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS MM ON PRL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.TEDL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'TEDL'
WHERE OC.STAT = 20

UNION ALL

SELECT
    OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name],
    OC.CFC8 AS [Price List Market],
    CS.TX15 AS [Delivery Terms],
    6 AS [Priority],
    PLT6.PLTB AS [Price List Tab],
    PLT6.PRRF AS [Base Price List],
    PRL.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    PRL.SAPR AS [Customer Price],
    PRL.LMDT AS [Change Date],
    PRL.CHNO AS [Change Number],
    PRL.CHID AS [Change By],
    PRL.FVDT AS [Valid From],
    PRL.LVDT AS [Valid To],
    MM.SAPR AS [Sales Price],
    CASE
        WHEN PRL.LVDT < CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Expired'
        WHEN PRL.FVDT > CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Future'
        WHEN PRL.FVDT <= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) AND PRL.LVDT >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Current'
        ELSE 'Review'
    END AS [Price List Status]

FROM M3.OCUSMA OC
JOIN M3.OPRMTX PLT6 ON OC.PLTB = PLT6.PLTB AND OC.CFC8 = PLT6.OBV1 AND PLT6.PREX = 6
JOIN M3.OPRBAS PRL ON PRL.PRRF = PLT6.PRRF
LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS MM ON PRL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.TEDL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'TEDL'
WHERE OC.STAT = 20

CREATE VIEW BI_Dilution
 --drop view BI_Dilution

AS

    SELECT 
        FG.YEA4 AS [Year],
        FG.JRNO AS [Journal Number],
        FG.JSNO AS [Journal Sequence Number],
        FG.TRCD AS [Transaction Code],
        FG.VSER AS [Voucher Number Series],
        FG.VONO AS [Voucher Number],
        FG.VDSC AS [Voucher Name],
        FP.SUNO AS [Supplier],
        CM.SUNM AS [Supplier Name],
        FG.ACDT AS [Invoice Date],
        FG.AIT1 AS [GL],
        FCH.TX40 AS [GL Description],
        FG.AIT1,
        FG.AIT1 + ' - ' + L1.TX40 AS [Dimension 1],
        FG.AIT2,
        FG.AIT2 + ' - ' + L2.TX40 AS [Dimension 2],
        FG.AIT3,
        FG.AIT3 + ' - ' + L3.TX40 AS [Dimension 3],
        FG.AIT4,
        FG.AIT4 + ' - ' + L4.TX40 AS [Dimension 4],
        FG.AIT5,
        FG.AIT5 + ' - ' + L5.TX40 AS [Dimension 5],
        FG.AIT6,
        FG.AIT7,
        FG.VTXT AS [Voucher Text],
        FG.ACQT AS [QTY],
        FG.ACAM AS [Amount],
        FG.ECAR AS [State],
        FG.VSNO AS [Voucher Sequence Number]
    FROM M3.FGLEDG AS FG
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT VONO, JRNO, SUNO FROM M3.FPLEDG) FP ON FG.VONO = FP.VONO AND FG.JRNO = FP.JRNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.CIDMAS AS CM ON CM.SUNO = FP.SUNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.FCHACC AS FCH ON FCH.AITM = FG.AIT1
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L1 ON FG.AIT1 = L1.AITM AND L1.AITP = 1
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L2 ON FG.AIT2 = L2.AITM AND L2.AITP = 2
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L3 ON FG.AIT3 = L3.AITM AND L3.AITP = 3
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L4 ON FG.AIT4 = L4.AITM AND L4.AITP = 4
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L5 ON FG.AIT5 = L5.AITM AND L5.AITP = 5
    WHERE FG.YEA4 > '2023'
    AND FG.AIT1 IN ('421020', '421030', '421040', '421050', '421055', '421060', '421070', '421010', '620000')

CREATE VIEW BI_Expenses
 --drop view BI_Expenses

AS

    SELECT 
        FG.YEA4 AS [Year],
        FG.JRNO AS [Journal Number],
        FG.JSNO AS [Journal Sequence Number],
        FG.TRCD AS [Transaction Code],
        FG.VSER AS [Voucher Number Series],
        FG.VONO AS [Voucher Number],
        FG.VDSC AS [Voucher Name],
        FP.SUNO AS [Supplier],
        CM.SUNM AS [Supplier Name],
        FG.ACDT AS [Invoice Date],
        FG.AIT1 AS [GL],
        FCH.TX40 AS [GL Description],
        FG.AIT1,
        FG.AIT1 + ' - ' + L1.TX40 AS [Dimension 1],
        FG.AIT2,
        FG.AIT2 + ' - ' + L2.TX40 AS [Dimension 2],
        FG.AIT3,
        FG.AIT3 + ' - ' + L3.TX40 AS [Dimension 3],
        FG.AIT4,
        FG.AIT4 + ' - ' + L4.TX40 AS [Dimension 4],
        FG.AIT5,
        FG.AIT5 + ' - ' + L5.TX40 AS [Dimension 5],
        FG.AIT6,
        FG.AIT7,
        FG.VTXT AS [Voucher Text],
        FG.ACQT AS [QTY],
        FG.ACAM AS [Amount],
        FG.ECAR AS [State],
        FG.VSNO AS [Voucher Sequence Number]
    FROM M3.FGLEDG AS FG
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT VONO, JRNO, SUNO FROM M3.FPLEDG) FP ON FG.VONO = FP.VONO AND FG.JRNO = FP.JRNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.CIDMAS AS CM ON CM.SUNO = FP.SUNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.FCHACC AS FCH ON FCH.AITM = FG.AIT1
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L1 ON FG.AIT1 = L1.AITM AND L1.AITP = 1
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L2 ON FG.AIT2 = L2.AITM AND L2.AITP = 2
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L3 ON FG.AIT3 = L3.AITM AND L3.AITP = 3
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L4 ON FG.AIT4 = L4.AITM AND L4.AITP = 4
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L5 ON FG.AIT5 = L5.AITM AND L5.AITP = 5
    WHERE FG.YEA4 > '2025'
    AND ( (FG.AIT1 >= '500000' AND FG.AIT1 < '800000') OR FG.AIT1 IN ('158000', '158500'))

CREATE VIEW BI_InvoicedOrders
-- Drop view BI_InvoicedOrders
-- select top 100 * from BI_InvoicedOrders where Year = '2026' order by 'Invoice Date' DESC

AS

SELECT DISTINCT

    TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 2) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date],
    H.YEA4 AS [Year],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.EXIN) AS [Extended Invoice Number],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.IVNO) AS [Invoice Number],
    H.ORNO AS [Order Number],
    H.ORTP AS [Order Type],
    H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    H.PYNO AS [Payer],
    H.ADID AS [Address ID],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    IM.ITGR AS [Product Line],
    IM.ITCL AS [Brand],
    L.PONR AS [Order Line],
    L.POSX AS [Line Suffix],
    L.LNCL AS [Line Classification],
    L.IVQT AS [Qty],
    L.SAPR AS [Unit Price],
    L.UCOS AS [Unit Cost],
    CASE WHEN LNCL = 2 THEN 0 ELSE (L.IVQT * L.SAPR * H.RAIN) END AS [Dollar Amount],
    CASE WHEN LNCL = 2 THEN 0 ELSE L.DCOS END AS [Total Cost],
    L.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    L.CUOR AS [Customer PO],
    L.DLIX AS [Delivery Number],
    COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OA2.CUNM, OC.CUNM) AS [Ship to Name],
    COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OA2.CUA1, OC.CUA1) AS [Ship to Address 1],
    COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OA2.CUA2, OC.CUA2) AS [Ship to Address 2],
    COALESCE(OA.TOWN, OA2.TOWN, OC.TOWN) AS [Ship to City],
    COALESCE(OA.ECAR, OA2.ECAR, OC.ECAR) AS [Ship to State],
    COALESCE(OA.PONO, OA2.PONO, OC.PONO) AS [Ship to Zip Code],
    COALESCE(OA.CSCD, OA2.CSCD, OC.CUA4) AS [Ship to Country],
    OC.CUNM AS [Bill to Name],
    OC.CUA1 AS [Bill to Address 1],
    OC.CUA2 AS [Bill to Address 2],
    OC.TOWN AS [Bill to City],
    OC.ECAR AS [Bill to State],
    OC.PONO AS [Bill to Zip Code],
    OC.CUA4 AS [Bill to Country],
    OO.RGDT AS [Order Entry Date]

FROM M3.ODHEAD H

LEFT JOIN M3.ODLINE L ON H.ORNO = L.ORNO AND H.EXIN = L.EXIN AND H.DLIX = L.DLIX
LEFT JOIN M3.OOHEAD OO ON H.ORNO = OO.ORNO
LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS IM ON L.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSMA OC ON H.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
LEFT JOIN M3.OOADRE OA ON H.ORNO = OA.ORNO AND OA.ADRT = '1' AND H.ADID = OA.ADID
LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSAD OA2 ON H.CUNO = OA2.CUNO AND H.ADID = OA2.ADID AND H.ADID <> '' AND OA2.ADRT = '1'

WHERE H.IVNO <> 0 AND H.YEA4 >= '2022'

CREATE VIEW BI_InvoicedReturns
-- Drop view BI_InvoicedReturns

AS

SELECT
    TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 2) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date],
    H.YEA4 AS [Year],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.EXIN) AS [Extended Invoice Number],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.IVNO) AS [Invoice Number],
    H.ORNO AS [Order Number],
    H.ORTP AS [Order Type],
    H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    H.PYNO AS [Payer],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    L.PONR AS [Order Line],
    L.POSX AS [Line Suffix],
    L.LNCL AS [Line Classification],
    L.IVQT AS [Qty],
    L.SAPR AS [Unit Price],
    L.UCOS AS [Unit Cost],
    CASE WHEN L.LNCL = 2 THEN 0 ELSE (L.IVQT * L.SAPR * H.RAIN) END AS [Dollar Amount],
    CASE WHEN L.LNCL = 2 THEN 0 ELSE L.DCOS END AS [Total Cost],
    L.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    L.CUOR AS [Customer PO],
    L.DLIX AS [Delivery Number],
    O.REPN AS [Receiving Number],
    O.SERN AS [Serial Number],
    CASE WHEN O.RSCD IS NULL OR O.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE O.RSCD END AS [Transaction Reason],
    CASE WHEN O.RSCD IS NULL OR O.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE C.TX40 END AS [Transaction Reason Description],
    R.YREF AS [Reference],
    R.RORN AS [Reference Sales Order Number]

FROM M3.ODHEAD H
LEFT JOIN M3.ODLINE L ON H.ORNO = L.ORNO AND H.EXIN = L.EXIN AND H.DLIX = L.DLIX
LEFT JOIN M3.OOLINE O ON L.ORNO = O.ORNO AND L.PONR = O.PONR AND L.POSX = O.POSX
LEFT JOIN M3.OCHEAD R ON O.REPN = R.REPN
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB C ON O.RSCD = C.STKY AND C.STCO = 'RSCD'

WHERE
    H.IVNO <> 0 AND
    H.YEA4 >= '2022' AND
    H.ORTP IN ('RMA','X90','E90')

(
SELECT          FW.[Item Number]
, COALESCE(A.[Salsify Item Number], B.[Salsify Item Number]) as [Salsify Item Number]
, COALESCE(A.[Description], B.[Description]) as [Description]

,                               [Finance Brand], [Brand], [Sub-Brand], NULL as [Brand Control], NULL as [Collection], [Product Line], [Category], [Subcategory]
,                               [Base Model SKU], NULL as [FOB Cost], NULL as [M3 Cost], NULL as [Freight Cost], NULL as [Landed Cost], NULL as [Wholesale Price] 				    	      
,                               NULL as [US Duty Rate], NULL as [CA Duty Rate], NULL as [Weight], NULL as [40 HC QTY], NULL as [Lead Time] , NULL as [Gift Box Length]
,                               NULL as [Gift Box Width], NULL as [Gift Box Height], NULL as [Gift Box Weight], NULL as [Case Pack Qty], NULL as [Case Pack Length]
,                               NULL as [Case Pack Width], NULL as [Case Pack Height], NULL as [Case Pack Weight], NULL as [Master Pack Qty]
,                               NULL as [Master Pack Length], NULL as [Master Pack Width], NULL as [Master Pack Height], NULL as [Master Pack Weight]
,                               NULL as [Pallet Pack Qty], NULL as [Pallet Pack Length], NULL as [Pallet Pack Width], NULL as [Pallet Pack Height]
,                               NULL as [Pallet Pack Ti/Hi], NULL as [ASIN], NULL as [UPC], NULL as [EAN], NULL as [Supplier Code], NULL as [Supplier Name]
,                               NULL as [Image URL], NULL as [Customization Available], NULL as [Tier], NULL as [Canada Y/N], NULL as [Exclusivity], NULL as [Exclusivity 2], NULL as [Exclusivity 3]
,                               NULL as [Supplier Short Name], NULL as [Origin Port], NULL as [Estimated Landed Cost], NULL as [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate]
,                               NULL as [Duty Rate ($)], NULL as [Trump Tariff], NULL as [20' Container Qty], NULL as [40' Container Qty], NULL as [Country of Origin], NULL as [HTS Code]
,                               NULL as [Project Start Date], NULL as [Launch Date], NULL as [Updated Launch Date]
FROM            v_Discontinued
) C on FW.[Item Number] = C.[Item Number]
*/
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          [Salsify Item Number], Description
FROM            SLS.Products_BI
) Y on X.[Aligned Item Number] = Y.[Salsify Item Number]

where X.[Description] is not null

CREATE VIEW BI_M3_Sales
-- Drop view BI_M3_Sales
-- select top 100 * from BI_M3_Sales where Year = '2026' order by Date DESC
AS

SELECT DISTINCT

    TRY_CAST(LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 4) + '-' + 
                 SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
                 RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 2) AS DATE) AS 'Date',
    H.YEA4 AS 'Year',
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.EXIN) AS 'Extended Invoice Number',
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.IVNO) AS 'Invoice Number',
    H.ORNO AS 'Order Number',
    H.ORTP AS 'Order Type',
    H.CUNO AS 'Customer Number',
    L.ITNO AS 'Item Number',
    I.GRP4 AS 'Brand',
    I.ITCL AS 'Sub-Brand',
    I.BUAR AS 'Business Unit',
    I.GRP2 AS 'Division',
    L.TotalQty AS 'Qty',   
    (L.TotalAmount * H.RAIN) AS 'Dollar Amount',
    L.TotalCost AS 'Cost',
    L.WHLO AS 'Warehouse'

FROM M3.ODHEAD H

-- Orders Line table
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ORNO,
        EXIN,
        IVNO,
        ITNO,
        WHLO,
        SUM(IVQT) AS TotalQty,
        SUM(IVQT * SAPR) AS TotalAmount,
        SUM(DCOS) AS TotalCost
    FROM M3.ODLINE
    WHERE LNCL <> 2
    GROUP BY ORNO, EXIN, IVNO, ITNO, WHLO
) L

ON H.ORNO = L.ORNO AND H.EXIN = L.EXIN   

LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS I ON L.ITNO = I.ITNO

WHERE
    H.IVNO <> 0

    -- Exclude orders by order type
    AND H.ORTP NOT IN ('E80', 'E50', 'E90', 'X90', 'RMA')

    -- Exclude Intercompany customers
    AND H.CUNO NOT IN ('50293', '50793', '50636', 'COM01263', 'COM00600')

    -- Exclude 2022 Orders
        -- Dilution
        AND H.EXIN NOT IN ('2022000001151')
        -- Warranty Charges
        AND H.EXIN NOT IN ('2022000001509', '2022000000911', '2022000000480', '2022000002508', '2022000001812', '2022000001212', '2022000002564', '2022000001216')
    
    -- Exclude 2023 Orders
        -- Dilution
        AND H.EXIN NOT IN ('2400010910', '2400010911')
        -- Credit Memo
        AND H.EXIN NOT IN ('2400012352')
        -- Discrepancy in GL Table
        AND H.EXIN NOT IN ('2400016623')
        -- Warranty Charges
        AND H.EXIN NOT IN ('2400035333', '2023000001318', '2400048058', '2400032552', '2400008533', '2400005191', '2400006432', '2400010608', '2400028676',
                           '2400003600', '2400045934', '2400011939', '2400028673', '2400004200', '2400033030', '2400037748', '2400040460', '2400017824', '2400015985')
    
    -- Exclude 2024 Orders
        -- Dilution
        AND H.EXIN NOT IN ('2400080268', '2400080266', '2400124015', '2400125328', '2400141712', '2400219826', '2400125326')



-- Add manual adjustments on GLs table
UNION
SELECT
    F.ACDT AS 'Date',
    F.YEA4 AS 'Year',
    F.VTXT AS 'Extended Invoice Number',
    F.VTXT AS 'Invoice Number',
    NULL AS 'Order Number',
    'Manual Adjustments' AS 'Order Type',
    NULL AS 'Customer Number',
    NULL AS 'Item Number',
    NULL AS 'Brand',
    NULL AS 'Sub-Brand',
    NULL AS 'Busines Unit',
    NULL AS 'Division',
    (-1 * F.ACQT) AS 'Qty',
    (-1 * F.ACAM) AS 'Dollar Amount',
    NULL AS 'Cost',
    NULL AS 'Warehouse'
FROM M3.FGLEDG F
WHERE
    F.AIT1 = 411010
    AND (F.VTXT LIKE 'CM WAS APPLIED INCORRECTLY%'
    OR F.VTXT LIKE 'Change this account%'
    OR F.VTXT LIKE 'Sales Vino Temp%' 
    OR F.VTXT LIKE 'RC Prepayment%'
    OR F.VTXT LIKE 'CAS950 posting%'
    OR F.VTXT LIKE 'CM was applied incorrectly%'
    OR F.VTXT LIKE 'PRICE CORRECTION ON KALORIK INVOICES%'
    OR F.VTXT LIKE 'DUP-2999908968%'
    OR F.VTXT LIKE 'Cost Accounting Transactions%')

CREATE VIEW BI_ManufacturingOrders
-- drop view BI_ManufacturingOrders

AS

    SELECT
        MFNO AS [Manufacturing Number],
        WHST AS [Order Status],
        WHLO AS [Warehouse],
        ITNO AS [Item Number],
        PRNO AS [Product Number],
        ORTY AS [Order Type],
        CASE WHEN WHST < 80 THEN 'Open' ELSE 'Completed' END AS [Status Type],
        WOSQ AS [Reporting Number],
        RESP AS [Responsible],
        STDT AS [Start Date],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), RPDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), RPDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), RPDT), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Report Date],
        RGDT AS [Entry Date],
        ORQA AS [Order Quantity],
        RVQA AS [Received Qty],
        MAQA AS [Manufactured Quantity],
        WCLN AS [Production Line],
        RORN AS [Reference Order Number],
        RORL AS [Reference Order Line]

    FROM M3.MWOHED MW

CREATE VIEW BI_Orders
 --drop view BI_Orders

AS

    SELECT 
        OL.ORNO AS [Order Number],
        OL.ORST AS [Line Status],
        OL.PONR AS [Line Number],
        OL.POSX AS [Line Suffix],
        OL.LNCL AS [Line Classification],
        OL.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
        OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO],
        OL.RGDT AS [Line Entry Date],
        OL.DWDZ AS [Line Requested Date],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OL.UID1), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OL.UID1), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OL.UID1), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Line Expected Ship Date],
        OL.SMCD AS [SalesRep],
        OL.ITNO AS [Item Number],
        OL.ORQT AS [Order Quantity],
        OL.ALQT AS [Allocated Quantity],
        OL.RNQT AS [Remaining to Allocate Quantity],
        OL.PLQT AS [In Process Quantity],
        OL.DLQT AS [Delivered Quantity],
        OL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Quantity],
        (OL.ALQT + OL.RNQT + OL.PLQT + OL.DLQT) AS [Open Quantity],
        CASE 
            WHEN (OL.ORQT - (OL.ALQT + OL.RNQT + OL.PLQT + OL.DLQT) - OL.IVQT) < 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (OL.ORQT - (OL.ALQT + OL.RNQT + OL.PLQT + OL.DLQT) - OL.IVQT)
        END AS [Cancelled Quantity],
        OL.SAPR AS [Unit Price],
        OL.UCOS AS [Unit Cost],
        OL.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
        OL.RSC6 AS [Reason Code],
        OL.TEPY AS [Payment Terms],
        OL.TEDL AS [Delivery Terms],
        OL.ADID AS [Address ID],
        OH.OBLC AS [Order Stop Code],
        CASE 
            WHEN OH.OBLC IN ('0','9') THEN 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '1' THEN 'Ship Complete'
            WHEN OH.OBLC IN ('2','3') THEN 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '6' THEN 'Time Fenced Credit Limit Issue'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' THEN 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' THEN 'Logistics Hold'
            ELSE 'NA' 
        END AS [Order Stop Code Description],
        OH.FDED AS [First Date],
        OH.LDED AS [Last Date],
        OH.RGDT AS [Order Entry Date],
        OH.RLDT AS [Requested Date],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OH.UID1), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OH.UID1), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OH.UID1), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Updated Requested Date],
        OH.RESP AS [Sales Admin Responsible],
        OH.ORTP AS [Order Type],
        OH.WCON AS [Contact Method],
        OH.PYNO AS [Payer],
        COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OA2.CUNM, OC.CUNM) AS [Ship to Name],
        COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OA2.CUA1, OC.CUA1) AS [Ship to Address 1],
        COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OA2.CUA2, OC.CUA2) AS [Ship to Address 2],
        COALESCE(OA.TOWN, OA2.TOWN, OC.TOWN) AS [Ship to City],
        COALESCE(OA.ECAR, OA2.ECAR, OC.ECAR) AS [Ship to State],
        COALESCE(OA.PONO, OA2.PONO, OC.PONO) AS [Ship to Zip Code],
        COALESCE(OA.CSCD, OA2.CSCD, OC.CUA4) AS [Ship to Country]

    FROM M3.OOLINE OL
    LEFT JOIN M3.OOHEAD OH ON OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.OOADRE OA ON OL.ORNO = OA.ORNO AND OA.ADRT = '1' AND OL.ADID = OA.ADID
    LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSAD OA2 ON OL.CUNO = OA2.CUNO AND OL.ADID = OA2.ADID AND OL.ADID <> '' AND OA2.ADRT = '1'

CREATE VIEW BI_POCharges
-- drop view BI_POCharges

AS

SELECT 
    C.PUNO AS [PO Number],
    C.PNLI AS [PO Line],
    C.PNLS AS [PO Line Subnumber],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    H.ORTY AS [Order Type],
    H.RGDT AS [Order Entry Date],
    C.CDSE AS [Sequence Number],
    C.EXTY AS [Charge Type],
    C.CEID AS [Costing Element],
    C.EXIC AS [Charge Invoicing],
    C.WSOP AS [Costing Operator],
    C.CEVA AS [Costing Element Amount],
    C.CEVJ AS [Adjusted Costing Element Amount],
    C.ACIN AS [Acc Invoiced],
    C.IVCQ AS [Invoice Charge Quantity],
    C.THPR AS [3rd Party Charges],
    C.POOV AS [Markup],
    C.OVHE AS [Costing Markup],
    C.RGDT AS [Entry Date],
    C.LMDT AS [Change Date],
    C.CHID AS [Changed by]
FROM M3.MPOEXP C
LEFT JOIN M3.MPLINE L ON C.PUNO = L.PUNO AND C.PNLI = L.PNLI AND C.PNLS = L.PNLS
LEFT JOIN M3.MPHEAD H ON C.PUNO = H.PUNO
WHERE C.PNLI <> '0'

CREATE VIEW BI_PackageTracking
-- drop view BI_PackageTracking
AS

SELECT MF.ITNO AS ITEM_NUMBER
      ,MT.POPN AS CUSTOMER_SKU
      ,MF.CUOR AS CUST_PO_NUMBER
      ,MF.DLIX AS DELIVERY_NUMBER
      ,MF.RIDN AS ORDER_NUMBER
      ,MF.PANR AS PACKAGE_NUMBER
      ,MF.DLQT AS SHIPPED_QUANTITY
      ,MF.GRWE AS PACKAGE_WEIGHT
      ,MP.DLRM AS CARRIER
      ,MP.ETRN AS TRACKING_NUMBER
      ,MF.RGDT AS ENTRY_DATE
      ,MP.CUNO AS CUSTOMER_NUMBER
      ,MP.PACO AS PACKAGE_LEVEL
FROM M3.MFTRNS MF
    LEFT JOIN M3.MPTRNS MP ON MF.PANR = MP.SSCC AND MF.DLIX = MP.DLIX AND (MP.PACO = 0 OR MP.PACO IS NULL OR MP.PACO IS NULL)
    LEFT JOIN M3.MITPOP MT ON MF.ITNO = MT.ITNO AND MT.E0PA = MP.CUNO AND ALWT = '6'
    LEFT JOIN M3.MHDISH MH ON MF.DLIX = MH.DLIX
WHERE MH.PGRS = 90 AND MH.RORC = 3

CREATE VIEW BI_PurchaseOrders
-- DROP VIEW BI_PurchaseOrders

AS

SELECT
    POL.PUNO AS [PO Number],
    POL.PNLI AS [PO Line],
    POL.PNLS AS [PO Line Subnumber],
    POL.PUSL AS [PO Line Status],
    CASE
        WHEN POL.PUSL BETWEEN 46 AND 90 THEN 'Received'
		ELSE 'Open'
    END AS [PO Status],
    POL.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    POL.ORQA AS [Order Qty],
	POL.RVQA AS [Received Qty],
    TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POL.RCDT)) AS [Last Received Date],
    POL.PUPR AS [Price],
	POL.LNAM AS [Total Amt],
    POL.WHLO AS [Final Warehouse],
    POL.PLDT AS [Planning Date],
    POL.SUDO AS [Container Number],

    POH.RGDT AS [Order Date],
    POH.DWDT AS [Factory Ready Date],
	POH.BUYE AS [Buyer],
    POH.SUNO AS [Supplier],
	POH.TEPY AS [Terms],
    POH.TEDL AS [Delivery Terms],
    POH.UCA2 AS [Origin Port Name],
    POH.UCA3 AS [Discharge Port Name],
	CASE
        WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'ARRIVES DISCHG PORT' THEN 'ARRIVES AT DISCHARGE PORT'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'ARRIVES WAREHOUSE' THEN 'ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'DOMESTIC ARRIVES WAR' THEN 'DOMESTIC ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'EX WORKS' THEN 'EX WORKS'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'LEAVES ORIGIN PORT' THEN 'LEAVES ORIGIN PORT'
		ELSE 'UNDEFINED'
    END AS [Product Receipt Type],
	POH.UCA5 AS [Final Destination],
	TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POH.UID1)) AS [ETA/ETD Date],
	POH.YRE1 AS [Reference Number],

    TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POD.ARDT)) AS [Arrival Date]

FROM M3.MPLINE POL

LEFT JOIN M3.MPHEAD POH ON POL.PUNO = POH.PUNO
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        PUNO,
        PNLI,
        PNLS,
        PUOS,
        ARDT
    FROM M3.MPLIND
    WHERE PUOS = '45') POD
ON POL.PUNO = POD.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = POD.PNLI AND POL.PNLS = POD.PNLS

WHERE
    POL.FACI = 'TLC' AND
    POL.PUSL BETWEEN 15 AND 90 AND
    POH.ORTY <> 'C01'

CREATE VIEW BI_PurchaseOrdersCharges
-- drop view BI_PurchaseOrdersCharges

AS

SELECT * FROM M3.MPOEXP
WHERE
    PUNO <> '`' AND
    CEID IN ('FREI01', 'FREI02', 'FREI03', 'FREVEN', 'SLSTAX') AND
    PNLI = '0'

CREATE VIEW BI_Returns
 --drop view BI_Returns

AS

--E90 Returns
SELECT 
    H.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    H.REPN AS [Receiving Number],
    L.RELI AS [Line Number],
    CASE
        WHEN L.REST IS NULL OR L.REST = '' THEN '05'
        ELSE L.REST
    END AS [Return Status],
    CASE
        WHEN L.REST IS NULL THEN 'No Lines Exist'
        WHEN L.REST = '11' THEN 'Quantity Advised'
        WHEN L.REST = '12' THEN 'Quantity Advised and Partly Received'
        WHEN L.REST = '13' THEN 'Quantity Advised and Partly Inspected'
        WHEN L.REST = '22' THEN 'Quantity Received'
        WHEN L.REST = '23' THEN 'Quantity Received and Partly Inspected'
        WHEN L.REST = '33' THEN 'Qty Inspected'
        WHEN L.REST = '90' THEN 'Deleted'
        WHEN L.REST = '99' THEN 'Closed'
        ELSE 'NA' 
    END AS [Return Status Description],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    L.SERN AS [Serial Number],
    L.WHSL AS [Location],
    L.RPA5 AS [Inspection Officer],
    TRY_CAST(
        LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.EPDT), 4) + '-' + 
        SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.EPDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
        RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.EPDT), 2)
        AS DATE
    ) AS [Return Date],
    L.REQ0 AS [Notified Quantity],
    L.REQ1 AS [Returned Quantity],
    L.REQ2 AS [Inspection Quantity],
    L.REQ3 AS [Approved Quantity],
    L.REQ4 AS [Returned to Supplier],
    L.REQ5 AS [Returned to Customer],
    L.REQ6 AS [Rejected Quantity],
    L.REQ7 AS [Credited Quantity],
    L.REQ8 AS [Repairable Quantity],
    L.SAPR AS [Sales Price],
    L.UCOS AS [Cost Price],
    CASE 
        WHEN L.RSCD IS NOT NULL AND L.RSCD <> '' THEN L.RSCD
        WHEN H.RSCD IS NOT NULL AND H.RSCD <> '' THEN H.RSCD
        ELSE 'NA'
    END AS [Transaction Reason],
    CASE WHEN L.RSCD IS NULL OR L.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE C.TX40 END AS [Transaction Reason Description],
    L.CRES AS [Credit Status],
    CASE 
        WHEN L.CRES = '0' THEN 'Not Credited'
        WHEN L.CRES = '1' THEN 'Partly Credited'
        WHEN L.CRES = '2' THEN 'Fully Credited'
        ELSE 'NA' 
    END AS [Credit Status Description],
    H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    L.RORN AS [Reference Sales Order Number],
    L.RORL AS [Reference Sales Order Line],
    L.RORX AS [Reference Sales Order Suffix],
    L.RORC AS [Reference Sales Order Category],
    H.RERE AS [Return Responsible],
    H.RESL AS [Return Order Lowest Status],
    H.RESH AS [Return Order Highest Status],
    H.CRSB AS [Credit Lowest Status],
    H.CRSH AS [Credit Highest Status],
    H.EXIN AS [Reference Sales Invoice Number],
    H.YREF AS [Reference],
    H.ORTP AS [Return Type]
FROM M3.OCHEAD H
LEFT JOIN M3.OCLINE L ON H.REPN = L.REPN
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB C ON L.RSCD = C.STKY AND C.STCO = 'RSCD'


--RMA and X90
UNION ALL

SELECT
    L.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    H.ORNO AS [Receiving Number],
    L.PONR AS [Line Number],
    NULL AS [Return Status],
    NULL AS [Return Status Description],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    O.SERN AS [Serial Number],
    NULL AS [Location],
    NULL AS [Inspection Officer],
    TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 2) AS DATE) AS [Return Date],
    (L.IVQT * -1) AS [Notified Quantity],
    (L.IVQT * -1) AS [Returned Quantity],
    NULL AS [Inspection Quantity],
    (L.IVQT * -1) AS [Approved Quantity],
    NULL AS [Returned to Supplier],
    NULL AS [Returned to Customer],
    NULL AS [Rejected Quantity],
    (L.IVQT * -1) AS [Credited Quantity],
    NULL AS [Repairable Quantity],
    L.SAPR AS [Sales Price],
    L.UCOS AS [Cost Price],
    CASE WHEN O.RSCD IS NULL OR O.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE O.RSCD END AS [Transaction Reason],
    CASE WHEN O.RSCD IS NULL OR O.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE C.TX40 END AS [Transaction Reason Description],
    '2' AS [Credit Status],
    'Fully Credited' AS [Credit Status Description],
    H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Order Number],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Order Line],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Order Suffix],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Order Category],
    NULL AS [Return Responsible],
    NULL AS [Return Order Lowest Status],
    NULL AS [Return Order Highest Status],
    NULL AS [Credit Lowest Status],
    NULL AS [Credit Highest Status],
    NULL AS [Reference Sales Invoice Number],
    NULL AS [Reference],
    H.ORTP AS [Return Type]
FROM M3.ODHEAD H
LEFT JOIN M3.ODLINE L ON H.ORNO = L.ORNO AND H.EXIN = L.EXIN AND H.DLIX = L.DLIX
LEFT JOIN M3.OOLINE O ON L.ORNO = O.ORNO AND L.PONR = O.PONR AND L.POSX = O.POSX
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB C ON O.RSCD = C.STKY AND C.STCO = 'RSCD'

WHERE
    H.IVNO <> 0 AND
    H.YEA4 >= '2022' AND
    H.ORTP IN ('RMA','X90') AND
    L.LNCL <> 2

CREATE VIEW BI_StockTransactions
 --drop view BI_StockTransactions

AS

    SELECT
        S.ITNO AS [Item Number],
        S.TRDT AS [Transaction Date],
        S.TTYP AS [Transaction Type],
        S.RIDN AS [Order Number],
        S.RIDL AS [Order Line],
        S.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
        S.TRQT AS [Transaction Qty],
        S.NSTQ AS [New On Hand Balance],
        S.NSTT AS [New On Hand Balance per Transaction Date],
        S.TRPR AS [Inventory Accounting Price],
        S.MFCO AS [Acquisition Cost],
        S.CADT AS [Accounting Date],
        S.RFTX AS [Reference Text],
        S.BREF AS [Lot Ref],
        S.WHSL AS [Location],
        S.TRTP AS [Order Type],
        S.RESP AS [Responsible],
        S.RGDT AS [Entry Date],
        --S.RGTM AS [Entry Time],
        TIMEFROMPARTS(
            S.RGTM / 10000,
            (S.RGTM % 10000) / 100,
            S.RGTM % 100,
            0,
            0) AS [Entry Time],

        CAST(CAST(S.RGDT AS datetime) + CAST(TIMEFROMPARTS(
            S.RGTM / 10000,
            (S.RGTM % 10000) / 100,
            S.RGTM % 100,
            0,
            0) AS datetime)
                AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
                AT TIME ZONE 'Eastern Standard Time' AS date) AS [Eastern Entry Date],
        
        CAST(CAST(S.RGDT AS datetime) + CAST(TIMEFROMPARTS(
            S.RGTM / 10000,
            (S.RGTM % 10000) / 100,
            S.RGTM % 100,
            0,
            0) AS datetime)
                AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
                AT TIME ZONE 'Eastern Standard Time' AS time) AS [Eastern Entry Time]

    FROM M3.MITTRA S
    WHERE
        TRDT >= '2025-01-01' AND
        TTYP <> '99'

        --AND S.RIDN = '1000573900'
        --select * from M3.MITTRA where RIDN = '1000573900'
        --select * from M3.MITTRA where ITNO = 'XKA-2-008-02190'

CREATE VIEW BI_SupplierInvoiceDetails
-- Drop view BI_SupplierInvoiceDetails

AS

SELECT 
L.DIVI AS [Division],
L.YEA4 AS [Year],
L.RGDT AS [Entry Date],
L.ACDT AS [Accounting Date],
L.ACAM AS [Amount],
L.VONO AS [Voucher Number],
L.VTXT AS [Voucher Text],
L.TRCD AS [Transaction Code],
L.JRNO AS [Journal Number],
L.AIT1 AS [GL],
N.TX40 AS [GL Description],
L.AIT2 AS [Business Unit],
L.AIT3 AS [CC],
L.AIT4 AS [Brand],
S.SUNO AS [Supplier Number],
SN.SUNM AS [Supplier Name],
S.SUCL AS [Supplier Group],
S.APCD AS [Authorized User],
S.SINO AS [Supplier Invoice Number],
S.IVDT AS [Invoice Date],
S.RECO AS [Internal Reconciliation Code],
TRY_CAST(
        LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.REDE), 4) + '-' + 
        SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.REDE), 5, 2) + '-' + 
        RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.REDE), 2) AS DATE) AS [Reconciliation Date]
FROM M3.FGLEDG L
LEFT JOIN M3.FPLEDG S ON L.VONO = S.VONO AND L.JRNO = S.JRNO AND L.YEA4 = S.YEA4
LEFT JOIN M3.FCHACC N ON L.AIT1 = N.AITM AND N.AITP = 1
LEFT JOIN M3.CIDMAS SN ON S.SUNO = SN.SUNO
WHERE
        L.TRCD IN ('40', '41') AND
        L.FNCN = '120' AND -- 120 Approved Coded
        L.YEA4 >= '2025' AND
        L.AIT1 >= '600000' AND L.AIT1 < '800000' -- AP GLs

CREATE VIEW BI_TransferOrders
-- drop view BI_TransferOrders
as
SELECT          MGH.TRNR AS     [Transfer Order]
,               MGH.TRDT AS     [Create Date]
,               MGH.WHLO AS     [From Warehouse]
,               MGH.TWLO AS     [To Warehouse]
,               MGL.RESP AS     [Responsible]
,               MGL.PONR AS     [Order Line]
,               MGL.TRSH AS     [Line Status]
,               MGL.ITNO AS     [Item Number]
,               MM.ITDS AS      [Item Description]
,               MGL.TRQT AS     [Transfer Qty]
,               MGL.RPQT AS     [Reported Qty]
,               MGL.TRQT - MGL.RPQT AS [Open Qty]
FROM            M3.MGHEAD MGH
JOIN            M3.MGLINE MGL ON MGH.TRNR = MGL.TRNR
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON MGL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE           TRTP IN ('D02', 'D10', 'D11', 'D40', 'D60', 'D65', 'D82', 'OPR', 'PPN')

CREATE VIEW         v_Commercial_InventoryByLocationWithReceiptDates
-- drop view v_Commercial_InventoryByLocationWithReceiptDates
as

SELECT              A.*
,                   ISNULL([Incoming Qty],0) as [Incoming Qty]
,                   [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM
(
SELECT              IM.BUAR as [Division]
,                   IB.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   IM.ITDS as [Item Name]
,                   IM.ITCL as [Brand]
,                   IB.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,                   IW.WHNM as [Warehouse Name]
,                   IM.PRGP as [Procurement Group]
,                   STQT AS [On Hand Qty]
,                   ALQT AS [Allocated Qty]
,                   REQT AS [Reserved Qty]
,                   STQT - REQT AS [Available Qty]
FROM                DBO.M3_MITBAL IB
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON IB.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITWHL IW on IB.WHLO = IW.WHLO-- and IB.ITNO = IW.ITNO
--WHERE               STQT + ALQT > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT              X.[Item Number], X.[Warehouse], [Incoming Qty], [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM
(
SELECT              ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,                   SUM(ORQA) AS [Incoming Qty]
FROM                DBO.M3_MPLINE
WHERE               DWDT >= GETDATE()
GROUP BY            ITNO, WHLO
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT              ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,                   DWDT AS [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM                DBO.M3_MPLINE
WHERE               DWDT >= GETDATE()
) Y                 on X.[Item Number] = Y.[Item Number] AND X.[Warehouse] = Y.[Warehouse]
) B                 on A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number] AND A.[Warehouse] = B.[Warehouse]

CREATE VIEW     v_GWT_Bridge_Test
as
SELECT			DISTINCT 'Syspro G' as ERP
,               NULL as [Line Status]
,               0 as [Order Stop Code]
,               'No Stop Code' as [Order Stop Code Description]
,               '7 - Invoiced' as [Qty Status]
,				AC.Customer as [Customer Number]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,               NULL as SalesRep
,               NULL as Territory
,               SM.ShipAddress1 as [Address 1]
,               SM.ShipAddress2 as [Address 2]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Zip Code]
,               AC.Telephone as [Phone Number]
,               SM.ShipAddress5 as [Country]
,               ATS.TermsCode as [Payment Terms]
,               NULL as [Cash Terms]
,               NULL as [Freight Terms]
,               NULL as [Carrier]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Sales Order]
,               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice Number]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,               NULL as [Order Type]
,               NULL as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,               SM.EntrySystemDate as [Entry Date]
,               SM.ReqShipDate as [Requested Date]
,               NULL as [DI Date]
,               ATD.InvoiceDate as [Inv Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,               ATD.DetailLine as [Line Number]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Item Number]
,				ISNULL(P.Description, IM.Description) as [Item Description]
,               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,               ATD.NetSalesValue/NULLIF(ATD.QtyInvoiced,0) as [Unit Price]
,               ATD.QtyInvoiced as [Order Qty]
,               ATD.QtyInvoiced as [Quantity]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P on GV.VisualPartID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorMaster SM on ATS.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2023-01-01'
and				DF.Company = 'G'

SELECT          OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,               CM.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,               OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order]
,               OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,               OH.ORDT AS [Order Date]
,               OH.RGDT AS [Entry Date]
,               OH.RLDT AS [Requested Delivery Date]
,               OH.ORTP AS [Order Type]
,               OH.SMCD AS [Salesperson]
,               OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,               OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,               OL.ORST AS [Line Status]
,               OL.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               IM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,               IM.BUAR AS [Business Area]
,               IM.ITCL AS [Brand]
,               IM.ITGR AS [Category]
,               IM.PDLN AS [Sub Category]
,               IM.PRGP AS [Procurement Group]
,               IM.SUNO AS [Supplier ID]
,               SM.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
,               OL.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               OL.ORQT AS [Order Qty]
,               OL.NEPR AS [Unit Price]
,               OL.ORQT*OL.NEPR AS [Sales Amt]
,               OL.UCOS AS [Unit Cost]
,               OL.ORQT*OL.UCOS AS [Cost Amt]
,               ODL.DLIX AS [Delivery Number]
,               ODL.IVNO AS [Invoice Number]
,               ODH.IVDT AS [Invoice Date]    
,               ODL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Qty]
FROM            M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN            M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_OCUSMA CM ON OH.CUNO = CM.CUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3_CIDMAS SM ON OL.SUNO = SM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3_ODLINE ODL ON OH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND OL.PONR = ODL.PONR
LEFT JOIN       M3_ODHEAD ODH ON OH.ORNO = ODH.ORNO AND ODL.DLIX = ODH.DLIX

content.query:
