--DROP EXTERNAL TABLE SLS.CostcoCatalog

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE SLS.CostcoCatalog (
[SKU] nvarchar(4000),
[Aligned Item Number] nvarchar(4000),
[M3 TLC Model] nvarchar(4000),
[Costco (US) ID] nvarchar(4000),
[Costco (US) Vendor #] nvarchar(4000),
[Costco (US) URL] nvarchar(4000),
[Costco (US) Unit Cost] nvarchar(4000)
)
WITH (
LOCATION = 'Salsify/CostcoCatalog_PowerBI.csv',
DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatQuote]
)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM SLS.CostcoCatalog
GO

SELECT          ODH.ORNO, ODL.DLIX, ODL.ITNO, ODL.IVQT, VLMM, PACL, PACW, PACH, GWTM
FROM            M3.ODHEAD ODH
JOIN            M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
LEFT JOIN       (SELECT DISTINCT DLIX, SORT, VLMM, PACL, PACW, PACH, GWTM FROM M3.MPTRNS) MPT ON ODL.DLIX = MPT.DLIX AND ODL.ITNO = MPT.SORT

select distinct Company
, [Order ID]
, CS.TX15
from a_SalesData a
LEFT JOIN M3.OOHEAD OH on a.[Order ID] = OH.[ORNO]
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB CS on OH.TEDL = CS.STKY AND STCO = 'TEDL'
LEFT JOIN ADC.oe_head oh
where [Division] = 'Commercial'
and [Date] >= '2023-01-01'





        SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Amt] as [Net Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               ship_via_code
,               [Cost ADC]
,               'adc' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Line Number]
FROM
(
select      COALESCE(SS.Division, SS2.Division) as Division
,           'ERP1' as Company
,           c.customer as [Customer ID]
,           c.name as [Customer Name]
,           oh.cu_po as [Customer PO]
,           cast(oh.[order] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Order ID]
,           cast(oh.[order] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Invoice ID]
,           oh.warehouse as [Warehouse]
,           oh.invc_date as [Date]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Sub-Brand], SS2.[Sub-Brand]) AS [Brand]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Finance Brand], SS2.[Finance Brand]) as [Finance Brand]
,			COALESCE(SS.Category, SS2.Category) as [Product Category]
,           i.item as [Part ID - Actual]
,           i.item as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,           COALESCE(SS.Description, SS2.Description) as [Part Description]
,           ol.vendor as [Supplier ID]
,           ol.q_itd*ol.price as [Sales Amt]
,           ol.q_itd as [Sales Qty]
,           ol.cost_a*ol.q_itd as [Cost ADC]
,           NULL as [Ship to City]
,           oh.state as [Ship to State]
,           oh.postal_code as [Ship to Zip Code]
,           oh.ship_via_code
from        ADC.oe_head oh
JOIN        ADC.oe_line ol on oh.[order] = ol.[order] and oh.invc_seq=ol.invc_seq and ol.q_comm <> 0
join        ADC.customer c on oh.customer = c.customer
join        ADC.item i on ol.item = i.item
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON i.item = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS2 ON i.item = SS2.[Item Number]
where           oh.company_oe = 'AD'
and             ol.company_oe = 'AD'
and             c.company_cu = 'AD'
and             i.company_it = 'AD'
and             ol.ar_flag = 'True'
and             oh.posted = 'True'
and             oh.post_date is not null
and             ol.invc_date is not null
and             ol.rec_type in ('I', 'C')
and             oh.invc_date >= '2023-01-01'
)A

SELECT DISTINCT         CASE WHEN ODL.NEPR * ODL.IVQT < 0 THEN 'Credit' ELSE 'Sales' END AS [Invoice Type]
,                       IM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,                       CASE WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03153', 'COM03154', 'COM03155', 'COM03156') THEN 'RDP' ELSE OC.SDST END AS BuyingGroup
,                        OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,                       OC.ALCU AS [AdCraft Customer Number]
,                       OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                       ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS [External Rep ID]
,                       CS.TX40 AS [External Rep Name]
,                       CASE WHEN /*CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OC.RESP = 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OC.RESP IN ('INDUSTRIAL', 'INDUS DEAL') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'INDUSTRIAL' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'MMCASSEY' THEN 'MMCASSEY'
                       WHEN */OC.ALCU IN (
                            'A-A-6005','ABC-0502','ACT-9780','ACT-9781','ALA-9476','ALA-9477','ALL-6626','ALL-6627','ALP-7889','ALP-7890','AMU-5961','AMU-5962','B-J-6165','B-J-6166','BOX-1188',
                            'BUD-0425','BUD-0426','BUR-7377','B-W-0100','B-W-0101','CHA-0275','CHA-4400','CHA-4401','CHE-5537','CLA-1112','COO-9830','C-R-1818','CUL-1190','DAR-9150','DON-0101',
                            'DON-0102','DON-0103','DON-0104','DON-0105','DUB-4431','DUC-0601','FED-0135','FED-0136','FET-0900','FOO-3010','FOO-8009','FOO-8010','FOO-9915','FOO-9916','FOU-0500',
                            'F-R-7022','HAW-2292','HOS-4170','HOT-2113','HOU-0920','INS-0230','INS-0231','KES-0110','KES-0111','KES-1629','KES-1634','KRE-0110','KRE-0111','LAG-0600','LAG-8540',
                            'LOU-5012','MID-5755','MIS-0690','NEL-1110','NEL-2424','NEL-3456','NEW-0788','OLY-0636','OMC-0234','PEN-9800','PEN-9801','PEO-1944','PEO-1945','PIT-0634','PIT-0635',
                            'RAP-0001','RES-0505','RES-0601','RES-0619','RES-0621','RES-8733','RES-8734','ROC-0101','ROC-6950','SAR-0070','SEA-4900','STA-1395','STA-1396','STA-1397','SUP-5455',
                            'TRI-0775','TUN-4941','WAC-0600','WAC-0601','WAS-0301','WOR-5965','ZAB-0500','ZAB-0501'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'SMW', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM02185', 'COM01934') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'SMW', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03154', 'COM03155') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'SER-0920','SER-0921','SPE-0155','SPE-0156','SUP-3622','SUP-3623','T-C-5454','T-C-5455','THO-1128','THO-1129','TRE-9420','TRE-9421','UNI-1602','UNI-1603','WES-6978',
                            'WES-9140','WES-9141','ZES-0400','ZES-0401'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN ('WAS-0300') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'PLM') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03153') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('PLM', 'ICE') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'A-A-3535','A-A-3536','ACE-0450','ACE-0451','ASS-0043','ASS-0044','B-G-0391','BBC-8828','BBC-8829','BOL-0100','BOL-0101','BUL-0100','BUL-0101','CAR-7430','CAR-7431',
                            'CAS-3151','CAS-3152','CEN-0575','CEN-0576','CHE-5536','COM-2912','COM-2913','CRE-0145','CRE-0146','C-T-3374','C-T-3375','DEA-5587','DEA-5588','DEP-1900','DEP-1901',
                            'DIC-0526','DON-1872','E-A-9333','E-A-9334','FAS-7221','FAS-7222','FEL-0150','FEL-0151','FIN-0450','FIN-0451','FOO-3011','FOO-7211','FOO-7212','GER-0400','GER-0401',
                            'GLO-6611','GLO-6612','GOL-0155','GOL-0156','GRO-3505','GRO-3506','HOR-4674','HOR-4675','J-E-0751','JEA-0700','JOH-9103','JOH-9104','KIR-0100','KIR-0101','LAF-4534',
                            'LAF-4535','MAC-4540','MAC-4541','MAN-7088','MAN-7089','MAR-0135','PUE-8857','PUE-8858'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.ALCU = 'JEA-0701' AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN RR.Region = 'East' AND IM.GRP4 IN ('PLM', 'ICE') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN RR.Region IN ('MW', 'West') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        END AS [Employee]
,                       ODH.ORNO AS [Sales Order]
,                       OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,                       IV.EXIN AS [Invoice Number]
,                       CAST(CAST(NULLIF(ODH.IVDT,0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date]
,                       IM.ITNO AS Item
,                       IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                       IM.PRGP AS [Item Type]
,                       IM.ITCL AS Brand
,                       ODL.WHLO AS Warehouse
,                       IM.BUAR AS Division
,                       ODL.IVQT AS [Inv Qty]
,                       CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT AS [Inv Amt]
--,                       ODL.DCOS AS [Inv Cost]
--,                       ISNULL(CH.CRAM, 0) * (CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT) / NULLIF (SUM(CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT) OVER (PARTITION BY ODH.ORNO) * 1.00, 0) AS [Customer Freight]
--,                       ODH.ORTP as [Order Type]
--,                       OC.OREF as [IC Flag]
--,                       ODH.TEDL as [Freight Terms]
,                       CS2.TX40+' - '+SC.TX40 AS [Product Category and Line]
,                       IM.GRP4 as [Product Class]
--,                       CG.A330 AS [Sales Admin]
--,                       OC.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                       CASE/* WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00063
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OC.RESP = 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .01
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00125
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00063
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OC.RESP IN ('INDUSTRIAL', 'INDUS DEAL') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .005
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'INDUSTRIAL' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00125
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'MMCASSEY' THEN .01*/
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'A-A-6005','ABC-0502','ACT-9780','ACT-9781','ALA-9476','ALA-9477','ALL-6626','ALL-6627','ALP-7889','ALP-7890','AMU-5961','AMU-5962','B-J-6165','B-J-6166','BOX-1188',
                            'BUD-0425','BUD-0426','BUR-7377','B-W-0100','B-W-0101','CHA-0275','CHA-4400','CHA-4401','CHE-5537','CLA-1112','COO-9830','C-R-1818','CUL-1190','DAR-9150','DON-0101',
                            'DON-0102','DON-0103','DON-0104','DON-0105','DUB-4431','DUC-0601','FED-0135','FED-0136','FET-0900','FOO-3010','FOO-8009','FOO-8010','FOO-9915','FOO-9916','FOU-0500',
                            'F-R-7022','HAW-2292','HOS-4170','HOT-2113','HOU-0920','INS-0230','INS-0231','KES-0110','KES-0111','KES-1629','KES-1634','KRE-0110','KRE-0111','LAG-0600','LAG-8540',
                            'LOU-5012','MID-5755','MIS-0690','NEL-1110','NEL-2424','NEL-3456','NEW-0788','OLY-0636','OMC-0234','PEN-9800','PEN-9801','PEO-1944','PEO-1945','PIT-0634','PIT-0635',
                            'RAP-0001','RES-0505','RES-0601','RES-0619','RES-0621','RES-8733','RES-8734','ROC-0101','ROC-6950','SAR-0070','SEA-4900','STA-1395','STA-1396','STA-1397','SUP-5455',
                            'TRI-0775','TUN-4941','WAC-0600','WAC-0601','WAS-0301','WOR-5965','ZAB-0500','ZAB-0501'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'SMW', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM02185', 'COM01934') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'SMW', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03154', 'COM03155') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'SER-0920','SER-0921','SPE-0155','SPE-0156','SUP-3622','SUP-3623','T-C-5454','T-C-5455','THO-1128','THO-1129','TRE-9420','TRE-9421','UNI-1602','UNI-1603','WES-6978',
                            'WES-9140','WES-9141','ZES-0400','ZES-0401'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN ('WAS-0300') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'PLM') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03153') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('PLM', 'ICE') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'A-A-3535','A-A-3536','ACE-0450','ACE-0451','ASS-0043','ASS-0044','B-G-0391','BBC-8828','BBC-8829','BOL-0100','BOL-0101','BUL-0100','BUL-0101','CAR-7430','CAR-7431',
                            'CAS-3151','CAS-3152','CEN-0575','CEN-0576','CHE-5536','COM-2912','COM-2913','CRE-0145','CRE-0146','C-T-3374','C-T-3375','DEA-5587','DEA-5588','DEP-1900','DEP-1901',
                            'DIC-0526','DON-1872','E-A-9333','E-A-9334','FAS-7221','FAS-7222','FEL-0150','FEL-0151','FIN-0450','FIN-0451','FOO-3011','FOO-7211','FOO-7212','GER-0400','GER-0401',
                            'GLO-6611','GLO-6612','GOL-0155','GOL-0156','GRO-3505','GRO-3506','HOR-4674','HOR-4675','J-E-0751','JEA-0700','JOH-9103','JOH-9104','KIR-0100','KIR-0101','LAF-4534',
                            'LAF-4535','MAC-4540','MAC-4541','MAN-7088','MAN-7089','MAR-0135','PUE-8857','PUE-8858'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.ALCU = 'JEA-0701' AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        WHEN RR.Region = 'East' AND IM.GRP4 IN ('PLM', 'ICE') THEN .01
                        WHEN RR.Region IN ('MW', 'West') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        ELSE 0
                        END AS [Employee Commission Rate] 
FROM                    M3.ODHEAD AS ODH 
LEFT JOIN               M3.ODLINE AS ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX 
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR
LEFT JOIN               M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
INNER JOIN              M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN               M3.OINVOH AS IV ON ODL.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND ODH.CUNO = IV.PYNO 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND IM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND cs.STCO = 'SMCD' 
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOCHRG AS CH ON ODH.ORNO = CH.ORNO AND CH.CRID = 'FRE002' AND ODH.DLIX = CH.DLIX
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB AS CS2 ON IM.ITGR = CS2.STKY AND cs2.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CUGEX1 AS CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CRPDLN SC ON IM.PDLN=SC.PDLN
LEFT JOIN               M3.RD_REGIONS RR ON RR.Store = LEFT(OL.CUOR, 3) and OC.CUNO = 'COM03156'
WHERE                    (ODH.IVNO <> '0')
AND                     CAST(CAST(NULLIF(ODH.IVDT,0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) BETWEEN '20240601' AND '20240630'
AND                     IM.GRP3 = 'ADM'

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT         CASE WHEN ODL.NEPR * ODL.IVQT < 0 THEN 'Credit' ELSE 'Sales' END AS [Invoice Type]
,                       IM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,                       CASE WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03153', 'COM03154', 'COM03155', 'COM03156') THEN 'RDP' ELSE OC.SDST END AS BuyingGroup
,                        OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,                       OC.ALCU AS [AdCraft Customer Number]
,                       OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                       ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS [External Rep ID]
,                       CS.TX40 AS [External Rep Name]
,                       CASE WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OC.RESP = 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OC.RESP IN ('INDUSTRIAL', 'INDUS DEAL') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'INDUSTRIAL' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'MMCASSEY' THEN 'MMCASSEY'
                        END AS [Employee]
,                       ODH.ORNO AS [Sales Order]
,                       OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,                       IV.EXIN AS [Invoice Number]
,                       CAST(CAST(NULLIF(ODH.IVDT,0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date]
,                       IM.ITNO AS Item
,                       IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                       IM.PRGP AS [Item Type]
,                       IM.ITCL AS Brand
,                       ODL.WHLO AS Warehouse
,                       IM.BUAR AS Division
,                       ODL.IVQT AS [Inv Qty]
,                       CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT AS [Inv Amt]
--,                       ODL.DCOS AS [Inv Cost]
--,                       ISNULL(CH.CRAM, 0) * (CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT) / NULLIF (SUM(CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT) OVER (PARTITION BY ODH.ORNO) * 1.00, 0) AS [Customer Freight]
--,                       ODH.ORTP as [Order Type]
--,                       OC.OREF as [IC Flag]
--,                       ODH.TEDL as [Freight Terms]
,                       CS2.TX40+' - '+SC.TX40 AS [Product Category and Line]
,                       IM.GRP4 as [Product Class]
--,                       CG.A330 AS [Sales Admin]
,                       OC.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                       CASE WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00063
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OC.RESP = 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .01
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00125
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00063
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OC.RESP IN ('INDUSTRIAL', 'INDUS DEAL') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .005
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'INDUSTRIAL' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00125
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'MMCASSEY' THEN .01 ELSE 0
                        END AS [Employee Commission Rate] 
FROM                    M3.ODHEAD AS ODH 
LEFT JOIN               M3.ODLINE AS ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX 
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR
LEFT JOIN               M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
INNER JOIN              M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN               M3.OINVOH AS IV ON ODL.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND ODH.CUNO = IV.PYNO 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND IM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND cs.STCO = 'SMCD' 
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOCHRG AS CH ON ODH.ORNO = CH.ORNO AND CH.CRID = 'FRE002' AND ODH.DLIX = CH.DLIX
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB AS CS2 ON IM.ITGR = CS2.STKY AND cs2.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CUGEX1 AS CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CRPDLN SC ON IM.PDLN=SC.PDLN
LEFT JOIN               M3.RD_REGIONS RR ON RR.Store = LEFT(OL.CUOR, 3) and OC.CUNO = 'COM03156'
WHERE                    (ODH.IVNO <> '0')
AND                     CAST(CAST(NULLIF(ODH.IVDT,0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) BETWEEN '20240601' AND '20240630'
AND                     IM.GRP3 = 'ADM'

SELECT cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer Number]
    , [Customer Name]
    , SUM([ACAM]*-1) [Billed Freight Amount]
    , SUM(SD.[Sales Amt]) as Sales
    FROM M3.FGLEDG FG 
    JOIN (SELECT [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Invoice ID], SUM([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt] from a_SalesData SD 
              LEFT JOIN BI_ItemMaster MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.[Item Number] 
              WHERE MM.Division = 'Commercial'
              AND SD.Warehouse IN ('DFF', 'DIW', 'DFD', 'DFS')
              AND SD.[Sales Type] = 'Sales'
              GROUP BY [Invoice ID], [Customer ID], [Customer Name]
              ) SD
  on LEFT(SUBSTRING(FG.VTXT,CHARINDEX(' 24',FG.VTXT)+1,LEN(FG.VTXT)),10) = SD.[Invoice ID] 
    WHERE FG.AIT1 = '431010' 
    AND AIT7 = 'OI201401' 
    AND ACDT BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-10-31'
    GROUP BY [Customer ID] , [Customer Name]

SELECT                      DISTINCT    [Part ID - Actual]
,                                       Brand
,                                       [Order ID]
,                                       Date
,                                       [Sales Qty]
,                                       SUM(Delivery2.IVQT) as [Total Invoiced Units]
,                                       SUM(CRAM) as [Total Freight]
,                                       SUM(CRAM)/NULLIF(SUM(Delivery2.IVQT),0) AS [Freight per Unit]
--,                                       CRAM/nullif([Sales Qty],0) as [Freight Charge per Unit]
FROM        a_SalesData     Sales
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODLINE       Delivery on Sales.[Order ID] = Delivery.ORNO and Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Delivery.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODLINE       Delivery2 on Sales.[Order ID] = Delivery2.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOCHRG       Charge on Sales.[Order ID] = Charge.ORNO and Delivery.DLIX = Charge.DLIX and Charge.CRID = 'FRE002'
WHERE       Sales.[Sales Type] = 'Sales'
AND         Sales.Company = 'M3'
AND         CRAM is not null
AND         CRAM > 0
GROUP BY        [Part ID - Actual], Brand, [Order ID], Date, [Sales Qty]

SELECT          'Bevles' as Brand, 'Erie' as Warehouse
,               IM.ITNO as [Item Number], IM.ITDS as [Item Description], BA.STQT - BA.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
FROM            M3_MITMAS IM
JOIN            M3_MITBAL BA ON IM.ITNO = BA.ITNO
WHERE           IM.BUAR = 'COM'
AND             IM.ITCL IN ('BEV')
AND             BA.WHLO IN ('EPA')
AND             PRGP = 'FG'
AND             ITGR NOT IN ('C113', 'C112')
AND             BA.STQT - BA.ALQT > 0
;



SELECT          CASE WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'General'
                WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'Maxx Cold'
                WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'Maxx Ice'
                WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'Omega' END as Brand
,               IM.ITNO as [Item Number], IM.ITDS as [Item Description], BA.STQT - BA.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
FROM            M3_MITMAS IM
JOIN            M3_MITBAL BA ON IM.ITNO = BA.ITNO
WHERE           IM.BUAR = 'COM'
AND             IM.ITCL IN ('GEN', 'MXC', 'MXI', 'OME')
AND             BA.WHLO IN ('PKY', 'SNV')
AND             PRGP = 'FG'
AND             ITGR NOT IN ('C113', 'C112')
AND             ITTY NOT IN ('210')
AND             BA.STQT - BA.ALQT > 0
;



SELECT         'Sapphire' Brand
,               IM.ITNO as [Item Number], IM.ITDS as [Item Description], BA.STQT - BA.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
FROM            M3_MITMAS IM
JOIN            M3_MITBAL BA ON IM.ITNO = BA.ITNO
WHERE           IM.BUAR = 'COM'
AND             IM.ITCL IN ('SAP')
AND             BA.WHLO = 'PKY'
AND             BA.STQT - BA.ALQT > 0
;

SELECT          A.*
,               B.[First Inventory Received]
FROM
(
SELECT          ITNO as [Item Number]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.Status
,               SUM(STQT) as [On Hand]
,               MIN(RGDT) as [First Entry Date]
,               CAST(CAST(NULLIF(MAX(IDDT),0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) as [Last Receipt Date]
,               CAST(CAST(NULLIF(MAX(ODDT),0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) as [Last Issue Date]
FROM            M3.MITBAL MT
JOIN            BI_ItemMaster IM on MT.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           TRDT <> 0
AND             WHLO NOT IN ('AMS', 'HKG', 'MEX', 'ITC', 'DDS', 'DFF', 'DFD', 'DIW', 'DIF', 'DFS', 'DIX', 'HKX')
GROUP BY        ITNO, Division, Brand, [Item Type], Status
) A

LEFT JOIN

(

SELECT          ITNO, MIN(TRDT) as [First Inventory Received]
FROM            M3.MITTRA
WHERE           TRQT > 0
AND             WHSL NOT LIKE 'GRN%'
GROUP BY        ITNO
) B             ON A.[Item Number] = B.ITNO


WHERE           [Last Issue Date] IS NULL
AND             [On Hand] <> 0
AND             [Item Type] = 'Finished Good'
AND             B.[First Inventory Received] < '2024-03-01'

CREATE VIEW v_Categories
as
SELECT      DISTINCT TX40+' - @'+ITGR AS Categories
FROM        M3.MITMAS MM 
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS ON MM.ITGR = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'ITGR'
;

CREATE VIEW v_SubCategories
AS
SELECT      DISTINCT SC.TX40+' - @'+SC.PDLN AS 'Sub Categories'
FROM        M3.CRPDLN SC
;

CREATE VIEW v_Brands
as
SELECT      DISTINCT TX40+' - @'+ITCL AS Brands
FROM        M3.MITMAS MM 
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS ON MM.ITCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'ITCL'
;

CREATE VIEW v_Warehouses
as
SELECT      WHNM+' - @'+WHLO as Warehouse
FROM        M3.MITWHL
WHERE       CONO = 100 and DIVI = 'TLC'
;

CREATE VIEW v_Suppliers
as
SELECT      SUNM+' - @'+SUNO AS Supplier
FROM        M3.CIDMAS

SELECT      ITNO, WHLO, SUNO
FROM        M3.MITBAL
WHERE       ITNO IN
(
'010A500'    
)

SELECT          MM.ITNO AS  [Item Number]
,               ITDS AS     [Item Description]
,               ITCL AS     [Brand]
,               PRGP AS     [Product Group]
,               CS1.TX40 AS [Product Group Description]
,               ITTY AS     [Item Type]
,               CS2.TX40 AS [Item Type Description]
,               ITGR AS     [Item Category]
,               CS3.TX40 AS [Item Category Description]
,               BUAR AS     [Business Area]
,               MF.CSNO AS  [HTS Code]
,               MM.CFI4 AS  [Trump Tariff]
FROM            M3.MITMAS MM
JOIN            M3.MITFAC MF on MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS1 ON CS1.STCO = 'PRGP' AND CS1.STKY = MM.PRGP
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON CS2.STCO = 'ITTY' AND CS2.STKY = MM.ITTY
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON CS3.STCO = 'ITGR' AND CS3.STKY = MM.ITGR

SELECT      *
FROM
(
SELECT      DISTINCT CASE WHEN W.WHLO IN ('PPN', 'EPV', 'EPA') THEN 'Zwigart'
            WHEN W.WHLO IN ('PKY', 'PKX') THEN 'Searcy'
            WHEN W.WHLO IN ('ARC', 'DIW') THEN 'Liavva'
            WHEN W.WHLO = 'WFL' THEN 'Ossa'
            WHEN W.WHLO = 'HNJ' THEN 'McLaughlin'
            WHEN W.WHLO IN ('PGL', 'SNV') THEN 'Banks'
            ELSE 'Unknown' end AS Responsible
,           W.WHLO AS WarehouseCode
,           W.WHNM AS WarehouseName
,           I.ITNO AS PartId
,           I.ITDS AS PartDescription
,           B.STQT AS Qty
,           B.STQT*F.APPR as InventoryValue
FROM        M3_MITWHL W
JOIN        M3_MITBAL B ON W.WHLO = B.WHLO
JOIN        M3_MITMAS I ON B.ITNO = I.ITNO
JOIN        M3_MITFAC F ON I.ITNO = F.ITNO
WHERE       1=1
AND         W.DIVI = 'TLC'
AND         F.FACI = 'TLC'
AND         B.STQT > 0
) a
WHERE       WarehouseCode = 'EPA'

SELECT      MM.ITNO, MM.ITDS, BAL.WHLO, SUM(STQT) AS OnHandApproved, SUM(QUQT) as OnHandInspect, SUM(RJQT) as OnHandReject
,           APPR--, (SUM(STQT)+SUM(QUQT)+SUM(RJQT))*APPR as InventoryValue
FROM        M3.MITBAL BAL
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON BAL.ITNO = BAL.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITFAC MF ON MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO AND MF.FACI = 'TLC'
GROUP BY    MM.ITNO, MM.ITDS, BAL.WHLO, APPR
HAVING      SUM(STQT) + SUM(QUQT) + SUM(RJQT) > 0



select itno, count(*) from m3.mitfac where FACI = 'TLC' group by itno having count(*) > 1
select * from m3.mitfac where itno = 'Z-131060-BLACK'

SELECT          DISTINCT OH.CUNO AS CUSTOMER_NUMBER
,               CM.CUNM AS CUSTOMER_NAME
,               OH.ORNO AS SALES_ORDER
,               OH.CUOR AS PO_NUMBER
,               OH.UCA3 AS BOL_ARN
,               OD.DLIX AS DELIVERY_NUMBER
,               OH.RASN AS RAIL_STATION
,               MPTRNS.ETRN AS EXTERNAL_TRACKING_NO
,               MPTRNS.DLRM AS REMARK
FROM            M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO

SELECT			'Syspro A' as Company
,               CASE WHEN AC.Customer IN ('ASBURY', 'BLAKFOO', 'BLAKESL', 
                                            'EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR', 'KOLDDRA', 'LEGIIND', 
                                            'OMEGPRO', 'ORIEN', 'QINGOTO', 'QINGSAN', 'ZEROLL')
                THEN 'Intercompany' else 'Not Intercompany' end as [Intercompany Flag]
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Invoice Date]
,               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,               SS.Division
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,               SS.Brand
,				SS.[Sub-Brand]
,				SS.[Product Line] as [Product Line]
,               SS.Category as [Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN NetSalesValue < 0 then 'Credit'
                WHEN QtyInvoiced < 0 then 'Credit'
                else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCA.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder

AND             NOT(QtyInvoiced = 0 and NetSalesValue = 0)

select          'ERP1' as Company
,               'Not Intercompany' as [Intercompany Flag]
,               c.customer as [Customer ID]
,               c.name as [Customer Name]
,               oh.cu_po as [Customer PO]
,               cast(oh.[order] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Order ID]
,               cast(oh.[order] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Invoice ID]
,               oh.invc_date as [Invoice Date]
,               oh.warehouse as [Warehouse]
,               COALESCE(SS.Division, SS2.Division) as Division
,               COALESCE(SS.[Finance Brand], SS2.[Finance Brand]) as [Finance Brand]
,               COALESCE(SS.Brand, SS2.Brand) as Brand
,	            COALESCE(SS.[Sub-Brand], SS2.[Sub-Brand]) as [Sub-Brand]
,		        COALESCE(SS.[Product Line], SS2.[Product Line]) as [Product Line]
,               COALESCE(SS.Category, SS2.Category) as [Category]
,               ol.item as [Part ID]
,			    COALESCE(SS.Description, SS2.Description) as [Part Description]
,               ol.q_itd*ol.price as [Sales Amt]
,               ol.q_itd as [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN ol.q_itd*ol.price < 0 then 'Credit'
                WHEN ol.q_itd < 0 then 'Credit'
                else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type]
from            ADC.oe_head oh
JOIN            ADC.oe_line ol on oh.[order] = ol.[order] and oh.invc_seq=ol.invc_seq and ol.q_comm <> 0
join            ADC.customer c on oh.customer = c.customer
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster SS on ol.item = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster SS2 on ol.item = SS2.[Salsify Item Number]
where           oh.company_oe = 'AD'
and             ol.company_oe = 'AD'
and             c.company_cu = 'AD'
and             ol.ar_flag = 'True'
and             oh.posted = 'True'
and             oh.post_date is not null
and             ol.invc_date is not null
and             ol.rec_type in ('I', 'C')
and             oh.post_date BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND '2021-12-31'
and             ol.item not in ('')
AND             NOT(ol.q_itd*ol.price = 0 and ol.q_itd = 0)

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CASE WHEN C.ID IN ('ASB001', 'V927830', 'BEV001', 'EX0001',

                                    'W01', 'Y01'
                                    )
                THEN 'Intercompany' else 'Not Intercompany' end as [Intercompany Flag]
,               CO.CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CO.CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               SL.INVOICE_ID as [Invoice ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Invoice Date]
,               COL.WAREHOUSE_ID as Warehouse
,               SS.Division
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,               SS.Brand
,				SS.[Sub-Brand]
,				SS.[Product Line] as [Product Line]
,               SS.Category as [Category]
,               COL.PART_ID as [Part ID]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.TOTAL_SHIPPED_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED < 0 then 'Credit'
                WHEN COL.TOTAL_SHIPPED_QTY < 0 then 'Credit'
                else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO

AND				COL.PART_ID NOT IN ('')
AND             NOT(COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED = 0 and COL.TOTAL_SHIPPED_QTY = 0)

SELECT			PO.ID AS								[PO Number]
,				PO.VENDOR_ID AS							[Supplier Number]
,				V.NAME AS								[Supplier Name]
,				PO.ORDER_DATE AS						[PO Place Date]
,				POL.LINE_NO								[Line Number]
,				POL.PART_ID								[Item Number]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,				POL.ORDER_QTY							[Order Qty]
,				POL.TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY					[Received Qty]
,				POL.LAST_RECEIVED_DATE					[Last Receipt Date]
,				POL.UNIT_PRICE							[Unit Cost]
,				POL.ORDER_QTY*POL.UNIT_PRICE			[Total Order Cost]
,				POL.TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY*POL.UNIT_PRICE	[Total Received Cost]
,				POL.ORIG_COUNTRY_ID						[Country]
FROM			ECM.PURCHASE_ORDER PO
JOIN			ECM.PURC_ORDER_LINE POL ON PO.ID = POL.PURC_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.VENDOR V on PO.VENDOR_ID = V.ID
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on POL.PART_ID = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE			POL.LAST_RECEIVED_DATE BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'
AND				POL.PART_ID IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Syspro Company A' as ERP
,				POH.PurchaseOrder as [PO Number]
,				POH.Supplier as [Supplier Number]
,				AP.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,				POH.OrderEntryDate as [PO Place Date]
,				POD.Line as [Line Number]
,				POD.MStockCode as [Item Number]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,				MOrderQty as [Order Qty]
,				MReceivedQty as [Received Qty]
,				MLastReceiptDat as [Last Received Date]
,				MPrice as [Unit Cost]
,				MPrice*MOrderQty as [Total Order Cost]
,				MPrice*MReceivedQty as [Total Received Cost]
FROM			SCA.PorMasterHdr POH
JOIN			SCA.PorMasterDetail POD on POH.PurchaseOrder = POD.PurchaseOrder
JOIN			SCA.ApSupplier AP on POH.Supplier = AP.Supplier
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on POD.MStockCode = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           MLastReceiptDat BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Syspro Company L' as ERP
,				POH.PurchaseOrder as [PO Number]
,				POH.Supplier as [Supplier Number]
,				AP.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,				POH.OrderEntryDate as [PO Place Date]
,				POD.Line as [Line Number]
,				POD.MStockCode as [Item Number]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,				MOrderQty as [Order Qty]
,				MReceivedQty as [Received Qty]
,				MLastReceiptDat as [Last Received Date]
,				MPrice as [Unit Cost]
,				MPrice*MOrderQty as [Total Order Cost]
,				MPrice*MReceivedQty as [Total Received Cost]
FROM			SCL.PorMasterHdr POH
JOIN			SCL.PorMasterDetail POD on POH.PurchaseOrder = POD.PurchaseOrder
JOIN			SCL.ApSupplier AP on POH.Supplier = AP.Supplier
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on POD.MStockCode = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           MLastReceiptDat BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Syspro Company G' as ERP
,				POH.PurchaseOrder as [PO Number]
,				POH.Supplier as [Supplier Number]
,				AP.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,				POH.OrderEntryDate as [PO Place Date]
,				POD.Line as [Line Number]
,				POD.MStockCode as [Item Number]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,				MOrderQty as [Order Qty]
,				MReceivedQty as [Received Qty]
,				MLastReceiptDat as [Last Received Date]
,				MPrice as [Unit Cost]
,				MPrice*MOrderQty as [Total Order Cost]
,				MPrice*MReceivedQty as [Total Received Cost]
FROM			SCG.PorMasterHdr POH
JOIN			SCG.PorMasterDetail POD on POH.PurchaseOrder = POD.PurchaseOrder
JOIN			SCG.ApSupplier AP on POH.Supplier = AP.Supplier
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on POD.MStockCode = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           MLastReceiptDat BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'

union all

SELECT          'Apprise' as ERP
,               [po-num]
,               po.[supplier-key]
,               [supplier-name]
,               [po-date]
,               [line-num]
,               [product-code]
,               IM.[Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               [qty-ordered]
,               [qty-received]
,               [receipt-complete-date]
,               [unit-cost]
,               [unit-cost]*[qty-ordered]
,               [unit-cost]*[qty-received]
FROM            APR.[po-trailer] po
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on po.[product-code] = IM.[Item Number]
join            APR.suppname sp on po.[supplier-key] = sp.[supplier-key]
where           [receipt-complete-date] BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'

SELECT      FS.CUNO AS          CustomerNumber
,           OC.CUNM AS          CustomerName
,           CINO AS             InvoiceNumber
,           IVDT AS             InvoiceDate
,           ACDT AS             PaidDate
,           OD.CUOR AS          CustomerPoNumber
,           OD.ITNO AS          ItemNumber
,           MM.ITDS AS          ItemDescription
,           CS.TX40 AS          Brand
,           OD.IVQT AS          InvoicedQuantity
--,           CUAM*-1 AS          PaidAmount
FROM        M3.FSLEDG FS
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON FS.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODLINE OD ON FS.CINO = OD.EXIN
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OD.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON MM.ITCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'ITCL'
WHERE       FS.CUNO IN
(
'50009', '50322', '50002', '50438', '50290', '50016',
'50481', '50742', '50218', '50018', '50025', '50582',
'50761'
)
AND         FS.TRCD = '20'
AND         ACDT BETWEEN '2023-08-01' AND '2023-11-30'

UNION ALL

SELECT			DISTINCT 
				RR.BILL_TO_CUST_ID AS			CustomerNumber
,				C.NAME AS						CustomerName
,				RR.INVOICE_ID AS				InvoiceNumber
,				RR.INVOICE_DATE AS				InvoiceDate
,				RR.LAST_PAID_DATE AS			PaidDate
,				RRL.CUSTOMER_PO_REF AS			CustomerPoNumber
,				RRL.PART_ID AS					ItemNumber
,				P.DESCRIPTION AS				ItemDescription
,				P.USER_1 AS						Brand
,				RRL.QTY	AS						InvoicedQuantity
--,				CASE WHEN RR.INVOICE_TYPE = 'MEMO' THEN RR.TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT*-1
--				ELSE RR.TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT
--				END AS							PaidAmount
FROM			ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE RR
JOIN			ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE_LINE RRL ON RR.INVOICE_ID = RRL.INVOICE_ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P ON RRL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			ECM.CUSTOMER C ON RR.BILL_TO_CUST_ID = C.ID
WHERE			RR.BILL_TO_CUST_ID IN
(
'HD1000', 'HOM003', 'LO4000', 'LO4001', 'LO4003',
'NO4564', 'NO4565', 'TA8583', 'CS8100', 'CS8101',
'HD1000'
)
AND				LAST_PAID_DATE BETWEEN '2023-08-01' AND '2023-11-30'

CREATE VIEW Prd_ItemMaster
-- drop view Prd_ItemMaster
AS

SELECT      [Item Number], [Item Name], [Main ERP]
,           B.[Brand Short Name], [Master Data Brand], [Master Data Finance Brand], [Master Data Division]
FROM        v_MainERP_Item A
LEFT JOIN   v_Brand_Item B on A.[Brand Short Name] = B.[Brand Short Name]
SELECT TOP 1000 * FROM sys.dm_exec_requests_history order by start_time desc

-- This query creates the SPS.Products view from the SLS.RawProdAuto table linked to the 
-- nightly refresh from Salsify CSV

--SELECT * FROM SLS.Products
--DROP VIEW SLS.Products
CREATE VIEW SLS.Products AS
SELECT 
  TRY_CAST([SKU] as varchar(4000)) 				                [SKU]
, COALESCE([Aligned Item Number], [SKU])                        [Aligned Item Number]
, TRY_CAST([UPC] as varchar(4000))        	              [UPC]
, TRY_CAST([EAN] as varchar(4000))        	              [EAN]
, TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU1] as varchar(4000)) 			        [Secondary SKU]
, TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU2] as varchar(4000)) 			        [Secondary SKU2]
, TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU3] as varchar(4000)) 			        [Secondary SKU3]
, TRY_CAST([Base Model SKU] as varchar(4000)) 			        [Base Model SKU]
, TRY_CAST([Brand] as varchar(4000)) 				            [Brand]
, TRY_CAST([Sub-Brand] as varchar(4000)) 			            [Sub-Brand]
, TRY_CAST([description] as varchar(4000)) 			            [description]
, TRY_CAST([Product Line] as varchar(4000)) 	                [Family (Product Line)]
, TRY_CAST([Category] as varchar(4000)) 		                [Product Subcategory]
, TRY_CAST([Subcategory] as varchar(4000)) 			            [Product Usage]
, TRY_CAST([Division] as varchar(4000)) 			    	    [Channel]
, TRY_CAST([Commercial / Residential] as varchar(4000))         [Commercial / Residential]
, TRY_CAST([Item Type] as varchar(4000)) 			            [Product Type]
, TRY_CAST([Status] as varchar(4000)) 			    	        [Status]
, TRY_CAST([NPR Date] as DATE)              			        [NPR Date]
, TRY_CAST([Customer Available Date] as DATE) 	                [Customer Available Date]
, TRY_CAST([Updated Customer Available Date] as DATE) 	        [Updated Customer Available Date]
, TRY_CAST([TLC Warehouse ETA] as DATE) 		                [TLC Warehouse ETA]
, TRY_CAST([Received in TLC Warehouse] as DATE)                 [Received in TLC Warehouse]	
, TRY_CAST([FOB Cost] as FLOAT) 				    	        [FOB Cost]
, TRY_CAST([Freight Cost] as FLOAT) 			    	        [Freight Cost]
, TRY_CAST([Landed Cost] as FLOAT) 			       	 	        [Landed Cost]
, TRY_CAST([Wholesale Price] as FLOAT) 			   	 	        [Wholesale Price]
, TRY_CAST([US Duty Rate % (HTC)] as FLOAT) 	    	        [US Duty Rate % (HTC)]
, TRY_CAST([Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)] as FLOAT) 		        [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)]
, TRY_CAST([Item Weight] as FLOAT)              		        [Item Weight]
, TRY_CAST([40 HC QTY] as FLOAT) 		            	        [40' HQ Container QTY]
, TRY_CAST([Exclusivity] as varchar(4000)) 			            [Exclusivity]
, TRY_CAST([Manufactured / Purchased] as varchar(4000)) [Manufactured / Purchased]
, TRY_CAST([Amazon ID (ASIN)] as varchar(4000)) [ASIN]

FROM
SLS.RAWProdAuto
WHERE [SKU]<>'SKU'

AS
SELECT [SKU],
       [Aligned Item Number],
       [CustName],
       [CustItem],
       [UPC],
       [Secondary SKU],
       [Secondary SKU2],
       [Secondary SKU3],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],

CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_SingleSKU 
-- drop view SLS.Products_SingleSKU 
-- select * from SLS.Products_SingleSKU 
as SELECT SKU as [Lookup SKU],
       [Aligned Item Number] as SKU,
       Brand,
       description,
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Type],
       Status,
       [NPR Date],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       Channel
FROM SLS.Products

CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_SingleSKU_F
as
SELECT *
FROM SLS.Products_SingleSKU_Temp
UNION
SELECT [SKU],
       [UPC],
       [SKU] as [Lookup SKU],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40 HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage]
FROM [SLS].[Products]
WHERE [Secondary SKU] is null
      AND [SKU] NOT IN (
                           select distinct [Lookup SKU] FROM SLS.Products_SingleSKU_Temp
                       )

CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_SingleSKU_Temp
as
SELECT [SKU],
       [UPC],
       [Secondary SKU] as [Lookup SKU],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40' HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage]
FROM [SLS].[Products]
WHERE [Secondary SKU] is not null
UNION
SELECT [SKU],
       [UPC],
       [Secondary SKU2] as [Lookup SKU],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40' HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage]
FROM [SLS].[Products]
WHERE [Secondary SKU2] is not null
UNION
SELECT [SKU],
       [UPC],
       [Secondary SKU3] as [Lookup SKU],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40' HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage]
FROM [SLS].[Products]
WHERE [Secondary SKU3] is not null

create view v_SalesData
-- drop view v_SalesData
as
SELECT          Division, Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], Warehouse, [Order Entry User]
,               cast([Order ID] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Order ID], Cast([Invoice ID] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Invoice ID], Date, Brand, [Product Category], [Part ID - Actual], [Part ID - Go Forward], [Part Description]
,               [Supplier ID], [Sales Amt], [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN [Invoice ID] IN ('70-8000757', '30-8000342', '30-8000345', ',70-8000832', '70-8000833', '20-8000101',
'30-8000354', '70-8000874', '70-8000578', '70-8000515', '70-8000859', '70-8000616', '30-8000305',
'70-8000621', '70-8000539', '70-8000538', 'LBL1006726', 'LBL8000214', 'LBL8000212', 'LBL8000247',
'LBL8000241', 'LBL8000234', 'LBL8000244', 'LBL8000228', 'LBL8000230', 'LBL8000221', 'LBL8000222',
'LBL8000242', 'LBN8000003'
) then 'Sales' when [Invoice ID] like '2400%' then 'Sales' when [Sales Qty] < 0 or [Sales Amt] < 0 then 'Returns' else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type],
CASE 
    -- AFS Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('AFS') 
            THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2023-02-01' THEN [Cost AFS]
            ELSE [Cost M3] 
        END

    -- Other Commercial Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Other Commercial')
             THEN
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2023-02-01' THEN [Cost L]
            ELSE [Cost M3] 
        END

    -- Zeroll Cost Logic
    WHEN Brand IN ('Zeroll')
             THEN
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2023-02-01' THEN [Cost L]
            ELSE [Cost M3] 
        END

    -- International Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'International' and Brand <> 'Kold Draft' 
            THEN 
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' THEN [Cost G]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Kold Draft Cost Logic
    WHEN [Brand] = 'Kold Draft'
            THEN 
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2021-04-01' THEN [Cost K]
           WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' THEN [Cost G]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Admiral Craft Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2023-11-01' THEN [Cost ADC]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Avanti Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Avanti') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2023-06-01' then [Cost APR]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Vinotemp Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Vinotemp') THEN [Cost M3]

    -- Westbend, Yonanas, Vinturi Cost Logic
    WHEN Brand IN ('West Bend', 'Yonanas', 'Vinturi', 'Jelly Belly') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2021-07-01' then [Cost WBM]
            WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Excalibur
    WHEN Brand IN ('Excalibur') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2021-05-01' then [Cost L]
            WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Omega
    WHEN Brand IN ('Omega') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2021-05-01' then [Cost O]
            WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Countertop Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Countertop') THEN
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
           ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Kalorik Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Kalorik') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END
    -- Default Logic
    ELSE [Cost M3]
END AS [Cost]
, [Ship to Name], [Ship to Address 1], [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code], [Bill to Name], [Bill to Address 1], [Bill to Address 2], [Bill to City], [Bill to State], [Bill to Zip Code]
                FROM
(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               A.[Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'a' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]
FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				SS.[Sub-Brand] as Brand
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCA.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCA.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AO_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AE_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = D.[Part ID]

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'l' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]

,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]

JOIN			SCL.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN		SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer
LEFT JOIN       SCL.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCL.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'

,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]

JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
LEFT JOIN       ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE_LINE SL ON CO.ID = SL.CUST_ORDER_ID AND COL.LINE_NO = SL.CUST_ORDER_LINE_NO
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON P.ID = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       ECM.CUST_ADDRESS CA ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = CA.CUSTOMER_ID AND CO.SHIP_TO_ADDR_NO = CA.ADDR_NO

LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON P.ID = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       WBM.CUST_ADDRESS CA ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = CA.CUSTOMER_ID AND CO.SHIP_TO_ADDR_NO = CA.ADDR_NO
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2020-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'

) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               [Cost K]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'k' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				'K' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID - Actual]
,				COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced, 0) as [Cost K]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCK.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCK.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCK.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCK.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCK.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCK.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'

) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, COALESCE(B.CUNO, A.[Customer ID]) as [Customer ID], COALESCE(B.CUNM, A.[Customer Name]) as [Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'av' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
    (
SELECT			SS.Division
,				'Avanti' as Company
,				[cust-code] as [Customer ID]
,				[cust-name] as [Customer Name]
,				[cust-po-number] as [Customer PO]
,                               NULL as [Order ID]
,				aih.[ref-num] as [Invoice ID]
,                               aii.[shipping-location-key] as Warehouse
,				aih.[ref-date] as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				aii.[item-code] as [Part ID - Actual]
,				COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], aii.[item-code]) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,                               aii.[item-name] as [Part Description]
,				p.[primary-supplier-key] as [Supplier ID]
,				CASE WHEN aih.[ref-num] like 'CM%' then [total-item-price]*-1 else [total-item-price] end as [Sales Amt]
,				CASE WHEN aih.[ref-num] like 'CM%' then qty*-1 else qty end as [Sales Qty]
,				aii.[total-sales-cost] as [Cost APR]
,                               aih.[ship-to-city] as [Ship to City]
,                               aih.[ship-to-state] as [Ship to State]
,                               aih.[ship-to-zip] as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
JOIN			APR.custname cn on aih.[cust-key] = cn.[cust-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.product p on aii.[item-key] = p.[product-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.category c on p.[category-key] = c.[category-key]
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON aii.[item-code] = SS.[Item Number]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= '2020-01-01'
AND				aih.[cust-key] NOT IN ('23117', '23124')
--AND             aih.[ref-num] NOT LIKE 'CM%'
AND             C.[system-id] = 'Avanti'

        ) A

LEFT JOIN

        (
SELECT          CUNO, CUNM, ALCU
FROM            M3.OCUSMA
        ) B     ON A.[Customer ID] = B.ALCU

        UNION ALL

        SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               [Cost ADC]
,               'adc' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
select      COALESCE(SS.Division, SS2.Division) as Division
,           'ERP1' as Company
,           c.customer as [Customer ID]
,           c.name as [Customer Name]
,           oh.cu_po as [Customer PO]
,           cast(oh.[order] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Order ID]
,           cast(oh.[order] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Invoice ID]
,           oh.warehouse as [Warehouse]
,           oh.invc_date as [Date]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Sub-Brand], SS2.[Sub-Brand]) AS [Brand]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Finance Brand], SS2.[Finance Brand]) as [Finance Brand]
,			COALESCE(SS.Category, SS2.Category) as [Product Category]
,           i.item as [Part ID - Actual]
,           i.item as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,           COALESCE(SS.Description, SS2.Description) as [Part Description]
,           ol.vendor as [Supplier ID]
,           ol.q_itd*ol.price as [Sales Amt]
,           ol.q_itd as [Sales Qty]
,           ol.cost_a*ol.q_itd as [Cost ADC]
,           NULL as [Ship to City]
,           oh.state as [Ship to State]
,           oh.postal_code as [Ship to Zip Code]
from        ADC.oe_head oh
JOIN        ADC.oe_line ol on oh.[order] = ol.[order] and oh.invc_seq=ol.invc_seq and ol.q_comm <> 0
join        ADC.customer c on oh.customer = c.customer
join        ADC.item i on ol.item = i.item
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON i.item = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS2 ON i.item = SS2.[Item Number]
where           oh.company_oe = 'AD'
and             ol.company_oe = 'AD'
and             c.company_cu = 'AD'
and             i.company_it = 'AD'
and             ol.ar_flag = 'True'
and             oh.posted = 'True'
and             oh.post_date is not null
and             ol.invc_date is not null
and             ol.rec_type in ('I', 'C')
and         oh.post_date >= '2020-01-01'
)A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost M3]/**A.[Sales Qty]*/ as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'vin' as test, [Ship to Name], [Ship to Address 1], [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               [Bill to Name], [Bill to Address 1], [Bill to Address 2], [Bill to City], [Bill to State], [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division 
,				'Netsuite' as Company
,				cast(E.id as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Customer ID]
,				E.altname as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,                               NULL as [Order ID]
,				cast(uniquekey as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Invoice ID]
,                               NULL as Warehouse
,                               NULL as [Order Entry User]
,				trandate as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				CAST(itemid as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], CAST(itemid as NVARCHAR(4000))) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				I.vendorname as [Supplier ID]
,			    amount as [Sales Amt]
,				itemcount as [Sales Qty]
,				SI.costestimate*-1.00/**-1.00/NULLIF(itemcount,0)*/ as [Cost M3]
,                       NULL as [Ship to Name]
,                       NULL as [Ship to Address 1]
,                       NULL as [Ship to Address 2]
,                       NULL as [Ship to City]
,                       NULL as [Ship to State]
,                       NULL as [Ship to Zip Code]
,                       NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]
FROM			NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			NET.Item I on SI.item = I.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Entity E on SI.entity = E.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Class C on I.class = C.id
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON CAST(itemid as NVARCHAR(4000)) = SS.[Item Number]
WHERE			trandate >= '2020-01-01'
--AND				amount > 0
AND				SI.[type] = 'CustInvc'
AND				itemid <> 'UNVERIFIED CREDITS'
) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost M3]/**A.[Sales Qty]*/ as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'M3' as test, [Ship to Name], [Ship to Address 1], [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               [Bill to Name], [Bill to Address 1], [Bill to Address 2], [Bill to City], [Bill to State], [Bill to Zip Code]
from
(
SELECT   distinct SS.Division
,         'M3' as Company
,          ODH.CUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer Name]
,          OL.CUOR COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer PO]
,          OL.ORNO AS [Order ID]
,          LE.CINO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Invoice ID]
,          OL.WHLO as Warehouse
,          OH.RESP as [Order Entry User]
,          LE.ACDT  as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,           IM.ITNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part ID - Actual]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], IM.ITNO) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,           SS.Description as [Part Description]
,           IM.SUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Supplier ID]
,           CASE WHEN MP.STRT = 'KIT' AND ODL.POSX = 0 THEN 0
            WHEN OH.ORTP IN ('E80', 'E90') and OL.SAPR*ODL.IVQT*LE.ARAT > 0 then OL.SAPR*ODL.IVQT*LE.ARAT*-1
            WHEN LE.CUAM = 0 THEN 0 
            WHEN LE.CINO = '2999910570' then 451*ODL.IVQT else  OL.SAPR*ODL.IVQT*LE.ARAT END as [Sales Amt]
,           CASE WHEN LE.CUAM = 0 then 0 else ODL.IVQT end as [Sales Qty]
,          CASE WHEN MP.STRT = 'KIT' AND ODL.POSX = 0 THEN 0 
           WHEN LE.CUAM = 0 then 0 ELSE ODL.DCOS END as [Cost M3]
,               COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OA2.CUNM, OC.CUNM) as [Ship to Name]
,               COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OA2.CUA1, OC.CUA1) as [Ship to Address 1]
,               COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OA2.CUA2, OC.CUA2) as [Ship to Address 2]
,          COALESCE(OA.TOWN, OA2.TOWN, OC.TOWN) AS [Ship to City]
,           COALESCE(OA.ECAR, OA2.ECAR, OC.ECAR) AS [Ship to State]
,          COALESCE(OA.PONO, OA2.PONO, OC.PONO) AS [Ship to Zip Code]
,               OC.CUNM as [Bill to Name], OC.CUA1 as [Bill to Address 1], OC.CUA2 as [Bill to Address 2], OC.TOWN as [Bill to City], OC.ECAR as [Bill to State], OC.PONO as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN                    M3.OOHEAD OH on ODH.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX AND LE.CINO = ODL.EXIN
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS on IM.ITGR = CS.STKY and cs.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB CS2 on IM.ITCL = CS2.STKY and cs2.STCO = 'ITCL'
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON IM.ITNO = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN               M3.MPDHED MP ON IM.ITNO = MP.PRNO AND MP.STRT = 'KIT'
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOADRE OA ON ODH.ORNO = OA.ORNO AND OA.ADRT = '1'
LEFT JOIN               M3.OCUSAD OA2 ON OC.CUNO = OA2.CUNO AND ODH.ADID = OA2.ADID AND ODH.ADID <> '' AND OA2.ADRT = '1'
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
and             IM.ITCL <> 'ZZZ'
AND             OC.OREF <> 'TLC INTERCOMPANY'
AND             ODH.ORNO NOT IN ('1000001170', '1000026212', '5000004149', '1000020120')
AND             LE.CINO NOT IN ('2400163940', '2999910397', '2999910571', '2400083573', '2400083579', '2400083575', '2400088771'
                                , '2400088775', '2400088773', '2400088788', '2400102150', '2400081300', '2400068696', '2400060092'
                                , '2400053326', '2400052745', '2400052544', '2400052542', '2400053348', '2400053347', '2400052543', '2400054060',
                                '2400054065', '2400053659', '2400060082', '2400060083', '2400054063', '2400054064', '2400053660', '2400058368',
                                '2400058376', '2400058378', '2400058380', '2400058374', '2400058366', '2400058382', '2400058372', '2400058358',
                                '2400058362', '2400058364', '2400058356',  '2400058360', '2400058384', '2400058370'
)

) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, 'LEGIONCUSTOMERID' as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], NULL as [Product Category], 'LEGIONPARTACTUAL' as [Part ID - Actual], 'LEGIONPARTGOFORWARD' as [Part ID - Go Forward], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]

,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'leg' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
