,				'Legion' as Company
,				'LEGIONCUSTOMERID' as [Customer ID]
,				Customer as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,                               NULL as [Order ID]
,				Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               Null as Warehouse
,				Date as [Date]
,				'Legion' as [Brand]
,               'Other Commercial' as [Finance Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				'LEGIONPARTACTUAL' as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               'LEGIONPARTGOFORWARD' as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			    Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
,                               NULL as [Ship to City]
,                               NULL as [Ship to State]
,                               NULL as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCK.LegionSales
WHERE                   Customer NOT LIKE '%GWT%'
AND                     Customer NOT LIKE '%GREENFIELD W%'
) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, 'ORIENCUSTOMERID' as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO], Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], NULL as [Product Category], 'ORIENPARTACTUAL' as [Part ID - Actual], 'ORIENPARTGOFORWARD' as [Part ID - Go Forward], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'orien' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT	Division
,				'Orien' as Company
,				CustomerID as [Customer ID]
,				CustomerName as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				NULL as [Order ID]
,                               NULL as [Invoice ID]
,                               NULL as Warehouse
,				Date as [Date]
,				'Orien' as [Brand]
,               NULL as [Finance Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				'ORIENPARTACTUAL' as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               'ORIENPARTGOFORWARD' as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			        Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
,                               NULL as [Ship to City]
,                               NULL as [Ship to State]
,                               NULL as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			        SCK.OrienSales
) A
) AS X

SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM ZDI.ContainerAuto
WHERE [Container Number(s)] IS NOT NULL AND [Carrier Name]='EUSU' AND TRY_CONVERT(date, [Invoice Date])>'6/30/2024'  -- AND [Container Number(s)] IS NOT NULL

SELECT TOP 100 [Carrier Name], Division, [Status], COUNT(*)
FROM ZDI.ContainerAuto
WHERE [Carrier Name]='EUSU'
GROUP BY [Carrier Name], Division, []
ORDER BY [Carrier Name]

SELECT TOP 100 Division, COUNT(*)
FROM ZDI.ContainerAuto
GROUP BY Division

SELECT      OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order], OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO], OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number], OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name], OL.WHLO as [Warehouse], OH.UCA9 as [Carrier Type]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number], OL.ORQT as [Order Qty]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       OL.ORST = '33'
AND         OL.WHLO = 'PKY'
AND         OH.ORTP = 'E14'
AND         OH.UCA9 IN ('LTL', 'FTL')
AND         OC.CUNO LIKE '7%'
--NON VALUE ADD AND LTL OR FTL
;

SELECT      OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order], OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO], OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number], OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name], OL.WHLO as [Warehouse], OH.UCA9 as [Carrier Type]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number], OL.ORQT as [Order Qty]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       OL.ORST = '44'
AND         OL.WHLO = 'PKY'
AND         OH.ORTP = 'E10'
AND         OH.UCA9 IN ('PAR')
AND         OC.CUNO LIKE '7%'
--VALUE ADD AND PAR
;

SELECT      OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order], OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO], OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number], OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name], OL.WHLO as [Warehouse], OH.UCA9 as [Carrier Type]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number], OL.ORQT as [Order Qty]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       OL.ORST <= '44'
AND         OL.WHLO = 'PKY'
AND         OH.ORTP = 'E10'
AND         OH.UCA9 IN ('LTL', 'FTL')
AND         OC.CUNO LIKE '7%'
--VALUE ADD AND LTL OR FTL
;

SELECT      [Sales Order], [Customer PO], [Line Status], [Customer Number], [Customer Name], [Warehouse]
,           [Carrier Type], [Item Number], [Order Qty], [Case Pack], [Case Qty Conversion]
FROM
(
SELECT      OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order], OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO], OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number], OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name], OL.WHLO as [Warehouse], OH.UCA9 as [Carrier Type]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number], OL.ORQT as [Order Qty]
,           MP.D1QT as [Case Pack], OL.ORQT/MP.D1QT*1.00 as [Case Qty Conversion]
,           CASE WHEN (round(OL.ORQT/MP.D1QT*1.00,0) - round(OL.ORQT/MP.D1QT*1.00,2)) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as CasePackBreak
,           SUM(CASE WHEN (round(OL.ORQT/MP.D1QT*1.00,0) - round(OL.ORQT/MP.D1QT*1.00,2)) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY OH.ORNO) AS Flag
--,           count(D1QT) 
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN        (SELECT DISTINCT ORNO, COUNT(PONR) AS LINE_CT FROM M3.OOLINE GROUP BY ORNO HAVING COUNT(PONR) > 1) LC ON OH.ORNO = LC.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MP ON OL.ITNO = MP.ITNO AND MP.PACT LIKE 'C%'
WHERE       OL.ORST <= '44'
AND         OL.WHLO = 'PKY'
AND         OH.ORTP = 'E14'
AND         OH.UCA9 IN ('PAR')
AND         OC.CUNO LIKE '7%'
) a
WHERE       Flag <> 0
--CONSOLIDATION
;


SELECT      OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order], OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO], OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number], OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name], OL.WHLO as [Warehouse], OH.UCA9 as [Carrier Type]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number], OL.ORQT as [Order Qty]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       OL.ORST <= '44'
AND         MM.PRGP IN ('CP', 'SP')
AND         OH.ORNO NOT IN
(
            SELECT  DISTINCT ORNO 
            FROM M3.OOLINE OL
            JOIN M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO 
            WHERE MM.PRGP NOT IN ('CP', 'SP')
)
AND         OC.CUNO LIKE '7%'
-- SPARE PARTS

SELECT          'M3' as ERP
,               CM.SUNO AS      [Supplier Number]
,               CM.SUNM AS      [Supplier Name]
,               FP.SINO AS      [Invoice]
,               MONTH(FP.ACDT) as [Paid Month]
,               YEAR(FP.ACDT) as [Paid Year]
,               SUM(CUAM) as [Paid Amount]
FROM            M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN            M3.CIDMAS CM ON FP.SUNO = CM.SUNO
WHERE           TRCD = 50
GROUP BY        CM.SUNO, CM.SUNM, FP.SINO, MONTH(FP.ACDT), YEAR(FP.ACDT)

SELECT inv.cuno, oc.cunm, inv.cino, inv.acdt, inv.cuam FROM M3.FSLEDG inv
join M3.ocusma oc on inv.cuno = oc.cuno
WHERE TRCD = '20'
and (CINO LIKE 'L%' OR CINO LIKE 'AA%')
AND ACDT >= '2024-06-01'
and ACDT <= '2024-06-30'

SELECT 		DISTINCT OC.CUNM AS CUSTOMER_NAME
,           OH.CUOR AS CUSTOMER_PO_NUMBER
,			ODH.ORNO AS SALES_ORDER_NUMBER
,			ODL.IVNO AS INVOICE_NUMBER
,			IVDT AS INVOICE_DATE
,			IM.ITNO AS ITEM
,			IM.ITDS AS ITEM_NAME
,			ODL.IVQT AS INVOICED_QTY
,			ODL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT AS INVOICED_AMT
FROM		M3_ODHEAD ODH
JOIN		M3_ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN        M3_OOLINE OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR
JOIN        M3_OOHEAD OH ON OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN 		M3_OCUSMA OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3_OOADRE OA on ODH.ORNO = OA.ORNO
JOIN 		M3_MITMAS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE       odl.ivno <> '0'
AND         OC.CUNO IN
(
'COM00055',
'COM00138',
'COM00259',
'COM00486',
'COM00884',
'COM00618',
'COM00628',
'COM01013',
'COM00252',
'COM00585',
'COM00623'
)

-- 2023-05-05 Upgrading for TLCSQL Data Warehouse
-- DBO.M3_ Becomes M3.
-- Must COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS M3 Data to union with other CI columns
-- Fixed Date Conversions for M3 Data since date fields are dates now.  
CREATE VIEW TLC_Sales_Cube
AS
-- SELECT TOP 10 * FROM TLC_Sales_Cube
-- drop view TLC_Sales_Cube
SELECT          CASE WHEN Brand in ('EXCALIBUR', 'OMEGA') then 'Countertop' else Division end as Division, Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO]
,               [Order ID], Date, Brand, [Product Category], [Part ID], [Part Description]
,               [Supplier ID], [Sales Amt], [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN [Sales Qty] >= 0 then 'Sales' else 'Returns' end as [Sales Type]
,               CASE WHEN Brand IN ('MAXX COLD', 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL', 'MAXX ICE', 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL', 'GENERAL', 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'DUURA') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020, 2021, 2022)        THEN [Cost AFS]
                WHEN Brand IN ('MAXX COLD', 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL', 'MAXX ICE', 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL', 'GENERAL', 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'DUURA') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2023) and MONTH(Date) IN (1)        THEN [Cost AFS]
                WHEN Brand IN ('MAXX COLD', 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL', 'MAXX ICE', 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL', 'GENERAL', 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'DUURA') AND YEAR(Date) = (2023) and MONTH(Date) > 1            THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('MAXX COLD', 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL', 'MAXX ICE', 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL', 'GENERAL', 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'DUURA') AND YEAR(Date) > (2023)                                THEN [Cost M3]

                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'ZEROLL') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020, 2021, 2022)                                                          THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'ZEROLL') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2023) and MONTH(Date) IN (1)                                                     THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'ZEROLL') AND YEAR(Date) >= (2023) and MONTH(Date) > 1                                                        THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'ZEROLL') AND YEAR(Date) > (2023)                                                                             THEN [Cost M3]

                WHEN Brand IN ('EMC')                                                                                                                               THEN [Cost G]

                WHEN Brand IN ('AVANTI') and YEAR(Date) IN (2023) and MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5)                                                                THEN [Cost APR]
                WHEN Brand IN ('AVANTI') and YEAR(Date) IN (2023) and MONTH(Date) >= 6                                                                              THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('AVANTI') and YEAR(Date) > (2023)                                                                                                    THEN [Cost M3]

                WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP', 'ELEMENT', 'APEX', 'BRAMA', 'WINEMATE', 'NON STOCK', 'MISCELLANEOUS', 'EPICUREANIST') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020, 2021)                                                                                     THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP') and YEAR(Date) = 2022 and MONTH(Date) IN (1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9)                                                             THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP') and YEAR(Date) = 2022 and MONTH(Date) IN (10,11,12)                                                                      THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP') and YEAR(Date) >= 2023                                                                                                   THEN [Cost M3]                                                                                                                             

                WHEN Brand IN ('KOLD DRAFT')                                                                                                                        THEN [Cost K]

                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EDGECRAFT', 'OTHER', 'MAGIC COOL') AND Company <> 'G'                                                               THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                              THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2021                                                      THEN [Cost G]*.75
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL                                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                   THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                               THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                         THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                     THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)        THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)    THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                         THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                     THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                       THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                                             THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                              THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                               THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                       THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                   THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                             THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                         THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)            THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)        THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                             THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                           THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                                                 THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                                  THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                                   THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                  THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                  THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)               THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)           THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                          THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                      THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                        THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                                        THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                                     THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                                THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                        THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                    THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)        THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)    THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)     THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12) THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                            THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                           THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                      THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('Edgecraft')                                                                                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]
                END as Cost
                FROM
(
(               
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               A.[Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'a' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT CASE WHEN DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'EXCALIBUR') THEN 'Commercial' ELSE DF.Division END as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand = 'OMEGA' THEN 'OMEGA AFS'
                WHEN DF.Brand = 'EXCALIBUR' THEN 'EXCALIBUR AFS'
				ELSE DF.Brand END AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(

FROM            v_SCA_AL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND

,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LB%' THEN 'BLAKESLEE' 
				WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LE%' THEN 'EXCALIBUR'
				WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LV%' THEN 'BEVLES' else DF.Brand end as [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost L]

,				aii.[item-code] as [Part ID]
,				aii.[item-name] as [Part Description]
,				p.[primary-supplier-key] as [Supplier ID]
,				CASE WHEN [ref-num] like 'CM%' then [total-item-price]*-1 else [total-item-price] end as [Sales Amt]
,				CASE WHEN [ref-num] like 'CM%' then qty*-1 else qty end as as [Sales Qty]
,				aii.[total-sales-cost] as [Cost APR]
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
JOIN			APR.custname cn on aih.[cust-key] = cn.[cust-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.product p on aii.[item-key] = p.[product-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.category c on p.[category-key] = c.[category-key]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= '2019-01-01'
AND				aih.[cust-key] NOT IN ('23117', '23124')
--AND             aih.[ref-num] NOT LIKE 'CM%'
AND             C.[system-id] = 'Avanti'
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost M3]/**A.[Sales Qty]*/ as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'vin' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			'Countertop' as Division
,				'Netsuite' as Company
,				cast(E.id as varchar(max)) as [Customer ID]
,				E.altname as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				cast(uniquekey as varchar(max)) as [Order ID]
,				trandate as [Date]
,				'VINOTEMP' as [Brand]
,				C.fullname as [Product Category]
,				CAST(itemid as varchar(max)) as [Part ID]
,				description as [Part Description]
,				I.vendorname as [Supplier ID]
,			    amount as [Sales Amt]
,				itemcount as [Sales Qty]
,				SI.costestimate/**-1.00/NULLIF(itemcount,0)*/ as [Cost M3]
FROM			NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			NET.Item I on SI.item = I.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Entity E on SI.entity = E.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Class C on I.class = C.id
WHERE			trandate >= '2019-01-01'
--AND				amount > 0
AND				SI.type = 'CustInvc'
AND				itemid <> 'UNVERIFIED CREDITS'

UNION ALL

SELECT   distinct CASE WHEN IM.ITCL IN ('BEV', 'BLA', 'DUUR', 'GEN', 'MXC', 'MXI', 'PGEN', 'PMXC', 'PMXI', 'POME', 'SAP') then 'Commercial'
            WHEN IM.ITCL IN ('AVA') then 'Compact' else 'Countertop' end as Division
,         'M3' as Company
,          ODH.CUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer Name]
,          OL.CUOR COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer PO]
,          ODH.ORNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Order ID]
,          cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)  as [Date]
,          CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END  as Brand
,          CS.TX40 as [Product Category]
,           IM.ITNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part ID]
,           IM.ITDS COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part Description]
,           IM.SUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Supplier ID]
,           OL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT as [Sales Amt]
,           ODL.IVQT as [Sales Qty]
,           OL.UCOS*ODL.IVQT as [Cost M3]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.PYNO = ODH.PYNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS on IM.ITGR = CS.STKY and STCO = 'ITGR'
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
--AND				LE.IVTP <> 'CN'
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, NULL as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, NULL as [Product Category], NULL as [Part ID], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'leg' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			'Commercial' as Division
,				'Legion' as Company
,				NULL as [Customer ID]
,				Customer as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				Invoice as [Order ID]
,				Date as [Date]
,				'LEGION' as [Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				NULL as [Part ID]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			    Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
FROM			SCK.LegionSales
WHERE           Customer NOT LIKE '%GWT%'
AND             Customer NOT LIKE '%GREENFIELD W%'
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, NULL as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, NULL as [Product Category], NULL as [Part ID], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'orien' as test
FROM
(
SELECT	Division
,				'Orien' as Company
,				CustomerID as [Customer ID]
,				CustomerName as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				NULL as [Order ID]
,				Date as [Date]
,				'ORIEN' as [Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				NULL as [Part ID]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			    Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
FROM			SCK.OrienSales
) A
)
) X

SELECT 		'*EXE' [PRFL_Process Flag]
,			'100' [CONO_Company]
,			MT.WHLO [WHLO_Warehouse]
,			'WS' [E0PA_Partner]
,			'WMS' [E065_Message type]
,			OH.CUNO [CUNO_Customer number]
,			ITNO [ITNO_Item number]
,			WHSL [WHSL_Location]
,			'1' [QTYP_Quantity Picked]
,			RIDL [RIDL_Order line]
,			RIDI [RIDI_Order index]
,			'1' [PLSX_Picking list suffix]
,			BREF [BREF_Lot Reference 1]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT 
JOIN       M3.OOHEAD OH ON MT.RIDN = OH.ORNO 
WHERE 		MT.RIDI IN('123879','126580','127333','130766','130768','127872','128727','128836','129104','129329','129342','129454','130009','130030','130132','130816')
AND MT.TTYP ='93'

SELECT 		DISTINCT TR.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           TR.DLIX as [Delivery Number]
,           OL.ORNO as [Order Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           TR.DLRM as [Carrier]
,           TR.ETRN as [Tracking]
FROM 		M3.MPTRNS TR
JOIN		M3.MHDISH MD ON TR.DLIX = MD.DLIX
JOIN 		M3.OOLINE OL ON MD.RIDN = OL.ORNO
JOIN 		M3.OOHEAD OH ON OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
WHERE 		OH.CUNO = 'COM00486'

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM M3.MPTRNS

SELECT      BAL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           COALESCE(SLS.[SKU], SLS2.[SKU]) as [SKU]
,           COALESCE(SLS.[Status], SLS2.[Status]) as Status
,           SUM(STQT) as [On Hand Qty]
FROM        M3.MITBAL BAL
LEFT JOIN   SLS.Products_BI SLS on BAL.ITNO = SLS.[M3 TLC Model]
LEFT JOIN   SLS.Products_BI SLS2 on BAL.ITNO = SLS2.SKU
WHERE       COALESCE(SLS.[Status], SLS2.[Status]) = 'Discontinued'
GROUP BY    BAL.ITNO, COALESCE(SLS.[SKU], SLS2.[SKU]), COALESCE(SLS.[Status], SLS2.[Status])
HAVING      SUM(STQT) > 10

SELECT      OBT.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement Number]
,           TX40 AS [Trade Agreement Description]
,           TX15 AS [Trade Agreement Name]
,           OBT2.TREC AS [Sales Rep ID]
,           OBT3.OBV2 as [Brand]
,           CSM.OBV1 as [Sales Territory]
,           OBT2.FVDT as [From Date]
,           OBT2.TVDT as [To Date]
FROM        M3.OBTRAG OBT
JOIN        M3.OBTREC OBT2 ON OBT.TAGN = OBT2.TAGN
JOIN        M3.OBTMTX OBT3 on OBT.TAGN = OBT3.TAGN and OBT2.TREC = OBT3.OBV1
JOIN        M3.CSMCDX CSM on OBT3.OBV2 = CSM.OBV2 and CSM.SMD1 = OBT2.TREC

CREATE VIEW v_ECM_EO_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_ECM_EO_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost O]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct 'Countertop' as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               REPLACE(REPLACE(P.ID, 'ZT-ZR', 'ZR'),'ZT', 'ZR') as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               CPC.COST*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost ECM]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
AND				P.USER_1 IN ('OMEGA')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				REPLACE(ATD.StockCode, 'ZT', 'ZR') collate database_Default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('EDG001', 'EDG002', 'EDG003')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				REPLACE(ATD.StockCode, 'ZT', 'ZR') collate database_Default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('EDG001', 'EDG002', 'EDG003')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW     v_M3_LandedCost
-- drop view v_M3_LandedCost
as
SELECT          A.*
,               [Total Weight]*1.0/NULLIF((SUM([Total Weight]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])),0) AS [Weight Pct]
,               [Total Weight]*1.0/NULLIF((SUM([Total Weight]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])),0)*1.0*(SUM([Freight Cost]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])) AS [Freight Calc]
,               [Total Weight]*1.0/NULLIF((SUM([Total Weight]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])),0)*1.0*(SUM([Freight Cost]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Container Number])) - [Freight Cost] as [Freight Diff] 
FROM            
(
SELECT          POH.PUNO AS [PO Number]
,               POL.PNLI AS [PO Line]
,               POL.PUSL AS [Line Status]
,               POL.ORCO AS [Country of Origin]
,               POL.WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,               LEFT(CAST(CAST(POL.DWDT as VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) AS [Expected Delivery Date]
,               POL.SUDO AS [Container Number]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               ITM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,               CST.TX40 AS [Category]
,               SUM(ORQA) as [Order Qty]
,               MAX(POL.PUPR) as [FOB CPU]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Landed Cost]),0)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) as [Landed CPU]
,               MAX(POL.PUPR) + ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Landed Cost]),0)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) AS [Total CPU]
,               (ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Line Haul]),0) + ISNULL(MAX([Final Mile]),0) + ISNULL(MAX([Acc & Oth]),0))/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0)*1.0 AS [Freight CPU]
,               MAX([Trump Tariff])*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) AS [Trump CPU]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Line Haul]),0)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) as [Line Haul CPU]
,               MAX([PMI Cost])*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA),0) AS [PMI CPU]
,               SUM(ORQA*POL.PUPR) as [FOB Cost]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Landed Cost]),0) AS [Landed Cost]
,               SUM(ORQA*POL.PUPR) + ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Landed Cost]),0) as [Total Cost]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Line Haul]),0) AS [Line Haul]
,               ISNULL(MAX([Final Mile]),0) AS [Final Mile]
,               ISNULL(MAX([Acc & Oth]),0) AS [Acc & Oth]
,               ISNULL(MAX(PCL.[Line Haul]),0) + ISNULL(MAX([Final Mile]),0) + ISNULL(MAX([Acc & Oth]),0) as [Freight Cost]
,               MAX(ITM.GRWE) as [Unit Gross Weight]
,               MAX(ITM.GRWE)*SUM(ORQA) as [Total Weight]
,               POL.CSNO AS [HTS Code]
,               ITM.CFI4 AS [Trump Amt]
,               MAX([Trump Tariff]) AS [Trump Tariff]
,               MAX([Trump Tariff])*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA*POL.PUPR),0) AS [Trump Calc Rate]
,               MAX([PMI Cost]) AS [PMI Cost]
,               MAX([PMI Cost])*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(ORQA*POL.PUPR),0) AS [PMI Rate]
FROM            M3_MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3_MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3_MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
LEFT JOIN      (
                SELECT          PUNO
,                               PNLI
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'DUTY' then RCAC end) as [Duty Rate]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'CREDIT' then RCAC end) as [Credit]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'PMI' then RCAC end) as [PMI Cost]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'TRUTAR' then RCAC end) as [Trump Tariff]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'FREI01' then RCAC end) as [Line Haul]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'FREI02' then RCAC end) as [Final Mile]
,                               MAX(CASE WHEN CEID = 'FREI03' then RCAC end) as [Acc & Oth]
,                               SUM(RCAC) AS [Landed Cost]
                FROM            M3_FGRPCL
                GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI
                ) PCL ON POH.PUNO = PCL.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = PCL.PNLI
WHERE           1=1
--AND             POL.SUDO = 'EITU1821405'
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO, POL.PNLI, POL.ORCO, POL.WHLO, POL.DWDT, POL.SUDO, ITM.ITNO, ITM.ITDS, CST.TX40, POL.PUPR, POL.CSNO, ITM.CFI4, POL.PUSL
) A

CREATE VIEW v_SalesData
AS

-- drop view v_SalesData
SELECT          Division, Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO]
,               [Order ID], Date, Brand, [Product Category], [Part ID], [Part Description]
,               [Supplier ID], [Sales Amt], [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR AFS', 'GENERAL', 'MAXX COLD', 'MAXX ICE', 'OMEGA AFS', 'SAPPHIRE')                                                   THEN [Cost AFS]

                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES')                                                                                                               THEN [Cost L]

                WHEN Brand IN ('EMC')                                                                                                                               THEN [Cost G]

                WHEN Brand IN ('AVANTI')                                                                                                                            THEN [Cost APR]

              WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP')                                                                                                                          THEN [Cost VINO]

                WHEN Brand IN ('KOLD DRAFT')                                                                                                                        THEN [Cost K]

                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EDGECRAFT', 'OTHER', 'MAGIC COOL') AND Company <> 'G'                                                               THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                              THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2021                                                      THEN [Cost G]*.75
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL                                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                   THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                               THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                         THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                     THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)        THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)    THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                         THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                     THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                       THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                                             THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                              THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                               THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                       THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                   THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                             THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                         THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)            THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)        THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                             THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                           THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                                                 THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                                  THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                                   THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                  THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                  THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)               THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)           THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                          THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                      THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                        THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                                        THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                                     THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                                THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                        THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                    THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)        THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)    THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)     THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12) THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                            THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                           THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                      THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('ZEROLL')                                                                                                                            THEN [Cost L]

                WHEN Brand IN ('Edgecraft')                                                                                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]
                END as Cost
                FROM
(
(               
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               A.[Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand = 'OMEGA' THEN 'OMEGA AFS'
                WHEN DF.Brand = 'EXCALIBUR' THEN 'EXCALIBUR AFS'
				ELSE DF.Brand END AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AO_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AE_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = D.[Part ID]
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LB%' THEN 'BLAKESLEE' 
				WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LE%' THEN 'EXCALIBUR'
				WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LV%' THEN 'BEVLES' else DF.Brand end as [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost L]
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCL.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				DF.Company = 'L'
AND				(AC2.Category NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY') or AC2.Category is NULL)
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A
)
--good
UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               [Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				DF.Brand
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost O]
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCO.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer

JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass

LEFT JOIN

UNION ALL

(

,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]

,               NULL as [Cost APR]

,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               [Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost VINO]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
--,				NULL as [Cost Visual]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'

and				DF.Company = 'G'

) A

LEFT JOIN

(

(

)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID]
,				ISNULL(P.Description, IM.Description) as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
--,				NULL as [Cost Visual]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode

WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				DF.Division = 'Countertop'
and				DF.Company = 'G'

) A

LEFT JOIN

(

) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND

)

UNION ALL

(

,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost VINO]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct CASE WHEN P.USER_1 = 'VINOTEMP' THEN 'Compact' ELSE 'Countertop' END as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               CPC.COST as [Cost ECM]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EAV_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EW_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EO_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = E.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EVINO_Cost
) F            on A.Division = F.Division and A.Company = F.Company and A.[Customer ID] = F.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = F.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = F.[Part ID]
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct 'Countertop' as Division
,               'Westbend' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               (UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST) as [Cost WBM]
FROM            WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            WBM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		WBM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               [Cost K]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			'Commercial' as Division
,				'K' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				'KOLD DRAFT' as Brand
,				IM.ProductClass as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced, 0) as [Cost K]
FROM			SCK.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCK.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCK.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCK.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A
)


UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			Distinct 'Compact' as Division
,				'Avanti' as Company
,				aih.[cust-key] as [Customer ID]
,				[cust-name] as [Customer Name]
,				[cust-po-number] as [Customer PO]
,				aih.[ref-num] as [Order ID]
,				aih.[ref-date] as [Date]
,				'AVANTI' as [Brand]
,				c.[short-description] as [Product Category]
,				aii.[item-key] as [Part ID]
,				aii.[item-name] as [Part Description]
,				p.[primary-supplier-key] as [Supplier ID]
,				[total-item-price] as [Sales Amt]
,				qty as [Sales Qty]
,				aii.[total-sales-cost] as [Cost APR]
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
JOIN			APR.custname cn on aih.[cust-key] = cn.[cust-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.product p on aii.[item-key] = p.[product-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.category c on p.[category-key] = c.[category-key]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= '2019-01-01'
AND				aih.[cust-key] NOT IN ('23117', '23124')
AND             aih.[ref-num] NOT LIKE 'CM%'
AND             C.[system-id] = 'Avanti'
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost VINO]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			'Compact' as Division
,				'Vinotemp' as Company
,				cast(E.id as varchar(max)) as [Customer ID]
,				E.altname as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				cast(uniquekey as varchar(max)) as [Order ID]
,				trandate as [Date]
,				'VINOTEMP' as [Brand]
,				C.fullname as [Product Category]
,				CAST(itemid as varchar(max)) as [Part ID]
,				description as [Part Description]
,				I.vendorname as [Supplier ID]
,			    amount as [Sales Amt]
,				itemcount as [Sales Qty]
,				SI.costestimate*-1/NULLIF(itemcount,0) as [Cost VINO]
FROM			NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			NET.Item I on SI.item = I.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Entity E on SI.entity = E.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Class C on I.class = C.id
WHERE			trandate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				amount > 0
AND				SI.type = 'CustInvc'
AND				itemid <> 'UNVERIFIED CREDITS'
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, NULL as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, NULL as [Product Category], NULL as [Part ID], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
FROM
(
SELECT			'Commercial' as Division
,				'Legion' as Company
,				NULL as [Customer ID]
,				Customer as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				Invoice as [Order ID]
,				Date as [Date]
,				'LEGION' as [Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				NULL as [Part ID]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			    Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
FROM			SCK.LegionSales
WHERE           Customer NOT LIKE '%GWT%'
AND             Customer NOT LIKE '%GREENFIELD W%'
) A
)
) X

SELECT      DISTINCT OH.ORNO as [Order Number]
,           OH.RLDT AS [Ship Date]
,           oh.uca7 as [Carrier]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OCD.CUNM) AS [Ship To Name]
,           COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OCD.CUA1) AS [Ship To Address 1]
,           COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OCD.CUA2) AS [Ship To Address 2]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
--JOIN        M3.MHDISH MH ON OH.ORNO = MH.RIDN
--JOIN        M3.MPTRNS MP ON MH.DLIX = MP.DLIX
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOADRE OA ON OH.ORNO = OA.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OCUSAD OCD ON OH.CUNO = OCD.CUNO AND OH.ADID = OCD.ADID
WHERE       OH.RLDT >= '2024-02-01'
and         oh.uca7 like '%UPS%'
AND         (OH.CUNO LIKE '7%' OR OH.CUNO LIKE '5%')
--AND         DLRM LIKE '%UPS%'
AND         (LEN(COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OCD.CUNM)) > 34 OR LEN(COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OCD.CUA1)) > 34 OR LEN(COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OCD.CUA2)) > 34)

SELECT      DISTINCT [Customer Number]
,           [Customer Name]
,           [Payment Terms]
,           [Sales Order]
,           [Customer PO]
,           [Entry Date]
,           [Requested Date]
,           SUM([Unit Price]*[Order Quantity]) as [Order Value]
FROM        V_OPENORDERSBYSTATUS
WHERE       [Customer Number] like 'COM%'
AND         [Order Stop Code] = 3
AND         [Qty Status] IN ('2 - Reserved/Backorder', '3 - Allocated')
GROUP BY    [Customer Number]
,           [Customer Name]
,           [Payment Terms]
,           [Sales Order]
,           [Customer PO]
,           [Entry Date]
,           [Requested Date]

--DROP VIEW ZDI.Container
CREATE VIEW ZDI.Container AS 
SELECT *, TRY_CONVERT(date, REPLACE(SUBSTRING([Filename], CHARINDEX('Report__', [Filename]) + 19, 10),'_', '/')) Filedate
FROM ZDI.ContainerRaw
WHERE TRY_CONVERT(date, REPLACE(SUBSTRING([Filename], CHARINDEX('Report__', [Filename]) + 19, 10),'_', '/')) IN (
	SELECT
    MAX(TRY_CONVERT(date, REPLACE(SUBSTRING([Filename], CHARINDEX('Report__', [Filename]) + 19, 10),'_', '/'))) FileDate
    FROM ZDI.ContainerRaw
)

SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM ZDI.Container
