	[Remit To State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Postal Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Status] nvarchar(4000),
	[References] nvarchar(4000),
	[Audit Detail] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'ZeroDown/Legacy_Report_*.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatQuote]
	)
GO

-- DROP VIEW a_SalesData
-- SELECT Brand, Sum([Sales Amt]), sum([Net Sales Amt]) from a_SalesData group by Brand
-- SELECT TOP 10 COUNT(*) FROM v_SalesData
CREATE VIEW a_SalesData AS
SELECT
 [D]     [Division]
,[C]     [Company]
,[CID]   [Customer ID]
,[CN]    [Customer Name]
,[CPO]   [Customer PO]
,[WH]    [Warehouse]
,[OID]  [Order ID]
,[IID]  [Invoice ID]
,[Date]
,[Brand]
,[PC]   [Product Category]
,[PIDA] [Part ID - Actual] 
,[PIGF] [Part ID - Go Forward]
,[DESC] [Part Description]
,[SID]  [Supplier ID]
,[Amt]  [Sales Amt]
,[NetAmt] [Net Sales Amt]
,[Qty]  [Sales Qty]
,[Type] [Sales Type]
, [STN] as [Ship to Name]
, SA1 as [Ship to Address 1]
, SA2 as [Ship to Address 2]
,[STC] [Ship to City]
,[STS] [Ship to State]
,[STZ] [Ship to Zip Code]
, BTN as [Bill to Name]
, BA1 as [Bill to Address 1]
, BA2 as [Bill to Address 2]
,[BTC] [Bill to City]
,[BTS] [Bill to State]
,[BTZ] [Bill to Zip Code]
,[Cost]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/Analytics/a_SalesData.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]

/* Pipeline Query 

SELECT 
 [Division]             [D]
,[Company]              [C]
,[Customer ID]          [CID]
,[Customer Name]        [CN]
,[Customer PO]          [CPO]
,[Warehouse]            [WH]
,[Cost]
,[Part ID - Go Forward] [PIDGF]
,[Part Description]     [DESC]
,[Supplier ID]          [SID]
,[Sales Amt]            [Amt]
,[Sales Qty]            [Qty]
,[Sales Type]           [Type]
,[Order ID]             [OID]
,[Invoice ID]           [IID]
,[Date]
,[Brand]
,[Product Category]     [PC]
,[Part ID - Actual]     [PIDA]
 FROM [dbo].[v_SalesData]

*/

CREATE VIEW c_SalesData
AS
--select * from c_SalesData
-- drop view c_SalesData
SELECT          Division, Company, [Customer ID] collate database_default as [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], Warehouse
,               cast([Order ID] as varchar(max)) as [Order ID], Cast([Invoice ID] as varchar(max)) as [Invoice ID], Date, Brand, [Product Category], [Part ID - Actual] collate database_default as [Part ID - Actual], [Part ID - Go Forward], [Part Description]
,               [Supplier ID], [Sales Amt], [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN [Sales Qty] < 0 or [Sales Amt] < 0 then 'Returns' else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type]
--,               [Cost M3] as Cost
                FROM
(
SELECT   distinct CASE WHEN IM.GRP2 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN IM.GRP2 = 'CMP' then 'Compact' 
            WHEN        IM.GRP2 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop' else 'TBD' end as Division
,         'M3' as Company
,          ODH.CUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer Name]
,          OL.CUOR COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer PO]
,          OL.ORNO AS [Order ID]
,          LE.CINO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Invoice ID]
,          OL.WHLO as Warehouse
,          LE.ACDT  as [Date]
,          CS2.TX40  as Brand
,          CS.TX40 as [Product Category]
,           IM.ITNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part ID - Actual]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], IM.ITNO) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,           IM.ITDS COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part Description]
,           IM.SUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Supplier ID]
,           CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT END as [Sales Amt]
,           ODL.IVQT as [Sales Qty]
--,          CASE WHEN MP.STRT = 'KIT' AND ODL.POSX = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.DCOS END as [Cost M3]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS on IM.ITGR = CS.STKY and cs.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB CS2 on IM.ITCL = CS2.STKY and cs2.STCO = 'ITCL'
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON IM.ITNO = SS.[Item Number] AND SS.Status NOT IN ('DEAD', 'DISCONTINUED')
LEFT JOIN               M3.MPDHED MP ON IM.ITNO = MP.PRNO AND MP.STRT = 'KIT'
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
--AND				LE.IVTP <> 'CN'
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
and             IM.ITCL <> 'ZZZ'
AND             OC.OREF <> 'TLC INTERCOMPANY'
AND             ODH.ORNO NOT IN ('1000001170', '1000026212', '5000004149', '1000020120')
) A

SELECT      DISTINCT MM.ITNO
,           ITDS
,           MM.GRP2
,           MM.GRWE
,           MP.PACT as each_pck
,           MP.PACL as each_L
,           MP.PACW as each_w
,           MP.PACH as each_h
,           Mt.D1QT as each_qty
,           MP2.PACT as case_pck
,           MP2.PACL as case_L
,           MP2.PACW as case_w
,           MP2.PACH as case_h
,           Mt2.D1QT as case_qty
,           MP3.PACT as pallet_pck
,           MP3.PACL as pallet_L
,           MP3.PACW as pallet_w
,           MP3.PACH as pallet_h
,           Mt3.D1QT as pallet_qty
,           SUM([Sales Amt])
FROM        M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MT ON MM.ITNO = MT.ITNO AND MT.PACT LIKE 'E%' AND PACT <>'E00000'
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPAC MP ON MT.PACT = MP.PACT
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MT2 ON MM.ITNO = MT2.ITNO AND MT2.PACT LIKE 'C%'
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPAC MP2 ON MT2.PACT = MP2.PACT
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MT3 ON MM.ITNO = MT3.ITNO AND MT3.PACT LIKE 'P%'
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPAC MP3 ON MT3.PACT = MP3.PACT
LEFT JOIN   a_SalesData SD on MM.ITNO = SD.[Part ID - Actual] AND Date >= GETDATE() - 365 AND [Sales Amt] > 0
GROUP BY    MM.ITNO
,           ITDS
,           MM.GRP2
,           MM.GRWE
,           MP.PACT
,           mp.PACL
,           mp.PACW
,           mp.PACH
,           mt.D1QT
,           mp2.PACT
,           mp2.PACL
,           mp2.PACW
,           mp2.PACH
,           mt2.D1QT
,           mp3.PACT
,           mp3.PACL
,           mp3.PACW
,           mp3.PACH
,           mt3.D1QT

select a.*, b.ivno, ''''+c.orno as orno, ''''+cuor as cuor
from
(
select distinct ''''+fs.CINO as cino from m3.fsledg fs
) a

left join

(
select			DISTINCT IVNO, ''''+EXIN as exin
from			m3.oinvoh
) b on a .CINO = b.EXIN

left join

(
select IVNO, ORNO
from M3.ODHEAD
) c on b.ivno = c.IVNO

left join

(
select orno, cuor
from m3.oohead
) d on c.orno = d.orno

SELECT          ITNO, ITDS, FUDS, ITCL, ITTY, MABU, PRGP, STCD, BOGR, PRGR
FROM            M3.MITMAS

select im.itno as item_number
,       itds as item_desc
, fuds as item_long_desc
, itcl as brand
, itgr as category
, cs.tx40 as category_desc
, prgp as item_type
, mabu as'make[1]_or_buy[2]'
, buar as business_area
, ilen as length
, iwid as width
, ihei as height
, grwe as gross_weight
, cfi4 as trump_tariff
, pupr as purchase_price
, suno as supplier
, sapr as sales_price
, mf.csno as hts_code
from m3.mitmas Im 
join m3.mitfac mf on im.itno = mf.itno
left join m3.csytab cs on im.itgr = cs.stky and cs.stco = 'ITGR'

SELECT       I.ITNO                  [ItemNumber]
            , ITNE                  [OriginalItemNumber]
            , ITDS                  [Description]
            , FUDS                  [LongDescription]
            , ITCL                  [Brand Code]
            , BR.TX15               [Brand]
            , CA.TX15               [Category]
            , ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')
              + CASE WHEN ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')=SC.TX40 THEN '' 
                     WHEN ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')<>''     THEN '|'+SC.TX40 
                     ELSE '' 
                END                 [Sub-Category]
            , 0.00                  [Cost]
            , PUPR                  [Price]
            , CASE MABU WHEN '1' THEN '1|MAKE'
                        WHEN '2' THEN '2|BUY'
              END                  [Make or Buy]
            , CASE WHEN PRGP='' THEN 'UP' 
                   ELSE PRGP 
              END
              +'|'+CP.TX15          [ItemType]
            , I.STAT                [Status]
            , I.SUNO                [SupplierNumber]
            , V.SUNM                [SupplierName]
            , F.ORCO                [OriginCountry]
            , U.POPN                [UPC]
FROM            M3.MITMAS I
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB BR ON I.ITCL=BR.STKY AND BR.STCO='ITCL'   --Brand Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB CA ON I.ITGR=CA.STKY AND CA.STCO='ITGR'   --Category Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CRPDLN SC ON I.PDLN=SC.PDLN                      --Sub-Category Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB CP ON I.PRGP=CP.STKY AND CP.STCO='PRGP'   --Comp or FG
     LEFT JOIN M3.CIDMAS V ON I.SUNO = V.SUNO
     LEFT JOIN M3.MITFAC F ON I.ITNO = F.ITNO AND F.FACI = 'TLC'
     LEFT JOIN M3.MITPOP U ON I.ITNO = U.ITNO AND U.ALWQ = 'UPC' AND U.ALWT = '2'
WHERE I.CONO='100'

CREATE VIEW     v_415_ATP_Report
--drop view v_415_ATP_Report
as
SELECT          DISTINCT ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               ITM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,               ITM.ITCL AS [Brand]
,               CASE WHEN ITM.ITCL IN ('GEN', 'DUUR', 'MXI', 'MXC', 'PGEN', 'PMXC', 'PMXI', 'SAP') then 'AFS'
                WHEN ITM.ITCL IN ('BEV', 'BLA') then 'Legacy'
                else 'Other' end as [Legacy Company]
,               ITB.WHLO AS [Warehouse] 
,               ITB.STQT AS [Quantity on Hand]
,               ITB.ALQT AS [Quantity Allocated]
,               ITB.STQT - ITB.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
,               ORQA AS [Quantity on Order]
,               YRE1 as [Reference]
,               POL.PUNO as [Purchase Order Number]
,               POH.RGDT as [Order Date]
,               POH.DWDT as [Factory Ready Date]
,               left(cast(nullif(CAST(POH.UID2 as varchar(10)),0) as date),10) as [ETA Date]
,               POH.UID1 as [ETD Date]
,               ITM.PRGP as [Procurement Group]
,               POH.PUST as [High Status]
,               POL.PUPR as [Purchase Price]
,               POL.LNAM as [Line Amount]
,               POH.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,               SM.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MITBAL ITB
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON ITB.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPLINE POL on ITM.ITNO = POL.ITNO and POL.WHLO = ITB.WHLO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPHEAD POH ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO      
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDMAS SM ON POH.SUNO = SM.SUNO
WHERE           ITB.WHLO IN ('PKY', 'SNV', 'HNJ')

                    WHEN ApInvoice.Branch = 'BL' then 'Blakeslee'
                    WHEN ApInvoice.Branch = 'BV' then 'Bevles'
                    else 'Legacy' end as Company
,                   CASE WHEN ApInvoice.Branch in ('BL', 'BV') then 'Commercial' else 'Countertop' end as BusinessUnit
,                   'Syspro L' as ERP
,                   ApInvoice.Supplier
,                   ApSupplier.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   ApInvoice.Invoice as Invoice
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.InvoiceDate, 110) AS InvoiceDate
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.DueDate, 110) AS DueDate

,                   'Avanti' as Company
,                   'Compact' as BusinessUnit
,                   'Apprise' as ERP
,                   sn.[supplier-code] as Supplier
,                   [remit-to-name]   as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   [reference-number]   as [Invoice Number]
,                   [invoice-date]   as InvoiceDate    
,                   [due-date]  as DueDate
,                   cast(datediff(day, [due-date], [invoice-date])*-1 as varchar(8)) as Terms
,                   [open-amount] as OutstandingBalance
FROM                [APR].[apinvhdr] ai
join                [APR].suppname sn on ai.[supplier-key] = sn.[supplier-key]
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on sn.[supplier-code] = TS.supplier
where               [open-amount] <> 0  
and                 [inv-status] <> 'Voided'
and                 ai.[system-id] = 'Avanti'

UNION ALL
*/

SELECT      Division
,           Company
,           BusinessUnit
,           'M3' as ERP
,           Supplier
,           [Supplier Name]
--,           [Master Name]
,           Category
,           Invoice
,           InvoiceDate
,           DueDate
,           Terms
,           [List]
,           [Terms Code]
,           [Days Aged]
,           Balance*-1 as [Outstanding Balance]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 end as [Current]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [1 - 30 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 31 and 60 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [31 - 60 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 61 and 90 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [61 - 90 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 91 and 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [91 - 180 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] > 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [180+ Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 - Balance*-1 end as [Past Due]
,           CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 end) <> 0 THEN 'Current'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '1-30'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 31 and 60 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '31-60'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 61 and 90 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '61-90'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 91 and 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '91-180'
            ELSE '180+' END as [Age Bucket]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 then 'Not Critical'
            WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then 'Not Critical'
            ELSE 'Critical' end as [Critical]
FROM
(
SELECT      SUNO, SINO, SUM(CUAM) AS BALANCE
FROM        M3.FPLEDG
WHERE       TRCD IN (40, 50)
AND         SINO NOT IN
(
SELECT      DISTINCT SINO
FROM        M3.FPLEDG
WHERE       IVTP = 'PR'
)
GROUP BY    SINO, SUNO
) A 

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      CASE WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'CNR' then 'Consumer'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services/Corporate'
            else 'TBD' end as Division
,           'M3' AS Company
,           CASE WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services/Corporate'
            else 'TBD' end as BusinessUnit
,           FP.SUNO AS Supplier
,           SU.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
--,           master_name as [Master Name]
,           CASE WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%ORIEN%' THEN 'I/C'
            WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%QINGDAO OTO%' THEN 'I/C'
            ELSE UPPER(CS.TX40) END as Category
,           FP.SINO as Invoice
,           FP.IVDT as InvoiceDate
,           FP.DUDT as DueDate
,           cast(FP.TEPY as varchar(8)) as Terms
,           CASE WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%ORIEN%' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
            WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%QINGDAO OTO%' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
            ELSE 'INCLUDE' end AS [List]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.IVDT, FP.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.DUDT, getdate()) as [Days Aged]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS SU ON FP.SUNO = SU.SUNO
--LEFT JOIN   SCA.TempSupp TS on SU.SUNO = TS.supplier
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON SU.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
WHERE       FP.TRCD = 40
AND         SU.SUNO <> '30274'
) B         on A.SINO = B.Invoice AND A.SUNO = B.Supplier
WHERE       round(Balance*-1,2) <> 0.00 and Supplier <> ''

create view v_AP_Aging_New
--drop view v_AP_Aging_New
as

--SELECT * FROM M3.FPLEDG WHERE SINO = '9302022'
-- reco = 9, AND REDE = PAID DATE

SELECT      A.Amount, B.*
FROM
(
SELECT      SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           SUM(CUAM*ARAT) as Amount
FROM        M3.FPLEDG
WHERE         RECO <> '9'
GROUP BY    SUNO, SINO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT CASE WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 in ('CMP', 'CNR') then 'Consumer'
            else 'Pending' end as Division
,           CASE WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial' 
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            else 'Pending' end as [Business Unit]
,           FP.SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           CM.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
,           SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           CASE WHEN FP.SUNO = '30514' AND FP.SINO = '2849' THEN '2017-12-11' ELSE IVDT END as [Invoice Date]
,           CASE WHEN FP.SUNO = '30514' AND FP.SINO = '2849' THEN '2017-12-11' ELSE DUDT END as [Due Date]
,           CS2.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.IVDT, FP.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
,           CS.TX40 as [Category]
,           CASE WHEN CV.PACD = '' then 'No Priority'
            WHEN CV.PACD = 'A' then 'Highest Priority'
            WHEN CV.PACD = '9' then 'Stopped'
            WHEN CV.PACD = '3' then 'Priority 3'
            ELSE 'Priority '+CV.PACD END as [Priority]
,           CASE WHEN IVTP in ('PR', 'CP' ,'RC') then 'Prepaid' else 'Not Prepaid' end as [Prepaid Flag]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS CM ON FP.SUNO = CM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON FP.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FP.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
WHERE       FP.TRCD = '40'
AND         FP.RECO <> '9'
) B         ON A.[Invoice Number] = B.[Invoice Number] and A.[Supplier Number] = B.[Supplier Number]

create view v_AP_Aging_Test2
--drop view v_AP_Aging_Test2
as

--SELECT * FROM M3.FPLEDG WHERE SINO = '9302022'
-- reco = 9, AND REDE = PAID DATE

SELECT      A.*, CASE WHEN B.[Prepaid Flag] = 'Prepaid' then 'Y' else 'N' end as [Prepaid], C.[PONumber]
FROM
(
SELECT      CASE WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 in ('CMP', 'CNR') then 'Consumer'
            else 'Pending' end as Division
,           CASE WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial' 
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            else 'Pending' end as [Business Unit]
,           FP.SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           CM.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
,           SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           IVDT as [Invoice Date]
,           DUDT as [Due Date]
,           CS2.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.IVDT, FP.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
,           CASE WHEN TRCD = 40 then 'Invoice' else 'Payment' end as [Transaction Type]
,           CUAM*ARAT AS [Amount]
,           CS.TX40 as [Category]
,           CASE WHEN CV.PACD = '' then 'No Priority'
            WHEN CV.PACD = 'A' then 'Highest Priority'
            WHEN CV.PACD = '9' then 'Stopped'
            WHEN CV.PACD = '3' then 'Priority 3'
            ELSE 'Priority '+CV.PACD END as [Priority]
,           FP.ACDT as [Accounting Date]
,           CASE WHEN FP.RECO = '9' then 'Reconciled' else 'Not Reconciled' END as [Reconciled Status]
,           FP.LMDT as [Record Update Date]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS CM ON FP.SUNO = CM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON FP.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FP.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT FP.SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           'Prepaid' as [Prepaid Flag]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS CM ON FP.SUNO = CM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON FP.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FP.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
WHERE       IVTP in ('PR', 'CP' ,'RC')
) B         on A.[Supplier Number] = B.[Supplier Number] and A.[Invoice Number] = B.[Invoice Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT FP.SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           FP.SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           RTRIM(LTRIM(SUBSTRING(LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI))),0,CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI)))) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CHARINDEX(' ',LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI)))) END))) as [PONumber]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.FPLEDX FX ON FP.CONO = FX.CONO AND FP.DIVI = FX.DIVI AND FP.JRNO = FX.JRNO AND FP.JSNO = FX.JSNO AND FP.YEA4 = FX.YEA4
WHERE       FX.PEXN = 402
AND         RTRIM(LTRIM(SUBSTRING(LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI))),0,CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI)))) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CHARINDEX(' ',LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI)))) END))) IS NOT NULL
) C         on A.[Supplier Number] = C.[Supplier Number] and A.[Invoice Number] = C.[Invoice Number]

create view     v_AP_Aging_Weekly
as
SELECT          /*Division
,               [Business Unit]
,               [Supplier Number]
,               [Supplier Name]
,               Category
,               DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) as [Days Aged Weekly]
,               [Accounting Date]
,               [Due Date]
,               [Prepaid]
,               */CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 0 then 'Current'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 31 then '1 - 30'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 61 then '31 - 60'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 91 then '61 - 90'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 121 then '91 - 120'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 181 then '121 - 180'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 366 then '181 - 365'
                ELSE '365+' end AS [Aging Buckets Weekly]
,               SUM(Amount*-1) as [Amount]
FROM            v_AP_Aging_Test2
WHERE           [Supplier Name] not like '%ORIEN%'
AND             [Supplier Name] not like '%QINGDAO OTO%'
GROUP BY        /*Division
,               [Business Unit]
,               [Supplier Number]
,               [Supplier Name]
,               Category
,               DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date])
,               [Accounting Date]
,               [Due Date]
,               [Prepaid]
,               */CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 0 then 'Current'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 31 then '1 - 30'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 61 then '31 - 60'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 91 then '61 - 90'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 121 then '91 - 120'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 181 then '121 - 180'
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], [Accounting Date]) < 366 then '181 - 365'
                ELSE '365+' end

                    else 'Legacy' end as Company

SELECT              'Consumer' as Division
,                   'Avanti' as Company
,                   'Compact' as BusinessUnit
,                   'Apprise' as ERP
,                   sn.[supplier-code] as Supplier
,                   [remit-to-name]   as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   [reference-number]   as [Invoice Number]
,                   [invoice-date]   as InvoiceDate    
,                   [due-date]  as DueDate
,                   cast(datediff(day, [due-date], [invoice-date])*-1 as varchar(8)) as Terms
,                   [open-amount] as OutstandingBalance
FROM                [APR].[apinvhdr] ai
join                [APR].suppname sn on ai.[supplier-key] = sn.[supplier-key]
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on sn.[supplier-code] = TS.supplier
where               [open-amount] <> 0  
and                 [inv-status] <> 'Voided'
and                 ai.[system-id] = 'Avanti'

UNION ALL
*/

SELECT      Division
,           Company
,           BusinessUnit
,           'M3' as ERP
,           Supplier
,           [Supplier Name]
--,           [Master Name]
,           Category
,           Invoice
,           InvoiceDate
,           DueDate
,           Terms
,           [List]
,           [Terms Code]
,           [Days Aged]
,           Balance*-1 as [Outstanding Balance]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 end as [Current]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [1 - 30 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 31 and 60 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [31 - 60 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 61 and 90 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [61 - 90 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 91 and 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [91 - 180 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] > 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [180+ Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 - Balance*-1 end as [Past Due]
,           CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 end) <> 0 THEN 'Current'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '1-30'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 31 and 60 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '31-60'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 61 and 90 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '61-90'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 91 and 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '91-180'
            ELSE '180+' END as [Age Bucket]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 then 'Not Critical'
            WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then 'Not Critical'
            ELSE 'Critical' end as [Critical]
FROM
(
SELECT      SUNO, SINO, SUM(CUAM) AS BALANCE
FROM        M3.FPLEDG
WHERE       TRCD IN (40, 50)
GROUP BY    SINO, SUNO
) A 

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      CASE WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'CNR' then 'Consumer'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services/Corporate'
            else 'TBD' end as Division
,           'M3' AS Company
,           CASE WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services/Corporate'
            else 'TBD' end as BusinessUnit
,           FP.SUNO AS Supplier
,           SU.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
--,           master_name as [Master Name]
,           CASE WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%ORIEN%' THEN 'I/C'
            WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%QINGDAO OTO%' THEN 'I/C'
            ELSE UPPER(CS.TX40) END as Category
,           FP.SINO as Invoice
,           FP.IVDT as InvoiceDate
,           FP.DUDT as DueDate
,           cast(FP.TEPY as varchar(8)) as Terms
,           CASE WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%ORIEN%' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
            WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%QINGDAO OTO%' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
            ELSE 'INCLUDE' end AS [List]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.IVDT, FP.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.DUDT, getdate()) as [Days Aged]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS SU ON FP.SUNO = SU.SUNO
--LEFT JOIN   SCA.TempSupp TS on SU.SUNO = TS.supplier
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON SU.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
WHERE       FP.TRCD = 40
AND         SU.SUNO <> '30274'
) B         on A.SINO = B.Invoice AND A.SUNO = B.Supplier
WHERE       round(Balance*-1,2) <> 0.00 and [Supplier] <> ''

CREATE VIEW     v_AR_Aging
-- drop view v_AR_Aging
as

SELECT      Division
,           Company
,           BusinessUnit
,           Customer_ID
,           Customer_Name
,           Invoice
,           Round(Balance, 2) as Balance
,           InvoiceDate
,           DueDate
,           AccountingDate
,           cast(Terms as varchar(8)) as Terms

FROM
(
SELECT      CINO, SUM(CUAM) AS BALANCE
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
WHERE       TRCD IN (10, 20)
GROUP BY    CINO
) A 

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      CASE WHEN SU.CFC3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CFC3 = 'CNR' then 'Consumer'
            WHEN SU.CFC3 = 'GWT' then 'International'
            else 'TBD'
            end as Division
,           'M3' AS Company
,           CASE WHEN SU.CUNO like 'COM%' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CUNO like '7%' then 'Consumer'
            WHEN SU.CUNO like '5%' then 'Compact'
            WHEN SU.CUNO like 'GWT%' then 'International'
            else 'TBD'
            end as BusinessUnit
,           FP.CUNO AS Customer_ID
,           SU.CUNM AS Customer_Name
,           FP.CINO as Invoice
,           FP.IVDT as InvoiceDate
,           FP.DUDT as DueDate
,           FP.ACDT as AccountingDate
,           cast(FP.TEPY as varchar(8)) as Terms
FROM        M3.FSLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA SU ON FP.CUNO = SU.CUNO
WHERE       FP.TRCD = 10
) B         on A.CINO = B.Invoice
and          Round(Balance,2) <> 0

/*
SELECT          'Consumer' as Division
,               AR.[system-id] as Company
,               'Compact' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[cust-key] as Customer_ID
,               C.[cust-name] as Customer_Name
,               cast(AR.[ref-num] as varchar(40)) as Invoice
,               AR.[open-amt] as Balance
,               AR.[ref-date] as Invoice_Date
,               AR.[due-date] as Due_Date
,               cast(datediff(day, [due-date], [ref-date])*-1 as varchar(8)) as Terms
FROM            APR.[ar-open] as AR  
Left join       APR.[custname] as C on C.[cust-key] = AR.[cust-key]  
where           [open-amt] <> '0'
AND             AR.[system-id] = 'Avanti'

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Consumer' as Division
,               'Edgecraft' AS Company
,               'Countertop' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.CUSTOMER_ID as Customer_ID
,               AC.NAME as Customer_Name
,               cast(AR.INVOICE_ID as varchar(40)) as Invoice
,               CASE WHEN AR.[SYS_CURR_TOTAL_AMT] < 0 THEN round( -(AR.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FRGHT_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FIN_CHARGE + TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT - TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT - WRITEOFF_APPLIED),2) 
                     WHEN AR.[SYS_CURR_TOTAL_AMT] > 0 THEN round((AR.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FRGHT_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FIN_CHARGE + TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT - TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT - WRITEOFF_APPLIED),2)
                     END AS Balance
,               AR.INVOICE_DATE as Invoice_Date
,               CASE WHEN T.NET_DAYS IS NULL THEN DATEADD(DAY, 0, AR.INVOICE_DATE) 
                    ELSE DATEADD(DAY, T.NET_DAYS, AR.INVOICE_DATE) END AS Due_Date
,               cast(T.NET_DAYS as varchar(8)) as Terms
FROM            ECM.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       ECM.RECEIVABLES_CUSTOMER AS AC ON AC.ID = AR.CUSTOMER_ID 
LEFT JOIN       ECM.SHARED_TERMS_RULE AS T ON T.ID = AR.TERMS_RULE_ID
WHERE           (AR.INVOICE_STATUS = 'OPEN') AND (YEAR(AR.INVOICE_DATE) >= '2020')
AND             CASE WHEN AR.[SYS_CURR_TOTAL_AMT] < 0 THEN round( -(AR.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FRGHT_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FIN_CHARGE + TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT - TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT - WRITEOFF_APPLIED),2) 
                     WHEN AR.[SYS_CURR_TOTAL_AMT] > 0 THEN round((AR.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FRGHT_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FIN_CHARGE + TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT - TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT - WRITEOFF_APPLIED),2)
                     END <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Commercial' as Division
,               'AFS' AS 'Company'
,               'Commercial' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               AR.[Invoice] as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCA.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCA.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCA.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Consumer' as Division
,               'Omega' AS 'Company'
,               'Countertop' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               AR.[Invoice] as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCO.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCO.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCO.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'


UNION ALL

SELECT          'Commercial' as Division
,               'KDI' AS 'Company'
,               'Commercial' AS BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               AR.[Invoice] as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCK.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCK.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCK.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'

UNION ALL

SELECT          'International' as Division
,               'GWT' AS 'Company'
,               'International' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               cast(AR.[Invoice] as varchar(40)) as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCG.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCG.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCG.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'

UNION ALL

SELECT          CASE WHEN AR.Branch in ('BC', 'BG', 'BL', 'BN', 'VA', 'VC', 'VE', 'VG', 'VN') then 'Commercial'
                ELSE 'Consumer' END as Division
,               CASE WHEN AR.Branch IN ('BC', 'BG', 'BL', 'BN') THEN 'Blakeslee' 
                WHEN AR.[Branch] IN ('EC', 'EE', 'EF', 'EG', 'EO', 'ER', 'EW') THEN 'Excalibur' 
                WHEN AR.[Branch] IN ('VA', 'VC', 'VE', 'VG', 'VN') THEN 'Bevles' 
                WHEN AR.[Branch] IN ('XR') THEN 'Kitchen Discount' 
                WHEN AR.[Branch] IN ('ZC', 'ZD', 'ZG', 'ZN', 'ZR', 'ZX') 
                THEN 'Zeroll' ELSE 'Legacy' END AS 'Company'
,               CASE WHEN AR.Branch in ('BC', 'BG', 'BL', 'BN', 'VA', 'VC', 'VE', 'VG', 'VN') then 'Commercial'
                ELSE 'Countertop' END as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               AR.[Invoice] as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCL.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCL.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCL.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Commercial' as Division
,               'Admiral' as Company
,               'Commercial' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[customer] as Customer_ID
,               C.name as Customer_Name
,               cast(AR.ar_id as varchar(40)) as Invoice
,               AR.[opn_balance] as Balance  
,               AR.[item_date] as InvoiceDate   
,               AR.[due_date] as DueDate
,               cast(datediff(day, [due_date], [item_date])*-1 as varchar(8)) as Terms
FROM            [ADC].[ar_main] as AR  
left join       [ADC].[customer] as C on C.customer = AR.customer  
where           opn_balance <> '0'
and             AR.company_ar = 'AD'
and             C.company_cu = 'AD'
*/

create view v_AR_Aging_Historical
--drop view v_AR_Aging_Historical
as
--select sum(Amount) from v_AR_Aging_Historical

SELECT      A.Amount, B.*
FROM
(
SELECT      CUNO as [Customer Number]
,           CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           SUM(CUAM*ARAT) as Amount
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
WHERE         /*RECO <> '9'
AND         */[ACDT] <= '2024-11-30'
GROUP BY    CUNO, CINO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT CASE WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'GWT%' then 'International'
            WHEN LEFT(OC.CUNO,1) in ('5', '7') then 'Consumer'
            end as Division
,           CASE WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE '7%' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE '5%' then 'Compact' 
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'GWT%' then 'International'
            end as [Business Unit]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           IVDT as [Invoice Date]
,           DUDT as [Due Date]
,           CS2.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FS.IVDT, FS.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
FROM        M3.FSLEDG FS
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC on FS.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FS.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
WHERE       FS.TRCD = '10'
AND         FS.RECO <> '9'
) B         ON A.[Invoice Number] = B.[Invoice Number] and A.[Customer Number] = B.[Customer Number]

create view v_AR_Aging_New
--drop view v_AR_Aging_New
as
--select sum(Amount) from v_AR_Aging_New

SELECT      A.Amount, B.*
FROM
(
SELECT      CUNO as [Customer Number]
,           CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           SUM(CUAM*ARAT) as Amount
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
WHERE       RECO <> '9'
GROUP BY    CUNO, CINO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT CASE WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'GWT%' then 'International'
            WHEN LEFT(OC.CUNO,1) in ('5', '7') then 'Consumer'
            end as Division
,           CASE WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE '7%' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE '5%' then 'Compact' 
            WHEN OC.CUNO LIKE 'GWT%' then 'International'
            end as [Business Unit]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           IVDT as [Invoice Date]
,           DUDT as [Due Date]
,           CS2.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FS.IVDT, FS.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
FROM        M3.FSLEDG FS
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC on FS.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FS.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
WHERE       FS.TRCD = '10'
AND         FS.RECO <> '9'
) B         ON A.[Invoice Number] = B.[Invoice Number] and A.[Customer Number] = B.[Customer Number]

CREATE VIEW     v_ATP_Report
--drop view v_ATP_Report
as
SELECT          DISTINCT ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               ITM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,               ITM.ITCL AS [Brand]
,               ITM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,               ITB.WHLO AS [Warehouse] 
,               ITB.STQT AS [Quantity on Hand]
,               ITB.ALQT AS [Quantity Allocated]
,               ITB.STQT - ITB.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
,               ORQA AS [Quantity on Order]
,               YRE1 as [Reference]
,               POL.PUNO as [Purchase Order Number]
,               POH.RGDT as [Order Date]
,               POL.DWDT as [Factory Ready Date]
,               left(cast(nullif(CAST(POL.UID2 as varchar(10)),0) as date),10) as [ETA Date]
,               POL.UID1 as [ETD Date]
,               ITM.PRGP as [Procurement Group]
,               POH.PUST as [High Status]
,               POL.PUPR as [Purchase Price]
,               POL.LNAM as [Line Amount]
,               left(cast(nullif(CAST(POL.RCDT as varchar(10)),0) as date),10) as [Receipt Date]
,               POH.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,               SM.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MITBAL ITB
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON ITB.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPLINE POL on ITM.ITNO = POL.ITNO and POL.WHLO = ITB.WHLO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPHEAD POH ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO      
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDMAS SM ON POH.SUNO = SM.SUNO

/*******************************************************************************************************
  Author:       Rene Villarreal
  Create Date:  August 2, 2022
  Description:  Create view v_ActualSales
********************************************************************************************************
SUMMARY OF CHANGES

Date                     Author                    Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
August 02, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Create original view
August 04, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added Brand from Part/InvMaster
August 11, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added Cost and Supplier
August 11, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added WB, Company O, and Excal from Company L
August 12, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added Company A
********************************************************************************************************/
--drop view v_ActualSales
CREATE VIEW v_ActualSales AS 
(

SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description],
  P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID],
  V.NAME as [Suppler Name],
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt],
  COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty],
  CPC.COST as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
  JOIN ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
  JOIN ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
  JOIN ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
  LEFT JOIN ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
  JOIN ECM.VENDOR V ON P.PREF_VENDOR_ID = V.ID
WHERE COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
  AND CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%' 
  AND C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Westbend' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description],
  P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID],
  V.NAME as [Suppler Name],
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt],
  COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty],
  CPC.COST as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
  JOIN WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
  JOIN WBM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
  JOIN WBM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
  LEFT JOIN ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
  JOIN WBM.VENDOR V ON P.PREF_VENDOR_ID = V.ID
WHERE COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2021-07-01'
  AND CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%' 
  AND C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM WBM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Company L' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC.Category as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  SB.Brand as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [Sales Qty],
  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCL.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
  JOIN SCL.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass
WHERE 
  SB.Company = 'L'
  AND SB.Brand IN ('Excalibur', 'Yonanas', 'Zeroll')
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0 
  AND AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND AC.Category <> 'GWT' 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Commercial' as Division,
  'Company L' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC.Category as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  SB.Brand as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [Sales Qty],
  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCL.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
  JOIN SCL.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass
WHERE 
  SB.Company = 'L'
  AND SB.Brand NOT IN ('Excalibur', 'Yonanas', 'Zeroll')
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0 
  AND AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND AC.Category <> 'GWT' 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Company G' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'GWT' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  CASE WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'CHEF' then 'Chefs Choice'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'EXCL' then 'Excalibur'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'OMEG' then 'Omega'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'VINT' then 'Vinturi'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'WEST' then 'WestBend'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'ZERO' then 'Zeroll'
  ELSE 'Yonanas' END as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [SalesQty],
  CPC.COST as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCG.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCG.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode 
  JOIN SCG.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  LEFT JOIN ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on IM.StockCode = CPC.ID
WHERE 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND OrderStatus IN ('9') 
  AND IM.ProductClass IN (
    'CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 
    'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP'
  ) 
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0



UNION ALL 



SELECT 
  'Commercial' as Division,
  'Company G' as Company, 
  AC2.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'GWT' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  SB.Brand as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID],

  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],

  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [Sales Qty],
  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCG.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCG.ArCustomer AC2 on SM.Customer = AC2.Customer 
  JOIN SCG.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
  JOIN SCG.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass

  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0

UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Company O' as Company, 
  AC2.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC2.UserField1 as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date],

  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],

  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM

  JOIN SCO.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass

  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0

UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Commercial' as Division,
  'Company A' as Company,

FROM

CREATE VIEW         v_AdCraftStockReport
-- drop view v_AdCraftStockReport
-- select * from v_AdCraftStockReport where [Item Number] = 'BWM-7-R'
as
SELECT              X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Category]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], 0) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
,                   CASE WHEN cast(CAST([ETA Date] as varchar(10)) as date) > GETDATE() + 3 THEN cast(CAST([ETA Date] as varchar(10)) as date)
                    ELSE NULL END  as [Available Date]
,                   [Kit Flag]
/*,                   CASE WHEN X.Warehouse = 'AAH' then 'Asheville, NC'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ACL' then 'Cleveland, OH'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ALA' then 'New Orleans, LA' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'AOR' then 'Orlando, FL' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'TPA' then 'Tampa, FL' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ACA' then 'Commerce, CA'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ANC' then 'National City, CA'
                    END as [Warehouse Name]*/
FROM
(
SELECT              DISTINCT WH.WHLO AS Warehouse, MM.ITNO as [Item Number], MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,                   CS.TX40 as [Category], 'Non-Kit' as [Kit Flag]
FROM                M3.MITWHL WH
CROSS JOIN          M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN           (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'ITGR') CS on MM.ITGR = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN           M3.MITFAC MF ON MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO          
WHERE               WH.DIVI = 'TLC'
--AND                 MM.STAT = '20'
AND                 MF.FACI = 'TLC'
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			BA.ITNO as [Item Number]
,				WHLO as [Warehouse]
,               AVAL - ALQT - SSQT as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
from			M3.MITBAL BA
) A ON          X.Warehouse = A.Warehouse and X.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ITNO, UID2 as [ETA Date]
FROM            M3.MPLINE
WHERE           ITNO+CAST(UID2 AS VARCHAR(MAX)) IN
(
SELECT          ITNO+CAST(MIN(UID2) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) as next_date
FROM            M3.MPLINE
GROUP BY        ITNO
)
and UID2 <> 0
) B             ON X.[Item Number] = B.ITNO

WHERE           X.[Item Number] NOT IN
(
    SELECT      DISTINCT PRNO
    FROM        M3.MPDMAT
    WHERE       STRT = 'KIT'
)

UNION ALL

SELECT              X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Category]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR((AVAL - ALQT - SSQT)*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
,                   NULL AS [ETA Date]
,                   [Kit Flag]
/*,                   CASE WHEN X.Warehouse = 'AAH' then 'Asheville, NC'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ACL' then 'Cleveland, OH'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ALA' then 'New Orleans, LA' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'AOR' then 'Orlando, FL' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'TPA' then 'Tampa, FL' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ACA' then 'Commerce, CA'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ANC' then 'National City, CA'
                    END as [Warehouse Name]*/
FROM
(
SELECT              DISTINCT WH.WHLO AS Warehouse, MM.ITNO as [Item Number], MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,                   CS.TX40 as [Category], 'Kit' as [Kit Flag], MP.MTNO AS [Component]
FROM                M3.MITWHL WH
CROSS JOIN          M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN           (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'ITGR') CS on MM.ITGR = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN           M3.MITFAC MF ON MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO
LEFT JOIN           M3.MPDMAT MP ON MM.ITNO = MP.PRNO
WHERE               WH.DIVI = 'TLC'
--AND                 MM.STAT = '20'
AND                 STRT = 'KIT'
AND                 MF.FACI = 'TLC'
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT PRNO as [Item Number]
,           MTNO
,           CNQT
,           MB.WHLO as Warehouse
,           STQT, ORQT, REQT, ALQT, AVAL, SSQT
FROM        M3.MPDMAT MP
JOIN        M3.MITBAL MB ON MP.MTNO = MB.ITNO
WHERE       STRT = 'KIT'
) A on X.Warehouse = A.Warehouse AND X.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number] AND X.Component = A.MTNO
GROUP BY X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Category], [Kit Flag]

CREATE VIEW         v_AdCraftStockReport_All
-- drop view v_AdCraftStockReport_All
as
SELECT              X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Sub-Brand], X.[Product Line], X.Category
,                   ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], 0) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
,                   [Kit Flag]
FROM
(
SELECT              DISTINCT WH.WHLO AS Warehouse
,                   MM.ITNO as [Item Number]
,                   IM.[Description] as [Item Description]
,                   IM.[Sub-Brand]
,                   IM.[Product Line]
,                   IM.Category
,                   'Non-Kit' as [Kit Flag]
FROM                M3.MITWHL WH
CROSS JOIN          M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN           (SELECT DISTINCT [Item Number], [Sub-Brand], [Finance Brand], [Product Line], [Category], [Description], Status FROM BI_ItemMaster WHERE [Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft') IM on MM.ITNO = IM.[Item Number] and IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft'      
WHERE               WH.DIVI = 'TLC'
AND                 IM.Status NOT IN ('Harvest', 'Discontinued')
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			BA.ITNO as [Item Number]
,				WHLO as [Warehouse]
,               AVAL - SSQT as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
from			M3.MITBAL BA
) A ON          X.Warehouse = A.Warehouse and X.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number]

WHERE           X.[Item Number] NOT IN
(
    SELECT      DISTINCT PRNO
    FROM        M3.MPDMAT
    WHERE       STRT = 'KIT'
)

UNION ALL

SELECT              X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Sub-Brand], X.[Product Line], X.Category
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR((AVAL - ALQT - SSQT)*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
,                   [Kit Flag]

FROM
(
SELECT              DISTINCT WH.WHLO AS Warehouse
,                   MM.ITNO as [Item Number]
,                   IM.[Description] as [Item Description]
,                   IM.[Sub-Brand]
,                   IM.[Product Line]
,                   IM.Category
,                   'Non-Kit' as [Kit Flag]
,                   MP.MTNO AS [Component]
FROM                M3.MITWHL WH
CROSS JOIN          M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN           (SELECT DISTINCT [Item Number], [Sub-Brand], [Finance Brand], [Product Line], [Category], [Description], Status FROM BI_ItemMaster WHERE [Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft') IM on MM.ITNO = IM.[Item Number] and IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft'      
LEFT JOIN           M3.MPDMAT MP ON MM.ITNO = MP.PRNO
WHERE               WH.DIVI = 'TLC'
AND                 IM.Status NOT IN ('Harvest', 'Discontinued')
AND                 STRT = 'KIT'
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT PRNO as [Item Number]
,           MTNO
,           CNQT
,           MB.WHLO as Warehouse
,           STQT, ORQT, REQT, ALQT, AVAL, SSQT
FROM        M3.MPDMAT MP
JOIN        M3.MITBAL MB ON MP.MTNO = MB.ITNO
WHERE       STRT = 'KIT'
) A on X.Warehouse = A.Warehouse AND X.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number] AND X.Component = A.MTNO
GROUP BY X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Sub-Brand], X.[Product Line], X.Category, [Kit Flag]

,           ISNULL(B.[AllocatedQty], 0) as [AllocatedQty]

(
    SELECT X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Category] 
, ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], 0) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
