create view v_Adjustments
as
SELECT        'Distributions' AS TransactionType, CASE WHEN TTYP = '50' THEN 'Distribution In' ELSE 'Distribution Out' END AS TransactionDesc, MT.RIDN AS OrderNumber, MT.WHLO AS Warehouse, MT.WHSL AS WarehouseLocation, 
                         MT.ITNO AS ItemNumber, MT.TRDT AS TransactionDate, MT.RESP AS TransactionUser, CASE WHEN FC.AITM IN ('131000', '134000') THEN TRQT ELSE TRQT * - 1 END AS TransactionQty, TRPR AS TransactionUnitPrice, 
                         (CASE WHEN FC.AITM IN ('131000', '134000') THEN TRQT ELSE TRQT * - 1 END) * TRPR AS TransactionValue, FC.AITM AS GlCode, FC.TX40 AS GlDescription, MT.ANBR AS AccountingNumber
FROM            M3.MITTRA MT JOIN
                         M3.CINACC CN ON MT.ANBR = CN.ANBR JOIN
                         M3.FCHACC FC ON CN.AIT1 = FC.AITM
WHERE        MT.TTYP IN ('50', '51')
UNION ALL
SELECT        'Adjustments' AS TransactionType, CASE WHEN TTYP = '40' THEN 'Adjustment In' ELSE 'Adjustment Out' END AS TransactionDesc, MT.RIDN AS OrderNumber, MT.WHLO AS Warehouse, MT.WHSL AS WarehouseLocation, 
                         MT.ITNO AS ItemNumber, MT.TRDT AS TransactionDate, MT.RESP AS TransactionUser, CASE WHEN FC.AITM LIKE '1%' THEN TRQT ELSE TRQT * - 1 END AS TransactionQty, TRPR AS TransactionUnitPrice, 
                         (CASE WHEN FC.AITM LIKE '1%' THEN TRQT ELSE TRQT * - 1 END) * TRPR AS TransactionValue, FC.AITM AS GlCode, FC.TX40 AS GlDescription, MT.ANBR AS AccountingNumber
FROM            M3.MITTRA MT JOIN
                         M3.CINACC CN ON MT.ANBR = CN.ANBR JOIN
                         M3.FCHACC FC ON CN.AIT1 = FC.AITM
WHERE        MT.TTYP IN ('40', '41')
UNION ALL
SELECT        'Physical Count' AS TransactionType, 'Physical Inventory' TransactionDesc, MT.RIDN AS OrderNumber, MT.WHLO AS Warehouse, MT.WHSL AS WarehouseLocation, MT.ITNO AS ItemNumber, MT.TRDT AS TransactionDate, 
                         MT.RESP AS TransactionUser, CASE WHEN FC.AITM LIKE '1%' THEN TRQT ELSE TRQT * - 1 END AS TransactionQty, TRPR AS TransactionUnitPrice, (CASE WHEN FC.AITM LIKE '1%' THEN TRQT ELSE TRQT * - 1 END) 
                         * TRPR AS TransactionValue, FC.AITM AS GlCode, FC.TX40 AS GlDescription, MT.ANBR AS AccountingNumber
FROM            M3.MITTRA MT JOIN
                         M3.CINACC CN ON MT.ANBR = CN.ANBR JOIN
                         M3.FCHACC FC ON CN.AIT1 = FC.AITM
WHERE        MT.TTYP IN ('90')

CREATE VIEW		v_AutoCommissions
-- drop view v_AutoCommissions
as
SELECT          A.[Customer Number], A.[Customer Name], A.[Order Number], A.[PO Number]
,               A.[Line Number], A.Brand, A.[Item Number], A.[Item Description]
,               A.[Invoice Number], [Invoice Date], Year, Month, [Invoice Amt], [Commission Amt]
,               [Sales Rep ID], [Sales Rep Name], [Trade Agreement Number], [Trade Agreement Description]
,               [Trade Agreement Name]
,               COALESCE(TOWN2, C.TOWN, A.City) as ShipToCity
,               COALESCE(ECAR2, C.ECAR, A.State) as ShipToState
,               COALESCE(PONO2, C.PONO, A.[Zip Code]) as ShipToZip
FROM
(
SELECT			distinct OBT.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,				OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,				OBT.ORNO AS [Order Number]
,               OH.CUOR AS [PO Number]
,				OBT.PONR AS [Line Number]
,				MI.ITCL AS [Brand]
,				OBT.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,				MI.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,				OBT.EXIN AS [Invoice Number]
,				CAST(NULLIF(CAST(IVDT AS VARCHAR(MAX)),0) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date]
,				OBT.YEA4 AS [Year]
,				OBT.PERI AS [Month]
,				OBT.ABOV AS [Invoice Amt]
,				OBT.ALBO AS [Commission Amt]
,				OBT.TREC AS [Sales Rep ID]
,				CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep Name]
,				OBT.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement Number]
,           	OBT2.TX40 AS [Trade Agreement Description]
,           	OBT2.TX15 AS [Trade Agreement Name]
,               OH.ADID AS [Address ID]
,               OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,               OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,               OC.TOWN as [City]
,               OC.ECAR as [State]
,               OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
FROM			M3.OBTTRA OBT
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTRAG OBT2 ON OBT.TAGN = OBT2.TAGN
LEFT JOIN		M3.OCUSMA OC ON OBT.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.MITMAS MI ON OBT.ITNO = MI.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS ON OBT.TREC = CS.STKY 
LEFT JOIN       M3.OOHEAD OH on OBT.ORNO = OH.ORNO
WHERE 			STCO = 'SMCD'
AND             OBT.CUNO NOT LIKE 'COM%'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ORNO
,               CUNM
,               CUA1
,               CUA2
,               TOWN
,               PONO
,               ECAR
,               CSCD
FROM            M3.OOADRE
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) C             on A.[Order Number] = C.[ORNO]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT CUNO
,               ADID as [Address ID 2]
,               CUNM as CUNM2
,               CUA1 AS CUA12
,               CUA2 AS CUA22
,               TOWN AS TOWN2
,               PONO AS PONO2
,               ECAR AS ECAR2
,               CSCD AS CSCD2
FROM            M3.OCUSAD
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) D             on A.[Customer Number] = D.[CUNO] and A.[Address ID] = D.[Address ID 2]

CREATE VIEW v_AvailableInventoryEDI
-- drop view v_AvailableInventoryEDI
as
SELECT      A.[Customer Number], A.[Customer Name], COALESCE(B.[Translated Item Number], A.[Item Number]) as [Item Number]
,           A.[Customer Item Number], A.[Item Description], A.UPC
--,           C.[Safety Stock Pct]
,           D.Warehouse
--,           D.[Allocatable Net]
--,           D.[Safety Stock]
,           CASE WHEN [Safety Stock Flag] = 0 THEN [Allocatable Net]
            WHEN [Safety Stock Flag] = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[Safety Stock Pct],0) = 100 THEN [Allocatable Net]
            ELSE [Allocatable Net] - [Safety Stock] end as [Available Inventory for Feed]
FROM
(
SELECT      OS.CUNO                                     AS [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM                                     AS [Customer Name]
,           OS.ITNO                                     AS [Item Number]
,           OS.POPN                                     AS [Customer Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS                                     AS [Item Description]
,           MP.POPN                                     AS [UPC]
,           CASE WHEN MAX(MQSS) = 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as [Safety Stock Flag]
FROM        M3.OCUSIT OS
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on OS.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC on OS.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPOP MP on OS.ITNO = MP.ITNO AND MP.ALWT = '02'
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSAFPR CS on OS.ITNO = CS.OBV1
GROUP BY    OS.CUNO, OC.CUNM, OS.ITNO, OS.POPN, MM.ITDS, MP.POPN--, MP2.POPN

UNION ALL

SELECT      OS.CUNO                                     AS [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM                                     AS [Customer Name]
,           OS.ITNO                                     AS [Item Number]
,           MP2.POPN                                    AS [Customer Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS                                     AS [Item Description]
,           MP.POPN                                     AS [UPC]
,           CASE WHEN MAX(MQSS) = 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as [Safety Stock Flag]
FROM        M3.OCUSIT OS
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on OS.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC on OS.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPOP MP on OS.ITNO = MP.ITNO AND MP.ALWT = '02'
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSAFPR CS on OS.ITNO = CS.OBV1
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPOP MP2 on OS.ITNO = MP2.ITNO AND MP2.E0PA = OS.CUNO AND MP2.ALWT = '09'
WHERE       MP2.POPN is NOT NULL
GROUP BY    OS.CUNO, OC.CUNM, OS.ITNO, OS.POPN, MM.ITDS, MP.POPN, MP2.POPN
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      EXTP                                        AS [Customer Number]
,           MVXD                                        AS [Item Number]
,           MBMD                                        AS [Translated Item Number]
FROM        M3.MBMTRD
WHERE       IDTR = 215
) B ON          A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number] and A.[Customer Number] = B.[Customer Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      OBV2                                        AS [Customer Number]
,           OBV1                                        AS [Item Number]
,           MQSS                                        AS [Safety Stock Pct]
FROM        M3.CSAFPR
) C         on A.[Customer Number] = C.[Customer Number] and A.[Item Number] = C.[Item Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      BAL.ITNO AS                         [Item Number]
,           BAL.WHLO AS                         [Warehouse]
,           BAL.AVAL - BAL.ALQT AS              [Allocatable Net]
,           BAL.SSQT AS                         [Safety Stock]
FROM        M3.MITBAL BAL
WHERE       BAL.AVAL - BAL.ALQT > 0
) D         on A.[Item Number] = D.[Item Number]

WHERE       CASE WHEN [Safety Stock Flag] = 0 THEN [Allocatable Net]
            WHEN [Safety Stock Flag] = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[Safety Stock Pct],0) = 100 THEN [Allocatable Net]
            ELSE [Allocatable Net] - [Safety Stock] end > 0

create view     v_Avanti_OpenOrderAndBackorder
-- drop view v_Avanti_OpenOrderAndBackorder
as
SELECT          A.*, B.NextPO
FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT OH.ORNO as OrderNumber
,               OH.CUNO as CustomerCode
,               OC.CUNM as CustomerName
,               OH.ORDT as OrderDate
,               OH.RLDT as RequestedDate
,               OH.CUOR as CustomerPO
,               OH.OBLC as StopCode
,               OL.ORQT*OL.NEPR as OriginalAmt
,               OL.ORQT*OL.NEPR - OL.IVQT*OL.NEPR as OpenAmt
,               OL.ORST as OrderStatus
,               OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,               OC.RESP as Territory
,               OL.PONR as LineNumber
,               OL.ITNO as ItemNumber
,               MM.ITDS as ItemName
,               OL.ORQT as OrderQty
,               OL.RNQT as OpenQty
,               OL.ALQT as AllocatedQty
,               OL.PLQT as PickQty
,               OL.RNQT as BoQty
,               OL.NEPR as UnitPrice
,               (OL.RNQT-OL.PLQT)*OL.NEPR as ExtendedOpenAmt
,               OL.WHLO as Warehouse
,               MM.ITCL as Brand
FROM            M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE           OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '44'
and             MM.ITCL = 'AVA'
) A
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ITNO as ItemNumber
,               SUM(ORQA) as OrderedQty
,               MIN(DWDT) as NextPO
FROM            M3.MPLINE
WHERE           RCDT = 0
GROUP BY        ITNO
) B             on A.ItemNumber = B.ItemNumber

SELECT      DISTINCT CM.SUNM as SupplierName
,           MH.SUNO as SupplierNumber
,           MH.PUNO as PurchaseOrderNumber
,           MM.ITNO as ItemNumber
,           MM.ITCL as Brand
,           MH.WHLO as Warehouse
,           ML.RVQA as ReceivedQty
,           ML.ORQA - ML.RVQA as OpenQty
,           ML.SUDO as ContainerNumber
,           MH.DWDT as RequestedDate
FROM        M3.MPHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MPLINE ML on MH.PUNO = ML.PUNO
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS CM on MH.SUNO = CM.SUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON ML.ITNO = MM.ITNO



SELECT * FROM M3.OOHEAD WHERE OREF <> '' AND FRE1 = 'CNAVA'

create view     v_Avanti_ShippableOrders
--drop view v_Avanti_ShippableOrders
as
SELECT          DISTINCT OH.ORNO as OrderNumber
,               OH.RLDT as RequestedDate
,               OL.ORST as LineStatus
,               OH.OBLC as OnHold
,               OH.CUNO as CustomerCode
,               OC.CUNM as CustomerName
,               OL.PONR as LineNumber
,               OL.ITNO as ItemNumber
,               MM.ITDS as ItemName
,               OL.RNQT as OpenQty
,               OL.ALQT as AllocatedQty
,               OL.PLQT as PickQty
,               OH.TEDL as FreightType
,               OL.WHLO as Warehouse
,               OL.RNQT * OL.NEPR as ShippableAmt
,               OH.ADID as AddressID
,               OA.CUNM as ShipToName
,               OA.CUA1 as ShipToAddr1
,               OA.CUA2 as ShipToAddr2
,               OA.TOWN as ShipToCity
,               OA.ECAR as ShipToState
,               OA.PONO as ShipToZipCode
,               MM.ITCL as Brand
FROM            M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.OOADRE OA ON OH.ORNO = OA.ORNO and OH.ADID = OA.ADID
WHERE           OL.ORST <= '44'

CREATE VIEW     v_Avanti_Warehouse_Statistics
as
SELECT          FW.*
,               A.[Quantity Shipped]
,               A.[Amount Shipped]
,               A.[Ship Date]
,               A.[Shipped Brand]
,               B.[Receipt Date]
,               B.[Container Count]
,               B.[Receipt Brand]
,               C.[Quantity Transferred In]
,               C.[Transfer Receipt Date]
,               C.[Transfer In Brand]
FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT WHLO as [Warehouse], SDES [Main Warehouse], WHNM [Warehouse Name]
FROM            M3.MITWHL
WHERE           DIVI = 'TLC'
) FW

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT        distinct MT.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,               SUM(TRQT*-1) as [Quantity Shipped]
,               SUM(OL.NEPR*TRQT*-1) as [Amount Shipped]
,               TRDT as [Ship Date]
,          CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END  as [Shipped Brand]
FROM            M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH on MT.RIDN = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3.ODLINE ODL on MT.RIDI = ODL.DLIX and MT.ITNO = ODL.ITNO and MT.RIDN = ODL.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND MT.ITNO = OL.ITNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE           TTYP = '31'
GROUP BY    MT.WHLO, TRDT, CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END
) A         on A.Warehouse = FW.Warehouse

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      WHLO AS Warehouse
,           CAST(RCDT as date) as [Receipt Date]
,           COUNT(DISTINCT SUDO) as [Container Count]
,          CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END as [Receipt Brand]
FROM        M3.MPLINE MP
JOIN        M3.MITMAS IM on MP.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE       MP.RCDT <> 0
GROUP BY    WHLO, RCDT, CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END
) B         on FW.Warehouse = B.Warehouse

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT        distinct MT.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,               SUM(TRQT) as [Quantity Transferred In]
,               TRDT as [Transfer Receipt Date]
,          CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END  as [Transfer In Brand]
FROM            M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN            M3.MITMAS IM ON MT.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE           TTYP = '50'
GROUP BY    WHLO, TRDT, CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END
) C on FW.Warehouse = C.Warehouse

--DROP VIEW v_AzureSpendData  
CREATE VIEW v_AzureSpendData AS 
SELECT 
    [date], serviceFamily, consumedService, meterName, meterCategory, meterSubCategory, productName, [resourceGroupName], [location]
    ,effectivePrice, quantity, unitOfMeasure, chargeType, costInBillingCurrency, ResourceId, tags
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/Azure/TLC/*/',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
    ) AS [result]

CREATE VIEW    v_BOM_Consumption
as
SELECT      MW.ITNO
,           MM.MTNO
,           SUM(MW.RVQT*MM.CNQT) as Consumption
,           CAST(NULLIF(CAST(MW.RPDT as VARCHAR(10)),0) as DATE) as [Report Date]
FROM        M3.MWOHED MW
JOIN        M3.MWOMAT MM on MW.MFNO = MM.MFNO
GROUP BY    MW.ITNO, MM.MTNO, MW.RPDT
HAVING      SUM(MW.RVQT*MM.CNQT) > 0

CREATE VIEW     v_BOM_Costs
--DROP VIEW v_BOM_Costs
as
SELECT          A.[Item Number]
,               [Units per Day]
,               [Material Cost]
,               [Labor Cost]
,               [Burden Cost]
,               [Material Cost] + [Labor Cost] + [Burden Cost] as [Total Product Cost]
,               C.STRT AS [Product Structure]
FROM
  (
  SELECT        MM.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               CTCD as [Units per Day]
,               PIPR as [Labor Cost]
,               PIPR*.75 as [Burden Cost]
  FROM          M3.MITMAS MM
  LEFT JOIN     M3.MPDOPE MD ON MM.ITNO = MD.PRNO
  ) A

LEFT JOIN

(
  SELECT          C1.ITNO, C2.MAXDATE, C1.CSU2 AS [Material Cost]
  FROM            M3.MCHEAD C1
  INNER JOIN      
(
  SELECT        MAX(PCDT) AS MAXDATE, ITNO
  FROM          M3.MCHEAD
  GROUP BY      ITNO
) C2
ON              C1.ITNO = C2.ITNO AND C1.PCDT = C2.MAXDATE
) B             ON A.[Item Number] = B.ITNO

LEFT JOIN

(
  SELECT DISTINCT PRNO, STRT
  FROM    M3.MPDMAT
) C             ON A.[Item Number] = C.PRNO
WHERE C.PRNO IS NOT NULL

-- DROP VIEW    v_BOM_Structures
CREATE VIEW v_BOM_Structures
AS
SELECT      PRNO as [Finished Good]
,           MTNO as [Component]
,           CNQT as [Component Qty per Unit]
,           STRT as [Product Sctructure]
FROM        M3.MPDMAT
WHERE       CNQT > 0

/*******************************************************************************************************
  Author:       Rene Villarreal
  Create Date:  August 3, 2022
  Description:  Create view v_Backlog_ConsumerDashboard
********************************************************************************************************
SUMMARY OF CHANGES

Date                    Author                    Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
August 3, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Create original view
August 4, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added Brand from Part/InvMaster
********************************************************************************************************/


CREATE VIEW		v_Backlog_ConsumerDashboard
AS

SELECT 			'Company L' as Company, AC.Customer as [Customer ID], AC2.Name as [Customer Name]
, 				AC.Category as [Budget Category], COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)  as [Ship Date], SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 'Zeroll' as [Brand], MStockCode as [Part ID]
,  				COALESCE(MPrice*MBackorderQty,0) as [Backlog]
FROM 			SCL.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer
JOIN            SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE 			SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX')
AND 			ReqShipDate < DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0
AND 			OrderStatus IN ('1', '4', '8', 'S')
AND 			AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			AC.Category <> 'GWT'


UNION ALL


SELECT 			'Company L' as Company, AC.Customer as [Customer ID], AC2.Name as [Customer Name]
, 				AC.Category as [Budget Category], COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)  as [Ship Date], SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 'Zeroll' as [Brand], MStockCode as [Part ID]
,  				COALESCE(MPrice*MBackorderQty,0) as [Backlog]
FROM 			SCL.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer
JOIN            SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE 			SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX')
AND 			ReqShipDate < DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			MPrice*MBackorderQty > 0
AND 			OrderStatus IN ('2')
AND 			AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			AC.Category <> 'GWT'


UNION ALL 


SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company, CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], C.NAME as [Customer Name]
, 				C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], CO.ID as [Order ID]
,				CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO], P.USER_1 AS [Brand], PART_ID as [Part ID]
, 				(COL.TOTAL_AMT_ORDERED - COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED) as [Backlog]
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN            ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			COALESCE(COL.DESIRED_SHIP_DATE, CO.DESIRED_SHIP_DATE) < DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE '%RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.STATUS NOT IN ('X', 'C')
AND				(COL.TOTAL_AMT_ORDERED - COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED) > 0

CREATE VIEW         v_Brand_Item
-- drop view v_Brand_Item
AS
SELECT                          DISTINCT [Brand Short Name]
,                               [Brand] as [Master Data Brand]
,                               [Finance Brand] as [Master Data Finance Brand]
,                               CASE WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('AFS', 'Admiral Craft', 'Orien', 'Oto', 'Bevles', 'Blakeslee') then 'Commercial'
                                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Avanti', 'Vinotemp') then 'Compact'
                                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Edgecraft') then 'Countertop'
                                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('EMC') then 'International'
                                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Shared Services') then 'Shared Services'
                                ELSE 'Undefined' END as [Master Data Division]
FROM
(                                
SELECT          DISTINCT ITCL as [Brand Short Name]
,               CASE WHEN       ITCL = 'ADM' THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'Apex'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ARG' THEN 'Argus'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'AVA' THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BAR' THEN 'Barmaid'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BAT' THEN 'Bartec'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BDM' THEN 'Black Diamond'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BER' THEN 'Berg'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BEV' THEN 'Bevles'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BLA' THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'Brama'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'CEN' THEN 'Centaur'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'CEXC' THEN 'Excalibur - Commercial'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'Chefs Choice'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'COME' THEN 'Omega - Commercial'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'CUL' THEN 'Culitek'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'DUUC' THEN 'Duura - Compact'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'DUUR' THEN 'Duura - Commercial'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'Element'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EMC' THEN 'EMC'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'Epicureanist'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EXC' THEN 'Excalibur'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'GEN' THEN 'General'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'GRI' THEN 'Grista'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'KEN' THEN 'Kenneeco'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'LEG' THEN 'Legion'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'LUN' THEN 'Lunar Ice'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MAG' THEN 'Magic Cool'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'Miscellaneous'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MXC' THEN 'Maxx Cold'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MXI' THEN 'Maxx Ice'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MXM' THEN 'Maxximum'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'Non-Stocked'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'OME' THEN 'Omega'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ORI' THEN 'Orien'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'OTO' THEN 'Oto'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'PAT' THEN 'Patriot'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'PGEN' THEN 'General - Private Label'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'PMXC' THEN 'Maxx Cold - Private Label'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'PMXI' THEN 'Maxx Ice - Private Label'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'POME' THEN 'Omega - Private Label'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'QUA' THEN 'Qualite'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'Sapphire'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'SLA' THEN 'Sir Lawrence'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'UST' THEN 'U-Star'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'Vinturi'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'Vinotemp'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'VNTC' THEN 'Vinotemp - Custom'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'Westbend'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'WESC' THEN 'Westbend - Compact'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'Winemate'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'Yonanas'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'Zeroll'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ZZZ' THEN 'Shared Services'
                ELSE            'Undefined' end as [Brand]
,               CASE WHEN       ITCL IN ('ADM', 'ARG', 'BDM', 'BER', 'CUL', 'GRI', 'KEN',
                                         'LUN', 'PAT', 'QUA', 'SLA', 'UST') THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('AVA', 'DUUC', 'MAG', 'WESC') THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('APX', 'BRA', 'ELE', 'EPI', 'VNT', 'VNTC', 'WIN') THEN 'Vinotemp'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('CEN', 'CEXC', 'COME', 'DUUR', 'GEN', 'MXC', 
                                         'MXI', 'PGEN', 'PMXC', 'PMXI', 'POME', 'SAP', 
                                         'BAR', 'BAT', 'LEG', 'MXM') THEN 'AFS'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('BEV') THEN 'Bevles'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('BLA') THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('CHF', 'EDG', 'EXC', 'OME', 'VIN', 'WES', 'YON', 'ZER') THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EMC' THEN 'EMC'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ORI' THEN 'Orien'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'OTO' THEN 'Oto'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('MIS', 'NS', 'ZZZ') THEN 'Shared Services'
                ELSE            'Undefined' end as [Finance Brand]
FROM            M3.MITMAS
) A

UNION

SELECT          [Brand Short Name]
,               [Brand] as [Master Data Brand]
,               [Finance Brand] as [Master Data Finance Brand]
,               CASE WHEN [Finance Brand] in ('Avanti', 'Vinotemp') then 'Compact'
                WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'Edgecraft' then 'Countertop'
                ELSE 'Undefined' end as [Master Data Division]
FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT USER_1 AS      [Brand Short Name]
,               CASE WHEN USER_1 = 'AVANTI' THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'CHEFS CHOICE' THEN 'Chefs Choice'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'EDGECRAFT' THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'ELEMENT' THEN 'Element'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'OMEGA' THEN 'Omega'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'VINTURI' THEN 'Vinturi'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'VINTURI COMPACT' THEN 'Vinturi - Compact'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'WESTBEND' THEN 'Westbend'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'WESTBEND COMPACT' THEN 'Westbend - Compact'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'YONANAS' THEN 'Yonanas'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'DUURA' THEN 'Duura - Compact'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'TLC' THEN 'TLC'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'OTHER' THEN 'Other'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'ZEROLL' THEN 'Zeroll'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'VINOTEMP' THEN 'Vinotemp'
                ELSE 'Undefined' END as [Brand]
,               CASE WHEN USER_1 IN ('AVANTI', 'VINTURI COMPACT', 'WESTBEND COMPACT', 'DUURA') then 'Avanti'
                WHEN USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EDGECRAFT', 'OMEGA', 'VINTURI', 'WESTBEND', 'YONANAS', 'TLC', 'OTHER', 'ZEROLL') THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP', 'ELEMENT') THEN 'Vinotemp'
                ELSE 'Undefined' END AS [Finance Brand]
FROM            ECM.PART
)
A

UNION

SELECT          [Brand Short Name]
,               [Brand] as [Master Data Brand]
,               [Finance Brand] as [Master Data Finance Brand]
,               CASE WHEN [Finance Brand] in ('Avanti', 'Vinotemp') then 'Compact'
                WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'Edgecraft' then 'Countertop'
                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Bevles', 'Blakeslee', 'AFS', 'Admiral Craft') then 'Commercial'
                WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'EMC' then 'International'
                ELSE 'Undefined' end as [Master Data Division]
FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT ProductClass AS      [Brand Short Name]
,               CASE WHEN ProductClass in
                ('BARM', 'CHIC', 'CRAT', 'CRTP', 'DADE', 'DITO',
                 'DOUG', 'META', 'FMP', 'FWE', 'GRIN', 'GRNP',
                 'HENPEN', 'LAKE', 'ZMIS', 'ROBP', 'ROBO', 'SERVI',
                 'SERVIP', 'SERVP', 'SPMD', 'THERTEK', 'TRAE',
                 'VOGT', 'VOLR', 'WOOD', 'STOE', 'BERTHA') THEN 'EMC'
                 WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('BEVL', 'BEVP', 'bevles') THEN 'Bevles'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('BLAK', 'BLAP') THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('EXKD') THEN 'Excalibur - Commercial'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('GENC', 'GENP', 'GENH', 'GENM', 'GNMP', 'GENS', 'GNSP') THEN 'General'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('LEGX', 'LEGI', 'LGXP') THEN 'Legion'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('MAXC', 'MAXE', 'MAXF', 'MAXH', 'MXCD', 'MXCR',
                 'MXXR', 'SANTA', 'MAXP', 'MXCP', 'MXXP') THEN 'Maxx Cold'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('MICE', 'MICP') THEN 'Maxx Ice'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('OCOMM') THEN 'Omega - Commercial'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('ADMIRAL') THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('AVAN') THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('VINO') THEN 'Vinotemp'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('CHEF') THEN 'Chefs Choice'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('EXCL') THEN 'Excalibur'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('OMEG') THEN 'Omega'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('WEST') THEN 'Westbend'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('VINT') THEN 'Vinturi'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('YONA', 'YONP') THEN 'Yonanas'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('ZERO') THEN 'Zeroll'
                ELSE 'Undefined' END as [Brand]
,               CASE WHEN ProductClass IN ('AVAN') then 'Avanti'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP', 'VINT', 'WEST', 'OMEG', 'EXCL', 'CHEF') THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('VINO') THEN 'Vinotemp'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('BEVL', 'BEVP', 'bevles') THEN 'Bevles'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('BLAK', 'BLAP') THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN ProductCLass IN ('GENC', 'GENP', 'GENH', 'GENM', 'GNMP', 'GENS', 'GNSP',
                                      'EXKD', 'OCOMM', 'LEGX', 'LEGI', 'LGXP', 'MICE', 'MICP',
                                      'MAXC', 'MAXE', 'MAXF', 'MAXH', 'MXCD', 'MXCR', 'MXXR', 
                                      'SANTA', 'MAXP', 'MXCP', 'MXXP') THEN 'AFS'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('ADMIRAL') THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN ProductClass in
                ('BARM', 'CHIC', 'CRAT', 'CRTP', 'DADE', 'DITO',
                 'DOUG', 'META', 'FMP', 'FWE', 'GRIN', 'GRNP',
                 'HENPEN', 'LAKE', 'ZMIS', 'ROBP', 'ROBO', 'SERVI',
                 'SERVIP', 'SERVP', 'SPMD', 'THERTEK', 'TRAE',
                 'VOGT', 'VOLR', 'WOOD', 'STOE', 'BERTHA') THEN 'EMC'
                ELSE 'Undefined' END AS [Finance Brand]
FROM            SCG.InvMaster
)
A

CREATE VIEW		v_Budget_ConsumerDashboard
AS

SELECT			Brand, SUM(Budget) as BUDGET
FROM 			ECM.BUDGET_BRAND
WHERE 			Month = MONTH(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ))
AND 			Year = YEAR(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ))
