CREATE VIEW v_CancelledOrders
as
SELECT      'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '9 - Cancelled' as [Qty Status]
,           'Cancelled' as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           NULL AS [Inv Date]
,           MM.ITCL as [Brand]
,           MM.GRP2 as [Division]
,           MM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN MM.GRP3 = 'ADM' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.NEPR END as [Unit Price]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN OL.ORQT/2 ELSE OL.ORQT END as [Order Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN (OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT)/2 ELSE OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT END as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           NULL AS [Tracking Number]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
WHERE       OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '99'
AND         OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT > 0

CREATE VIEW     v_CartonsByDate
-- drop view v_CartonsByDate
as
SELECT          MP.WHLO as Warehouse
,               MP.RGDT as ShipDate
,               COUNT(DISTINCT MP.DLIX) as DeliveryCount
,               COUNT(DISTINCT PANR) as PackageCount
FROM            M3.MPTRNS MP
JOIN            M3.MHDISH MH ON MP.DLIX = MH.DLIX
JOIN            M3.MHDISL ML ON MH.DLIX = ML.DLIX
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON ML.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE           PISS = '90'
GROUP BY        MP.WHLO, MP.RGDT, BUAR, PRGP
--ORDER BY        MP.RGDT DESC

CREATE VIEW     v_CasePackSetup
--DROP VIEW v_CasePackSetup
as
SELECT          MM.ITNO as         [Item Number]
,               ITDS as         [Item Description]
,               PRGP as         [Product Group]
,               BUAR as         [Business Unit]
,               CS.TX40 AS      [Brand]
,               MP.PACT AS      [Each Package Name]
,               MP.D1QT as      [Each Qty]
,               PC.PACL AS      [Each Length]
,               PC.PACW AS      [Each Width]
,               PC.PACH AS      [Each Height]
,               MP2.PACT AS      [Case Package Name]
,               MP2.D1QT as      [Case Qty]
,               PC2.PACL AS      [Case Length]
,               PC2.PACW AS      [Case Width]
,               PC2.PACH AS      [Case Height]
,               MP3.PACT AS      [Pallet Package Name]
,               MP3.D1QT as      [Pallet Qty]
,               PC3.PACL AS      [Pallet Length]
,               PC3.PACW AS      [Pallet Width]
,               PC3.PACH AS      [Pallet Height]
FROM            M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPACIT MP ON MM.ITNO = MP.ITNO AND MP.PACT LIKE 'E%'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPAC PC ON MP.PACT = PC.PACT
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPACIT MP2 ON MM.ITNO = MP2.ITNO AND MP2.PACT LIKE 'C%'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPAC PC2 ON MP2.PACT = PC2.PACT
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPACIT MP3 ON MM.ITNO = MP3.ITNO AND MP3.PACT LIKE 'P%'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPAC PC3 ON MP3.PACT = PC3.PACT
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS ON MM.ITCL = CS.STKY AND STCO = 'ITCL'

SELECT          A.*, DUTY, PMI, TRUTAR, FREI01, FREI02, FREI03
FROM
(
SELECT          POH.PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]
,               POH.PUDT AS [Purchase Order Date]
,               POH.DWDT AS [Requested Delivery Date]
,               cast(CAST(POL.RCDT as varchar(10)) as date) AS [Receipt Date]
,               POL.WHLO as Warehouse
,               POL.PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               POL.PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               POL.PUSL as [Line Status]
,               POL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,               MM.ITCL as [Brand]
,               POL.PUPR as [Unit Price]
,               POL.ORQA as [Order Qty]
,               POL.RVQA as [Receipt Qty]
,               POL.SUDO as [Container Number]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON POL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
and             POL.RCDT <> 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(RCAC) as 'DUTY'
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           CEID = 'DUTY'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) B ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = B.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = B.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = B.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(RCAC) as 'FREI01'
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           CEID = 'FREI01'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) C ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = C.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = C.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = C.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(RCAC) as 'FREI02'
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           CEID = 'FREI02'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) D ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = D.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = D.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = D.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(RCAC) as 'FREI03'
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           CEID = 'FREI03'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) E ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = E.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = E.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = E.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(RCAC) as 'PMI'
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           CEID = 'PMI'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) F ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = F.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = F.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = F.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(RCAC) as 'TRUTAR'
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           CEID = 'TRUTAR'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) G ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = G.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = G.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = G.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

CREATE VIEW v_CommercialConsolidatedData
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                         A.Customer, A.CustomerName, A.Responsible, A.Salesperson, A.SalespersonName, A.DeliveryTerms, A.CustomerPoNumber, A.SalesOrder, A.OrderDate, A.SalesOrderLine, A.LineStatus, A.Item, A.ItemDescription, A.Division, 
                         A.Brand, A.ProcurementGroup, A.Category, A.CategoryName, A.Warehouse, A.QtyOrdered, A.UnitPrice, A.TotalOrderValue, A.UnitCost, A.TotalOrderCost, B.Invoice, B.InvoiceDate, B.QtyInvoiced, B.TotalInvoiceValue, 
                         C.RmaNumber, C.RmaStatus, C.RmaDate, D.CreditMemo, D.CreditMemoDate, D.CreditMemoReference, D.CreditMemoStatus, E.CreditMemoInvoice, E.CreditMemoInvoiceDate, E.CreditMemoValue, F.SerialNumber
FROM            (SELECT DISTINCT 
                                                    OH.CUNO AS Customer, OC.CUNM AS CustomerName, OC.RESP AS Responsible, ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS Salesperson, CS.TX40 AS SalespersonName, OC.TEDL AS DeliveryTerms, 
                                                    OH.CUOR AS CustomerPoNumber, OH.ORNO AS SalesOrder, OH.ORDT AS OrderDate, OL.PONR AS SalesOrderLine, OL.ORST AS LineStatus, OL.ITNO AS Item, MM.ITDS AS ItemDescription, MM.BUAR AS Division, 
                                                    MM.ITCL AS Brand, MM.PRGP AS ProcurementGroup, MM.ITGR AS Category, CS2.TX40 AS CategoryName, OL.WHLO AS Warehouse, OL.ORQT AS QtyOrdered, OL.NEPR AS UnitPrice, 
                                                    OL.ORQT * OL.NEPR AS TotalOrderValue, OL.UCOS AS UnitCost, OL.IVQT * OL.UCOS AS TotalOrderCost
                          FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH INNER JOIN
                                                    M3.OOLINE AS OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO INNER JOIN
                                                    M3.MITMAS AS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO INNER JOIN
                                                    M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                    M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                    M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND MM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                    M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SMCD' LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                    M3.CSYTAB AS CS2 ON MM.ITGR = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'ITGR'
                          WHERE        (1 = 1) AND (OH.ORTP NOT IN ('E80', 'E90')) AND (OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%')) AS A FULL OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT OD.ORNO AS SalesOrder, OD.PONR AS SalesOrderLine, IH.PYNO AS Customer, IH.EXIN AS Invoice, IH.RGDT AS InvoiceDate, OD.IVQT AS QtyInvoiced, OD.IVQT * OD.NEPR AS TotalInvoiceValue
                               FROM            M3.ODLINE AS OD LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.OINVOL AS IH ON OD.ORNO = IH.ORNO AND OD.DLIX = IH.DLIX
                               WHERE        (1 = 1) AND (IH.PYNO LIKE 'COM%') AND (IH.IVTP = '30') AND (IH.ORNO NOT LIKE '5%')) AS B ON A.SalesOrder = B.SalesOrder AND A.SalesOrderLine = B.SalesOrderLine FULL OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT OCL.RORN AS SalesOrder, OCL.REPN AS RmaNumber, OCL.REST AS RmaStatus, OCL.EPDT AS RmaDate, OCL.ITNO AS Item, OCL.PONR AS SalesOrderLine
                               FROM            M3.OCHEAD AS OC INNER JOIN
                                                         M3.OCLINE AS OCL ON OC.REPN = OCL.REPN
                               WHERE        (OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%')) AS C ON A.SalesOrder = C.SalesOrder AND A.Item = C.Item FULL OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT 
                                                         OH.CUNO AS Customer, OH.CUOR AS CustomerPoNumber, OL.ITNO AS Item, OL.ORNO AS CreditMemo, OH.YREF AS CreditMemoReference, OL.PONR AS SalesOrderLine, OL.ORST AS CreditMemoStatus, 
                                                         OH.ORDT AS CreditMemoDate
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH INNER JOIN
                                                         M3.OOLINE AS OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
                               WHERE        (OH.ORTP IN ('E80', 'E90')) AND (OH.CUNO LIKE 'COM%')) AS D ON A.Customer = D.Customer AND A.CustomerPoNumber = D.CustomerPoNumber AND A.SalesOrderLine = D.SalesOrderLine AND 
                         A.Item = D.Item FULL OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT OD.ORNO AS SalesOrder, OD.PONR AS SalesOrderLine, IH.PYNO AS Customer, IH.EXIN AS CreditMemoInvoice, IH.RGDT AS CreditMemoInvoiceDate, OD.IVQT * OD.NEPR AS CreditMemoValue
                               FROM            M3.ODLINE AS OD LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.OINVOL AS IH ON OD.ORNO = IH.ORNO AND OD.DLIX = IH.DLIX
                               WHERE        (1 = 1) AND (IH.PYNO LIKE 'COM%') AND (IH.IVTP = '30') AND (IH.ORNO LIKE '5%')) AS E ON D.CreditMemo = E.SalesOrder AND D.SalesOrderLine = E.SalesOrderLine LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT ML.SERN AS SerialNumber, MT.RIDN AS SalesOrder, MT.RIDL AS SalesOrderLine
                               FROM            M3.MILOIN AS ML INNER JOIN
                                                         M3.MITTRA AS MT ON ML.SERN = MT.BREF
                               WHERE        (MT.TTYP = '93') AND (RIGHT(MT.WHSL, 3) = MT.WHLO) AND (MT.BREF <> MT.ITNO) AND (MT.TRQT > 0)) AS F ON A.SalesOrder = F.SalesOrder AND A.SalesOrderLine = F.SalesOrderLine

create view         v_Commercial_BackLog
-- drop view v_Commercial_BackLog
as
SELECT              OC.CFC3 as [Division]
,                   OC.CFC4 as [Legacy System]
,                   OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order Number]
,                   OH.ORSL AS [Order Status]
,                   OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                   OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                   LEFT(CAST(CAST(OH.ORDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) AS [Order Date]
,                   LEFT(CAST(CAST(OH.RLDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) AS [Requested Delivery Date]
,                   OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,                   OL.ITNO AS [Item ID]
,                   IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                   OL.WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,                   OL.ORQT AS [Order Qty]
,                   OL.NEPR*OL.ORQT AS [Order Amt]
FROM                DBO.M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN                DBO.M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE               LEFT(CAST(CAST(OH.RLDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) < CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
AND                 OH.ORSL < 66

create view         v_Commercial_DailyOrderEntry
-- drop view v_Commercial_DailyOrderEntry
as
SELECT              OC.CFC3 as [Division]
,                   OC.CFC4 as [Legacy System]
,                   OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order Number]
,                   OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO Number]
,                   OH.ORSL AS [Order Status]
,                   OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
--,                   CA.ECAR AS [Ship To State]
,                   OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                   LEFT(CAST(CAST(OH.ORDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) AS [Order Date]
,                   LEFT(CAST(CAST(OH.RLDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) AS [Requested Delivery Date]
,                   OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,                   OL.ITNO AS [Item ID]
,                   IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                   OL.WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,                   OL.ORQT AS [Order Qty]
,                   OL.NEPR*OL.ORQT AS [Order Amt]
FROM                DBO.M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN                DBO.M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
--JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSAD CA ON OC.CUNO = CA.CUNO AND OH.ADID = CA.ADID
WHERE               LEFT(CAST(CAST(OH.RGDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) = CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)

CREATE VIEW         v_Commercial_InventoryByLocationWithReceiptDates
-- drop view v_Commercial_InventoryByLocationWithReceiptDates
as

SELECT              A.*
,                   ISNULL([Incoming Qty],0) as [Incoming Qty]
,                   [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM
(
SELECT              IM.BUAR as [Division]
,                   IB.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   IM.ITDS as [Item Name]
,                   IM.ITCL as [Brand]
,                   IM.GRP3 as [Finacne Brand]
,                   IB.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,                   IW.WHNM as [Warehouse Name]
,                   IM.PRGP as [Procurement Group]
,                   STQT AS [On Hand Qty]
,                   ALQT AS [Allocated Qty]
,                   REQT AS [Reserved Qty]
,                   STQT - REQT AS [Available Qty]
FROM                M3.MITBAL IB
JOIN                M3.MITMAS IM ON IB.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN                M3.MITWHL IW on IB.WHLO = IW.WHLO-- and IB.ITNO = IW.ITNO
--WHERE               STQT + ALQT > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT              X.[Item Number], X.[Warehouse], [Incoming Qty], [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM
(
SELECT              ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,                   SUM(ORQA) AS [Incoming Qty]
FROM                M3.MPLINE
WHERE               DWDT >= GETDATE()
GROUP BY            ITNO, WHLO
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT              ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,                   ISNULL(DATEADD(DAY, 14, CAST(CAST(NULLIF(UID2, 0) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS DATE)), DATEADD(DAY, 90, DWDT)) AS [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM                M3.MPLINE
WHERE               DWDT >= GETDATE()
) Y                 on X.[Item Number] = Y.[Item Number] AND X.[Warehouse] = Y.[Warehouse]
) B                 on A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number] AND A.[Warehouse] = B.[Warehouse]

create view         v_Commercial_OpenInvoicedCancelled
-- drop view v_Commercial_OpenInvoicedCancelled
as
SELECT DISTINCT 
                         CASE WHEN OC.CUNO like 'COM%' then 'COM' else 'CNR' END AS Division, OC.CFC4 AS [Legacy System], OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order Number], OH.CUOR AS [Customer Po Number], OH.ORSL AS [Order Status], IM.ITCL AS Brand, IM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand], OC.SDST AS BuyingGroup, OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID], OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name], OH.RESP AS Responsible, OH.OBLC AS [Stop Code], OH.ORDT AS [Order Date], 
                         OH.RLDT AS [Requested Delivery Date], OL.PONR AS [Line Number], OL.ITNO AS [Item ID], IM.ITDS AS [Item Name], OL.WHLO AS Warehouse, OL.ORQT AS [Order Qty], OL.NEPR * OL.ORQT AS [Order Amt]
FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH INNER JOIN
                         M3.OOLINE AS OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO INNER JOIN
                         M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO INNER JOIN
                         M3.MITMAS AS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO

CREATE VIEW     v_Commercial_SerialTracking
-- drop view v_Commercial_SerialTracking
AS

SELECT      'Syspro AFS' as ERP
,			SDSR.Serial
,			SM.SalesOrder
,			SD.SalesOrderLine
,			ATD.Customer
,			SM.CustomerPoNumber
--,			SD.LineType
,			ATD.StockCode AS Item
,			SD.MStockDes AS ItemDescription
,			ATD.Warehouse
,			ATD.QtyInvoiced
,			SD.MOrderQty AS QtyOrdered
--,			SD.MUnitCost
,			SD.MPrice AS UnitPrice
,			ATD.NetSalesValue 
,			CAST(ATD.Invoice AS VARCHAR(255)) AS Invoice
,			ATD.InvoiceDate
--,			ATD.Branch
,			ATD.Salesperson
--,			ATD.OrderType
--,			ATD.Area
--,			ATD.ProductClass
FROM        SCA.SorMaster SM
JOIN        SCA.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder
JOIN		SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD ON SM.SalesOrder = ATD.SalesOrder AND SD.SalesOrderLine = ATD.SalesOrderLine 
JOIN		SCA.SorDetailSerRep SDSR ON SM.SalesOrder = SDSR.SalesOrder AND SD.SalesOrderLine = SDSR.SalesOrderLine

UNION ALL

SELECT          'M3' as ERP
,               BREF as Serial
,               OH.ORNO as SalesOrder
,               OL.PONR AS SalesOrderLine
,               OH.CUNO as Customer
,               OH.CUOR AS CustomerPoNumber
,               IM.ITNO AS Item
,               IM.ITDS AS ItemDescription
,               IT.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               OL.IVQT AS QtyInvoiced
,               OL.ORQT AS QtyOrdered
,               OL.NEPR AS UnitPrice
,               OL.IVQT*OL.NEPR as NetSalesValue
,               CAST(OD.IVNO AS VARCHAR(255)) as Invoice
,               CAST(CAST(OD.IVDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE) as InvoiceDate
,               OC.SMCD as Salesperson
FROM            M3.MITTRA IT 
JOIN            M3.MITMAS IM ON IT.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH ON IT.RIDN = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND IT.RIDL = OL.PONR
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC on OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3.ODHEAD OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO AND OD.WHLO = OH.WHLO
WHERE           1=1
AND             IM.BUAR = 'COM'
AND             TTYP = 93
AND             IT.WHSL LIKE CONCAT('%', IT.WHLO, '%')
AND             LEN(BREF) >= 2
AND             TRQT > 0
AND             BREF <> IM.ITNO

SELECT          distinct OH.ORNO as SalesOrder
,               OH.CUOR AS CustomerPoNumber
,               OL.ORST AS OrderStatus
,               OH.CUNO as Customer
,               OC.CUNM as CustomerName
,               OL.PONR AS LineNumber
,               IT.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               IM.ITNO AS Item 
,               IM.ITDS AS ItemDescription
,               BREF AS SerialNumber
FROM            M3_MITTRA IT 
JOIN            M3_MITMAS IM ON IT.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_OOHEAD OH ON IT.RIDN = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND IT.RIDL = OL.PONR
JOIN            M3_OCUSMA OC on OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
WHERE           1=1
AND             IM.BUAR = 'COM'
AND             TTYP = 93
AND             IT.WHSL LIKE CONCAT('%', IT.WHLO, '%')
AND             LEN(BREF) >= 2
AND             TRQT > 0
AND             BREF <> IM.ITNO
order BY        BREF

CREATE VIEW v_CommissionMatrix
-- drop view v_CommissionMatrix
as
SELECT      PREX+' - '+'Sales Rep/Item' AS [Priority]
,           OBV1+' - '+CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep]
,           OBV2 AS [Dimension 2]
,           OBV3 AS [Dimension 3]
,           MT.TAGN AS [Agreement Number]
,           TR.RATE/100 as [Commission Rate]
FROM        M3.OBTMTX MT
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS on MT.OBV1 = CS.STKY and STCO = 'SMCD'
JOIN        M3.OBTREC TR on MT.TAGN = TR.TAGN
WHERE       MT.TATB = 'CONSUMER'
AND         MT.PREX = 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      PREX+' - '+'Sales Rep/Customer/Brand' AS [Priority]
,           OBV1+' - '+CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep]
,           OBV2+' - '+OC.CUNM AS [Dimension 2]
,           CS2.TX40 AS [Dimension 3]
,           MT.TAGN AS [Agreement Number]
,           TR.RATE/100 as [Commission Rate]
FROM        M3.OBTMTX MT
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS on MT.OBV1 = CS.STKY and CS.STCO = 'SMCD'
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS2 on MT.OBV3 = CS2.STKY and CS2.STCO = 'ITCL'
JOIN        M3.OBTREC TR on MT.TAGN = TR.TAGN
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON MT.OBV2 = OC.CUNO
WHERE       MT.TATB = 'CONSUMER'
AND         MT.PREX = 3

UNION ALL

SELECT      PREX+' - '+'Sales Rep/Market/Brand' AS [Priority]
,           OBV1+' - '+CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep]
,           CS3.TX40 AS [Dimension 2]
,           CS2.TX40 AS [Dimension 3]
,           MT.TAGN AS [Agreement Number]
,           TR.RATE/100 as [Commission Rate]
FROM        M3.OBTMTX MT
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS on MT.OBV1 = CS.STKY and CS.STCO = 'SMCD'
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS2 on MT.OBV3 = CS2.STKY and CS2.STCO = 'ITCL'
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS3 on MT.OBV2 = CS3.STKY and CS3.STCO = 'CUCL'
JOIN        M3.OBTREC TR on MT.TAGN = TR.TAGN
WHERE       MT.TATB = 'CONSUMER'
AND         MT.PREX = 5

UNION ALL

SELECT      PREX+' - '+'Sales Rep/Brand' AS [Priority]
,           OBV1+' - '+CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep]
,           CASE WHEN OBV2 = 'ZZZ' then 'DEDUCTIONS and ALLOWANCES' else CS2.TX40 end AS [Dimension 2]
,           OBV3 AS [Dimension 3]
,           MT.TAGN AS [Agreement Number]
,           TR.RATE/100 as [Commission Rate]
FROM        M3.OBTMTX MT
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS on MT.OBV1 = CS.STKY and CS.STCO = 'SMCD'
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS2 on MT.OBV2 = CS2.STKY and CS2.STCO = 'ITCL'
JOIN        M3.OBTREC TR on MT.TAGN = TR.TAGN
WHERE       MT.TATB = 'CONSUMER'
AND         MT.PREX = 8

UNION ALL

SELECT      PREX+' - '+'Sales Rep' AS [Priority]
,           OBV1+' - '+CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep]
,           OBV2 AS [Dimension 2]
,           OBV3 AS [Dimension 3]
,           MT.TAGN AS [Agreement Number]
,           TR.RATE/100 as [Commission Rate]
FROM        M3.OBTMTX MT
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS on MT.OBV1 = CS.STKY and CS.STCO = 'SMCD'
JOIN        M3.OBTREC TR on MT.TAGN = TR.TAGN
WHERE       MT.TATB = 'CONSUMER'
AND         MT.PREX = 9

CREATE VIEW v_Commissions
--drop view v_Commissions
AS
SELECT			*
,				CASE WHEN round(ISNULL(PaidInvoice,0),2) >= round(ISNULL(TotalMerchandiseValue,0),2) then 'Paid' else 'Not Paid' end as PaidStatus
,				CASE WHEN round(ISNULL(PaidInvoice,0),2) >= round(ISNULL(TotalMerchandiseValue,0),2) then TotalMerchandiseValue * CommissionRate * 1.00 / 100 else 0 end AS PayableCommission
FROM
(
SELECT			A.*
,				B.PaidDate
,				ROUND(ISNULL(((B.PaidAmount) * 1.00 / SUM(NULLIF (TotalMerchandiseValue, 0)) OVER (Partition BY InvoiceNumber)) * TotalMerchandiseValue, 0), 2) - ROUND(ISNULL((Freight * 1.00 / SUM(NULLIF (TotalMerchandiseValue, 0)) OVER (Partition BY DelvNum)) * TotalMerchandiseValue, 0), 2) /*+ FreightDiscount*/ AS PaidInvoice
FROM
(          
SELECT			distinct OH.ORNO AS SalesOrder
,				OH.CUOR AS CustomerPoNumber
,				OH.RGDT AS OrderDate
,				OH.CUNO AS CustomerId
,				OC.CUNM AS CustomerName
,				OL.PONR AS LineNumber
,               OD.DLIX as DelvNum
,				OL.ORST AS LineStatus
,				MM.ITCL AS Brand
,				OC.CFC9 AS SalesTerritory
,				OL.ITNO AS Item
,				MM.ITDS AS ItemDescription
,				IH.EXIN AS InvoiceNumber
,				IVDT as InvoiceDate
,				OD.IVQA AS InvoiceQuantity
,				OL.NEPR AS UnitPrice
,				OD.IVQA * OD.NEPR AS TotalMerchandiseValue
,				ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS SalesRep
,				CS.TX40 AS SalesRepName
,				ISNULL(TG.RATE,0) as CommissionRate
,				CAST(ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) AS varchar(10)) + '%' AS CommissionPct--, ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) / 100 * OD.IVQA * OD.NEPR AS CommissionAmt
FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH 
INNER JOIN		M3.OOLINE AS OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO 
INNER JOIN		M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
INNER JOIN		M3.MITMAS AS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.ODLINE AS OD ON OL.ORNO = OD.ORNO AND OD.PONR = OL.PONR AND OL.ITNO = OD.ITNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.ODHEAD AS ODH ON OH.ORNO = ODH.ORNO AND OD.DLIX = ODH.DLIX
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND MM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX ON OC.CUNO = TX.OBV1 AND TX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX2 ON MM.ITCL = TX2.OBV2 AND ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = TX2.OBV1 AND TX2.PREX = 5 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTREC AS TG ON ISNULL(TX.TAGN, TX2.TAGN) = TG.TAGN AND ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = TG.TREC 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OINVOH AS IH ON ODH.IVNO = IH.IVNO AND ODH.CUNO = IH.PYNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND STCO = 'SMCD'

WHERE			(OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%')
AND				OL.ORST = '77' 
AND				PRGP = 'FG'
AND				OD.IVQA >= 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          X.*, Y.PaidDate
FROM
(
SELECT          CINO, SUM(CUAM)*-1.00 AS PaidAmount
FROM            M3.FSLEDG
WHERE           TRCD = '20'
GROUP BY        CINO
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			CINO, MAX(ACDT) as PaidDate--, SUM(CUAM-VTAM)*-1.00 AS PaidAmount
FROM            M3.FSLEDG
WHERE			TRCD = '20'
GROUP BY		CINO
) Y             on X.CINO = Y.CINO
) B on A.InvoiceNumber = B.CINO

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			ORNO, DLIX, SUM(ChargeAmt) as Freight
from
(
SELECT			ORNO,DLIX,CRID
,				CASE WHEN CRID = 'FRE002' then CRAM WHEN CRID = 'FRE003' then CRAM*-1 end as ChargeAmt
FROM			M3.OOCHRG
WHERE			CHST = '77'
AND				ISNULL(CASE WHEN CRID = 'FRE002' then CRAM WHEN CRID = 'FRE003' then CRAM*-1 end,0) <> 0
) S
GROUP BY		ORNO, DLIX
) C on A.SalesOrder = C.ORNO and A.DelvNum = C.DLIX
) X

UNION ALL



SELECT			*
,				CASE WHEN round(ISNULL(PaidInvoice,0),2) <= round(ISNULL(TotalMerchandiseValue,0),2) then 'Paid' else 'Not Paid' end as PaidStatus
,				CASE WHEN round(ISNULL(PaidInvoice,0),2) <= round(ISNULL(TotalMerchandiseValue,0),2) then TotalMerchandiseValue * CommissionRate * 1.00 / 100 else 0 end AS PayableCommission
FROM
(
SELECT			A.*
,				B.PaidDate
,				ROUND(ISNULL(((B.PaidAmount) * 1.00 / SUM(NULLIF (TotalMerchandiseValue, 0)) OVER (Partition BY InvoiceNumber)) * TotalMerchandiseValue, 0), 2) AS PaidInvoice
FROM
(          
SELECT			distinct OH.ORNO AS SalesOrder
,				OH.CUOR AS CustomerPoNumber
,				OH.RGDT AS OrderDate
,				OH.CUNO AS CustomerId
,				OC.CUNM AS CustomerName
,				OL.PONR AS LineNumber
,               NULL as DelvNum
,				OL.ORST AS LineStatus
,				MM.ITCL AS Brand
,				OC.CFC9 AS SalesTerritory
,				OL.ITNO AS Item
,				MM.ITDS AS ItemDescription
,				IH.EXIN AS InvoiceNumber
,				IVDT as InvoiceDate
,				OD.IVQA AS InvoiceQuantity
,				OL.NEPR AS UnitPrice
,				OD.IVQA * OD.NEPR AS TotalMerchandiseValue
,				ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS SalesRep
,				CS.TX40 AS SalesRepName
,				ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) as CommissionRate
,				CAST(ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) AS varchar(10)) + '%' AS CommissionPct--, ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) / 100 * OD.IVQA * OD.NEPR AS CommissionAmt
FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH 
INNER JOIN		M3.OOLINE AS OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO 
INNER JOIN		M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
INNER JOIN		M3.MITMAS AS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.ODLINE AS OD ON OL.ORNO = OD.ORNO AND OD.PONR = OL.PONR AND OL.ITNO = OD.ITNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.ODHEAD AS ODH ON OH.ORNO = ODH.ORNO AND OD.DLIX = ODH.DLIX
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND MM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX ON OC.CUNO = TX.OBV1 AND TX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX2 ON MM.ITCL = TX2.OBV2 AND ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = TX2.OBV1 AND TX2.PREX = 5 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTREC AS TG ON ISNULL(TX.TAGN, TX2.TAGN) = TG.TAGN AND ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = TG.TREC 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OINVOH AS IH ON ODH.IVNO = IH.IVNO AND ODH.CUNO = IH.PYNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND STCO = 'SMCD'

WHERE			(OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%')
AND				OL.ORST = '77' 
AND				PRGP = 'FG'
AND				OD.IVQA < 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			CINO, ACDT as PaidDate, SUM(CUAM-VTAM)*1.00 AS PaidAmount
FROM            M3.FSLEDG
WHERE			TRCD = '10'
GROUP BY		CINO, ACDT
) B on A.InvoiceNumber = B.CINO
) X

CREATE VIEW                 v_CommissionsMatrix_Commercial
-- DROP VIEW v_CommissionsMatrix_Commercial
as
SELECT DISTINCT             'Dairy Queen Items' as Priority
,                           'Commercial' as [Commission Division]
,                           TX0.OBV1 as [Item Number]
,                           NULL as Brand
,                           NULL as [Brand Description]
,                           NULL as [Customer ID]
,                           NULL as [Customer Name]
,                           NULL as [Territory]
,                           TX0.TAGN as [Trade Agreement Number]
,                           TR0.RATE as [Commission Rate]
,                           TX0.TREC as [Sales Rep ID]
,                           CS0.TX40 as [Sales Rep Name]
FROM                        M3.OBTMTX TX0
LEFT JOIN                   M3.OBTREC TR0 ON TX0.TREC = TR0.TREC AND TX0.TAGN = TR0.TAGN
LEFT JOIN                   M3.CSYTAB CS0 ON TX0.TREC = CS0.STKY AND CS0.STCO = 'SMCD'
WHERE                       TX0.PREX = 0
AND                         TX0.TATB = 'COMMERCIAL'

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT             'Non-State Territories' as Priority
,                           'Commercial' as [Commission Division]
,                           NULL as [Item Number]
,                           NULL as Brand
,                           NULL as [Brand Description]
,                           OC.CUNO as [Customer ID]
,                           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,                           OC.CFC9 as [Territory]
,                           TX3.TAGN as [Trade Agreement Number]
,                           TR3.RATE as [Commission Rate]
,                           TX3.TREC as [Sales Rep ID]
,                           CS3.TX40 as [Sales Rep Name]
FROM                        M3.CSMCDX CX3
LEFT JOIN                   M3.OCUSMA OC ON CX3.OBV1 = OC.CFC9
LEFT JOIN		            M3.OBTMTX TX3 ON OC.CUNO = TX3.OBV1 AND CX3.SMD1 = TX3.TREC AND TX3.PREX = 3
LEFT JOIN                   M3.OBTREC TR3 ON TX3.TREC = TR3.TREC AND TX3.TAGN = TR3.TAGN
LEFT JOIN                   M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON TX3.TREC = CS3.STKY AND CS3.STCO = 'SMCD'
WHERE                       CX3.PREX = 3
AND                         TX3.TATB = 'COMMERCIAL'

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT             'State Territories' as Priority
,                           'Commercial' as [Commission Division]
,                           NULL as [Item Number]
,                           CX5.OBV2 as Brand
,                           CS52.TX40 as [Brand Description]
,                           OC.CUNO as [Customer ID]
,                           OC.CUNO as [Customer Name]
,                           OC.CFC9 as [Territory]
,                           TX5.TAGN as [Trade Agreement Number]
,                           TR5.RATE as [Commission Rate]
,                           TX5.TREC as [Sales Rep ID]
,                           CS5.TX40 as [Sales Rep Name]
FROM                        M3.CSMCDX CX5
LEFT JOIN                   M3.OCUSMA OC ON CX5.OBV1 = OC.CFC9
LEFT JOIN                   M3.MITMAS MM ON CX5.OBV2 = MM.ITCL
LEFT JOIN		            M3.OBTMTX TX5 ON CX5.OBV2 = TX5.OBV2 AND CX5.SMD1 = TX5.TREC AND TX5.PREX = 5
LEFT JOIN                   M3.OBTREC TR5 ON TX5.TREC = TR5.TREC AND TX5.TAGN = TR5.TAGN
LEFT JOIN                   M3.CSYTAB CS5 ON TX5.TREC = CS5.STKY AND CS5.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN                   M3.CSYTAB CS52 ON CX5.OBV2 = CS52.STKY AND CS52.STCO = 'ITCL'
WHERE                       CX5.PREX = 4
AND                         TX5.TATB = 'COMMERCIAL'

CREATE VIEW     v_Commissions_All
--drop view v_Commissions_All
-- SELECT * FROM v_Commissions_All WHERE [Order ID] = '1000121973'
AS
SELECT          A.*, B.[Paid Date], CASE WHEN B.[Paid Status] is null then 'Not Fully Paid' else B.[Paid Status] end as [Paid Status]
,               CASE WHEN [Paid Amt] < [Total Invoice] THEN [Paid Amt]/NULLIF([Total Invoice],0)*[Sales Amt] else [Sales Amt] end as [Paid Amount]
,               CASE WHEN [Commission Division] = 'Consumer' and [Sales Rep ID] <> 'SR0070' then [Commission Rate]*[Sales Amt]
                 WHEN [Commission Division] = 'Commercial' then [Commission Rate]*(CASE WHEN [Paid Amt] < [Total Invoice] THEN [Paid Amt]/NULLIF([Total Invoice],0)*[Sales Amt] else [Sales Amt] end)
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '53525R'   then 2.17 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '53645R'   then 2.40 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '53645T'   then 3.00 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = 'HP450R'   then 1.97 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '53036'    then 0.28 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = 'HP350'    then 0.65 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '52000'    then 0.77 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '52000DS'  then 0.48 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '51065'    then 0.37 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '51066'    then 0.67 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '52006'    then 0.35 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '52026'    then 0.35 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '43536'    then 2.47 * [Sales Qty]
                 WHEN [Sales Rep ID] = 'SR0070' and [Item Number] = '58030'    then 3.00 * [Sales Qty]
                end as [Commission Amt]
FROM
(
SELECT          SD.[Customer ID]
,               SD.[Customer Name]
,               CSM.TX40 as [Market]
,               SD.[Customer PO]
,               SD.[Order ID]
,               SD.[Invoice ID]
,               SD.[Order Date]
,               SD.Date as [Invoice Date]
,               SD.[Line Number]
,               SD.Warehouse
,               SD.[Item Number] as [Item Number]
,               IM.Description as [Item Description]
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Brand]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               SD.[Sales Qty]
,               SD.[Sales Amt]
,               SD.[Unit Price]
,               'Consumer' as [Commission Division]
,               CASE WHEN [Customer ID] like '5%' then 'Compact' else 'Countertop' end as [Commission Business Unit]
,               COALESCE(MX0.TAGN, MX2.TAGN, MX3.TAGN, MX4.TAGN, MX5.TAGN, MX8.TAGN, MX9.TAGN) as [Trade Agreement Number]
,               COALESCE(MX0.TREC, MX2.TREC, MX3.TREC, MX4.TREC, MX5.TREC, MX8.TREC, MX9.TREC) as [Sales Rep ID]
,               COALESCE(CS0.TX40, CS2.TX40, CS3.TX40, CS4.TX40, CS5.TX40, CS8.TX40, CS9.TX40) as [Sales Rep Name]
,               OC.RESP as [Sales Manager]
,               NULL as [Buying Group]
,               COALESCE(TR0.RATE, TR2.RATE, TR3.RATE, TR4.RATE, TR5.RATE, TR8.RATE, TR9.RATE)/100 as [Commission Rate]
,               NULL as [Sales Territory]
,               [Sales Type]
,               SUM([Sales Amt]) OVER (PARTITION BY SD.[Customer ID], SD.[Invoice ID]) as [Total Invoice]
FROM            v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON SD.[Customer ID] collate database_default = OC.CUNO collate database_default
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM on SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = MM.ITNO collate database_default
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS ON CS.STKY collate database_default = MM.ITCL AND CS.STCO = 'ITCL' collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = IM.[Item Number] collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTMTX MX0 ON OC.SMCD collate database_default = MX0.OBV1 collate database_default AND SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = MX0.OBV2 collate database_default AND MX0.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX0.PREX = 0
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS0 ON CS0.STKY collate database_default = MX0.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR0 ON MX0.OBV1 collate database_default = TR0.TREC collate database_default AND MX0.TAGN collate database_default = TR0.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTMTX MX2 ON OC.SMCD collate database_default = MX2.OBV1 collate database_default AND SD.[Customer ID] collate database_default = MX2.OBV2 collate database_default AND OC.[CUCL] collate database_default = MX2.OBV3 collate database_default AND MM.[ITCL] collate database_default = MX2.OBV4 collate database_default AND MX2.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX2.PREX = 2
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON CS2.STKY collate database_default = MX2.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS2.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR2 ON MX2.OBV1 collate database_default = TR2.TREC collate database_default AND MX2.TAGN collate database_default = TR2.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTMTX MX3 ON OC.SMCD collate database_default = MX3.OBV1 collate database_default AND SD.[Customer ID] collate database_default = MX3.OBV2 collate database_default AND MM.ITCL collate database_default = MX3.OBV3 collate database_default AND MX3.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX3.PREX = 3
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON CS3.STKY collate database_default = MX3.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS3.STCO collate database_default = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR3 ON MX3.OBV1 collate database_default = TR3.TREC collate database_default AND MX3.TAGN collate database_default = TR3.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTMTX MX4 ON OC.SMCD collate database_default = MX4.OBV1 collate database_default AND OC.[CUCL] collate database_default = MX4.OBV2 collate database_default AND MM.ITCL collate database_default = MX4.OBV3 collate database_default AND OC.CSCD collate database_default = MX4.OBV4 collate database_default AND MX4.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX4.PREX = 4
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS4 ON CS4.STKY collate database_default = MX4.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS4.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR4 ON MX4.OBV1 collate database_default = TR4.TREC collate database_default AND MX4.TAGN collate database_default = TR4.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTMTX MX5 ON OC.SMCD collate database_default = MX5.OBV1 collate database_default AND OC.CUCL collate database_default = MX5.OBV2 collate database_default AND MM.ITCL collate database_default = MX5.OBV3 collate database_default AND MX5.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX5.PREX = 5
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS5 ON CS5.STKY collate database_default = MX5.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS5.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR5 ON MX5.OBV1 collate database_default = TR5.TREC collate database_default AND MX5.TAGN collate database_default = TR5.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTMTX MX8 ON OC.SMCD collate database_default = MX8.OBV1 collate database_default AND MX8.OBV2 collate database_default = MM.ITCL collate database_default AND MX8.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX8.PREX = 8
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS8 ON CS8.STKY collate database_default = MX8.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS8.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR8 ON MX8.OBV1 collate database_default = TR8.TREC collate database_default AND MX8.TAGN collate database_default = TR8.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTMTX MX9 ON OC.SMCD collate database_default = MX9.OBV1 collate database_default AND MX9.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX9.PREX = 9 AND MX9.OBV1 <> 'SR0070'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS9 ON CS9.STKY collate database_default = MX9.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS9.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR9 ON MX9.OBV1  collate database_default = TR9.TREC collate database_default AND MX9.TAGN  collate database_default = TR9.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CSM  on OC.CUCL = CSM.STKY and CSM.STCO = 'CUCL'
WHERE           cast(SD.Date as date) >= '2024-02-01'
AND             OC.SMCD <> 'SR0070'
AND             LEFT(OC.CUNO,1) in ('5', '7')

UNION ALL


SELECT          SD.[Customer ID]
,               SD.[Customer Name]
,               NULL as [Market]
,               SD.[Customer PO]
,               SD.[Order ID]
,               SD.[Invoice ID]
,               SD.[Order Date]
,               SD.Date as [Invoice Date]
,               SD.[Line Number]
,               SD.Warehouse
,               SD.[Item Number] as [Item Number]
,               IM.Description as [Item Description]
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Brand]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               SD.[Sales Qty]
,               SD.[Sales Amt]
,               SD.[Unit Price]
,               'Commercial' as [Commission Division]
,               'Commercial' as [Commission Business Unit]
,               COALESCE(TX0.TAGN, TX3.TAGN, TX5.TAGN) as [Trade Agreement Number]
,               COALESCE(TX0.TREC, TX3.TREC, TX5.TREC) as [Sales Rep ID]
,               COALESCE(CS0.TX40, CS3.TX40, CS5.TX40) as [Sales Rep Name]
,               OC.RESP as [Sales Manager]
,               OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,               COALESCE(TR0.RATE, TR3.RATE, TR5.RATE)/100 as [Commission Rate]
,               OC.CFC9 as [Sales Territory]
,               [Sales Type]
,               SUM([Sales Amt]) OVER (PARTITION BY SD.[Customer ID], SD.[Invoice ID]) as [Total Invoice]
FROM            v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON SD.[Customer ID] collate database_default = OC.CUNO collate database_default
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM on SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = MM.ITNO collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = IM.[Item Number] collate database_default
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX TX0 ON MM.ITNO collate database_default = TX0.OBV1 AND TX0.PREX = 0 AND TX0.TATB = 'COMMERCIAL'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR0 ON TX0.TREC collate database_default = TR0.TREC collate database_default AND TX0.TAGN collate database_default = TR0.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS0 ON CS0.STKY collate database_default = TX0.TREC collate database_default AND CS0.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSMCDX CX3 ON OC.CFC9 collate database_default = CX3.OBV1 AND CX3.PREX = 3
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX TX3 ON OC.CUNO collate database_default = TX3.OBV1 AND TX3.PREX = 3 AND TX3.TATB = 'COMMERCIAL'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR3 ON TX3.TREC collate database_default = TR3.TREC collate database_default AND TX3.TAGN collate database_default = TR3.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON CS3.STKY collate database_default = TX3.TREC collate database_default AND CS3.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSMCDX CX5 ON OC.CFC9 collate database_default = CX5.OBV1 AND MM.ITCL collate database_default = CX5.OBV2 AND CX5.PREX = 4
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX TX5 ON MM.ITCL collate database_default = TX5.OBV2 AND CX5.SMD1 collate database_default = TX5.OBV1 AND TX5.PREX = 5 AND TX5.TATB = 'COMMERCIAL'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OBTREC TR5 ON TX5.TREC collate database_default = TR5.TREC collate database_default AND TX5.TAGN collate database_default = TR5.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS5 ON CS5.STKY collate database_default = TX5.TREC collate database_default AND CS5.STCO = 'SMCD'
WHERE           cast(SD.Date as date) >= '2024-02-01'
AND             LEFT(OC.CUNO,3) in ('COM')

UNION ALL

SELECT          SD.[Customer ID]
,               SD.[Customer Name]
,               NULL as [Market]
,               SD.[Customer PO]
,               SD.[Order ID]
,               SD.[Invoice ID]
,               SD.[Order Date]
,               SD.Date as [Invoice Date]
,               SD.[Line Number]
,               SD.Warehouse
,               SD.[Item Number] as [Item Number]
,               IM.Description as [Item Description]
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Brand]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               SD.[Sales Qty]
,               SD.[Sales Amt]
,               SD.[Unit Price]
,               'Consumer' as [Commission Division]
,               CASE WHEN [Customer ID] like '5%' then 'Compact' else 'Countertop' end as [Commission Business Unit]
,               NULL as [Trade Agreement Number]
,               'SR0070' as [Sales Rep ID]
,               'Richard W. Abbott' as [Sales Rep Name]
,               OC.RESP as [Sales Manager]
,               NULL as [Buying Group]
,               NULL as [Commission Rate]
,               NULL as [Sales Territory]
,               [Sales Type]
,               SUM([Sales Amt]) OVER (PARTITION BY SD.[Customer ID], SD.[Invoice ID]) as [Total Invoice]
FROM            v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON SD.[Customer ID] collate database_default = OC.CUNO collate database_default
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM on SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = MM.ITNO collate database_default
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS ON CS.STKY collate database_default = MM.ITCL AND CS.STCO = 'ITCL' collate database_default
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = IM.[Item Number] collate database_default
WHERE           cast(SD.Date as date) >= '2024-02-01'
AND             OC.SMCD = 'SR0070'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          CUNO as [Customer ID]
,               CINO as [Invoice ID]
,               SUM(CUAM*-1) as [Paid Amt]
,               ACDT as [Paid Date]
,               CASE WHEN RECO = 9 then 'Fully Paid' else 'Not Fully Paid' end as [Paid Status]
FROM            M3.FSLEDG
WHERE           TRCD = 20
GROUP BY        CUNO, CINO, ACDT, CASE WHEN RECO = 9 then 'Fully Paid' else 'Not Fully Paid' end
) B on          A.[Customer ID] collate database_default = B.[Customer ID] and A.[Invoice ID] collate database_default = B.[Invoice ID]

CREATE VIEW v_Commissions_Avanti
--drop view v_Commissions_Avanti
AS
SELECT			distinct OH.ORNO AS SalesOrder
,				OH.CUOR AS CustomerPoNumber
,				OH.RGDT AS OrderDate
,				OH.CUNO AS CustomerId
,				OC.CUNM AS CustomerName
,				OL.PONR AS LineNumber
,               OD.DLIX as DelvNum
,				OL.ORST AS LineStatus
,				OL.ITNO AS Item
,				MM.ITDS AS ItemDescription
,				IH.EXIN AS InvoiceNumber
,				IVDT as InvoiceDate
,				OD.IVQA AS InvoiceQuantity
,				OL.NEPR AS UnitPrice
,				OD.IVQA * OD.NEPR AS TotalMerchandiseValue
,				OH.SMCD AS SalesRep
,				CS.TX40 AS SalesRepName
,				ISNULL(TG.RATE,0) as CommissionRate
,				CAST(ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) AS varchar(10)) + '%' AS CommissionPct
FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH 
INNER JOIN		M3.OOLINE AS OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO 
INNER JOIN		M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
INNER JOIN		M3.MITMAS AS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.ODLINE AS OD ON OL.ORNO = OD.ORNO AND OD.PONR = OL.PONR AND OL.ITNO = OD.ITNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.ODHEAD AS ODH ON OH.ORNO = ODH.ORNO AND OD.DLIX = ODH.DLIX
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX ON OC.CUNO = TX.OBV2 AND TX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX2 ON OH.SMCD = TX2.OBV1 AND TX2.PREX = 6 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTREC AS TG ON ISNULL(TX.TAGN, TX2.TAGN) = TG.TAGN AND OH.SMCD = TG.TREC 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OINVOH AS IH ON ODH.IVNO = IH.IVNO AND ODH.CUNO = IH.PYNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON OH.SMCD = CS.STKY AND STCO = 'SMCD'
WHERE			MM.ITCL = 'AVA'
AND				OL.ORST = '77' 
AND				PRGP = 'FG'
AND             MM.ITNO NOT LIKE 'Z-%'
AND             OC.CUNM NOT LIKE 'NOF%'

CREATE VIEW v_Commissions_LineReps
--drop view v_Commissions_LineReps
AS
/*
SELECT			*
,				CASE WHEN round(ISNULL(PaidInvoice,0),2) >= round(ISNULL(TotalMerchandiseValue,0),2) then 'Paid' else 'Not Paid' end as PaidStatus
,				CASE WHEN round(ISNULL(PaidInvoice,0),2) >= round(ISNULL(TotalMerchandiseValue,0),2) then TotalMerchandiseValue * CommissionRate * 1.00 / 100 else 0 end AS PayableCommission
FROM
(
SELECT			A.*
,				B.PaidDate
,				ROUND(ISNULL(((B.PaidAmount) * 1.00 / SUM(NULLIF (TotalMerchandiseValue, 0)) OVER (Partition BY InvoiceNumber)) * TotalMerchandiseValue, 0), 2) - ROUND(ISNULL((Freight * 1.00 / SUM(NULLIF (TotalMerchandiseValue, 0)) OVER (Partition BY DelvNum)) * TotalMerchandiseValue, 0), 2) AS PaidInvoice
FROM
(          
SELECT			distinct OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order]
,				OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO Number]
,				OH.RGDT AS [Order Date]
,				OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,				OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,				OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,               OD.DLIX as [Delv Num]
,				OL.ORST AS [Line Status]
,				MM.ITCL AS Brand
,				OC.CFC9 AS [Sales Territory]
,				OL.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,				MM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,				IH.EXIN AS InvoiceNumber
,				IVDT as InvoiceDate
,				OD.IVQA AS InvoiceQuantity
,				OD.LNAM/NULLIF(OD.IVQA,0) AS UnitPrice
--,				OD.LNAM AS TotalMerchandiseValue
,               CASE WHEN MP.STRT = 'KIT' AND OL.POSX = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE OD.LNAM END as [TotalMerchandiseValue]
,				OL.SMCD AS SalesRep
,				CS.TX40 AS SalesRepName
,               OC.RESP AS SalesManager
,               OC.SDST AS [Buying Group]
,				ISNULL(TG.RATE,0) as CommissionRate
,				CAST(ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) AS varchar(10)) + '%' AS CommissionPct--, ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) / 100 * OD.IVQA * OD.NEPR AS CommissionAmt
FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH 
INNER JOIN		M3.OOLINE AS OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO 
INNER JOIN		M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
INNER JOIN		M3.MITMAS AS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.ODLINE AS OD ON OL.ORNO = OD.ORNO AND OD.PONR = OL.PONR AND OL.ITNO = OD.ITNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.ODHEAD AS ODH ON OH.ORNO = ODH.ORNO AND OD.DLIX = ODH.DLIX
--LEFT JOIN		M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
--LEFT JOIN		M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND MM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX ON OC.CUNO = TX.OBV1 AND TX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX2 ON MM.ITCL = TX2.OBV2 AND OL.SMCD = TX2.OBV1 AND TX2.PREX = 5 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTREC AS TG ON ISNULL(TX.TAGN, TX2.TAGN) = TG.TAGN AND OL.SMCD = TG.TREC 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OINVOH AS IH ON ODH.IVNO = IH.IVNO AND ODH.CUNO = IH.PYNO 
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON OL.SMCD = CS.STKY AND STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPDHED MP ON MM.ITNO = MP.PRNO AND MP.STRT = 'KIT'
 
WHERE			(OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%')
AND				OL.ORST = '77' 
AND				PRGP = 'FG'
AND				OD.IVQA >= 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          X.*, Y.PaidDate
FROM
(
SELECT          CINO, SUM(CUAM)*-1.00 AS PaidAmount
FROM            M3.FSLEDG
WHERE           TRCD = '20'
GROUP BY        CINO
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			CINO, MAX(ACDT) as PaidDate--, SUM(CUAM-VTAM)*-1.00 AS PaidAmount
FROM            M3.FSLEDG
WHERE			TRCD = '20'
GROUP BY		CINO
) Y             on X.CINO = Y.CINO
) B on A.InvoiceNumber = B.CINO

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			ORNO, DLIX, SUM(ChargeAmt) as Freight
from
(
SELECT			ORNO,DLIX,CRID
,				CASE WHEN CRID = 'FRE002' then CRAM WHEN CRID = 'FRE003' then CRAM*-1 end as ChargeAmt
FROM			M3.OOCHRG
WHERE			CHST = '77'
AND				ISNULL(CASE WHEN CRID = 'FRE002' then CRAM WHEN CRID = 'FRE003' then CRAM*-1 end,0) <> 0
) S
GROUP BY		ORNO, DLIX
) C on A.SalesOrder = C.ORNO and A.DelvNum = C.DLIX
) X

INNER JOIN		M3.OOLINE AS OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO

--LEFT JOIN		M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3

SELECT      [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], [Invoice ID], [Invoice Date], Brand, [Finance Brand]
,           [Line Number], [Item Number], [Item Description], Warehouse, [Sales Territory], [Sales Manager], [Sales Rep], [Sales Rep Name]
,           [Buying Group], [Invoice Qty], [Invoice Amt], [Paid Status], [Paid Date], [Paid Amount]
,           [Commission Rate]
,           ROUND([Paid Amount]*CAST(REPLACE([Commission Rate], char(37), '') as float)/100, 2) as [Commission Amount]
FROM
(
SELECT      *
,           ROUND(CASE WHEN [Paid Amt] < [Total Invoice] THEN [Paid Amt]/[Total Invoice]*[Invoice Amt] else [Invoice Amt] end,2) as [Paid Amount]
FROM        
(
SELECT      A.*
,           SUM([Invoice Amt]) OVER (PARTITION BY A.[Customer ID], A.[Invoice ID]) as [Total Invoice]
,           [Paid Amt]
--,           ROUND(CASE WHEN (SUM([Invoice Amt]) OVER (PARTITION BY A.[Customer ID], A.[Invoice ID]))/NULLIF([Paid Amt],0) <= 1 THEN (SUM([Invoice Amt]) OVER (PARTITION BY A.[Customer ID], A.[Invoice ID]))/NULLIF([Paid Amt],0)*[Invoice Amt] else [Invoice Amt] end,2) as [Paid Amount]
--,           ROUND(CASE WHEN [Invoice Amt]/NULLIF([Paid Amt],0) <= 1 THEN [Invoice Amt]/NULLIF([Paid Amt],0)*[Invoice Amt] else [Invoice Amt] end,2)*CAST(REPLACE([Commission Rate], char(37), '') as float)/100 as [Commission Amount]
FROM
(
SELECT      ODH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,           OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,           OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,           OL.ORNO AS [Order ID]
,           LE.CINO AS [Invoice ID]
,           LE.ACDT as [Invoice Date]
,           CS2.TX40 as Brand
,           IM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,		    OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,           OL.ORST AS [Line Status]
,           IM.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN MP.STRT = 'KIT' AND ODL.POSX = 0 THEN 0
            WHEN LE.CUAM = 0 THEN 0 
            WHEN LE.CINO = '2999910570' then 451*ODL.IVQT else  OL.SAPR*ODL.IVQT END as [Invoice Amt]
,           CASE WHEN LE.CUAM = 0 then 0 else ODL.IVQT end as [Invoice Qty]
,			OC.CFC9 AS [Sales Territory]
,           OC.RESP AS [Sales Manager]
,           OC.SDST AS [Buying Group]
,			OL.SMCD AS [Sales Rep]
,			CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep Name]
,		    CAST(ISNULL(TG.RATE, 0) AS varchar(10)) + '%' as [Commission Rate]
,           CASE WHEN LE.RECO = 9 then 'Paid' else 'Not Paid' end as [Paid Status]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(LE.REDE,0) as varchar(8)) as date) as [Paid Date]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 on IM.ITCL = CS2.STKY and cs2.STCO = 'ITCL'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS on OL.SMCD = CS.STKY and cs.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPDHED MP ON IM.ITNO = MP.PRNO AND MP.STRT = 'KIT'
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX ON OC.CUNO = TX.OBV1 AND TX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTMTX AS TX2 ON IM.ITCL = TX2.OBV2 AND OL.SMCD = TX2.OBV1 AND TX2.PREX = 5 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTREC AS TG ON ISNULL(TX.TAGN, TX2.TAGN) = TG.TAGN AND OL.SMCD = TG.TREC 
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
AND             OC.OREF <> 'TLC INTERCOMPANY'
AND             ODH.ORNO NOT IN ('1000001170', '1000026212', '5000004149', '1000020120')
AND             LE.CINO NOT IN ('2400163940', '2999910397', '2999910571', '2400083573', '2400083579', '2400083575', '2400088771'
                                , '2400088775', '2400088773', '2400088788', '2400102150', '2400081300', '2400068696', '2400060092', '2400163926'
                                , '2400053326', '2400052745', '2400052544', '2400052542', '2400053348', '2400053347', '2400052543', '2400054060',
                                '2400054065', '2400053659', '2400060082', '2400060083', '2400054063', '2400054064', '2400053660', '2400058368',
                                '2400058376', '2400058378', '2400058380', '2400058374', '2400058366', '2400058382', '2400058372', '2400058358',
                                '2400058362', '2400058364', '2400058356',  '2400058360', '2400058384', '2400058370'
                                )
and             (OC.CUNO LIKE 'COM%')
AND				PRGP = 'FG'
AND             LE.RECO = 9
AND             CAST(CAST(NULLIF(LE.REDE,0) as varchar(8)) as date) BETWEEN '2024-08-01' AND '2024-08-31'
--AND             OC.CUNO = 'COM00487'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          CUNO as [Customer ID]
,               CINO as [Invoice ID]
,               SUM(CUAM*-1) as [Paid Amt]
FROM            M3.FSLEDG
WHERE           TRCD = 20
GROUP BY        CUNO, CINO
) B on          A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] and A.[Invoice ID] = B.[Invoice ID]
) X
) X2
