CREATE VIEW         v_Commissions_Lookup
-- drop view v_Commissions_Lookup
as
SELECT              A.*,
                    COALESCE(MX0.TAGN, MX2.TAGN, MX3.TAGN, MX4.TAGN, MX5.TAGN, MX8.TAGN, MX9.TAGN) as [Trade Agreement Number],
                    COALESCE(TR0.RATE, TR2.RATE, TR3.RATE, TR4.RATE, TR5.RATE, TR8.RATE, TR9.RATE)/100 as [Commission Rate],
                    'Consumer' as [Division]
FROM                v_Commissions_CrossJoin A
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTMTX MX0 ON A.[Sales Rep ID] collate database_default = MX0.OBV1 collate database_default AND A.[Item Number] collate database_default = MX0.OBV2 collate database_default AND MX0.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX0.PREX = 0
LEFT JOIN           M3.CSYTAB CS0 ON CS0.STKY collate database_default = MX0.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS0.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR0 ON MX0.OBV1 collate database_default = TR0.TREC collate database_default AND MX0.TAGN collate database_default = TR0.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTMTX MX2 ON A.[Sales Rep ID] collate database_default = MX2.OBV1 collate database_default AND A.[Customer Number] collate database_default = MX2.OBV2 collate database_default AND A.[Market Key] collate database_default = MX2.OBV3 collate database_default AND A.[Item Number] collate database_default = MX2.OBV4 collate database_default AND MX2.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX2.PREX = 2
LEFT JOIN           M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON CS2.STKY collate database_default = MX2.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS2.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR2 ON MX2.OBV1 collate database_default = TR2.TREC collate database_default AND MX2.TAGN collate database_default = TR2.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTMTX MX3 ON A.[Sales Rep ID] collate database_default = MX3.OBV1 collate database_default AND A.[Customer Number] collate database_default = MX3.OBV2 collate database_default AND A.[Item Number] collate database_default = MX3.OBV3 collate database_default AND MX3.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX3.PREX = 3
LEFT JOIN           M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON CS3.STKY collate database_default = MX3.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS3.STCO collate database_default = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR3 ON MX3.OBV1 collate database_default = TR3.TREC collate database_default AND MX3.TAGN collate database_default = TR3.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTMTX MX4 ON A.[Sales Rep ID] collate database_default = MX4.OBV1 collate database_default AND A.[Market Key] collate database_default = MX4.OBV2 collate database_default AND A.[Item Number] collate database_default = MX4.OBV3 collate database_default AND A.Country collate database_default = MX4.OBV4 collate database_default AND MX4.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX4.PREX = 4
LEFT JOIN           M3.CSYTAB CS4 ON CS4.STKY collate database_default = MX4.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS4.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR4 ON MX4.OBV1 collate database_default = TR4.TREC collate database_default AND MX4.TAGN collate database_default = TR4.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTMTX MX5 ON A.[Sales Rep ID] collate database_default = MX5.OBV1 collate database_default AND A.[Market Key] collate database_default = MX5.OBV2 collate database_default AND A.[Item Number] collate database_default = MX5.OBV3 collate database_default AND MX5.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX5.PREX = 5
LEFT JOIN           M3.CSYTAB CS5 ON CS5.STKY collate database_default = MX5.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS5.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR5 ON MX5.OBV1 collate database_default = TR5.TREC collate database_default AND MX5.TAGN collate database_default = TR5.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTMTX MX8 ON A.[Sales Rep ID] collate database_default = MX8.OBV1 collate database_default AND MX8.OBV2 collate database_default = A.[Item Number] collate database_default AND MX8.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX8.PREX = 8
LEFT JOIN           M3.CSYTAB CS8 ON CS8.STKY collate database_default = MX8.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS8.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR8 ON MX8.OBV1 collate database_default = TR8.TREC collate database_default AND MX8.TAGN collate database_default = TR8.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTMTX MX9 ON A.[Sales Rep ID] collate database_default = MX9.OBV1 collate database_default AND MX9.TATB = 'CONSUMER' AND MX9.PREX = 9 AND MX9.OBV1 <> 'SR0070'
LEFT JOIN           M3.CSYTAB CS9 ON CS9.STKY collate database_default = MX9.OBV1 collate database_default AND CS9.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR9 ON MX9.OBV1  collate database_default = TR9.TREC collate database_default AND MX9.TAGN  collate database_default = TR9.TAGN collate database_default
WHERE               A.[Sales Rep ID] <> 'SR0070'
AND                 COALESCE(TR0.RATE, TR2.RATE, TR3.RATE, TR4.RATE, TR5.RATE, TR8.RATE, TR9.RATE) IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL       

SELECT              A.*,
                    COALESCE(TX0.TAGN, TX3.TAGN, TX5.TAGN) as [Trade Agreement Number],
                    COALESCE(TR0.RATE, TR3.RATE, TR5.RATE)/100 as [Commission Rate],
                    'Commercial' as [Division]
FROM                v_Commissions_CrossJoin A
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTMTX TX0 ON A.[Item Number] collate database_default = TX0.OBV1 AND TX0.PREX = 0
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR0 ON TX0.TREC collate database_default = TR0.TREC collate database_default AND TX0.TAGN collate database_default = TR0.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN           M3.CSMCDX CX3 ON A.[Sales Territory] collate database_default = CX3.OBV1 AND CX3.PREX = 3
LEFT JOIN		        M3.OBTMTX TX3 ON A.[Customer Number] collate database_default = TX3.OBV1 AND TX3.PREX = 3
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR3 ON TX3.TREC collate database_default = TR3.TREC collate database_default AND TX3.TAGN collate database_default = TR3.TAGN collate database_default
LEFT JOIN		        M3.CSMCDX CX5 ON A.[Sales Territory] collate database_default = CX5.OBV1 AND A.[Brand Key] collate database_default = CX5.OBV2 AND CX5.PREX = 4
LEFT JOIN		        M3.OBTMTX TX5 ON A.[Brand Key] collate database_default = TX5.OBV2 AND CX5.SMD1 collate database_default = TX5.OBV1 AND TX5.PREX = 5
LEFT JOIN           M3.OBTREC TR5 ON TX5.TREC collate database_default = TR5.TREC collate database_default AND TX5.TAGN collate database_default = TR5.TAGN collate database_default
AND                 COALESCE(TR0.RATE, TR3.RATE, TR5.RATE) IS NOT NULL

CREATE VIEW 			v_CostData
AS

-- drop view v_CostData

SELECT			'AFS' as Division_From
,				CASE WHEN ATS.Customer = 'EDGECOR' then 'ECM'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'OMEGPRO' then 'SCO'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'LEGIIND' THEN 'LEGION'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'AVANRES' THEN 'AVANTI'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('EXCALIB', 'BLAKESL', 'BLAKFOO', 'ZEROLL') THEN 'SCL'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'GREEWOR' THEN 'SCG'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'KOLDDRA' THEN 'SCK'
				ELSE 'AFS' END as Division_To
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				DF.Brand IN ('GENERAL', 'MAXX COLD', 'MAXX ICE', 'SAPPHIRE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode, CASE WHEN ATS.Customer = 'EDGECOR' then 'ECM'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'OMEGPRO' then 'SCO'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'LEGIIND' THEN 'LEGION'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'AVANRES' THEN 'AVANTI'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('EXCALIB', 'BLAKESL', 'BLAKFOO', 'ZEROLL') THEN 'SCL'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'GREEWOR' THEN 'SCG'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'KOLDDRA' THEN 'SCK'
				ELSE 'AFS' END

UNION ALL

SELECT			'LEGACY' as Division_From
,				CASE WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('ASBURBL', 'ASBURBV', 'ASBUREX', 'ASBURKD', 'ASBURZE') then 'SCA'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('AMAEDGZ', 'EDGECBV', 'EDGECOR', 'EDGECZE') then 'ECM'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('LEGIOBV', 'LEGIOEX') THEN 'LEGION'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('AVANTII', 'AVANRES') THEN 'AVANTI'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('GREWOBE', 'GREWOBL', 'GREWOEX', 'GREWOKD', 'GREWOZE') THEN 'SCG'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('OMEGABV', 'OMEGABL', 'OMEGAEX', 'OMEGAKD', 'OMEGAZE') THEN 'SCO'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'KOLDDBL' THEN 'SCK'
				ELSE 'LEGACY' END as Division_To
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				DF.Brand IN ('ZEROLL', 'EXCALIBUR', 'BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode, CASE WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('ASBURBL', 'ASBURBV', 'ASBUREX', 'ASBURKD', 'ASBURZE') then 'SCA'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('AMAEDGZ', 'EDGECBV', 'EDGECOR', 'EDGECZE') then 'ECM'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('LEGIOBV', 'LEGIOEX') THEN 'LEGION'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('AVANTII', 'AVANRES') THEN 'AVANTI'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('GREWOBE', 'GREWOBL', 'GREWOEX', 'GREWOKD', 'GREWOZE') THEN 'SCG'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('OMEGABV', 'OMEGABL', 'OMEGAEX', 'OMEGAKD', 'OMEGAZE') THEN 'SCO'
				WHEN ATS.Customer = 'KOLDDBL' THEN 'SCK'
				ELSE 'LEGACY' END

UNION ALL

SELECT			'OMEGA' as Division_From
,				CASE WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('ASB001') then 'SCA'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('EDG001', 'EDG002', 'EDG003') then 'ECM'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('GRE062') THEN 'SCG'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('WESTBEN', 'YON001') THEN 'WBM'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('ZERCO') THEN 'SCL'
				ELSE 'OMEGA' END as Division_To
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode, CASE WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('ASB001') then 'SCA'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('EDG001', 'EDG002', 'EDG003') then 'ECM'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('GRE062') THEN 'SCG'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('WESTBEN', 'YON001') THEN 'WBM'
				WHEN ATS.Customer IN ('ZERCO') THEN 'SCL'
				ELSE 'OMEGA' END

UNION ALL

SELECT			'ECM' as Division_From
,				CASE WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('ASB001') then 'SCA'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('V927830') then 'AVANTI'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('BL3663', 'DC26', 'E107181', 'EX0001', 'ZERCO', 'ZZEXADV', 'ZZEXDCN', 'ZZEXDIR', 'ZZEXWEBCN') THEN 'SCL'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005','OM7336', 'OM7337', 'OM8050', 'V555005', 'Y555005', 'Z119021', 'ZZOMADV', 'ZZOMREP', 
									    'ZZOMWAP', 'ZZREP', 'ZZWARCN', 'ZZWARR', 'ZZWARRC') THEN 'SCO'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('VINOTEMP') THEN 'VINOTEMP'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('C119023', 'DC28', 'V01', 'V325450', 'VINTURI2', 'VINTW', 'VINTWC', 'W01', 'W119020', 'W119026', 
										'Y01', 'YOEMP', 'YONAH', 'YONASC', 'YONAW', 'YONAWC') THEN 'WBM'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('AR5569', 'AT6708', 'AZ1111', 'BL3456', 'CO1703', 'CO4930', 'DA5333', 'DA6180',
										 'DE8888', 'DU2913', 'E527663', 'EN1111', 'FAR682', 'GE2828', 'GI0815', 'GR1111',
										 'GR7336', 'GR7337', 'GR7338', 'GWT-LANDIG', 'HB0445', 'HO2804', 'IFA111', 'JA2345',
										 'JA6001', 'KA0142', 'KI3040', 'KI6616', 'KU0951', 'LA1111', 'LI0909', 'MA6040', 'N200000',
										 'N200001', 'NA4484', 'NEX380', 'OP4886', 'RB6760', 'RE1503', 'RI3390', 'RO6500', 'SH2772',
										 'SI1732', 'TA1100', 'TO3145', 'TOM111', 'TR2660', 'V200000', 'V200001', 'VA7855', 'WB1000',
										 'Y200000', 'Y200001') THEN 'SCG'
				ELSE 'ECM' END as Division_To
,				P.ID COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				AVG(CPC.COST) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND				P.USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'OMEGA', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID, CASE WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('ASB001') then 'SCA'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('V927830') then 'AVANTI'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('BL3663', 'DC26', 'E107181', 'EX0001', 'ZERCO', 'ZZEXADV', 'ZZEXDCN', 'ZZEXDIR', 'ZZEXWEBCN') THEN 'SCL'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005','OM7336', 'OM7337', 'OM8050', 'V555005', 'Y555005', 'Z119021', 'ZZOMADV', 'ZZOMREP', 
									    'ZZOMWAP', 'ZZREP', 'ZZWARCN', 'ZZWARR', 'ZZWARRC') THEN 'SCO'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('VINOTEMP') THEN 'VINOTEMP'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('C119023', 'DC28', 'V01', 'V325450', 'VINTURI2', 'VINTW', 'VINTWC', 'W01', 'W119020', 'W119026', 
										'Y01', 'YOEMP', 'YONAH', 'YONASC', 'YONAW', 'YONAWC') THEN 'WBM'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('AR5569', 'AT6708', 'AZ1111', 'BL3456', 'CO1703', 'CO4930', 'DA5333', 'DA6180',
										 'DE8888', 'DU2913', 'E527663', 'EN1111', 'FAR682', 'GE2828', 'GI0815', 'GR1111',
										 'GR7336', 'GR7337', 'GR7338', 'GWT-LANDIG', 'HB0445', 'HO2804', 'IFA111', 'JA2345',
										 'JA6001', 'KA0142', 'KI3040', 'KI6616', 'KU0951', 'LA1111', 'LI0909', 'MA6040', 'N200000',
										 'N200001', 'NA4484', 'NEX380', 'OP4886', 'RB6760', 'RE1503', 'RI3390', 'RO6500', 'SH2772',
										 'SI1732', 'TA1100', 'TO3145', 'TOM111', 'TR2660', 'V200000', 'V200001', 'VA7855', 'WB1000',
										 'Y200000', 'Y200001') THEN 'SCG'
				ELSE 'ECM' END

UNION ALL

SELECT			'WBM' as Division_From
,				CASE WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('V927830') then 'AVANTI'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E107181', 'L613875') THEN 'SCL'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585') THEN 'SCO'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006') THEN 'ECM'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E527663', 'N200001', 'V200001', 'Y200001', 'N200000' , 'V200000', 'Y200000') THEN 'SCG'
				ELSE 'WBM' END as Division_To
,				P.ID COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				AVG(UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND				P.USER_1 IN ('WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID, CASE WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('V927830') then 'AVANTI'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E107181', 'L613875') THEN 'SCL'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585') THEN 'SCO'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006') THEN 'ECM'
				WHEN CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E527663', 'N200001', 'V200001', 'Y200001', 'N200000' , 'V200000', 'Y200000') THEN 'SCG'
				ELSE 'WBM' END

UNION ALL

SELECT			'VINOTEMP' as Division_From
,				CASE WHEN E.id IN ('308120', '308712') then 'ECM'
				WHEN E.id IN ('307440', '308759') then 'AVANTI'
				WHEN E.id IN ('308693') THEN 'GWT'
				ELSE 'VINOTEMP' END as Division_To
,				itemid COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT as [Part ID]
,				MAX(trandate) as [Date]
,				AVG(SI.costestimate) as CostValue
FROM			NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			NET.Item i on SI.item = I.id
JOIN			NET.Entity E on SI.entity = E.id
WHERE			trandate >= '2019-01-01'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(trandate, 'yyyy-MM'), itemid, CASE WHEN E.id IN ('308120', '308712') then 'ECM'
				WHEN E.id IN ('307440', '308759') then 'AVANTI'
				WHEN E.id IN ('308693') THEN 'GWT'
				ELSE 'VINOTEMP' END

UNION ALL

SELECT			'AVANTI' as Division_From
,				CASE WHEN aih.[cust-key] IN ('00074660') then 'ECM'
				ELSE 'AVANTI' END as Division_To
,				aii.[item-key] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT as [Part ID]
,				MAX(aih.[ref-date]) as [Date]
,				AVG(aii.[total-sales-cost]) as CostValue
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= '2019-01-01'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(aih.[ref-date], 'yyyy-MM'), aii.[item-key], CASE WHEN aih.[cust-key] IN ('00074660') then 'ECM'
				ELSE 'AVANTI' END

CREATE VIEW     v_CriticalParts
-- drop view v_CriticalParts
as
SELECT          MW.MFNO AS                  [Manufacturing Order]
,               MW.PRNO AS                  [Product Number]
,               MW.STDT AS                  [Start Date]
,               MW.FIDT AS                  [Finish Date]
,               MW.WHLO AS                  [Warehouse]
,               MW.WCLN AS                  [Production Line]
,               MW.RESP AS                  [Responsible]
,               MW.ORQA AS                  [Finished Good Order Qty]
,               MM.MTNO AS                  [Component]
,               MM.REQA AS                  [Component Qty]
,               MB.SUNO AS                  [Supplier]
,               IM.ITDS AS                  [Component Description]
,     ISNULL(SUM(ML.ORQA - ML.RVQA),0) AS   [Open Qty]
,               SUM(MB.STQT) AS             [On Hand Qty]
,               MW.WHST AS                  [MO Status]
FROM            M3.MWOHED MW
JOIN            M3.MWOMAT MM ON MW.MFNO = MM.MFNO AND MW.PRNO = MM.PRNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITMAS IM ON MM.MTNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITBAL MB ON MM.MTNO = MB.ITNO AND MW.WHLO = MB.WHLO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPLINE ML ON MM.MTNO = ML.ITNO AND MM.WHLO = ML.WHLO AND PUSL <> '99'
GROUP BY        MW.MFNO, MW.PRNO, MW.STDT, MW.FIDT, MW.WHLO, MW.WCLN, MW.RESP
,               MW.ORQA, MM.MTNO, MM.REQA, MB.SUNO, IM.ITDS, MW.WHST

CREATE VIEW v_CurrencyConversion
as
SELECT      DISTINCT C1.CUCD, ARAT
FROM        M3.CCURRA C1
INNER JOIN  (
            SELECT CUCD, MAX(CUTD) as MaxDate
            FROM M3.CCURRA
            WHERE CRTP = '1'
            GROUP BY CUCD
            ) C2 on C1.CUCD = C2.CUCD and C1.CUTD = C2.MaxDate
WHERE       C1.CRTP = '1'
AND         C1.CUCD = 'CAD'

UNION

SELECT      'USD' AS CUCD, 1 AS ARAT

CREATE VIEW     v_CustomerLookup
--drop view v_CustomerLookup
AS
SELECT          CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,               ALCU AS [Search Key]
,               CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,               YRE2 as [Vendor Number]
,               SMCD as [Sales Rep ID]
,               CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep Name]
,               RESP as [Sales Manager ID]
,               CUCL AS [Market]
,               A330 AS [Sales Admin]
,               FRE1 AS [Business Unit]
,               CFC0 as [EDI Flag]
,               TEDL AS [Delivery Terms]
,               TEPY AS [Payment Terms]
,               CFC8 AS [Base Price List]
,               STAT AS [Status]
,               CUA1 AS [Address 1]
,               CUA2 AS [Address 2]
,               CUA3 AS [Address 3]
,               CUA4 AS [Address 4]
FROM            M3.OCUSMA OC
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.SMCD = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA' AND A330 <> ''

CREATE VIEW v_CustomerMaster
AS
SELECT      CUNO AS     [Customer Number]
,           CUNM AS     [Customer Name]
,           CUA1 AS     [Address 1]
,           CUA2 AS     [Address 2]
,           CUA3 AS     [Address 3]
,           TOWN AS     [City]
,           PONO AS     [Zip Code]
,           ECAR AS     [State]
,           CSCD AS     [Country]
,           RESP AS     [Manager]
,           SMCD AS     [Sales Rep ID]
,           CS.TX40 AS  [Sals Rep Name]
FROM        M3.OCUSMA OC
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CS.STKY = OC.SMCD AND CS.STCO = 'SMCD'
WHERE       CUNO LIKE 'COM%'

create view v_CustomerSalesRepXRef
--drop view v_CustomerSalesRepXRef
as
select distinct CUNO, CUNM, SMCD, TX40 from M3.OCUSMA OC JOIN M3.CSYTAB CS on OC.SMCD = CS.STKY and STCO = 'SMCD'

CREATE VIEW     v_DCP_Consolidation
-- drop view v_DCP_Consolidation
-- select * from v_DCP_Consolidation where [Item Number] = 'AFO52295SS'
as
SELECT          OC.CUNO [Customer Number]
,               OC.CUNM [Customer Name]
,               OH.ORNO [Order Number]
,               OH.CUOR [PO Number]
,               OH.ORDT [Order Date]
,               OL.DWDT [Requested Date]
,               OH.UCA7 [Carrier]
,               OH.ADID [Ship to ID]
,               AD.TOWN [Ship to City]
,               AD.PONO [Ship to Zip]
,               AD.ECAR [Ship to State]
,               OL.ITNO [Item Number]
,               OL.ORQT [Order Qty]
,               NULLIF(IC.D1QT,1) [Case Pack]
,               NULLIF(IC2.D1QT,1) [Pallet Pack]
,               ISNULL(OL.ORQT/NULLIF(NULLIF(IC.D1QT,1),0),OL.ORQT) [Carton Qty]
,               OL.ORQT/NULLIF(NULLIF(IC2.D1QT,1),0) [Pallet Qty]
,               MM.GRWE [Gross Weight]
,               ISNULL(NULLIF(MP.PACL,1), NULLIF(MP3.PACL,1))[Case Length]
,               ISNULL(NULLIF(MP.PACW,1), NULLIF(MP3.PACW,1)) [Case Width]
,               ISNULL(NULLIF(MP.PACH,1), NULLIF(MP3.PACH,1)) [Case Height]
,               ISNULL(NULLIF((MP.PACL*MP.PACW*MP.PACH),1),NULLIF((MP3.PACL*MP3.PACW*MP3.PACH),1))/(1728) AS Volume
,               OL.ORQT*MM.GRWE [Total Weight]
,               OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
FROM            M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPACIT IC ON MM.ITNO = IC.ITNO AND IC.PACT LIKE 'C%'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPAC MP ON IC.PACT = MP.PACT
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPACIT IC2 ON MM.ITNO = IC2.ITNO AND IC2.PACT LIKE 'P%' and IC2.PACT NOT IN ('PALLET', 'P00000')
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPAC MP2 ON IC2.PACT = MP2.PACT
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPACIT IC3 ON MM.ITNO = IC3.ITNO AND IC3.PACT LIKE 'E%'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPAC MP3 ON IC3.PACT = MP3.PACT
LEFT JOIN       M3.OOADRE AD ON OH.ORNO = AD.ORNO AND AD.ADRT = '1'
WHERE           OL.ORST <= '33'

CREATE VIEW v_Discontinued
-- drop view v_Discontinued
-- drop external table SLS.Discontinued
AS
SELECT  SKU
,       Description
,       [Aligned Item Number]
,       Model as [Base Model SKU]
,       'Discontinued' as Status
,       [Manufactured or Purchased]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Miscellaneous Charge' else [Item Type] end as [Item Type]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Consumer' else [Business Unit] end as [Business Unit]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Compact' else [Division] end as [Division]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Vinotemp' else [Finance Brand] end as [Finance Brand]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Vinotemp' WHEN SKU IN ('V1016', 'V9042') then 'Vinturi' else [Brand] end as [Brand]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Vinotemp' else [Sub-Brand] end as [Sub-Brand]
,       [Product Line]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Others' else [Category] end as [Category]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Others' else [Subcategory] end as [Subcategory]
FROM SLS.Discontinued

CREATE VIEW     v_DistributionOrders
as
SELECT      DISTINCT MH.TRNR AS [Order Number]
,           MH.TRTP AS [Order Type]
,           MH.TRDT AS [Order Date]
,           MH.WHLO AS [From Warehouse]
,           MH.TWLO AS [To Warehouse]
,           ML.PONR AS [Line Number]
,           '2 - Reserved' AS [Status]
,           ML.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,           RPQT - QTIT - QTRL - DPQT - ALQT as Qty
FROM        M3.MGHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MGLINE ML ON MH.TRNR = ML.TRNR AND MH.WHLO = ML.WHLO
WHERE       MH.TRTP IN ('D02', 'D10', 'D11', 'D40', 'D60', 'D65', 'D82', 'PPN')
AND         RPQT - QTIT - QTRL - DPQT - ALQT > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      DISTINCT MH.TRNR AS [Order Number]
,           MH.TRTP AS [Order Type]
,           MH.TRDT AS [Order Date]
,           MH.WHLO AS [From Warehouse]
,           MH.TWLO AS [To Warehouse]
,           ML.PONR AS [Line Number]
,           '3 - Allocated' AS [Status]
,           ML.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,           ALQT as Qty
FROM        M3.MGHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MGLINE ML ON MH.TRNR = ML.TRNR AND MH.WHLO = ML.WHLO
WHERE       MH.TRTP IN ('D02', 'D10', 'D11', 'D40', 'D60', 'D65', 'D82', 'PPN')
AND         ALQT > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      DISTINCT MH.TRNR AS [Order Number]
,           MH.TRTP AS [Order Type]
,           MH.TRDT AS [Order Date]
,           MH.WHLO AS [From Warehouse]
,           MH.TWLO AS [To Warehouse]
,           ML.PONR AS [Line Number]
,           '4 - Dispatched' AS [Status]
,           ML.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,           DPQT as Qty
FROM        M3.MGHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MGLINE ML ON MH.TRNR = ML.TRNR AND MH.WHLO = ML.WHLO
WHERE       MH.TRTP IN ('D02', 'D10', 'D11', 'D40', 'D60', 'D65', 'D82', 'PPN')
AND         DPQT > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      DISTINCT MH.TRNR AS [Order Number]
,           MH.TRTP AS [Order Type]
,           MH.TRDT AS [Order Date]
,           MH.WHLO AS [From Warehouse]
,           MH.TWLO AS [To Warehouse]
,           ML.PONR AS [Line Number]
,           '5 - Relocated' AS [Status]
,           ML.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,           QTRL as Qty
FROM        M3.MGHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MGLINE ML ON MH.TRNR = ML.TRNR AND MH.WHLO = ML.WHLO
WHERE       MH.TRTP IN ('D02', 'D10', 'D11', 'D40', 'D60', 'D65', 'D82', 'PPN')
AND         QTRL > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      DISTINCT MH.TRNR AS [Order Number]
,           MH.TRTP AS [Order Type]
,           MH.TRDT AS [Order Date]
,           MH.WHLO AS [From Warehouse]
,           MH.TWLO AS [To Warehouse]
,           ML.PONR AS [Line Number]
,           '6 - In Transit' AS [Status]
,           ML.ITNO AS  [Item Number]
,           QTIT as Qty
FROM        M3.MGHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MGLINE ML ON MH.TRNR = ML.TRNR AND MH.WHLO = ML.WHLO
WHERE       MH.TRTP IN ('D02', 'D10', 'D11', 'D40', 'D60', 'D65', 'D82', 'PPN')
AND         QTIT > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      DISTINCT MH.TRNR AS [Order Number]
,           MH.TRTP AS [Order Type]
,           MH.TRDT AS [Order Date]
,           MH.WHLO AS [From Warehouse]
,           MH.TWLO AS [To Warehouse]
,           ML.PONR AS [Line Number]
,           '9 - Reported' AS [Status]
,           ML.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,           RPQT as Qty
FROM        M3.MGHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MGLINE ML ON MH.TRNR = ML.TRNR AND MH.WHLO = ML.WHLO
WHERE       MH.TRTP IN ('D02', 'D10', 'D11', 'D40', 'D60', 'D65', 'D82', 'PPN')
AND         RPQT > 0

4000001144

select * from m3.mittra where ridn = '4000001144'

SELECT          '350939' AS VendorNumber
,               'LEGACY ASBURY' as Vendor
,               IVNO as InvoiceNumber
,               left(CAST(CAST(IVDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) as InvoiceDate
,               left(dateadd(day, 30, CAST(CAST(IVDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)), 10) as DueDate
,               RIGHT(CUNM,5) AS StoreNumber

--CREATE VIEW v_ECM_EAV_Cost
    --as

    -- drop view v_ECM_EAV_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue*[Sales Qty] as [Cost APR]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct 'Compact' as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
--,               CPC.COST*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost]
--,				(UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost Visual]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
--LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
AND				P.USER_1 IN ('AVANTI')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Compact' as Division
,				aii.[item-code] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT as [Part ID]
,				MAX(aih.[ref-date]) as [Date]
,				AVG(aii.[total-sales-cost]) as CostValue
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= '2019-01-01'
AND				aih.[cust-key] IN ('00053030', '00074660')
AND             aih.[ref-num] not like 'CM%'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(aih.[ref-date], 'yyyy-MM'), aii.[item-code]
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('AVANTI')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Compact' as Division
,				aii.[item-code] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT as [Part ID]
,				MAX(aih.[ref-date]) as [Date]
,				AVG(aii.[total-sales-cost]/NULLIF(aii.qty,0)) as CostValue
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= '2019-01-01'
AND				aih.[cust-key] IN ('00053030', '00074660')
AND             aih.[ref-num] not like 'CM%'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(aih.[ref-date], 'yyyy-MM'), aii.[item-code]
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW v_ECM_EL_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_ECM_EL_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost L]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct 'Countertop' as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               REPLACE(REPLACE(P.ID, 'ZT-ZR', 'ZR'),'ZT', 'ZR') as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               CPC.COST*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost ECM]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
AND				P.USER_1 IN ('ZEROLL', 'EXCALIBUR')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				REPLACE(ATD.StockCode, 'ZT', 'ZR') collate database_Default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('ZEROLL', 'EXCALIBUR')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('AMAEDGZ', 'EDGECBV', 'EDGECOR', 'EDGECZE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('ZEROLL', 'EXCALIBUR')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				REPLACE(ATD.StockCode, 'ZT', 'ZR') collate database_Default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('ZEROLL', 'EXCALIBUR')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('AMAEDGZ', 'EDGECBV', 'EDGECOR', 'EDGECZE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW v_ECM_EVINO_Cost

FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct 'Consumer' as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]

,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
--,               CPC.COST*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost]
--,				(UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost Visual]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
--LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
AND				P.USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Consumer' as Division
,				CAST(itemid as varchar(max)) as [Part ID]
,				MAX(trandate) as [Date]
,				AVG(SI.costestimate*-1/itemcount) as CostValue
FROM			NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			NET.Item I on SI.item = I.id
WHERE			SI.entity IN ('308120', '308712')
AND				itemcount > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(trandate, 'yyyy-MM'), CAST(itemid as varchar(max))
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('VINOTEMP')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Consumer' as Division
,				CAST(itemid as varchar(max)) as [Part ID]
,				MAX(trandate) as [Date]
,				AVG(SI.costestimate*-1/itemcount) as CostValue
FROM			NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			NET.Item I on SI.item = I.id
WHERE			SI.entity IN ('308120', '308712')
AND				itemcount > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(trandate, 'yyyy-MM'), CAST(itemid as varchar(max))
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('YONANAS') AND PS.SITE_ID = '40'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW v_FreightOut
--DROP VIEW v_FreightOut
as
SELECT      ORNO AS [Order ID]
,           CASE WHEN CRID = 'FRE002' then 'Freight Income' else 'Freight Expense' end as [Freight Charge]
,           SUM(CRAM) AS [Charge Amount]
FROM        M3.OOCHRG
WHERE       CRID IN ('FRE002', 'FRE003')
GROUP BY    ORNO,  CASE WHEN CRID = 'FRE002' then 'Freight Income' else 'Freight Expense' end

Create view v_FreightOutProfitLoss
-- drop view v_FreightOutProfitLoss
as 
SELECT AIT1 , CUNO , [Item Number] , Month , Year 
, SUM([Total Weight]/NULLIF(InvWeightTotal, 0)*Amount) as Amount 
FROM ( 
    SELECT '711020' as [AIT1] , [Invoice ID] , cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [CUNO] 
    , SD.[Part ID - Actual] as [Item Number] , COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty] as [Total Weight] 
    , [Sales Qty] 
    , SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Customer ID], [Invoice ID]) as InvWeightTotal 
    , MONTH(ACDT) as Month , YEAR(ACDT) as Year , SUM([ACAM]) as Amount 
    FROM M3.FGLEDG FG 
    JOIN a_SalesData SD on LEFT(SUBSTRING(FG.VTXT,CHARINDEX(' 24',FG.VTXT)+1,LEN(FG.VTXT)),10) = SD.[Invoice ID] 
    LEFT JOIN BI_ItemMaster MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.[Item Number] 
    LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS IM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = IM.ITNO 
    WHERE FG.AIT1 = '711020' 
    AND AIT7 = 'OI201411' 
    AND YEAR(ACDT) in (2024)
    GROUP BY [Customer ID] , [Invoice ID] , SD.[Part ID - Actual] , [Sales Qty] 
    , YEAR([ACDT]) , MONTH([ACDT]) , COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty] 
    ) A 
    GROUP BY AIT1 , CUNO , [Item Number] , Month , Year

    UNION ALL

SELECT AIT1 , CUNO , [Item Number] , Month , Year 
, SUM([Total Weight]/NULLIF(InvWeightTotal, 0)*Amount) as Amount 
FROM ( 
    SELECT '431010' as [AIT1] , [Invoice ID] , cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [CUNO] 
    , SD.[Part ID - Actual] as [Item Number] , COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty] as [Total Weight] 
    , [Sales Qty] 
    , SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Customer ID], [Invoice ID]) as InvWeightTotal 
    , MONTH(ACDT) as Month , YEAR(ACDT) as Year , SUM([ACAM]*-1) as Amount 
    FROM M3.FGLEDG FG 
    JOIN a_SalesData SD on LEFT(SUBSTRING(FG.VTXT,CHARINDEX(' 24',FG.VTXT)+1,LEN(FG.VTXT)),10) = SD.[Invoice ID] 
    LEFT JOIN BI_ItemMaster MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.[Item Number] 
    LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS IM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = IM.ITNO 
    WHERE FG.AIT1 = '431010' 
    AND AIT7 = 'OI201401' 
    AND YEAR(ACDT) in (2024)
    GROUP BY [Customer ID] , [Invoice ID] , SD.[Part ID - Actual] , [Sales Qty] 
    , YEAR([ACDT]) , MONTH([ACDT]) , COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty] 
    ) A 
    GROUP BY AIT1 , CUNO , [Item Number] , Month , Year

create view v_GWT_Sales_Budget
as
SELECT DISTINCT 
                         'G' AS Company, ISNULL(A.Description, '') AS 'Customer Area Description', SM.ShipAddress4 AS 'ShipTo State', SM.ShipPostalCode AS 'ShipTo ZipCode', Det.SalesOrder AS 'Sales Order', Det.Invoice AS 'Invoice', 
                         Det.CustomerPoNumber AS 'Customer PO', 
                         CASE Det.DocumentType WHEN 'I' THEN 'Invoice' WHEN 'C' THEN 'Credit Note' WHEN 'D' THEN 'Debit Note' WHEN 'i' THEN 'Dispatch Invoice' ELSE 'ERROR ERROR' END AS 'Doc Type Description', Br.Branch AS 'Branch', 
                         Br.Description AS 'Branch Description', Cust.BuyingGroup1 AS 'Buying Grp Code', Cust.Customer AS 'Customer #', Cust.Name AS 'Customer Name', ISNULL(Cust.CustomerClass, '') AS 'Customer Class Code', 
                         ISNULL(CCL.Description, '') AS 'Customer Class', ISNULL(Inv.Supplier, '') AS 'Supplier Code', ISNULL(Sup.SupplierName, '') AS 'Supplier Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN Cust.MasterAccount WHEN 'A' THEN Cust.MasterAccount ELSE Cust.Customer END AS 'Master Account', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN CustMaster.Name WHEN 'A' THEN CustMaster.Name ELSE Cust.Name END AS 'Master Account Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN MA.Description WHEN 'A' THEN MA.Description ELSE A.Description END AS 'Master Area Description', Det.Salesperson AS 'Sales Rep Code', SalRep.Name AS 'SalesRep Name', 
                         Cust.Salesperson1 AS 'Sales Mgr Code', ISNULL(SalMgr.Name, '') AS 'SalesMgr Name', Det.ProductClass AS 'Product Class', PC.Description AS 'Product Class Description', Det.InvoiceDate AS 'Invoice Date', DATENAME(dw, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Day', DATEPART(month, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Month', DATEPART(quarter, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Qtr', DATEPART(week, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Week', CAST(DATEPART(year, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS varchar(10)) AS 'Invoice Year', 
                         CASE Det.LineType WHEN '1' THEN '1 - Stock Item' WHEN '4' THEN '4 - Freight' WHEN '5' THEN '5 - Misc Charge' WHEN '6' THEN '6 - Comment' WHEN '7' THEN '7 - Non Stock' END AS 'Line Type Description', 
                         ISNULL(WH.Description, '') AS 'Warehouse Name', Det.StockCode AS 'StockCode', CASE Det.StockCode WHEN '' THEN '' ELSE Inv.Description END AS 'StockCode Description', Det.QtyInvoiced AS 'Qty invoiced', 
                         CASE Det.QtyInvoiced WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE NetSalesValue / QtyInvoiced END AS 'Sale Price', Det.DiscValue AS 'Disc Value', Det.NetSalesValue AS 'Net Sales Value', (Det.DiscValue + Det.NetSalesValue) 
                         AS 'Gross Sales Value', Det.CostValue AS 'Cost', (Det.NetSalesValue - Det.CostValue) AS 'Margin Dollars'
FROM            SCG.ArTrnDetail AS Det LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvWhControl AS WH ON WH.Warehouse = Det.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalBranch AS Br ON Br.Branch = Det.Branch LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SorMaster AS SM ON SM.SalesOrder = Det.SalesOrder LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS Cust ON Det.Customer = Cust.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS CustMaster ON Cust.MasterAccount = CustMaster.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.TblCustomerClass AS CCL ON Cust.CustomerClass = CCL.Class LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalProductClassDes AS PC ON Det.ProductClass = PC.ProductClass LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalRep ON (Det.Salesperson = SalRep.Salesperson AND Det.Branch = SalRep.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalMgr ON (Cust.Salesperson1 = SalMgr.Salesperson AND Cust.Branch = SalMgr.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvMaster AS Inv ON Det.StockCode = Inv.StockCode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS A ON A.Area = Cust.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS MA ON MA.Area = CustMaster.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ApSupplier AS Sup ON Inv.Supplier = Sup.Supplier
WHERE        (Det.SalesGlIntReqd <> 'N') AND (Det.InvoiceDate >= DATEADD(yy, 0, DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0)) AND Det.InvoiceDate <= GETDATE())
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                         'G' AS Company, ISNULL(A.Description, '') AS 'Customer Area Description', SM.ShipAddress4 AS 'ShipTo State', SM.ShipPostalCode AS 'ShipTo ZipCode', Det.SalesOrder AS 'Sales Order', Det.Invoice AS 'Invoice', 
                         Det.CustomerPoNumber AS 'Customer PO', 
                         CASE Det.DocumentType WHEN 'I' THEN 'Invoice' WHEN 'C' THEN 'Credit Note' WHEN 'D' THEN 'Debit Note' WHEN 'i' THEN 'Dispatch Invoice' ELSE 'ERROR ERROR' END AS 'Doc Type Description', Br.Branch AS 'Branch', 
                         Br.Description AS 'Branch Description', Cust.BuyingGroup1 AS 'Buying Grp Code', Cust.Customer AS 'Customer #', Cust.Name AS 'Customer Name', ISNULL(Cust.CustomerClass, '') AS 'Customer Class Code', 
                         ISNULL(CCL.Description, '') AS 'Customer Class', ISNULL(Inv.Supplier, '') AS 'Supplier Code', ISNULL(Sup.SupplierName, '') AS 'Supplier Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN Cust.MasterAccount WHEN 'A' THEN Cust.MasterAccount ELSE Cust.Customer END AS 'Master Account', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN CustMaster.Name WHEN 'A' THEN CustMaster.Name ELSE Cust.Name END AS 'Master Account Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN MA.Description WHEN 'A' THEN MA.Description ELSE A.Description END AS 'Master Area Description', Det.Salesperson AS 'Sales Rep Code', SalRep.Name AS 'SalesRep Name', 
                         Cust.Salesperson1 AS 'Sales Mgr Code', ISNULL(SalMgr.Name, '') AS 'SalesMgr Name', Det.ProductClass AS 'Product Class', PC.Description AS 'Product Class Description', Det.InvoiceDate AS 'Invoice Date', DATENAME(dw, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Day', DATEPART(month, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Month', DATEPART(quarter, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Qtr', DATEPART(week, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Week', CAST(DATEPART(year, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS varchar(10)) AS 'Invoice Year', 
                         CASE Det.LineType WHEN '1' THEN '1 - Stock Item' WHEN '4' THEN '4 - Freight' WHEN '5' THEN '5 - Misc Charge' WHEN '6' THEN '6 - Comment' WHEN '7' THEN '7 - Non Stock' END AS 'Line Type Description', 
                         ISNULL(WH.Description, '') AS 'Warehouse Name', Det.StockCode AS 'StockCode', CASE Det.StockCode WHEN '' THEN '' ELSE Inv.Description END AS 'StockCode Description', Det.QtyInvoiced AS 'Qty invoiced', 
                         CASE Det.QtyInvoiced WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE NetSalesValue / QtyInvoiced END AS 'Sale Price', Det.DiscValue AS 'Disc Value', Det.NetSalesValue AS 'Net Sales Value', (Det.DiscValue + Det.NetSalesValue) 
                         AS 'Gross Sales Value', Det.CostValue AS 'Cost', (Det.NetSalesValue - Det.CostValue) AS 'Margin Dollars'
FROM            SCG.ArTrnDetail AS Det LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvWhControl AS WH ON WH.Warehouse = Det.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalBranch AS Br ON Br.Branch = Det.Branch LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SorMaster AS SM ON SM.SalesOrder = Det.SalesOrder LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS Cust ON Det.Customer = Cust.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS CustMaster ON Cust.MasterAccount = CustMaster.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.TblCustomerClass AS CCL ON Cust.CustomerClass = CCL.Class LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalProductClassDes AS PC ON Det.ProductClass = PC.ProductClass LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalRep ON (Det.Salesperson = SalRep.Salesperson AND Det.Branch = SalRep.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalMgr ON (Cust.Salesperson1 = SalMgr.Salesperson AND Cust.Branch = SalMgr.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvMaster AS Inv ON Det.StockCode = Inv.StockCode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS A ON A.Area = Cust.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS MA ON MA.Area = CustMaster.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ApSupplier AS Sup ON Inv.Supplier = Sup.Supplier
WHERE        (Det.SalesGlIntReqd <> 'N') AND (Det.InvoiceDate >= DATEADD(yy, - 2, DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0)) AND Det.InvoiceDate <= GETDATE())
UNION ALL
/* START OF 'PREV YTD' AS 'Invoice Year',*/ SELECT DISTINCT 
                         'G' AS Company, A.Description AS 'Customer Area Description', SM.ShipAddress4 AS 'ShipTo State', SM.ShipPostalCode AS 'ShipTo ZipCode', Det.SalesOrder AS 'Sales Order', Det.Invoice AS 'Invoice', 
                         Det.CustomerPoNumber AS 'Customer PO', 
                         CASE Det.DocumentType WHEN 'I' THEN 'Invoice' WHEN 'C' THEN 'Credit Note' WHEN 'D' THEN 'Debit Note' WHEN 'i' THEN 'Dispatch Invoice' ELSE 'ERROR ERROR' END AS 'Doc Type Description', Br.Branch AS 'Branch', 
                         Br.Description AS 'Branch Description', Cust.BuyingGroup1 AS 'Buying Grp Code', Cust.Customer AS 'Customer #', Cust.Name AS 'Customer Name', Cust.CustomerClass AS 'Customer Class Code', 
                         CCL.Description AS 'Customer Class', ISNULL(Inv.Supplier, '') AS 'Supplier Code', ISNULL(Sup.SupplierName, '') AS 'Supplier Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN Cust.MasterAccount WHEN 'A' THEN Cust.MasterAccount ELSE Cust.Customer END AS 'Master Account', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN CustMaster.Name WHEN 'A' THEN CustMaster.Name ELSE Cust.Name END AS 'Master Account Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN MA.Description WHEN 'A' THEN MA.Description ELSE A.Description END AS 'Master Area Description', Det.Salesperson AS 'Sales Rep Code', SalRep.Name AS 'SalesRep Name', 
                         Cust.Salesperson1 AS 'Sales Mgr Code', SalMgr.Name AS 'SalesMgr Name', Det.ProductClass AS 'Product Class', PC.Description AS 'Product Class Description', Det.InvoiceDate AS 'Invoice Date', DATENAME(dw, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Day', DATEPART(month, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Month', DATEPART(quarter, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Qtr', DATEPART(week, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Week', CAST(DATEPART(year, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS varchar(4)) + ' YTD' AS 'Invoice Year', 
                         CASE Det.LineType WHEN '1' THEN '1 - Stock Item' WHEN '4' THEN '4 - Freight' WHEN '5' THEN '5 - Misc Charge' WHEN '6' THEN '6 - Comment' WHEN '7' THEN '7 - Non Stock' END AS 'Line Type Description', 
                         WH.Description AS 'Warehouse Name', Det.StockCode AS 'StockCode', CASE Det.StockCode WHEN '' THEN '' ELSE Inv.Description END AS 'StockCode Description', Det.QtyInvoiced AS 'Qty invoiced', 
                         CASE Det.QtyInvoiced WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE NetSalesValue / QtyInvoiced END AS 'Sale Price', Det.DiscValue AS 'Disc Value', Det.NetSalesValue AS 'Net Sales Value', (Det.DiscValue + Det.NetSalesValue) 
                         AS 'Gross Sales Value', Det.CostValue AS 'Cost', (Det.NetSalesValue - Det.CostValue) AS 'Margin Dollars'
FROM            SCG.ArTrnDetail AS Det LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvWhControl AS WH ON WH.Warehouse = Det.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalBranch AS Br ON Br.Branch = Det.Branch LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SorMaster AS SM ON SM.SalesOrder = Det.SalesOrder LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS Cust ON Det.Customer = Cust.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS CustMaster ON Cust.MasterAccount = CustMaster.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.TblCustomerClass AS CCL ON Cust.CustomerClass = CCL.Class LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalProductClassDes AS PC ON Det.ProductClass = PC.ProductClass LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalRep ON (Det.Salesperson = SalRep.Salesperson AND Det.Branch = SalRep.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalMgr ON (Cust.Salesperson1 = SalMgr.Salesperson AND Cust.Branch = SalMgr.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvMaster AS Inv ON Det.StockCode = Inv.StockCode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS A ON A.Area = Cust.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS MA ON MA.Area = CustMaster.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ApSupplier AS Sup ON Inv.Supplier = Sup.Supplier
WHERE        (Det.SalesGlIntReqd <> 'N') AND (Det.InvoiceDate >= DATEADD(yy, - 1, DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0)) AND Det.InvoiceDate <= DATEADD(YEAR, - 1, GETDATE()))

--DROP VIEW v_INVReport
CREATE VIEW v_INVReport AS 

SELECT  'M3'                     [ERP]
       , I.ITGR                  [Item Group]
       , CS.TX40                 [Item Group Description]
--       , I.ITCL                  [Item Brand]
       , CS2.TX40                [Item Brand]
       , CASE WHEN I.GRP2 = 'COM' then 'COMMERCIAL' WHEN I.GRP2 = 'CMP' then 'COMPACT' else 'COUNTERTOP'
         end                     [Major Class]
       , CASE WHEN I.GRP3 = 'ADM' THEN 'ADMIRAL CRAFT' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'AFS' THEN 'AFS' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'BEV' THEN 'BEVLES'
         WHEN I.GRP3 = 'BLA' THEN 'BLAKESLEE' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'VIN' THEN 'VINOTEMP' ELSE 'TBD' 
         END                     [Finance Brand]
       , V.WHLO                  [WHS]
       , I.STAT                  [Status]
       , I.ITNO                  [Item Number]
       , I.ITDS                  [Item Description]
       , V.STQT                  [Qty]
       , V.AVAL                  [Qty Available]
       , I.MABU                  [Make or Build]
       , I.PPUN                  [Units]
       , ROUND(F.APPR, 2)        [Cost Price]
       , ROUND(V.STQT*F.APPR, 2) [Total]
       , WH.WHNM                 [WHS Description]
FROM M3.MITBAL V LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS I ON V.ITNO=I.ITNO LEFT JOIN M3.MITFAC F ON V.ITNO=F.ITNO /*and F.FACI = 'TLC'*/ LEFT JOIN M3.MITWHL WH ON V.WHLO=WH.WHLO 
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB CS ON I.ITGR = CS.STKY LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON I.ITCL = CS2.STKY
WHERE V.STQT > 0 AND V.CONO=100 AND V.DIVI='TLC' AND CS.STCO = 'ITGR' AND CS2.STCO = 'ITCL'
/*
UNION ALL 

SELECT    'VIS'                               [ERP]
        , C.CODE                              [Item Group]
        , C.DESCRIPTION                       [Item Group Description]
        , P.USER_1                            [Item Brand]
        , CASE WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP', 'WESTBEND COMPACT', 'AVANTI', 'VINTURI COMPACT', 'DUURA', 'BRAMA', 'ELEMENT') then 'COMPACT' else 'COUNTERTOP'
          END                                 [Major Class]
        , CASE WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP', 'BRAMA', 'ELEMENT') THEN 'VINOTEMP' WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('AVANTI', 'WESTBEND COMPACT', 'VINTURI COMPACT', 'DUURA') THEN 'AVANTI' ELSE 'EDGECRAFT'
          END                                 [Finance Brand]
        , L.WAREHOUSE_ID +'-'+ L.LOCATION_ID  [WHS]
        , '20'                                [Status]
        , P.ID                                [Item Number]
        , P.DESCRIPTION                       [Item Description]
        , L.QTY                               [Qty]
        , L.QTY                               [Qty Available]
        , '2'                                 [Make or Build]
        , 'EA'                                [Units]
        , 0.0                                 [Cost Price]
        , 0.0                                 [Total]
        , W.DESCRIPTION                       [WHS Description]
FROM ((             ECM.PART_LOCATION L 
         INNER JOIN ECM.PART          P ON L.PART_ID = P.ID
       ) INNER JOIN ECM.WAREHOUSE     W ON L.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.ID
     )   INNER JOIN ECM.PRODUCT       C ON P.PRODUCT_CODE = C.CODE 
WHERE      L.QTY <> 0
*/

create view v_InventoryAdjustments
-- drop view v_InventoryAdjustments
as
SELECT      Case when TTYP = 40 then 'Adjustment In' when TTYP = 41 then 'Adjustment Out' else 'Cycle Count' end as [Transaction Type]
,           WHLO as Warehouse
,           WHSL as [Warehouse Location]
,           MM.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,           MM.ITCL as [Brand]
,           TRDT as [Transaction Date]
,           TRQT as [Qty]
,           TRPR as [Unit Price]
,           TRQT*TRPR as [Total Value]
,           mt.RESP as [User]
,           CASE WHEN RSCD = '' then 'NO REASON' else CS.TX40 end AS [Reason]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on MT.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS on MT.RSCD = CS.STKY and CS.STCO = 'RSCD'
WHERE       TTYP IN (40, 41, 90)
AND         TRQT <> 0

CREATE VIEW     v_InventoryFeed
-- drop view v_InventoryFeed
AS
SELECT          CT.CUNO AS      [Customer Number]
,               OC.CUNM AS      [Customer Name]
,               CT.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,               B.[Translated Item Number] AS [Item Number on Portal]
,               CT.POPN AS      [Alias Number]
,               OC.WHLO AS      [Warehouse]
,               OC.ORTP AS      [Order Type]
,               CG.A030 AS      [Default Delivery Term]
,               CG.A130 AS      [LiftGate Item]
,               CT.ITDS AS      [Alt Inventory ID]
,               MP.POPN AS      [UPC]
,               MP.ALWT AS      [UPC Category]
,               OB.SPNR AS      [Price]
FROM            M3.OCUSIT CT
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON CT.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPOP MP ON CT.ITNO = MP.ITNO AND MP.ALWQ = 'UPC' AND MP.ALWT = '2'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 CG ON CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSIT' AND CT.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CT.ITNO = CG.PK02
LEFT JOIN       M3.OPRBAS OB ON CT.CUNO = OB.PRRF AND CT.ITNO = OB.ITNO
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      EXTP       AS [Customer Number]
,           MVXD       AS [Item Number]
,           MBMD       AS [Translated Item Number]
FROM        M3.MBMTRD
WHERE       IDTR = 215
) B ON      CT.ITNO = B.[Item Number] AND CT.CUNO = B.[Customer Number]

CREATE VIEW     v_InventoryMovement
-- drop view v_InventoryMovement
as


SELECT   distinct OC.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,          OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,          ODH.ORNO AS [Order ID]
,          cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)  as [Date]
,          IM.ITCL as Brand
,           IM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,          CS.TX15 as [Product Category]
,           IM.ITNO as [Part ID]
,           IM.ITDS as [Part Description]
,           IM.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,           OL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT as [Sales Amt]
,           ODL.IVQT as [Sales Qty]
,           OL.NEPR as [Unit Price]
,           OL.WHLO as Warehouse
,           IM.BUAR as Division
,           OC.RESP as [Sales Manager]
,           CS2.TX40 as [Sales Rep]
,           DLRM as [Carrier SCAC]
,           ETRN as [Tracking/Pro Number]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.PYNO = ODH.PYNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS on IM.ITGR = CS.STKY and CS.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS2 on OC.SMCD = CS2.STKY and CS2.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPTRNS MT ON ODH.DLIX = MT.DLIX
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
AND				LE.IVTP <> 'CN'
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0

CREATE VIEW         v_InventoryStatus
-- drop view v_InventoryStatus
as
SELECT              X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.Brand, X.[Finance Brand]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Qty on Hand], 0) as [Qty on Hand]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Qty on Order (Incoming)], 0) as [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Qty on Reserve], 0) as [Qty on Reserve]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Qty Available], 0) as [Qty Available]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Qty Allocated], 0) as [Qty Allocated]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net], 0) as [Allocatable Net]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], 0) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Qty on Backorder], 0) as [Qty on Backorder]
,                   ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net], 0) - ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], 0) as [Safety Stock Qty]
,                   X.[Average Cost], X.[Product Group], X.[Category]
,                   ISNULL(B.[Open Qty Direct Ship], 0) as [Open Qty Direct Ship]
,                   ISNULL(C.[YTD Qty],0) as [YTD Qty]
,                   ISNULL(F.[L60 Qty],0) AS [L60 Qty]
,                   AVG(LastPurchasePrice) as LastPurchasePrice
,                   cast(CAST([ETA Date] as varchar(10)) as date) as [Available Date]
,                   [Kit Flag]
,                   CASE WHEN X.Warehouse = 'AAH' then 'Asheville, NC'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ACL' then 'Cleveland, OH'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ALA' then 'New Orleans, LA' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'AOR' then 'Orlando, FL' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'TPA' then 'Tampa, FL' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ACA' then 'Commerce, CA'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ANC' then 'National City, CA'
                    END as [Warehouse Name]
,                   CASE WHEN ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], 0) <= 0 then 0
                    WHEN ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], 0) < ISNULL(F.[L60 Qty],0) THEN 1
                    ELSE 2 END AS [Out of Stock Flag]
,                   CASE WHEN X.[Item Number] IN

) then 'RD Stock' else null end as [AdCraft DNU]
FROM
(
SELECT              DISTINCT WH.WHLO AS Warehouse, MM.ITNO as [Item Number], MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,                   MM.ITCL as [Brand], MM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand], MM.PRGP as [Product Group]
,                   CS.TX40 as [Category], 'Non-Kit' as [Kit Flag], MF.APPR as [Average Cost]
FROM                M3.MITWHL WH
CROSS JOIN          M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN           (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'ITGR') CS on MM.ITGR = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN           M3.MITFAC MF ON MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO          
WHERE               WH.DIVI = 'TLC'
AND                 MM.STAT = '20'
AND                 MF.FACI = 'TLC'
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			BA.ITNO as [Item Number]
,				WHLO as [Warehouse]
,				STQT as [Qty on Hand]
,				ORQT as [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
,               REQT as [Qty on Reserve]
,				STQT - REQT as [Qty Available]
,				ALQT as [Qty Allocated]
,               AVAL - ALQT as [Allocatable Net]
,               AVAL - ALQT - SSQT as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
,				CASE WHEN REQT - STQT < 0 then 0 else REQT - STQT end as [Qty on Backorder]
from			M3.MITBAL BA
) A ON          X.Warehouse = A.Warehouse and X.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			ITNO as [Item Number]
,				WHLO as [Warehouse]
,				SUM(ORQT) as [Open Qty Direct Ship]
FROM			M3.OOLINE
WHERE			WHLO = 'DIW'
and				ORST <= '33'
GROUP BY		ITNO, WHLO
) B				on X.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number] and X.[Warehouse] = B.[Warehouse]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          [Item Number], Warehouse, SUM([YTD Usage]) as [YTD Qty]
FROM
(
SELECT			ITNO as [Item Number]
,				SUM(IVQT) as [YTD Usage]
,				ODL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
FROM			M3.ODHEAD OD
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL on OD.ORNO = ODL.ORNO and OD.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
WHERE			IVQT > 0
AND				LEFT(IVDT, 4) = YEAR(GETDATE())
GROUP BY		ITNO, ODL.WHLO

UNION ALL

SELECT			cast(p.[product-code] as varchar(max)) as [Item Number]
,				sum(qty) as [YTD Usage]
,               CASE WHEN l.[location-name] = 'Kentucky' then 'PKY'
                WHEN l.[location-name] = 'Weston' then 'WFL'
                WHEN l.[location-name] = 'Sparks' then 'SNV'
                WHEN l.[location-name] = 'New Jersey' then 'HNJ'
                WHEN l.[location-name] = 'Parts' then 'PKY'
                else l.[location-name] end as Warehouse
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
LEFT JOIN		APR.product p on aii.[item-key] = p.[product-key]
join            APR.location l on aii.[shipping-location-key] = l.[location-key]
WHERE			YEAR(aih.[ref-date]) = YEAR(GETDATE())
AND             aih.[ref-num] NOT LIKE 'CM%'
AND             aii.[system-id] = 'Avanti'
GROUP BY        p.[product-code], l.[location-name]
) A
GROUP BY        [Item Number], [Warehouse]

) C			on X.[Item Number] = C.[Item Number] and X.[Warehouse] = C.[Warehouse]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ITNO, PUPR as LastPurchasePrice
FROM            M3.MPLINE
WHERE           ITNO+CAST(RGDT AS VARCHAR(MAX)) IN
(
SELECT          ITNO+CAST(MAX(RGDT) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) as last_date
FROM            M3.MPLINE
GROUP BY        ITNO
)
) D             ON X.[Item Number] = D.ITNO

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ITNO, UID2 as [ETA Date]
FROM            M3.MPLINE
WHERE           ITNO+CAST(UID2 AS VARCHAR(MAX)) IN
(
SELECT          ITNO+CAST(MIN(UID2) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) as next_date
FROM            M3.MPLINE
GROUP BY        ITNO
)
and UID2 <> 0
) E             ON X.[Item Number] = E.ITNO

LEFT JOIN

(
    SELECT          [Item Number], Warehouse, SUM([L60 Usage]) as [L60 Qty]
FROM
(
SELECT			ITNO as [Item Number]
,				SUM(IVQT) as [L60 Usage]
,				ODL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
FROM			M3.ODHEAD OD
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL on OD.ORNO = ODL.ORNO and OD.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
WHERE			IVQT > 0
AND				CAST(CAST(NULLIF(IVDT, 0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) >= GETDATE() - 60
GROUP BY		ITNO, ODL.WHLO
) y
GROUP BY            [Item Number], Warehouse
) F ON X.[Item Number] = F.[Item Number] AND X.Warehouse = F.Warehouse

WHERE           X.[Item Number] NOT IN
(
    SELECT      DISTINCT PRNO
    FROM        M3.MPDMAT
    WHERE       STRT = 'KIT'
)
and Brand is not null and Brand <> ''
GROUP BY        [Kit Flag], X.Category, E.[ETA Date], X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description]
,               X.Brand, X.[Average Cost], [Finance Brand], X.Warehouse, [Qty On Hand]
,               [Qty on Order (Incoming)], [Qty on Reserve], [Qty Available], [Qty Allocated]
,               [Qty on Backorder], [Open Qty Direct Ship], [YTD Qty], [Product Group]
,               [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], [Allocatable Net], [L60 Qty]

UNION ALL

SELECT              X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.Brand, X.[Finance Brand]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR(STQT*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Qty on Hand]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR(ORQT*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR(REQT*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Qty on Reserve]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR((STQT - REQT)*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Qty Available]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR(ALQT*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Qty Allocated]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR((AVAL - ALQT)*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Allocatable Net]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR((AVAL - ALQT - SSQT)*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
,                   NULL as [Safety Stock Qty]
,                   MIN(ISNULL(CASE WHEN FLOOR((REQT - STQT)*1.00/CNQT) < 0 then 0 else FLOOR((REQT - STQT)/CNQT) end, 0)) as [Qty on Backorder]
,                   X.[Average Cost], X.[Product Group], X.[Category]
,                   NULL as [Open Qty Direct Ship]
,                   NULL as [YTD Qty]
,                   NULL as [L60 Qty]
,                   NULL as LastPurchasePrice
,                   NULL as [Available Date]
,                   [Kit Flag]
,                   CASE WHEN X.Warehouse = 'AAH' then 'Asheville, NC'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ACL' then 'Cleveland, OH'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ALA' then 'New Orleans, LA' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'AOR' then 'Orlando, FL' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'TPA' then 'Tampa, FL' 
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ACA' then 'Commerce, CA'
                    WHEN X.Warehouse = 'ANC' then 'National City, CA'
                    END as [Warehouse Name]
,                   NULL as [Out of Stock Flag]
,                   CASE WHEN X.[Item Number] IN
(

) then 'RD Stock' else null end as [AdCraft DNU]
FROM
(
SELECT              DISTINCT WH.WHLO AS Warehouse, MM.ITNO as [Item Number], MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,                   MP.MTNO AS [Component], MM.ITCL as [Brand], MM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand], MM.PRGP as [Product Group]
,                   CS.TX40 as [Category], 'Kit' as [Kit Flag], MF.APPR as [Average Cost]
FROM                M3.MITWHL WH
CROSS JOIN          M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN           (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'ITGR') CS on MM.ITGR = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN           M3.MITFAC MF ON MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO
LEFT JOIN           M3.MPDMAT MP ON MM.ITNO = MP.PRNO
WHERE               WH.DIVI = 'TLC'
AND                 MM.STAT = '20'
AND                 STRT = 'KIT'
AND                 MF.FACI = 'TLC'
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT PRNO as [Item Number]
,           MTNO
,           CNQT
,           MB.WHLO as Warehouse
,           STQT, ORQT, REQT, ALQT, AVAL, SSQT
FROM        M3.MPDMAT MP
JOIN        M3.MITBAL MB ON MP.MTNO = MB.ITNO
WHERE       STRT = 'KIT'
) A on X.Warehouse = A.Warehouse AND X.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number] AND X.Component = A.MTNO
and Brand is not null and Brand <> ''
GROUP BY    X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.Brand, X.[Finance Brand], X.[Average Cost], X.[Product Group], X.[Category], x.[Kit Flag]

CREATE VIEW v_InventoryStatus_3Weeks
--drop view v_InventoryStatus_3Weeks
as
SELECT      A.*
,           B.[3 Week Backorder Qty]
,           [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
FROM
(
SELECT      DISTINCT Brand
,           [Item Number] as [Product Code]
,           [Item Description] as [Product Description]
,           Warehouse
,           [Product Group]
,           [Qty on Hand]
,           [Qty Allocated]
,           [YTD Qty]
,           [LastPurchasePrice]
FROM        v_InventoryStatus
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      [Item Number]
,           Warehouse
,           SUM(Quantity) as [3 Week Backorder Qty]
FROM        v_OpenOrdersByStatus
WHERE       [Qty Status] = '2 - Reserved/Backorder'
AND         ERP = 'M3'
AND         [Requested Date] <= GETDATE() + 21
GROUP BY    [Item Number], Warehouse
) B on A.[Product Code] = B.[Item Number] and A.Warehouse = B.Warehouse

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      ITNO as [Item Number]
,           WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           SUM(ORQA - RVQA) as [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
FROM        M3.MPLINE
WHERE       cast(CAST(NULLIF(UID2,0) as varchar(10)) as date) <= GETDATE() + 21
GROUP BY    ITNO, WHLO
) C         on A. [Product Code] = C.[Item Number] and A.Warehouse = C.Warehouse

CREATE VIEW     v_Inventory_MasterData
--drop view v_Inventory_MasterData
as

SELECT          'M3' AS ERP, ML.ITNO, ITDS, ML.WHLO
,               MM.ITCL as BRAND, MF.APPR as [Average Cost]
,               sum(STQT) as [Qty on Hand]
,               sum(REQT) as [Qty on Reserve]
,               sum(ALQT) as [Qty Allocated]
,               sum(SSQT) as [Qty on Safety Stock]
,               sum(QUQT) as [Qty on Inspection]
,               sum(RJQT) as [Qty Rejected]
,               ML.BUYE as [Buyer]
FROM            M3.MITBAL ML
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM on ML.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.MITFAC MF on ML.ITNO = MF.ITNO AND MF.FACI = 'TLC'
JOIN            M3.MITWHL WH ON ML.WHLO = WH.WHLO
WHERE           ISNULL(STQT,0) + ISNULL(ALQT,0) + ISNULL(REQT,0) + ISNULL(SSQT,0) + ISNULL(QUQT,0) + ISNULL(RJQT,0) <> 0
GROUP BY        ML.ITNO, ML.WHLO, ITDS, itcl, MF.APPR, BUYE


/*
UNION ALL

(
SELECT          'VISUAL' AS ERP, A.ITNO, A.ITDS, A.WHLO, A.LOCATION_ID, A.[Qty on Hand], A.BRAND
,               [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
,               isnull([Qty on Reserve],0) as [Qty on Reserve]
,               A.[Qty on Hand] - ISNULL([Qty on Reserve],0) as [Qty Available]
FROM
(
SELECT          PART_ID AS ITNO, WAREHOUSE_ID AS WHLO, LOCATION_ID as LOCATION_ID, P.DESCRIPTION AS ITDS, SUM(QTY) AS [Qty on Hand], P.USER_1 as BRAND
FROM            ECM.PART_LOCATION PL
JOIN            ECM.PART P on PL.PART_ID = P.ID
GROUP BY        PART_ID, WAREHOUSE_ID, P.DESCRIPTION, LOCATION_ID, p.user_1
HAVING          SUM(QTY) <> 0               
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
select			PART_ID as ITNO, WAREHOUSE_ID AS WHLO, SUM(ORDER_QTY - TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY) AS [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
from			ECM.PURC_ORDER_LINE
WHERE			LINE_STATUS = 'A'
AND				WAREHOUSE_ID IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY		PART_ID, WAREHOUSE_ID
HAVING			SUM(ORDER_QTY - TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY) > 0    
) B           ON A.ITNO = B.ITNO and A.WHLO = B.WHLO and A.LOCATION_ID = B.WHLO

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          [Item Number] as ITNO, [Warehouse] as WHLO, SUM(Quantity) as [Qty on Reserve] 
FROM            v_OpenOrdersByStatus
WHERE           ERP = 'Visual'
and             [Qty Status] = '3 - Allocated'
And             [IC Flag] <> 'IC'
GROUP BY        [Item Number], Warehouse
) C             ON A.ITNO = C.ITNO and A.WHLO = C.WHLO and A.LOCATION_ID = C.WHLO
)
*/

CREATE VIEW v_Invoices as
--drop view v_Invoices


select A.*, [Inv Qty]*1.0000/NULLIF(SUM([Inv Qty]) OVER (PARTITION BY A.[Sales Order]),0)*B.[Freight] as [Billed Freight]
, [Inv Qty]*1.0000/NULLIF(SUM([Inv Qty]) OVER (PARTITION BY A.[Sales Order]),0)*C.[Other_Freight] as [Other Freight]
FROM
(
SELECT          [Sales Type] as             [Invoice Type]
,               MM.GRP3 as                  [Finance Brand]
,               OC.SDST AS                  [Buying Group]
,                                           [Customer ID]
,                                           [Customer Name]
,              ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS [External Rep ID]
,               CS.TX40 AS                  [External Rep Name]
,               OC.RESP AS                  [Sales Manager]
,               [Order ID] AS               [Sales Order]
,                                           [Customer PO]
,               [Invoice ID] AS             [Invoice Number]
,               [Date] AS                   [Invoice Date]
,               [Part ID - Actual] AS       Item
,               [Part Description] AS       [Item Name]
,               MM.PRGP AS                  [Item Type]
,                                           Brand
,                                           Warehouse
,                                           Division
,               [Sales Qty] AS              [Inv Qty]
,               [Sales Amt] AS              [Inv Amt]
,               [Net Sales Amt] AS          [Inv Net Amt]
,               Cost AS                     [Inv Cost]
,               OH.ORTP as                  [Order Type]
,               OH.TEDL as                  [Freight Terms]
,               OH.ADID as                  [Address ID]
FROM            a_SalesData SD
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH ON SD.[Order ID] = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON SD.[Customer ID] = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND MM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND cs.STCO = 'SMCD' 
WHERE           [Date] >= '2023-01-01'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT ORNO as [Sales Order], SUM(CRAM) AS Freight
FROM M3.OOCHRG
WHERE CRID = 'FRE002'
AND DLIX <> 0
GROUP BY ORNO
) B on A.[Sales Order] = B.[Sales Order]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT ORNO as [Sales Order], SUM(CRAM) AS Other_Freight
FROM M3.OOCHRG
WHERE CRID = 'FRE003'
AND DLIX <> 0
GROUP BY ORNO
) C on A.[Sales Order] = C.[Sales Order]

--DROP VIEW v_ItemMaster

CREATE VIEW v_ItemMaster AS 

SELECT        'M3'                  [ERP]
            , ITNO                  [ItemNumber]
            , ITNE                  [OriginalItemNumber]
            , ITDS                  [Description]
            , ITCL                  [Brand Code]
            , BR.TX15               [Brand]
            , CASE WHEN I.GRP2 = 'COM' then 'COMMERCIAL' WHEN I.GRP2 = 'CMP' then 'COMPACT' else 'COUNTERTOP'
               end                     [Major Class]
          , CASE WHEN I.GRP3 = 'ADM' THEN 'ADMIRAL CRAFT' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'AFS' THEN 'AFS' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'BEV' THEN 'BEVLES'
               WHEN I.GRP3 = 'BLA' THEN 'BLAKESLEE' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'VIN' THEN 'VINOTEMP' 
               WHEN I.GRP3 = 'AVA' then 'AVANTI' ELSE 'TBD' 
                END                     [Finance Brand]
            , ITGR                  [Category Code]
            , CA.TX15               [Category]
            , ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')
              + CASE WHEN ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')=SC.TX40 THEN '' 
                     WHEN ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')<>''     THEN '|'+SC.TX40 
                     ELSE '' 
                END                 [Sub-Category]
            , 0.00                  [Cost]
            , PUPR                  [Price]
            , CASE MABU WHEN '1' THEN '1|MAKE'
                        WHEN '2' THEN '2|BUY'
              END                  [Make or Buy]
            , CASE WHEN PRGP='' THEN 'UP' 
                   ELSE PRGP 
              END
              +'|'+CP.TX15          [Comp or FG]
            , 'ACTIVE'              [ItemType]
FROM            M3.MITMAS I
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB BR ON I.ITCL=BR.STKY AND BR.STCO='ITCL'   --Brand Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB CA ON I.ITGR=CA.STKY AND CA.STCO='ITGR'   --Category Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CRPDLN SC ON I.PDLN=SC.PDLN                      --Sub-Category Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB CP ON I.PRGP=CP.STKY AND CP.STCO='PRGP'   --Comp or FG
    -- LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB IT ON I.ITTY=IT.STKY AND IT.STCO='ITTY'   --Item Type
WHERE I.CONO='100' AND STAT='20'
/*
UNION ALL

SELECT    'Visual'                          [ERP]
        , ID                                [ItemNumber]
        , ID                                [OriginalItemNumber]
        , P.[DESCRIPTION]                   [Description]
        , ''                                [Brand Code]
        , P.USER_1                          [Brand]
        , CASE WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP', 'WESTBEND COMPACT', 'AVANTI', 'VINTURI COMPACT', 'DUURA', 'BRAMA', 'ELEMENT') then 'COMPACT' else 'COUNTERTOP'
          END                                 [Major Class]
        , CASE WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP', 'BRAMA', 'ELEMENT') THEN 'VINOTEMP' WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('AVANTI', 'WESTBEND COMPACT', 'VINTURI COMPACT', 'DUURA') THEN 'AVANTI' ELSE 'EDGECRAFT'
          END                                 [Finance Brand]
        , P.PRODUCT_CODE                    [Category Code]
        , C.DESCRIPTION                     [Category] 
        , ''                                [Sub-Category]
        , I.unit_material_cost              [Cost]
        , I.unit_price                      [Price] 
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(I.FABRICATED, P.FABRICATED)='Y' THEN '1|MAKE'
               WHEN ISNULL(I.PURCHASED, P.PURCHASED)='Y'   THEN '2|BUY'
          END                               [Make or Buy]
        , CASE WHEN P.PRODUCT_CODE='99' THEN 'CP|COMPONENTS'
               ELSE 'FG|FINISHED GOOD'
          END                               [Comp or FG]
        , P.USER_10                           [ItemType]
FROM            ECM.PART    P 
      LEFT JOIN ECM.PRODUCT C ON P.PRODUCT_CODE=C.CODE
      LEFT JOIN ECM.PART_SITE I ON P.ID=I.PART_ID
      */
