CREATE VIEW     v_ItemUPC
AS
SELECT      MM.ITNO AS ItemNumber
,           MM.ITDS AS ItemDescription
,           MM.ITCL AS Brand
,           MP.POPN as UPC
FROM        M3.MITPOP MP
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON MP.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       ALWQ = 'UPC'

CREATE VIEW     v_LandedCost
-- drop view v_LandedCost
as
SELECT          'PO' as [MO or PO]
,               POH.PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               POH.ORTY AS [Order Type]
,               POL.PUSL AS [Order Low Status]
,               POL.PUST AS [Order High Status]
,               POL.PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               POL.PNLS AS [Order Line Sub Number]
,               POL.SUDO AS [Container Number]
,               REPN AS [Receiving Number]
,               CEID AS [Costing Element]
,               SUM(RVQA) as [Received Qty]
,               SUM(ORQA) as [Open Qty]
,               SUM(RCAC) AS [Received Cost Amount]
,               POL.PUPR AS [Unit Price]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Number]
,               IM.[Description]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Description]
,               IM.Subcategory
,               IM.Category
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Manufactured or Purchased] as [Procurement Type]
,               IM.Status
,               IM.[FOB Cost] as [Estimated FOB]
,               IM.[Origin Port to Warehouse Rate] as [Estimated Ocean]
,               IM.[Estimated Landed Cost] as [Estimated Landed]
,               cast(cast(NULLIF(POL.RCDT,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Received Date]
,               POH.PUDT as [Order Date]
,               POL.CSNO AS [HTS Code]
,               POL.ORCO AS [Country]
,               POL.WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,               IM.Weight AS [Weight]
,               POH.SUNO AS [Supplier Number]
,               SU.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
JOIN            M3.CIDMAS SU ON POH.SUNO = SU.SUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.FGRPCL PCL ON POH.PUNO = PCL.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = PCL.PNLI AND POL.PNLS = PCL.PNLS
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM ON POL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           1=1
AND             POH.ORTY <> ('C01')
AND             CEID NOT IN ('SLSTAX', 'CREDIT')
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO, POH.ORTY, POL.PNLI, POL.PNLS, POL.SUDO, REPN, CEID, POL.PUPR, ITM.ITNO
,               POL.CSNO, POL.ORCO, POL.WHLO, IM.Weight, IM.[Aligned Item Number], IM.[Description]
,               IM.Subcategory, IM.Category, IM.[Product Line], IM.[Sub-Brand], IM.Brand, IM.[Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit], IM.Division, [Item Type], [Manufactured or Purchased], Status, [FOB Cost]
,               [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate], [Estimated Landed Cost], [Aligned Item Description]
,               POL.PUSL, POL.PUST, POH.PUDT, POH.SUNO, SU.SUNM, POL.RCDT, POH.PUDT

,               SUM(RVQA) as [Received Qty]
,               SUM(ORQA) as [Open Qty]
,               SUM(RVQA*POL.PUPR) AS [Received Cost Amount]
,               POL.PUPR AS [Unit Price]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Number]
,               IM.[Description]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Description]
,               IM.Subcategory
,               IM.Category
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               IM.Division

,               SU.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH

JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
JOIN            M3.CIDMAS SU ON POH.SUNO = SU.SUNO
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM ON POL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           1=1
AND             POH.ORTY <> ('C01')
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO, POH.ORTY, POL.PNLI, POL.PNLS, POL.SUDO, POL.PUPR, ITM.ITNO
,               POL.CSNO, POL.ORCO, POL.WHLO, IM.Weight, IM.[Aligned Item Number], IM.[Description]
,               IM.Subcategory, IM.Category, IM.[Product Line], IM.[Sub-Brand], IM.Brand, IM.[Finance Brand]

,               POL.PUSL, POL.PUST, POH.PUDT, POH.SUNO, SU.SUNM, POL.RCDT, POH.PUDT

CREATE VIEW     v_LandedCost
as
-- drop view v_LandedCost
SELECT          A.*
,               B.[Ocean Freight Amount]
,               C.[Final Mile Amount]
,               D.[Other Freight Amount]
,               E.[Duty Amount]
,               F.[Tariff Amount]
,               G.[PMI Amount]
,               CASE WHEN Warehouse IN ('DIW', 'DFF', 'DFD', 'DDS') THEN 'DI' else 'Domestic' END as [Warehouse Type]
FROM
(
SELECT          POH.PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               POL.PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               POL.PNLS AS [Order Line Suffix]
,               POL.SUDO AS [Container Number]
,               SUM(RVQA) as [Received Qty]
,               SUM(ORQA) as [Open Qty]
,               SUM(RVQA*POL.PUPR) AS [FOB Amount]
,               POL.PUPR AS [Unit Price]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               cast(cast(NULLIF(POL.RCDT,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Received Date]
,               POH.PUDT as [Order Date]
,               POL.CSNO AS [HTS Code]
,               POL.ORCO AS [Country]
,               POL.WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,               POH.SUNO AS [Supplier Number]
,               SU.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
JOIN            M3.CIDMAS SU ON POH.SUNO = SU.SUNO
WHERE           1=1
AND             POH.ORTY <> ('C01')
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO, POL.PNLI, POL.PNLS, POL.SUDO, POL.PUPR, ITM.ITNO, POL.CSNO, POL.ORCO, POL.WHLO, POH.PUDT
                , POH.SUNO, SU.SUNM, POL.RCDT
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               PNLS AS [Order Line Suffix]
,               SUM(RCAC) as [Ocean Freight Amount]
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           1=1
AND             CEID = 'FREI01'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) B ON          A.[Order Number] = B.[Order Number] and A.[Order Line Number] = B.[Order Line Number] and A.[Order Line Suffix] = B.[Order Line Suffix]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               PNLS AS [Order Line Suffix]
,               SUM(RCAC) as [Final Mile Amount]
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           1=1
AND             CEID = 'FREI02'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) C ON          A.[Order Number] = C.[Order Number] and A.[Order Line Number] = C.[Order Line Number] and A.[Order Line Suffix] = C.[Order Line Suffix]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               PNLS AS [Order Line Suffix]
,               SUM(RCAC) as [Other Freight Amount]
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           1=1
AND             CEID IN ('FREI03', 'FREVEN')
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) D ON          A.[Order Number] = D.[Order Number] and A.[Order Line Number] = D.[Order Line Number] and A.[Order Line Suffix] = D.[Order Line Suffix]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               PNLS AS [Order Line Suffix]
,               SUM(RCAC) as [Duty Amount]
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           1=1
AND             CEID IN ('DUTY', 'FC2500', 'FC2000')
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) E ON          A.[Order Number] = E.[Order Number] and A.[Order Line Number] = E.[Order Line Number] and A.[Order Line Suffix] = E.[Order Line Suffix]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               PNLS AS [Order Line Suffix]
,               SUM(RCAC) as [Tariff Amount]
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           1=1
AND             CEID IN ('TRUTAR')
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) F ON          A.[Order Number] = F.[Order Number] and A.[Order Line Number] = F.[Order Line Number] and A.[Order Line Suffix] = F.[Order Line Suffix]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               PNLS AS [Order Line Suffix]
,               SUM(RCAC) as [PMI Amount]
FROM            M3.FGRPCL
WHERE           1=1
AND             CEID IN ('PMI')
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) G ON          A.[Order Number] = G.[Order Number] and A.[Order Line Number] = G.[Order Line Number] and A.[Order Line Suffix] = G.[Order Line Suffix]

CREATE VIEW v_LandedCost_CFO
--DROP VIEW v_LandedCost_CFO
AS
SELECT          DISTINCT CASE when ITM.ITCL IN ('AVA') THEN 'Compact' WHEN ITM.ITCL IN ('MXC', 'PMXC', 'GEN', 'PGEN', 'MXI', 'PMXI', 'BEV', 'BLA', 'DUUR', 'SAP') THEN 'Commercial' else 'Consumer' END AS Division
,               POH.PUNO AS [PO no]
,               POH.ORTY AS [PO Type]
,               POL.PNLI AS [Ln]
,               POL.PNLS AS [Ln Sub]
,               POL.SUDO AS [Container Num]
,               REPN AS [RecvgNum]
,               CDSE AS [Sno]
,               CEID AS [Elemnt]
,               MAX(RCAC) AS [Rcvd cost amt]
,               MAX(POL.PUPR) AS [Rcvd cost ppU/M]
,               SUM(ORQA) as [Reported qty]
,               MAX(ITM.GRWE)*SUM(ORQA) as [Total Weight]
,               ITM.ITCL AS [Brand]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item number]
,               ITM.ITDS AS [Description]
,               POL.RCDT AS [Trs dt]
,               POL.DWDT as [Delivery Date]
,               ITM.PRGP as [Item Type]
,               CASE WHEN POL.RCDT <> '0' then LEFT(CAST(CAST(POL.RCDT as varchar(8)) as date), 10) else NULL end as [Trs dt ext]
,               POL.CSNO AS [HTS Code]
,               ITM.CFI4 AS [Trump]
,               null AS Ls
,               null AS Hs
,               POL.ORCO AS [Country]
,               ITGR AS [Item grp]
,               CST.TX40 AS [Item Group]
,               POL.WHLO AS [Whs]
,               CASE WHEN CEID = 'PMI' THEN MAX(RCAC)*1.0/NULLIF((MAX(POL.PUPR)*SUM(ORQA)),0) ELSE NULL END as PMI
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
LEFT JOIN       M3.FGRPCL PCL ON POH.PUNO = PCL.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = PCL.PNLI AND POL.PNLS = PCL.PNLS
WHERE           1=1
GROUP BY        CASE when ITM.ITCL IN ('AVA') THEN 'Compact' WHEN ITM.ITCL IN ('MXC', 'PMXC', 'GEN', 'PGEN', 'MXI', 'PMXI', 'BEV', 'BLA', 'DUUR', 'SAP') THEN 'Commercial' else 'Consumer' END , ITM.ITCL
,               POH.PUNO, POL.PNLI, POL.ORCO, POL.WHLO, POL.SUDO, ITM.ITNO, ITM.ITDS, CST.TX40, POL.DWDT
,               POL.CSNO, POL.PUSL, CEID, ITGR, REPN, CDSE, POL.RCDT, ITM.CFI4, POL.PNLS, POH.ORTY, ITM.PRGP

select * from m3.fgrpcl

CREATE VIEW v_LandedCost_Sales
-- drop view v_LandedCost_Sales
as

SELECT      A.Date
,           A.[Part ID - Actual] as [Item Number]
,           SUM([Sales Amt]) as Sales
,           SUM([Sales Qty]) as SalesQty
,               IM.[Aligned Item Number]
,               IM.[Description]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Description]
,               IM.Subcategory
,               IM.Category
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Manufactured or Purchased] as [Procurement Type]
,               IM.Status
,               [Invoice ID]
,               [Order ID]
FROM        a_SalesData A
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on A.[Part ID - Actual] = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE       A.Company = 'M3'
AND         A.[Date] >= '2022-10-01'
AND         A.[Sales Type] = 'Sales'
GROUP BY    A.Date, A.[Part ID - Actual],               IM.[Aligned Item Number]
,               IM.[Description]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Description]
,               IM.Subcategory
,               IM.Category
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Manufactured or Purchased]
,               IM.Status, [Invoice ID], [Order ID]

create view         v_M3_Cancelled
as
SELECT              OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order Number]
,                   OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                   OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                   OH.ORDT AS [Order Date]
,                   OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,                   OL.ITNO AS [Item ID]
,                   IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                   OL.RSCD AS [Cancel Reason]
,                   OL.ORQT AS [Cancelled Qty]
,                   OL.NEPR*OL.ORQT AS [Cancelled Amt]
FROM                DBO.M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN                DBO.M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE               OH.ORST = '90'
--drop view v_M3_Cancelled

create view         v_M3_Sales
as
SELECT              OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order Number]
,                   OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                   OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                   OH.ORDT AS [Order Date]
,                   OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,                   OL.ITNO AS [Item ID]
,                   IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                   OL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Qty]
,                   OL.NEPR*OL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Amt]
FROM                DBO.M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN                DBO.M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE               OL.IVQT > 0

CREATE VIEW         v_M3_InventoryByLocation
as
--drop view v_M3_InventoryByLocation
SELECT              A.*
,                   [Incoming Qty]
,                   [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM
(
SELECT              IB.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   IM.ITDS as [Item Name]
,                   IB.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,                   STQT AS [On Hand Qty]
,                   ALQT AS [Allocated Qty]
,                   STQT - ALQT AS [Available Qty]
FROM                DBO.M3_MITBAL IB
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON IB.ITNO = IM.ITNO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT              X.[Item Number], X.[Warehouse], [Incoming Qty], [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM
(
SELECT              ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,                   SUM(ORQA) AS [Incoming Qty]
FROM                DBO.M3_MPLINE
WHERE               LEFT(CAST(CAST(DWDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) >= GETDATE()
GROUP BY            ITNO, WHLO
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT              ITNO AS [Item Number]
,                   WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,                   MIN(DWDT) AS [Expected Receipt Date]
FROM                DBO.M3_MPLINE
WHERE               LEFT(CAST(CAST(DWDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE), 10) >= GETDATE()
GROUP BY            ITNO, WHLO
) Y                 on X.[Item Number] = Y.[Item Number] AND X.[Warehouse] = Y.[Warehouse]
) B                 on A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number] AND A.[Warehouse] = B.[Warehouse]

--drop view v_M3_MITMAS 

create view v_M3_MITMAS 
as 

SELECT         IM.*
,               CASE WHEN STAT = '05' THEN 'Template Item'
                WHEN STAT = '10' THEN 'Project'
                WHEN STAT = '15' THEN 'Replacement Item'
                WHEN STAT = '20' THEN 'Released'
                WHEN STAT = '30' THEN 'Alternate Item Available'
                WHEN STAT = '40' THEN 'Low Turnover'
                WHEN STAT = '50' THEN 'Discontinued'
                WHEN STAT = '80' THEN 'Not Carried'
                WHEN STAT = '90' THEN 'Not Stocked'
                WHEN STAT = '99' THEN 'Item Number Change' END as 'STAT_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN ITTY = '100' THEN 'Purchased Equipment'
                WHEN ITTY = '110' THEN 'Manufactured Equipment'
                WHEN ITTY = '210' THEN 'Service Part'
                WHEN ITTY = '220' THEN 'Component' END as 'ITTY_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN PRGP = 'SP' then 'Service Part'
                WHEN PRGP = 'FG' then 'Finished Good'
                WHEN PRGP = 'CP' then 'Component'
                WHEN PRGP = 'MC' then 'Miscellaneous Charge' ELSE PRGP END AS PRGP_DESCRIPTION
,               CS.TX40 as 'ITGR_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS2.TX40 as 'ITCL_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN IM.ACRF = '410' then 'Countertop'
                WHEN IM.ACRF = '420' then 'Compact'
                WHEN IM.ACRF = '430' then 'Commercial' end as 'ACRF_DESCRIPTION'
,               SC.TX40 as 'PDLN_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS3.TX40 AS 'BUAR_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN MABU = '1' THEN 'Manufactured' else 'Purchased' end as 'MABU_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN GRP2 = 'CMP' THEN 'Compact'
                WHEN GRP2 = 'CNT' THEN 'Countertop'
                WHEN GRP2 = 'COM' THEN 'Commercial'
                WHEN GRP2 = 'GWT' THEN 'GWT'
                WHEN GRP2 = 'SHS' THEN 'Shared Services' ELSE GRP2 END AS 'GRP2_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN GRP3 = 'ADM' THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN GRP3 = 'AFS' THEN 'AFS'
                WHEN GRP3 = 'AVA' THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN GRP3 = 'CNT' THEN 'Countertop'
                WHEN GRP3 = 'INT' THEN 'International'
                WHEN GRP3 = 'KAL' THEN 'Kalorik'
                WHEN GRP3 = 'OTC' THEN 'Other Commercial'
                WHEN GRP3 = 'SHS' THEN 'Shared Services'
                WHEN GRP3 = 'VIN' THEN 'Vinotemp' ELSE GRP3 END AS 'GRP3_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN GRP4 = 'ADM' THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN GRP4 = 'AVA' THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN GRP4 = 'BEV' THEN 'BevLes'
                WHEN GRP4 = 'BLA' THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN GRP4 = 'BRA' THEN 'Brama'
                WHEN GRP4 = 'C21' THEN 'Chop 21'
                WHEN GRP4 = 'CHF' THEN 'Chef''sChoice'
                WHEN GRP4 = 'DUU' THEN 'DUURA'
                WHEN GRP4 = 'EDG' THEN 'EdgeCraft'

,               MF.CSNO
,               MF.ORCO
,               MP.POPN
FROM            M3.MITMAS IM
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS ON IM.ITGR=CS.STKY AND CS.STCO='ITGR'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON IM.ITCL=CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO='ITCL'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CRPDLN SC ON IM.PDLN=SC.PDLN
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON IM.BUAR=CS3.STKY AND CS3.STCO='BUAR'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITFAC MF ON IM.ITNO = MF.ITNO AND MF.FACI = 'TLC'
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPOP MP on IM.ITNO = MP.ITNO AND MP.ALWQ = 'UPC'
WHERE           IM.CONO = '100'

CREATE VIEW     v_M3_OCUSMA as
-- DROP VIEW    v_M3_OCUSMA
SELECT          distinct OC.*
,               CASE WHEN STAT = '10' THEN 'Preliminary'
                WHEN STAT = '11' THEN 'Temporary Customer Number'
                WHEN STAT = '12' THEN 'Incorrect Values'
                WHEN STAT = '20' THEN 'Definite'
                WHEN STAT = '90' THEN 'Blocked/Expired' end AS 'STAT_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN CUTP = '0' THEN 'Normal'
                WHEN CUTP = '1' THEN 'Bonus/Commission'
                WHEN CUTP = '2' THEN 'Payer'
                WHEN CUTP = '4' THEN 'Ship-Via'
                WHEN CUTP = '7' THEN 'Internal'
                WHEN CUTP = '8' THEN 'Temporary Customer'
                WHEN CUTP = '9' THEN 'Temporary Customer Group' end AS 'CUTP_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS.TX40 AS 'SDST_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS2.TX40 AS 'SMCD_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS3.TX40 AS 'FRE1_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS4.TX15 AS 'TEPY_DESCRIPTION'
,               OO.TX40 AS 'ORTP_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS5.TX40 AS 'CUCL_DESCRIPTION'
,               CG.A330 AS SALES_ADMIN
,               OG.DISP*1.00/100 as Discount
FROM            M3.OCUSMA OC
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.SDST = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SDST'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON OC.SMCD = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON OC.FRE1 = CS3.STKY AND CS3.STCO = 'FRE1'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS4 ON OC.TEPY = CS4.STKY AND CS4.STCO = 'TEPY' AND CS4.LNCD = 'GB'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS5 ON OC.CUCL = CS5.STKY AND CS5.STCO = 'CUCL'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OOTYPE OO ON OC.ORTP = OO.ORTP
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA' AND CG.A330 <> ''
LEFT JOIN       M3.OGDMTX OG on OC.CUNO = OG.OBV1 and OC.DISY = OG.DISY

CREATE VIEW     v_M3_OpenPurchaseOrders_Jan012023
as
SELECT          DISTINCT POH.PUNO AS [PO Number]
,               SUP.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,               SUP.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               ITM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,               POH.DWDT AS [Requested Delivery Date]
,               ORQA as [Order Qty]
,               RVQA as [Received Qty]
,               ORQA - RVQA as [Open Qty]
FROM            dbo.M3_MPHEAD POH
JOIN            dbo.M3_MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            dbo.M3_MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            dbo.M3_CIDMAS SUP on POL.SUNO = SUP.SUNO
WHERE           POH.DWDT >= '20230101'
and           POL.PUSL < '99'
--drop view     v_M3_OpenPurchaseOrders_Jan012023

create view         v_M3_Quotations
as
SELECT              OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order Number]
,                   OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                   OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                   OH.ORDT AS [Order Date]
,                   OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,                   OL.ITNO AS [Item ID]
,                   IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                   OL.ORQT AS [Order Qty]
,                   OL.NEPR*OL.ORQT AS [Order Amt]
FROM                DBO.M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN                DBO.M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE               OL.ORQT > 0
AND					OH.ORNO LIKE '6%'
--drop view v_M3_Quotations

create view         v_M3_Sales
as
SELECT              OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order Number]
,                   OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                   OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                   OH.ORDT AS [Order Date]
,                   OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,                   OL.ITNO AS [Item ID]
,                   IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                   OL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Qty]
,                   OL.NEPR*OL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Amt]
FROM                DBO.M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN                DBO.M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE               OL.IVQT > 0

CREATE VIEW         v_M3_SalesCubeData
-- drop view v_M3_SalesCubeData
as 
SELECT              ODH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                   LE.ACDT as [Date]
,                   IM.ITNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part ID]
,                   IM.ITDS COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part Description]
,                   SUM(OL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT) as [Sales Amt]
,                   SUM(ODL.IVQT) as [Sales Qty]
,                   SUM(ODL.DCOS) as [Cost]
,                   CASE WHEN SUM(ODL.IVQT) < 1 then 'Return' else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type]
FROM                M3.FSLEDG LE
JOIN                M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN
JOIN                M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.PYNO = ODH.PYNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date) 
JOIN                M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX 
JOIN                M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX 
JOIN                M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO JOIN M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO 
WHERE               LE.TRCD = 10 
and                 ODH.ACDT <> 0 
and                 IM.ITCL <> 'ZZZ' 
GROUP BY            ODH.CUNO, OC.CUNM, LE.ACDT, IM.ITNO, IM.ITDS

create view         v_M3_Sales_Costco
-- drop view v_M3_Sales_Costco
as
SELECT              OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order Number]
,                   OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
--,                   OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                   cast(cast(OL.LMDT as varchar(255)) as date) AS [Order Date]
--,                   OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,                   OL.ITNO AS [Item ID]
,                   IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                   OL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Qty]
,                   OL.NEPR*OL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Amt]
FROM                M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN                M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN                M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN                M3.MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE               OL.IVQT > 0
AND                 OC.CUNO IN ('50011', '50177', '50974')

UNION ALL

SELECT			    cast(uniquekey as varchar(max)) as [Sales Order Number]
,				    cast(E.id as varchar(max)) as [Customer ID]
,				    E.altname as [Customer Name]
,				    trandate as [Order Date]
,				    CAST(itemid as varchar(max)) as [Item ID]
,				    description as [Item Name]
,				    itemcount as [Invoiced Qty]
,			        amount as [Invoiced Amt]
FROM			    NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			    NET.Item I on SI.item = I.id
LEFT JOIN		    NET.Entity E on SI.entity = E.id
LEFT JOIN		    NET.Class C on I.class = C.id
WHERE			    trandate >= '2022-01-01'
AND				    amount > 0
AND				    SI.type = 'CustInvc'
AND				    itemid <> 'UNVERIFIED CREDITS'
AND                 E.altname = 'Costco'

CREATE VIEW                                                     v_ManufacturedOrders
-- drop view v_ManufacturedOrders
as
SELECT 'Manufacturing Order' as									[Order Type]
,		MWH.MFNO as												[Manufacturing Order Number]
,		MWH.WHHS as												[Manufacturing Order Status]
,      	MWH.ITNO AS 											[Item Number]
,		MWH.STDT AS												[Estimated Start Date]
,       cast(cast(NULLIF(MWH.RSDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date) AS                                             [Actual Start Date]
,       MWH.FIDT AS                                             [Estimated Finish Date]
,       cast(cast(NULLIF(MWH.REFD,0) as varchar(10)) as date) AS                                             [Actual Finish Date]
,		MWH.ORQA AS												[Order Qty]
,		MWH.RVQA AS												[Received Qty]
,       MWH.ORQA - MWH.RVQA AS                                  [Open Qty]
,		cast(CAST(NULLIF(MWH.RPDT, 0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Last Received Date]
,		MF.APPR  AS												[Price]
,		MWH.ORQA*MF.APPR AS										[Total Amount]
,		MWH.RESP as												[Responsible]
,		MWH.WHLO as												[Warehouse]
FROM            M3.MWOHED AS MWH
LEFT JOIN 		M3.MITFAC MF on MWH.ITNO = MF.ITNO
WHERE	MWH.WHHS > 10

CREATE VIEW v_ManufacturedQty
-- drop view v_ManufacturedQty
AS
SELECT        A.ItemNumber
, A.ItemDescription
, A.ProcurementGroup
, A.Warehouse
, A.ManufacturingNumber
, CAST(CAST(A.ReportDate AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) AS ReportDate
, A.ManufacturedQty
, A.AccCost AS StandardCost
, A.AvgCost as AverageCost
, B.ActualCost AS ActualCost
, A.TotalCost AS TotalStandardCost
, B.ActualCost*A.ManufacturedQty AS TotalActualCost
, A.AvgCost*A.ManufacturedQty AS TotalAverageCost
FROM    (
    SELECT        MWH.ITNO AS ItemNumber
    , MI.ITDS AS ItemDescription
    , MI.PRGP AS ProcurementGroup
    , MWH.WHLO AS Warehouse
    , MWH.MFNO AS ManufacturingNumber
    , IT.TRDT AS ReportDate
    , SUM(IT.TRQT) AS ManufacturedQty
    , AVG(IT.TRPR) AS AccCost
    , AVG(MF.APPR) AS AvgCost
    , SUM(IT.TRPR * IT.TRQT) AS TotalCost
    FROM            M3.MWOHED AS MWH 
    INNER JOIN      M3.MITMAS AS MI ON MWH.ITNO = MI.ITNO 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN M3.MITTRA AS IT ON MWH.ITNO = IT.ITNO AND MWH.MFNO = IT.RIDN
    LEFT OUTER JOIN M3.MITFAC MF on MWH.ITNO = MF.ITNO
    WHERE        (MWH.WHHS >= 70) 
    AND (MWH.MAQA <> 0)
    GROUP BY MWH.ITNO, MI.ITDS, MI.PRGP, MWH.WHLO, MWH.MFNO, IT.TRDT
        ) AS A 
        
        LEFT OUTER JOIN
        
        (
            SELECT        RIDN AS ManufacturingNumber
            , SUM(TOAF/NULLIF(AIQT,0)) AS ActualCost
            FROM            M3.CPOMAT
            GROUP BY RIDN
        ) AS B ON A.ManufacturingNumber = B.ManufacturingNumber

CREATE VIEW v_Manufacturing
as
SELECT      MFNO as     [Manufacturing Number]
,           WHST as     [Order Status]
,           WHLO as     [Warehouse]
,           ITNO as     [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Description]
--,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
--,           IM.Division as [Division]
--,           IM.[Item Type] as [Item Type]
,           STDT as     [Start Date]
,           ORQA as     [Order Qty]
,           RVQA as     [Received Qty]
,           CASE WHEN WCLN in ('ALINE', 'BEVLINE', 'BLINE', 'CLINE', 'EXC10LIN', 'WMLINE') THEN 'Assembly'
            WHEN WCLN in ('ZEROLLFG', 'ZEROLLIP') THEN 'Zeroll'
            WHEN WCLN IN ('PLATING') then 'Plating'
            WHEN WCLN IN ('MOLDING') then 'Molding'
            else WCLN end as [Production Line]
FROM        M3.MWOHED MW
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on MW.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE       ORTY IN ('D95', 'D96')
AND         WHST < 80

CREATE VIEW v_Manufacturing_All
-- drop view v_Manufacturing_All
as
SELECT      MFNO as     [Manufacturing Number]
,           WHST as     [Order Status]
,           WHLO as     [Warehouse]
,           ITNO as     [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Description]
,           STDT as     [Start Date]
,           RPDT as     [Report Date]
,           ORQA as     [Order Qty]
,           RVQA as     [Received Qty]
,           CASE WHEN WCLN in ('ALINE', 'BEVLINE', 'BLINE', 'CLINE', 'EXC10LIN', 'WMLINE') THEN 'Assembly'
            WHEN WCLN in ('ZEROLLFG', 'ZEROLLIP') THEN 'Zeroll'
            WHEN WCLN IN ('PLATING') then 'Plating'
            WHEN WCLN IN ('MOLDING') then 'Molding'
            else WCLN end as [Production Line]
FROM        M3.MWOHED MW
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on MW.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE       ORTY IN ('D95', 'D96')

CREATE VIEW     v_MinMax
-- drop view v_MinMax
-- select * from v_MinMax
as
SELECT			A.*, B.YtdSoldQty, C.PrevYearSoldQty, COALESCE(NULLIF(A.Price, ''), NULLIF(A.Price2, ''), LastPurchasePrice) as UnitCost
FROM
(
SELECT			MM.ITNO as M3ItemNumber
,				MM.ITNE as SysproItemNumber
,				MM.ITDS as ItemDescription
,				MB.WHLO as Warehouse
,				MM.ITCL as Brand
,               MM.PRGP as ItemType
,				MM.SUNO as Supplier
,               CD.SUNM as SupplierName
,				STQT as QtyOnHand
,				ORQT as QtyOnPO
,				REQT as QtyOnSO
,               MF.APPR as [Price]
,               MM.PUPR as [Price2]
,               MB.REOP as [Min Avanti]
,               MB.MXST as [Max Avanti]
FROM			M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN		M3.MITBAL MB on MM.ITNO = MB.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDMAS CD on MM.SUNO = CD.SUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITFAC MF on MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO
WHERE           MM.ITNO NOT LIKE '69K%'
AND             MM.ITNO NOT LIKE '68K%'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			ITNO, SUM(DLQT) AS YtdSoldQty
FROM			M3.ODLINE 
WHERE			left(RGDT, 4) = year(getdate())
GROUP BY		ITNO
) B	on			A.M3ItemNumber = B.ITNO

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			ITNO, SUM(DLQT) AS PrevYearSoldQty
FROM			M3.ODLINE
WHERE			left(RGDT, 4) = (year(getdate()) - 1)
GROUP BY		ITNO
) C	on		A.M3ItemNumber = C.ITNO

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ITNO, PUPR as LastPurchasePrice
FROM            M3.MPLINE
WHERE           ITNO+CAST(RGDT AS VARCHAR(MAX)) IN
(
SELECT          ITNO+CAST(MAX(RGDT) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) as last_date
FROM            M3.MPLINE
GROUP BY        ITNO
)
) D             ON A.M3ItemNumber = D.ITNO

CREATE VIEW v_NegativeInventory
as
SELECT      A.*, B.ITNO, B.STQT, TRDT, RESP
FROM
(
SELECT      DISTINCT WHLO, WHSL
FROM        M3.MITPCE
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      WHLO, ITNO, WHSL, STQT
FROM        M3.MITLOC
WHERE       STQT < 0
) B ON      A.WHLO = B.WHLO AND A.WHSL = B.WHSL

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT M.WHLO, M.WHSL, M.ITNO, M.TRDT, M.RESP
FROM        M3.MITTRA M
JOIN        (SELECT WHLO, WHSL, ITNO, MAX(cast(TRDT as varchar(max))+cast(TRTM as varchar(max))) TRDT FROM M3.MITTRA GROUP BY WHLO, WHSL, ITNO) M2 ON M.WHLO = M2.WHLO AND M.WHSL = M2.WHSL AND M.ITNO = M2.ITNO AND cast(M.TRDT as varchar(max))+cast(M.TRTM as varchar(max)) = M2.TRDT
) C ON      A.WHLO = C.WHLO AND A.WHSL = C.WHSL AND B.ITNO = C.ITNO
WHERE       STQT < 0

CREATE VIEW v_OB_Inventory
as
SELECT      A.*, B.ITNO, B.STQT, ALQT, TRDT, RESP
FROM
(
SELECT      DISTINCT WHLO, WHSL
FROM        M3.MITPCE
WHERE       SLTP = 'OB'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      WHLO, ITNO, WHSL, STQT, ALQT
FROM        M3.MITLOC
) B ON      A.WHLO = B.WHLO AND A.WHSL = B.WHSL

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT M.WHLO, M.WHSL, M.ITNO, M.TRDT, M.RESP
FROM        M3.MITTRA M
JOIN        (SELECT WHLO, WHSL, ITNO, MAX(cast(TRDT as varchar(max))+cast(TRTM as varchar(max))) TRDT FROM M3.MITTRA GROUP BY WHLO, WHSL, ITNO) M2 ON M.WHLO = M2.WHLO AND M.WHSL = M2.WHSL AND M.ITNO = M2.ITNO AND cast(M.TRDT as varchar(max))+cast(M.TRTM as varchar(max)) = M2.TRDT
) C ON      A.WHLO = C.WHLO AND A.WHSL = C.WHSL AND B.ITNO = C.ITNO
WHERE       STQT <> ALQT

CREATE VIEW v_OpenOrdersByStatus
 --drop view v_OpenOrdersByStatus
as

SELECT      A.*
,           CASE WHEN [Quantity] > 0 then 'Sales' else 'Returns' end as [Sales Type]
/*,           B.[Expected Arrival Date]*/
,           COALESCE (C.CUA1, D.CUA12, A.[Address 1]) AS [Ship to Address 1]
,           COALESCE (C.CUA2, D.CUA22, A.[Adddress 2]) AS [Ship to Address 2]
,           COALESCE (C.TOWN, D.TOWN2, A.[City]) AS [Ship to City]
,           COALESCE (C.PONO, D.PONO2, A.[Zip Code]) AS [Ship to Zip]
,           COALESCE (C.ECAR, D.ECAR2, A.[State]) AS [Ship to State]
,           COALESCE (C.CSCD, D.CSCD2, A.Country) AS [Ship to Country]

/*
,           NULL as CUNO
,           NULL AS [Address ID 2], NULL as CUNM2
,           NULL AS CUA12
,           NULL AS CUA22
,           NULL AS TOWN2
,           NULL AS PONO2
,           NULL AS ECAR2
,           NULL AS CSCD2
,           E.ARDN as [PO Number]
*/

,           [Overdue Invoice Amount]
,           [Overdue Days]
,           [Outstanding Invoice Amount]
,           [Outstanding Orders Not Invoiced]
FROM
(
SELECT      'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) end) <= EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,GETDATE())) THEN '2 - Backordered'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) end) > EOMONTH(GETDATE()) THEN '2 - Future Order' else '2 - Current Month Backorder' end as [Qty Status]
,           CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) end) <= EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,GETDATE())) THEN 'Backordered' 
            WHEN (CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) end) > EOMONTH(GETDATE()) THEN 'Future Order' else 'Current Month Backorder' end as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           NULL AS [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.SAPR*CC.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN OL.ORQT/2
            /*WHEN OL.ITNO LIKE 'VINO-CUSTOM%' THEN OL.ORQT/2*/ ELSE OL.ORQT END as [Order Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN OL.RNQT/2 
            /*WHEN OL.ITNO LIKE 'VINO-CUSTOM%' THEN OL.RNQT/2*/ ELSE OL.RNQT END as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           NULL AS [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
LEFT JOIN   v_CurrencyConversion CC ON OH.CUCD = CC.CUCD
WHERE       OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '79'
AND         OL.RNQT > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '3 - Allocated' as [Qty Status]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Shippable - Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Shippable - Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '0' then 'Released to DCs'
            ELSE 'Shippable - Released to Logistics' END as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           NULL AS [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.SAPR*CC.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           OL.ORQT as [Order Quantity]
,           OL.ALQT as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           NULL AS [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY

SELECT      DISTINCT 'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '7 - Invoiced' as [Qty Status]
,           'Invoiced' as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           LE.CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)  as [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 WHEN LE.CINO = '2999910570' then 451 ELSE OL.SAPR*LE.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           /*CASE WHEN OL.ITNO LIKE 'VINO-CUSTOM%' THEN OL.ORQT/2 ELSE */OL.ORQT /*END*/ as [Order Quantity]
,           /*CASE WHEN OL.ITNO LIKE 'VINO-CUSTOM%' THEN ODL.IVQT/2 ELSE*/ ODL.IVQT /*END*/ as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           ETRN as [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE 
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN 
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH on OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
--LEFT JOIN    (SELECT DISTINCT DLIX, SORT, ETRN FROM M3.MPTRNS) MT on ODH.DLIX = MT.DLIX and OL.ITNO = MT.SORT
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
AND             LE.CINO not in ('2400163940', '2999910397', '2999910571', '2400083573', '2400083579', '2400083575', '2400088771'
                                , '2400088775', '2400088773', '2400088788', '2400102150', '2400081300', '2400068696', '2400060092', '2400163926'
                                , '2400053326', '2400052745', '2400052544', '2400052542', '2400053348', '2400053347', '2400052543', '2400054060',
                                '2400054065', '2400053659', '2400060082', '2400060083', '2400054063', '2400054064', '2400053660', '2400058368',
                                '2400058376', '2400058378', '2400058380', '2400058374', '2400058366', '2400058382', '2400058372', '2400058358',
                                '2400058362', '2400058364', '2400058356',  '2400058360', '2400058384', '2400058370'
)

,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]

,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]

,           NULL AS [Inv Date]

,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.SAPR*CC.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN OL.ORQT/2 ELSE OL.ORQT END as [Order Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN (OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT)/2 ELSE OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT END as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]

FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
LEFT JOIN   v_CurrencyConversion CC ON OH.CUCD = CC.CUCD
WHERE       OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '99'
AND         OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT > 0
