,           COL.UNIT_PRICE as [Unit Price]
,           COL.ORDER_QTY as [Order Quantity]
,           COL.ORDER_QTY as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN C.USER_3 IN ('INTERCOMPANY', 'GWT') then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           NULL as [Shipping Method]
,           C.USER_7 as [DS Flag]
,           NULL as [Tracking Number]
FROM        ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN        ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN        ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID
JOIN        ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE       COL.LINE_STATUS IN ('C')

UNION ALL

SELECT			DISTINCT 'Syspro G' as ERP
,               NULL as [Line Status]
,               0 as [Order Stop Code]
,               'No Stop Code' as [Order Stop Code Description]
,               '7 - Invoiced' as [Qty Status]
,               'Invoiced' as [Bridge Category]
,				AC.Customer as [Customer Number]
,               AC.Customer as [Payer]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,               AC.CreditLimit as [Credit Limit]
,               NULL as SalesRep
,               NULL as SalesRepName
,               NULL as Territory
,               NULL as [OrderEntryUser]
,               NULL as [Buying Group]
,               NULL as [Address ID]
,               SM.ShipAddress1 as [Address 1]
,               SM.ShipAddress2 as [Address 2]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Zip Code]
,               AC.Telephone as [Phone Number]
,               SM.ShipAddress5 as [Country]
,               ATS.TermsCode as [Payment Terms]
,               NULL as [Cash Terms]
,               NULL as [Freight Terms]
,               NULL as [Carrier]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Sales Order]
,               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice Number]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,               NULL as [Order Type]
,               NULL as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,               SM.EntrySystemDate as [Line Entry Date]
,               SM.EntrySystemDate as [Order Entry Date]
,               SM.ReqShipDate as [Requested Date]
,               NULL as [Last Date]
,               NULL as [DI Date]
,               ATD.InvoiceDate as [Inv Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,               DF.Division as [Division]
,               CASE WHEN DF.Brand in ('BEVLES') then 'BEV'
                WHEN DF.Brand in ('ADMIRAL CRAFT') then 'ADM'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('AVANTI') THEN 'AVA'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE') THEN 'BLA'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('VINOTEMP') THEN 'VIN'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL', 'OMEGA', 'CHEFS CHOICE', 'WESTBEND', 'YONANAS') THEN 'EDG'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('MAXX ICE', 'LEGION', 'GENERAL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'MAXX COLD') THEN 'AFS' END as [Finance Brand]
,               ATD.DetailLine as [Line Number]
,               NULL as [Line Suffix]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Item Number]
,				ISNULL(P.Description, IM.Description) as [Item Name]
,               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,               ATD.NetSalesValue/NULLIF(ATD.QtyInvoiced,0) as [Unit Price]
,               ATD.QtyInvoiced as [Order Quantity]
,               ATD.QtyInvoiced as [Quantity]
,               'Not IC' as [IC Flag]
,               NULL as [Shipping Method]
,               NULL as [DS Flag]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P on GV.VisualPartID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorMaster SM on ATS.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2023-01-01'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
and             Brand <> 'EMC'
*/
) A
/*
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT *
FROM 
(
SELECT      ML.ITNO as [Item Number], ML.WHLO as [Warehouse], MIN(ML.DWDT) as [Expected Arrival Date]
FROM        M3.MPHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MPLINE ML ON MH.PUNO = ML.PUNO
WHERE       ML.PUSL BETWEEN '20' and '45'
GROUP BY    ML.ITNO, ML.WHLO
) X
) B         on A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number] and A.[Warehouse] = B.[Warehouse]
*/
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ORNO
,               CUNM
,               CUA1
,               CUA2
,               TOWN
,               PONO
,               ECAR
,               CSCD
FROM            M3.OOADRE
WHERE           ADRT = '1'
) C             on A.[Sales Order] = C.[ORNO]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT CUNO
,               ADID
,               CUNM as CUNM2
,               CUA1 AS CUA12
,               CUA2 AS CUA22
,               TOWN AS TOWN2
,               PONO AS PONO2
,               ECAR AS ECAR2
,               CSCD AS CSCD2
FROM            M3.OCUSAD
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) D             on A.[Customer Number] = D.[CUNO] and A.[Address ID] = D.[ADID]
/*
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			DISTINCT ARDN, ITNO, WHLO, DRDN
FROM			M3.MPREAL
) E         on A.[Sales Order] = E.DRDN and A.[Item Number] = E.ITNO
*/

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PYNO as [Payer]
,               ODIN as [Overdue Invoice Amount]
,               NOOD as [Overdue Days]
,               OINA as [Outstanding Invoice Amount]
,               OVNI as [Outstanding Orders Not Invoiced] 
FROM            M3.CCUCRL
) F         on A.[Payer] = F.[Payer]

CREATE VIEW     v_OpenOrdersByStatus2
-- drop view v_OpenOrdersByStatus2
as
SELECT          COALESCE(A.[Sales Order], B.[Sales Order], C.[Sales Order]) as [Sales Order]
,               COALESCE(A.[Order Stop Code], B.[Order Stop Code], C.[Order Stop Code]) as [Order Stop Code]
,               COALESCE(A.[Customer Number], B.[Customer Number], C.[Customer Number]) as [Customer Number]
,               COALESCE(A.[Customer Name], B.[Customer Name], C.[Customer Name]) as [Customer Name]
,               COALESCE(A.[Order Entry Date], B.[Order Entry Date], C.[Order Entry Date]) as [Entry Date]
,               COALESCE(A.[Requested Date], B.[Requested Date], C.[Requested Date]) as [Requested Date]
,               COALESCE(A.[ReqMonth], B.[ReqMonth], C.[ReqMonth]) as [ReqMonth]
,               COALESCE(A.[ReqYear], B.[ReqYear], C.[ReqYear]) as [ReqYear]
,               COALESCE(A.[Customer PO], B.[Customer PO], C.[Customer PO]) as [Customer PO]
,               COALESCE(A.[SalesRep], B.[SalesRep], C.[SalesRep]) as [SalesRep]
,               COALESCE(A.[SalesRepName], B.[SalesRepName], C.[SalesRepName]) as [SalesRepName]
,               COALESCE(A.[Territory], B.[Territory], C.[Territory]) as [Territory]
,               COALESCE(A.[Line Number], B.[Line Number], C.[Line Number]) as [Line Number]
,               COALESCE(A.[Order Amount], B.[Order Amount], C.[Order Amount]) as [Order Amount]
,               COALESCE(A.[Brand], B.[Brand], C.[Brand]) as [Brand]
,               COALESCE(A.[Item Number], B.[Item Number], C.[Item Number]) as [Item Number]
,               COALESCE(A.[Item Name], B.[Item Name], C.[Item Name]) as [Item Name]
,               COALESCE(A.[Order Quantity], B.[Order Quantity], C.[Order Quantity]) as [Order Quantity]
,               COALESCE([Allocated Qty], 0) as [Allocated Qty]
,               COALESCE([Pick Qty], 0) as [Pick Qty]
,               COALESCE([Open/Backorder Qty], 0) as [Open/Backorder Qty]
,               COALESCE(A.[Unit Price], B.[Unit Price], C.[Unit Price]) as [Unit Price]
,               [Open/Backorder Qty]*COALESCE(A.[Unit Price], B.[Unit Price], C.[Unit Price]) as [Open/Backorder Amount]
--,               COALESCE(A.[Expected Arrival Date], B.[Expected Arrival Date], C.[Expected Arrival Date]) as [Next PO Date]
,               COALESCE(A.[Warehouse], B.[Warehouse], C.[Warehouse]) as [Warehouse]
FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT [Sales Order]
,               [Order Stop Code]
,               [Customer Number]
,               [Customer Name]
,               [Order Entry Date]
,               [Requested Date]
,               MONTH([Requested Date]) as ReqMonth
,               YEAR([Requested Date]) as ReqYear
,               [Customer PO]
,               SalesRep
,               SalesRepName
,               Territory
,               [Line Number]
,               [Line Suffix]
,               [Order Quantity]*[Unit Price] as [Order Amount]
,               [Brand]
,               [Item Number]
,               [Item Name]
,               [Order Quantity]
,               [Quantity] as [Open/Backorder Qty]
--,               [Expected Arrival Date]
,               [Unit Price]
,               [Warehouse]
FROM            v_OpenOrdersByStatus
WHERE           [Qty Status] like '2%'
) A

FULL OUTER JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT [Sales Order]
,               [Order Stop Code]
,               [Customer Number]
,               [Customer Name]
,               [Order Entry Date]
,               [Requested Date]
,               MONTH([Requested Date]) as ReqMonth
,               YEAR([Requested Date]) as ReqYear
,               [Customer PO]
,               SalesRep
,               SalesRepName
,               Territory
,               [Line Number]
,               [Line Suffix]
,               [Order Quantity]*[Unit Price] as [Order Amount]
,               [Brand]
,               [Item Number]
,               [Item Name]
,               [Order Quantity]
,               [Quantity] as [Allocated Qty]
--,               [Expected Arrival Date]
,               [Unit Price]
,               [Warehouse]
FROM            v_OpenOrdersByStatus
WHERE           [Qty Status] = '3 - Allocated'
) B             on A.[Sales Order] = B.[Sales Order] and A.[Line Number] = B.[Line Number] and A.[Line Suffix] = B.[Line Suffix]

FULL OUTER JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT [Sales Order]
,               [Order Stop Code]
,               [Customer Number]
,               [Customer Name]
,               [Order Entry Date]
,               [Requested Date]
,               MONTH([Requested Date]) as ReqMonth
,               YEAR([Requested Date]) as ReqYear
,               [Customer PO]
,               SalesRep
,               SalesRepName
,               Territory
,               [Line Number]
,               [Line Suffix]
,               [Order Quantity]*[Unit Price] as [Order Amount]
,               [Brand]
,               [Item Number]
,               [Item Name]
,               [Order Quantity]
,               [Quantity] as [Pick Qty]
--,               [Expected Arrival Date]
,               [Unit Price]
,               [Warehouse]
FROM            v_OpenOrdersByStatus
WHERE           [Qty Status] = '4 - Waived/Pick'
) C             on A.[Sales Order] = C.[Sales Order] and A.[Line Number] = C.[Line Number] and A.[Line Suffix] = C.[Line Suffix]

/*******************************************************************************************************
  Author:       Rene Villarreal
  Create Date:  August 2, 2022
  Description:  Create view v_OpenOrders_ConsumerDashboard
********************************************************************************************************
SUMMARY OF CHANGES

Date                    Author                    Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
August 2, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Create original view
August 4, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added Brand from Part/InvMaster
********************************************************************************************************/


CREATE VIEW dbo.v_OpenOrders_ConsumerDashboard	
AS
(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company, CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], C.NAME as [Customer Name]
, 				C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], CO.ID as [Order ID]
,				CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO], P.USER_1 AS [Brand], PART_ID as [Part ID]
, 				(COL.TOTAL_AMT_ORDERED - COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED) as [Open Order Amount]
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN            ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			COALESCE(COL.DESIRED_SHIP_DATE, CO.DESIRED_SHIP_DATE) BETWEEN DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			CO.STATUS NOT IN ('X', 'C')
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)


UNION ALL


SELECT			'Company L' as Company, AC.Customer as [Customer ID], AC2.Name as [Customer Name]
, 				AC.Category as [Budget Category], COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)  as [Ship Date], SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 'Zeroll' as [Brand], MStockCode as [Part ID]
,  				(MPrice*MOrderQty - MPrice*MOrderQty) as [Open Order Amount]
FROM 			SCL.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer
JOIN            SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE 			SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX')
AND 			ReqShipDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			OrderStatus IN ('1', '4', '8', 'S')
AND 			AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			AC.Category <> 'GWT'
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0

UNION ALL 

SELECT			'Company L' as Company, AC.Customer as [Customer ID], AC2.Name as [Customer Name]
, 				AC.Category as [Budget Category], COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)  as [Ship Date], SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 'Zeroll' as [Brand], MStockCode as [Part ID]
,  				(MPrice*MBackorderQty) as [Open Order Amount]
FROM 			SCL.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer
JOIN            SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE 			SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX')
AND 			ReqShipDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			OrderStatus IN ('2')
AND 			AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			AC.Category <> 'GWT'
AND 			MPrice*MBackorderQty > 0


UNION ALL


SELECT			'Company G' as Company, AC.Customer as [Customer ID], AC.Name as [Customer Name]
, 				'GWT' as [Budget Category], COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)  as [Ship Date], SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,               CASE WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'CHEF' then 'Chefs Choice'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'EXCL' then 'Excalibur'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'OMEG' then 'Omega'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'VINT' then 'Vinturi'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'WEST' then 'WestBend'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'ZERO' then 'Zeroll'
                ELSE 'Yonanas' END as [Brand],MStockCode as [Part ID]
,  				(MPrice*MOrderQty) as [Open Order Amount]
FROM 			SCG.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN 			SCG.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE 			ReqShipDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			OrderStatus IN ('1', '4', '8', 'S')
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0
AND   			IM.ProductClass IN ('CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP')

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Company G' as Company, AC.Customer as [Customer ID], AC.Name as [Customer Name]
, 				'GWT' as [Budget Category], COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)  as [Ship Date], SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,               CASE WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'CHEF' then 'Chefs Choice'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'EXCL' then 'Excalibur'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'OMEG' then 'Omega'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'VINT' then 'Vinturi'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'WEST' then 'WestBend'
                WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'ZERO' then 'Zeroll'
                ELSE 'Yonanas' END as [Brand], MStockCode as [Part ID]
,  				(MPrice*MBackorderQty) as [Open Order Amount]
FROM 			SCG.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN 			SCG.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE 			ReqShipDate BETWEEN DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			OrderStatus IN ('2')
AND 			MPrice*MBackorderQty > 0
AND   			IM.ProductClass IN ('CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP')
)

CREATE VIEW     v_OpenPurchaseOrders
--drop view v_OpenPurchaseOrders
as
SELECT          A.*, DUTY, PMI, TRUTAR, FREI01, FREI02, FREI03, CUOR as [Customer PO], CUNO as [Customer Number], CUNM as [Customer Name], TEDL as [Shipping Term], UCA7 as [Shipping Method]
FROM
(
SELECT          POH.PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]
,               POH.PUDT AS [Purchase Order Date]
,               POH.PUSL+' - '+POH.PUST AS [PO Status]
,               POH.BUYE AS Buyer
--,               POH.TEDL AS [Shipping Method]
,               POL.DWDT AS [Requested Delivery Date]
,               POL.DWDT AS [Factory Ready Date]
,               CAST(CAST(NULLIF(POL.UID1,0) as varchar(10)) as date)AS [ETD Date]
,               CASE WHEN POL.UID2 <> 0 and MM.GRP3 = 'ADM' then dateadd(day,14,CAST(CAST(NULLIF(POL.UID2,0) as varchar(10)) as date))
                WHEN MM.GRP3 = 'ADM' then CAST(CAST(NULLIF(POH.UID3,0) as varchar(10)) as date)
                ELSE CAST(CAST(NULLIF(POL.UID2,0) as varchar(10)) as date) END AS [ETA Date]
,               cast(CAST(CASE WHEN POL.RCDT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE POL.RCDT END as varchar(10)) as date) AS [Receipt Date]
,               POL.WHLO as Warehouse
,               POL.PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               POL.PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               POL.PUSL as [Line Status]
,               POL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,               MM.ITCL as [Brand]
,               MM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,               POL.PUPR as [Unit Price]
,               POL.ORQA as [Order Qty]
,               POL.RVQA as [Receipt Qty]
,               POL.SUDO as [Container Number]
,               CS.SUNO AS [Supplier Number]
,               CS.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON POL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.CIDMAS CS ON POH.SUNO = CS.SUNO
AND             POL.OEND <> 1
AND             POL.RVQA = 0
AND             POL.RCDT = 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(CEVA) as 'DUTY'
FROM            M3.MPOEXP
WHERE           CEID = 'DUTY'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) B ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = B.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = B.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = B.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(CEVA) as 'FREI01'
FROM            M3.MPOEXP
WHERE           CEID = 'FREI01'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) C ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = C.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = C.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = C.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(CEVA) as 'FREI02'
FROM            M3.MPOEXP
WHERE           CEID = 'FREI02'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) D ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = D.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = D.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = D.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(CEVA) as 'FREI03'
FROM            M3.MPOEXP
WHERE           CEID = 'FREI03'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) E ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = E.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = E.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = E.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(CEVA) as 'PMI'
FROM            M3.MPOEXP
WHERE           CEID = 'PMI'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) F ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = F.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = F.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = F.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PUNO AS [Purchase Order Number]    
,               PNLI as [Purchase Order Line]
,               PNLS as [Purchase Order Subnumber]
,               SUM(CEVA) as 'TRUTAR'
FROM            M3.MPOEXP
WHERE           CEID = 'TRUTAR'
GROUP BY        PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
) G ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = G.[Purchase Order Number] and A.[Purchase Order Line] = G.[Purchase Order Line] and A.[Purchase Order Subnumber] = G.[Purchase Order Subnumber]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			DISTINCT ARDN, ITNO, MP.WHLO, DRDN, CUOR, OH.CUNO, OC.CUNM, OH.TEDL, OH.UCA7
FROM			M3.MPREAL MP
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH on MP.DRDN = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC on OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
) H ON          A.[Purchase Order Number] = H.ARDN and A.[Item Number] = H.ITNO

CREATE VIEW v_OpenTransferOrders
-- drop view v_TransferOrders
as
SELECT          MGH.TRNR AS     [Transfer Order]
,               MGH.TRDT as     [Create Date]
,               MGH.WHLO AS     [From Warehouse]
,               MGH.TWLO AS     [To Warehouse]
,               MGL.RESP as     [Responsible]
,               MGL.PONR AS     [Order Line]
,               MGL.TRSH AS     [Line Status]
,               MGL.ITNO AS     [Item Number]
,               MM.ITDS AS      [Item Description]
,               MGL.TRQT as     [Transfer Qty]
,               MGL.RPQT AS     [Reported Qty]
,               MGL.TRQT - MGL.RPQT as [Open Qty]
FROM            M3.MGHEAD MGH
JOIN            M3.MGLINE MGL on MGH.TRNR = MGL.TRNR
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON MGL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE           TRTP IN ('D02', 'D10', 'D11', 'D40', 'D60', 'D65', 'D82', 'OPR', 'PPN')
AND             MGL.TRQT - MGL.RPQT <> 0 AND MGL.TRSH <> 99

--DROP VIEW v_OrderAllocations

CREATE VIEW     v_OrderAllocations
AS

SELECT * FROM M3.MITPLO
WHERE CONO = '100' AND ORCA >= '300' AND ORCA < '400'

CREATE VIEW     v_OrderReceivedPOs
as
SELECT          POH.PUNO as PurchaseOrder
,               POL.PNLI as PurchaseOrderLine
,               POH.PUDT as PurchaseOrderDate
,               POH.SUNO as SupplierID
,               CMA.SUNM as SupplierName
,               ITM.ITCL as Brand
,               POL.ITNO as ItemNumber
,               ITM.ITDS as ItemDescription
,               POH.WHLO as Warehouse
,               POL.ORQA as OrderQuantity
,               POL.PUPR*POL.ORQA as OrderValue
,               POL.RVQA as ReceivedQuantity
,               POL.RVQA*POL.PUPR as ReceivedValue
,               POL.ORQA - RVQA as OpenQuantity
,               (POL.ORQA - RVQA)*POL.PUPR as OpenValue
FROM            M3_MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3_MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3_MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_CIDMAS CMA ON POH.SUNO = CMA.SUNO


select * from v_OrderReceivedPOs

CREATE VIEW     v_OrderStatusSummary
-- drop view v_OrderStatusSummary
AS
SELECT          A.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               ISNULL(B.[Status 33/0], 0) AS [Status 33/0]
,               ISNULL(C.[Status 33/7], 0) AS [Status 33/7]
,               ISNULL(D.[Status 33/8], 0) AS [Status 33/8]
,               ISNULL(E.[Status 44], 0) AS [Status 44]
,               ISNULL(F.[Status 66], 0) AS [Status 66]
,               ISNULL(G.[Status 77], 0) AS [Status 77]
,               ISNULL(G.[Status 77 Revenue], 0) AS [Status 77 Revenue]
FROM            
(
SELECT DISTINCT WHLO
FROM            M3.MITWHL
) A 

LEFT JOIN
                            
(
SELECT          OH.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 33/0'
FROM            M3.OOHEAD OH 
LEFT JOIN       M3.ODHEAD OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
WHERE           (
                cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date) >= '2023-02-09' 
                OR
                OD.IVDT IS NULL
                )
AND (OH.ORST = '33') 
AND (OH.OBLC = '0')
GROUP BY OH.WHLO
) B ON A.WHLO = B.Warehouse 



LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 33/7'
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date) >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '33') AND (OH.OBLC = '7')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS C ON A.WHLO = C.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 33/8'
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date)  >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '33') AND (OH.OBLC = '8')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS D ON A.WHLO = D.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 44'
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date)  >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '44')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS E ON A.WHLO = E.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 66'
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date)  >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '66')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS F ON A.WHLO = F.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 77', SUM(OH.BRLA) AS [Status 77 Revenue]
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date)  >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '77')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS G ON A.WHLO = G.Warehouse
WHERE        (ISNULL(B.[Status 33/0], 0) + ISNULL(C.[Status 33/7], 0) + ISNULL(D.[Status 33/8], 0) + ISNULL(E.[Status 44], 0) + ISNULL(F.[Status 66], 0) + ISNULL(G.[Status 77], 0) > 0)

CREATE VIEW     v_OutBoundInventory
-- DROP VIEW v_OutBoundInventory
as
SELECT      WHLO, ML.ITNO, WHSL, STQT, IDDT, ITCL, ITDS
FROM        M3.MITLOC ML
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON ML.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       WHLT = 'OB' 
AND         STQT <> ALQT

CREATE VIEW     v_OverdueShipments
-- drop view v_OverdueShipments
as
SELECT          *
FROM            v_OpenOrdersByStatus
WHERE           [Qty Status] = '4 - Waived/Pick'
AND             [Expected Ship Date] < cast(dateadd(hh,-5,getdate()) as date)

create view v_PCRichards
-- drop view v_PCRichards
as
SELECT          DISTINCT City
,               ITNO as ItemNumber
,               ITDS as ItemName 
,               ITCL as Brand
,               ORNO as [Sales Order]
,               CUOR as [Purchase Order Number]
,               RLDT as [Required Date]
,               WHLO as Warehouse
,               SUM(RNQT) as OpenQty
,               SUM(ALQT) as AllocatedQty
,               SUM(PLQT) as PickQty
FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT CASE WHEN UPPER(OA.TOWN) like '%CARTERET%' then 'Carteret'
                else 'Farmingdale' end as City
,               OL.ITNO
,               MM.ITDS
,               MM.ITCL
,               OH.ORNO
,               OH.CUOR
,               OH.RLDT
,               OL.WHLO
,               OL.RNQT
,               OL.ALQT
,               OL.PLQT
FROM            M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.OOADRE OA ON OL.ORNO = OA.ORNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.OCUSAD OA2 on OL.CUNO = OA2.CUNO and OL.ADID = OA2.ADID
WHERE           OL.ORST <= '44'
AND             OC.CUNO = '50333'
AND             OH.RLDT <= GETDATE() + 45
) A
GROUP BY       City, ITNO, ITDS, ITCL, ORNO, WHLO, CUOR, RLDT

create view v_PCRichards_detailed
-- drop view v_PCRichards_detailed
as
SELECT          DISTINCT OH.ORNO as [order-num]
,               OH.RLDT as [required-date]
,               CASE WHEN OL.ORST not like '%7%' then 'Open' else 'Partially Confirmed' end as [order-status]
,               OH.CUOR as [cust-po-number]
,               OC.CUNO as [cust-code]
,                CASE WHEN OL.ORST like '%2%' AND OL.WHLO NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') then 'True' else 'False' end AS [backorder]
,               OC.CUNM as [cust-name]
,               OL.ITNO as [product-code]
,               OL.ORQT - OL.IVQT as [Open Qty]
FROM            M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.OOADRE OA ON OH.ORNO = OA.ORNO and OH.ADID = OA.ADID
WHERE           OL.ORST < '77'
AND             OC.CUNO = '50333'

CREATE view     v_POCharges
--drop view v_POCharges
as
SELECT          POH.PUNO as PurchaseOrder
,               POL.PNLI as PurchaseOrderLine
,               POL.PUSL as OrderStatus
,               POH.PUDT as PurchaseOrderDate
,               POL.SUDO as ContainerNumber
,               ITM.ITCL as Brand
,               ITM.PRGP as ItemType
,               POL.ITNO as ItemNumber
,               ITM.ITDS as ItemDescription
,               POL.CSNO as HTS
,               ITM.CFI4 as TrumpTariff
,               POH.WHLO as Warehouse
,               SUM(POL.ORQA) as OrderQuantity
,               SUM(POL.PUPR*POL.ORQA) as OrderValue
,               PCL.CEID AS ChargeType
,               SUM(PCL.RCAC) as ChargeAmount
FROM            M3_MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3_MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3_MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
LEFT JOIN       M3_FGRPCL PCL ON POH.PUNO = PCL.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = PCL.PNLI
WHERE           1=1
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO
,               POL.PNLI
,               POH.PUDT
,               POL.SUDO
,               POL.PUSL
,               ITM.ITCL
,               ITM.PRGP
,               POL.ITNO
,               ITM.ITDS
,               POL.CSNO
,               ITM.CFI4
,               POH.WHLO
,               PCL.CEID

--DROP VIEW v_POReport
CREATE VIEW v_POReport AS 

--
-- Get PO Data from M3 and Visual and Merge into one consolidate report.  
--
SELECT 	A.*
,		B.CUNO 													[Customer Number]
,		B.CUNM													[Customer Name]
,		B.DRDN													[Sales Order Number]
,		B.TOWN													[Ship to City]
,		B.ECAR													[Ship to State]
,		B.PONO													[Shp to Postal Code]
FROM
(
SELECT	'M3'													[ERP]
		, POL.PUNO												[PO Number]
		, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(5), POL.PNLI) +'.'+ 
		  TRY_CONVERT(varchar(5), POL.PNLS) 					[PO Line]
		, POL.PUSL												[PO Line Status]
		, ITM.ITNO												[ItemNo]
		, ITM.ITDS												[Description]
		, ITM.UNMS												[UM]
		, ITM.ITCL												[Brand]
		, TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POH.RGDT)) [Order Date]
		, ORQA    												[Order Qty]
		, POL.RVQA 												[Received Qty]
		, TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POL.RCDT)) [Last Received Date]
		, POL.PUPR												[Price]
		, POL.LNAM												[Total Amt]
		, POH.BUYE												[Buyer]
		, 'USD'   												[Currency]
		, POH.SUNO												[Supplier]
		, SM.SUNM 												[Supplier Name]
		, POH.TEPY												[Terms]
		, POL.WHLO												[Warehouse]
		, POL.DWDT 												[Factory Ready Date - ERP]
		, POL.UID1												[ETD Date]
		, POL.UID2												[ETA Date]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH							-- M3 PO Header
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO	-- M3 PO Lines
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO	-- M3 Item Master
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDMAS SM ON POH.SUNO = SM.SUNO		-- M3 Supplier Master 
WHERE           POL.PUSL BETWEEN 15 and 45
AND				POH.ORTY <> 'C01'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
	SELECT 			ARDN, ITNO, WHLO, DRDN, A.CUNO, A.CUNM
,				COALESCE(B.TOWN, C.TOWN2, A.TOWN) as TOWN
,				COALESCE(B.ECAR, C.ECAR2, A.ECAR) as ECAR
,				COALESCE(B.PONO, C.PONO2, A.PONO) as PONO
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT ARDN, ITNO, MP.WHLO, DRDN, OC.CUNO, OC.CUNM, OH.ADID, OC.TOWN, OC.ECAR, OC.PONO
FROM			M3.MPREAL MP 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OOHEAD OH ON MP.DRDN = OH.ORNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ORNO
,               CUNM
,               CUA1
,               CUA2
,               TOWN
,               PONO
,               ECAR
,               CSCD
FROM            M3.OOADRE
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) B             on A.[DRDN] = B.[ORNO]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT CUNO
,               ADID
,               CUNM as CUNM2
,               CUA1 AS CUA12
,               CUA2 AS CUA22
,               TOWN AS TOWN2
,               PONO AS PONO2
,               ECAR AS ECAR2
,               CSCD AS CSCD2
FROM            M3.OCUSAD
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) C             on A.[CUNO] = C.[CUNO] and A.[ADID] = C.[ADID]
) B ON 			A.[PO Number] = B.ARDN and A.[ItemNo] = B.ITNO and A.[Warehouse] = B.WHLO



/* - If we are going to append the order to the line number

SELECT	A.[ERP]                             
,       A.[PO Number]                       
,       A.[PO Line] + CASE WHEN B.ID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '-' END + ISNULL(B.ID,'')       [PO Line]
,       A.[PO Line Status]
,       A.[ItemNo]
,       A.[Description]
,       A.[UM]
,       A.[Brand]							
,       A.[Order Date]
,       A.[Order Qty]
,       A.[Received Qty]
,       A.[Last Received Date]
,       A.[Price]
,       A.[Total Amt]
,       A.[Buyer]
,       A.[Currency]
,       A.[Supplier]
,       A.[Supplier Name]
,       A.[Terms]
,       A.[Warehouse]
,       A.[Factory Ready Date - ERP]
,		B.CUSTOMER_ID 											[Customer Number]
,		B.NAME													[Customer Name]
,		B.ID													[Sales Order Number]
,		B.CITY													[Ship to City]
,		B.STATE													[Ship to State]
,		B.ZIPCODE												[Shp to Postal Code]  */
/*
UNION ALL
SELECT	A.*
,		B.CUSTOMER_ID 											[Customer Number]
,		B.NAME													[Customer Name]
,		B.ID													[Sales Order Number]
,		B.CITY													[Ship to City]
,		B.STATE													[Ship to State]
,		B.ZIPCODE												[Shp to Postal Code]
FROM
(
SELECT	'VISUAL'										[ERP]

		, O.STATUS                  					[PO Line Status]
		, L.PART_ID										[ItemNo]

--		, P.COMMODITY_CODE								
		, O.ORDER_DATE									[Order Date]
		, L.ORDER_QTY 									[Order Qty]
		, L.TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY							[Received Qty]
		, L.LAST_RECEIVED_DATE  						[Last Received Date]
		, L.UNIT_PRICE									[Price]
		, L.TOTAL_AMT_ORDERED							[Total Amt]
		, O.BUYER										[Buyer]
		, O.CURRENCY_ID									[Currency]
		, O.VENDOR_ID									[Supplier]
		, V.NAME										[Supplier Name]
		, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(3), O.TERMS_NET_DAYS)		[Terms]
		, O.WAREHOUSE_ID 								[Warehouse]
		, O.DESIRED_RECV_DATE							[Factory Ready Date - ERP]
		, NULL											[ETD Date]
		, NULL											[ETA Date]
--		, O.SITE_ID 
from 
  			ECM.PURCHASE_ORDER  O  								-- Visual PO Header

FROM			ECM.PURC_ORDER_LINE MP

WHERE			MP.WAREHOUSE_ID = 'LEGACYDI'
  ) B ON		A.[PO Number] = B.PURC_ORDER_ID and A.[ItemNo] = B.PART_ID and A.Warehouse = B.WAREHOUSE_ID
  */

CREATE VIEW v_POReport_MasterData
-- DROP VIEW v_POReport_MasterData
-- select * from v_PoReport_MasterData where [PO Number] = '1006050'
AS

SELECT 	A.*
/*,		B.CUNO 													[Customer Number]
,		B.CUNM													[Customer Name]
,		B.DRDN													[Sales Order Number]
,		B.CUOR													[Customer PO Number]
,		B.TOWN													[Ship to City]
,		B.ECAR													[Ship to State]
,		B.PONO													[Shp to Postal Code]
*/
FROM
(
SELECT	'Purchase Order' as										[Order Type]
		, POH.PUNO												[PO Number]
		, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(5), POL.PNLI) +'.'+ 
		  TRY_CONVERT(varchar(5), POL.PNLS) 					[PO Line]
		, POL.PUSL												[PO Line Status]
		, ITM.ITNO												[Item Number]
		,               IM.[Description] as [Item Description]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
	    , TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POH.RGDT)) [Order Date]
		, ORQA    												[Order Qty]
		, POL.RVQA 												[Received Qty]
		, TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POL.RCDT)) [Last Received Date]
		, POL.PUPR												[Price]
		, POL.LNAM												[Total Amt]
		, POH.BUYE												[Buyer]
		, 'USD'   												[Currency]
		, POH.SUNO												[Supplier]
		, SM.SUNM 												[Supplier Name]
		, POH.TEPY												[Terms]
		, POL.WHLO												[Final Warehouse]
		, POH.DWDT 												[Factory Ready Date]
		, POL.PLDT												[Planning Date]
        , POH.TEDL                                              [Delivery Terms]
        , POH.UCA2                                              [Origin Port Name]
        , POH.UCA3                                              [Discharge Port Name]
		, CASE WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'ARRIVES DISCHG PORT' THEN 'ARRIVES AT DISCHARGE PORT'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'ARRIVES WAREHOUSE' THEN 'ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'DOMESTIC ARRIVES WAR' THEN 'DOMESTIC ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'EX WORKS' THEN 'EX WORKS'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'LEAVES ORIGIN PORT' THEN 'LEAVES ORIGIN PORT'
		ELSE 'UNDEFINED' END AS									[Product Receipt Type]
		, POH.UCA5 as											[Final Destination]
		, TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POH.UID1)) [ETA/ETD Date]
		, CASE WHEN POL.PUSL BETWEEN 46 AND 90 THEN 'Received'
		ELSE 'Open' end as [PO Status]
		, POL.SUDO as [Container Number]
		, POH.YRE1 as [Reference Number]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH							-- M3 PO Header
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO	-- M3 PO Lines
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO	-- M3 Item Master
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDMAS SM ON POH.SUNO = SM.SUNO		-- M3 Supplier Master
LEFT JOIN		BI_ItemMaster IM on POL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           POL.PUSL BETWEEN 15 and 90
AND				POH.ORTY <> 'C01'
) A
/*
LEFT JOIN

(
	SELECT 			ARDN, ITNO, WHLO, DRDN, A.CUNO, A.CUNM, A.CUOR
,				COALESCE(B.TOWN, C.TOWN2, A.TOWN) as TOWN
,				COALESCE(B.ECAR, C.ECAR2, A.ECAR) as ECAR
,				COALESCE(B.PONO, C.PONO2, A.PONO) as PONO
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT ARDN, ITNO, MP.WHLO, DRDN, OC.CUNO, OC.CUNM, OH.ADID, OC.TOWN, OC.ECAR, OC.PONO, OH.CUOR
FROM			M3.MPREAL MP 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OOHEAD OH ON MP.DRDN = OH.ORNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ORNO
,               CUNM
,               CUA1
,               CUA2
,               TOWN
,               PONO
,               ECAR
,               CSCD
FROM            M3.OOADRE
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) B             on A.[DRDN] = B.[ORNO]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT CUNO
,               ADID
,               CUNM as CUNM2
,               CUA1 AS CUA12
,               CUA2 AS CUA22
,               TOWN AS TOWN2
,               PONO AS PONO2
,               ECAR AS ECAR2
,               CSCD AS CSCD2
FROM            M3.OCUSAD
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) C             on A.[CUNO] = C.[CUNO] and A.[ADID] = C.[ADID]
) B ON 			A.[PO Number] = B.ARDN and A.[Item Number] = B.ITNO and A.[Final Warehouse] = B.WHLO
*/

CREATE VIEW v_POReport_MasterData2
-- DROP VIEW v_POReport_MasterData2
AS

SELECT 	A.*
,		B.CUNO 													[Customer Number]
,		B.CUNM													[Customer Name]
,		B.DRDN													[Sales Order Number]
,		B.CUOR													[Customer PO Number]
,		B.TOWN													[Ship to City]
,		B.ECAR													[Ship to State]
,		B.PONO													[Shp to Postal Code]
FROM
(
SELECT	'Purchase Order' as										[Order Type]
		, POH.PUNO												[PO Number]
		, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(5), POL.PNLI) +'.'+ 
		  TRY_CONVERT(varchar(5), POL.PNLS) 					[PO Line]
		, POL.PUSL												[PO Line Status]
		, ITM.ITNO												[Item Number]
	    , TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POH.RGDT)) [Order Date]
		, ORQA    												[Order Qty]
		, POL.RVQA 												[Received Qty]
		, TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POL.RCDT)) [Last Received Date]
		, POL.PUPR												[Price]
		, POL.LNAM												[Total Amt]
		, POH.BUYE												[Buyer]
		, 'USD'   												[Currency]
		, POH.SUNO												[Supplier]
		, SM.SUNM 												[Supplier Name]
		, POH.TEPY												[Terms]
		, POL.WHLO												[Final Warehouse]
		, POH.DWDT 												[Factory Ready Date]
        , POH.TEDL                                              [Delivery Terms]
        , POH.UCA2                                              [Origin Port Name]
        , POH.UCA3                                              [Discharge Port Name]
		, CASE WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'ARRIVES DISCHG PORT' THEN 'ARRIVES AT DISCHARGE PORT'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'ARRIVES WAREHOUSE' THEN 'ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'DOMESTIC ARRIVES WAR' THEN 'DOMESTIC ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'EX WORKS' THEN 'EX WORKS'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'LEAVES ORIGIN PORT' THEN 'LEAVES ORIGIN PORT'
		ELSE 'UNDEFINED' END AS									[Product Receipt Type]
		, TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POH.UID1)) [ETA/ETD Date]
		, CASE WHEN POL.PUSL BETWEEN 46 AND 90 THEN 'Received'
		ELSE 'Open' end as [PO Status]
		, POL.SUDO as [Container Number]
		, POH.YRE1 as [Reference Number]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH							-- M3 PO Header
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO	-- M3 PO Lines
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO	-- M3 Item Master
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDMAS SM ON POH.SUNO = SM.SUNO		-- M3 Supplier Master
WHERE           POL.PUSL BETWEEN 15 and 90
AND				POH.ORTY <> 'C01'

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Manufacturing Order' as									[Order Type]
,		MWH.MFNO as												[PO Number]
,		'1.0'		as											[PO Line]
,		MWH.WHHS as												[PO Line Status]
,      	MWH.ITNO AS 											[Item Number]
,		MWH.STDT AS												[Order Date]
,		MWH.ORQA AS												[Order Qty]
,		MWH.RVQA AS												[Received Qty]
,		cast(CAST(NULLIF(MWH.RPDT, 0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Last Received Date]
,		MF.APPR  AS												[Price]
,		MWH.ORQA*MF.APPR AS										[Total Amount]
,		MWH.RESP as												[Buyer]
,		'USD'													[Currency]
,		NULL AS													[Supplier]
,		NULL AS													[Supplier Name]
,		NULL AS													[Terms]
,		MWH.WHLO as												[Final Warehouse]
,		MWH.FIDT as 											[Factory Ready Date]
,		NULL as													[Delivery Terms]
,		'DOMESTIC' as											[Origin Port Name]
,		'DOMESTIC' as											[Discharge Port Name]
,		'DOMESTIC ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'							[Product Receipt Type]
,		MWH.FIDT as 											[ETA/ETD Date]
,		CASE WHEN MWH.WHHS = 90 then 'Received' else 'Open' end [PO Status]
,		NULL as													[Container Number]
,		NULL as 												[Reference Number]
FROM            M3.MWOHED AS MWH
LEFT JOIN 		M3.MITFAC MF on MWH.ITNO = MF.ITNO
WHERE	MWH.WHHS > 10
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
	SELECT 			ARDN, ITNO, WHLO, DRDN, A.CUNO, A.CUNM, A.CUOR
,				COALESCE(B.TOWN, C.TOWN2, A.TOWN) as TOWN
,				COALESCE(B.ECAR, C.ECAR2, A.ECAR) as ECAR
,				COALESCE(B.PONO, C.PONO2, A.PONO) as PONO
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT ARDN, ITNO, MP.WHLO, DRDN, OC.CUNO, OC.CUNM, OH.ADID, OC.TOWN, OC.ECAR, OC.PONO, OH.CUOR
FROM			M3.MPREAL MP 
LEFT JOIN		M3.OOHEAD OH ON MP.DRDN = OH.ORNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ORNO
,               CUNM
,               CUA1
,               CUA2
,               TOWN
,               PONO
,               ECAR
,               CSCD
FROM            M3.OOADRE
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) B             on A.[DRDN] = B.[ORNO]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT CUNO
,               ADID
,               CUNM as CUNM2
,               CUA1 AS CUA12
,               CUA2 AS CUA22
,               TOWN AS TOWN2
,               PONO AS PONO2
,               ECAR AS ECAR2
,               CSCD AS CSCD2
FROM            M3.OCUSAD
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) C             on A.[CUNO] = C.[CUNO] and A.[ADID] = C.[ADID]
) B ON 			A.[PO Number] = B.ARDN and A.[Item Number] = B.ITNO and A.[Final Warehouse] = B.WHLO

CREATE VIEW     v_PackConfigurations
as
SELECT          A.*, [Package Number], [Package Name], [Package Length], [Package Width], [Package Height], [Package Weight]
,               [Standard Qty], [Min Qty], [Max Qty], [Qty]
FROM
(
SELECT          MM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               MM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,               MM.BUAR AS [Business Unit]
FROM            M3.MITMAS MM
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          IC.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               IC.PACT AS [Package Number]
,               MP.PANM AS [Package Name]
,               MP.PACL AS [Package Length]
,               MP.PACW AS [Package Width]
,               MP.PACH AS [Package Height]
,               MP.VOMT AS [Package Weight]
,               IC.D1QT AS [Standard Qty]
,               IC.D2QT as [Min Qty]
,               IC.D3QT as [Max Qty]
,               IC.TRQT as [Qty]
FROM            M3.MPACIT IC
JOIN            M3.MITPAC MP on IC.PACT = MP.PACT
) B             on A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number]

create view v_PaidInvoicesCMI
-- drop view v_PaidInvoicesCMI
as
SELECT      A.CINO, A.CUNO, A.ACDT, ROUND(InvAmt2/NULLIF(count(PONR) OVER (PARTITION BY ORNO),0),2) as InvAmt
,           B.*
FROM
(
SELECT      CINO, CUNO, MAX(ACDT) as ACDT, SUM(CUAM) as InvAmt2
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
WHERE       TRCD = '20'
AND         CUNO IN
(
 '50011', '50177'
)
AND         ACDT >= '2023-01-01'
GROUP BY    CINO, CUNO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
select      DISTINCT EXIN, DLIX, ORNO, PONR, POSX
FROM        M3.ODLINE

) B        ON A.CINO = B.EXIN

'50690',
'50742',
'50218',
'50018',
'50021',
'50015',
'50582',
'50025',

create view v_PaidInvoicesSMG_Visual
-- drop view v_PaidInvoicesSMG_Visual
as
SELECT			A.INVOICE_ID, A.CUSTOMER_ID, A.LAST_PAID_DATE, ROUND(InvAmt2/NULLIF(count(LINE_NO) OVER (PARTITION BY CUST_ORDER_ID),0),2) as InvAmt
,               B.CUST_ORDER_ID, LINE_NO 
FROM
(
SELECT			INVOICE_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, MAX(LAST_PAID_DATE) AS LAST_PAID_DATE, SUM(TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT) AS InvAmt2
FROM			ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE

AND				CUSTOMER_ID IN
(
'BES000',
'BR7181',
'HA3125',
'HD1000',
'HOM003',
'HO3000',
'LO4003',
'HA8170',
'E336555',
'Y336555',
'LT5501',
'WA0781',
'CS8100',
'E834730',
'WA1001'
)
GROUP BY		INVOICE_ID, CUSTOMER_ID
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			DISTINCT INVOICE_ID, CUST_ORDER_ID, LINE_NO 
from			ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE_LINE
) B				ON A.INVOICE_ID = B.INVOICE_ID

CREATE VIEW v_PaidInvoices_Finance
as
SELECT      A.*, B.[Paid Date], [Paid Amount]
FROM
(
SELECT      CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           ACDT as [Invoice Date]
,           FS.PYNO as [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Payer Name]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer]
,           OC2.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           SUM(CUAM) as [Invoiced Amount]
FROM        M3.FSLEDG FS
LEFT JOIN   M3.OCUSMA OC ON FS.PYNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OCUSMA OC2 ON FS.PYNO = OC2.CUNO
WHERE       TRCD = 10
AND         ACDT >= '2023-01-01'
GROUP BY    CINO, ACDT, FS.PYNO, OC.CUNO, OC.CUNM, OC2.CUNM
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           ACDT as [Paid Date]
,           SUM(CUAM) as [Paid Amount]
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
WHERE       TRCD = 20
AND         ACDT >= '2023-01-01'
GROUP BY    CINO, ACDT
) B on      A.[Invoice Number] = B.[Invoice Number]

CREATE VIEW v_PartialLocations
as
SELECT      A.*, PALLET_QTY, CASE_PACK
FROM
(
SELECT      WHLO, ITNO, WHSL, STQT
FROM        M3.MITLOC
WHERE       STQT > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      MM.ITNO, MP.D1QT AS PALLET_QTY, MP2.D1QT AS CASE_PACK
FROM        M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MP ON MM.ITNO = MP.ITNO AND MP.PACT LIKE 'P%' AND MP.PACT <> 'PALLET' AND MP.D1QT <> 3
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MP2 ON MM.ITNO = MP2.ITNO AND MP2.PACT LIKE 'C%'
) B         ON A.ITNO = B.ITNO
WHERE       STQT < PALLET_QTY
AND         CASE_PACK > 1

CREATE VIEW v_PreviousDayReceipts
-- drop view v_PreviousDayReceipts
as
SELECT      ML.WHLO as Warehouse
,           MM.ITCL as Brand
,           MM.ITNO as ItemNumber
,           MM.ITDS as ItemDescription
,           ML.RVQA as Qty
FROM        M3.MPHEAD MP 
JOIN        M3.MPLINE ML ON MP.PUNO = ML.PUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON ML.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       cast(CAST(NULLIF(ML.RCDT,0) as varchar(max)) as date) = cast(getdate() - 1 as date)

CREATE VIEW v_Price_Lists
-- drop view v_Price_Lists
as
SELECT      DISTINCT OC.CUNO AS             [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM AS                      [Customer Name]
,           OC.CFC8 AS                      [Price List Market]
,           CS.TX15 AS                      [Delivery Terms]
,           PRL.ITNO AS                     [Item Number]
,           PRL.SAPR AS                     [Price - Customer Specific]
,           PRL.LMDT AS                     [Change Date]
,           PRL.CHNO AS                     [Change Number]
,           PRL.CHID AS                     [Change by]
,           PRL.FVDT AS                     [Valid from]
,           PRL.LVDT AS                     [Valid to]
,           MM.SAPR AS                      [Wholesale Price]
FROM        M3.OCUSMA OC
LEFT JOIN   M3.OPRMTX PLT ON OC.PLTB = PLT.PLTB AND OC.CUNO = PLT.OBV1 AND PLT.PREX = 2
LEFT JOIN   M3.OPRBAS PRL ON PLT.PRRF = PRL.PRRF
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITMAS MM ON PRL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.TEDL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'TEDL'
WHERE       PLT.PRRF IS NOT NULL

CREATE VIEW v_ProfitLoss
-- drop view v_ProfitLoss
as
SELECT      '411010' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year 
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM([Sales Amt])) as Amount
FROM        v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = IM.[Item Number] collate database_default
WHERE       SD.[Item Number] NOT LIKE 'Q1%'
AND         IM.[Item Type] = 'Finished Good'
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])
HAVING      SUM([Sales Amt]) >= 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      '411020' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM([Sales Amt])) as Amount
FROM        v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on SD.[Item Number] collate database_default = IM.[Item Number] collate database_default
WHERE       SD.[Item Number] NOT LIKE 'Q1%'
AND         IM.[Item Type] <> 'Finished Good'
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])
HAVING      SUM([Sales Amt]) >= 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      '421050' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM([Sales Amt])) as Amount
FROM        v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
WHERE       SD.[Item Number] IN ('Q1001', 'Q1002', 'Q1004', 'Q1012', 'Q1013', 'Q1015', 'Q1022', 'Q1023', 'Q1032', 'Q1033')
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])

UNION ALL

SELECT      '421070' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM([Sales Amt])) as Amount
FROM        v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
WHERE       SD.[Item Number] IN ('Q1003', 'Q1005', 'Q1006', 'Q1010', 'Q1040', 'Q1041', 'Q1042', 'Q1043', 'Q1044', 'Q1045',
                                'Q1046', 'Q1047', 'Q1048', 'Q1049'
                                )
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])

UNION ALL

SELECT      '421060' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM([Sales Amt])) as Amount
FROM        v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
WHERE       SD.[Item Number] NOT LIKE 'Q1%'
AND         SD.Warehouse <> 'DIF'
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])
HAVING      SUM([Sales Amt]) < 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      '421055' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM([Sales Amt])) as Amount
FROM        v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
WHERE       SD.[Item Number] NOT LIKE 'Q1%'
AND         SD.Warehouse = 'DIF'
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])
HAVING      SUM([Sales Amt]) < 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      '541010' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM([Cost Amt])) as Amount
FROM        v_SalesData_withAllowances SD
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])

UNION ALL

SELECT      '211552' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Invoice Date]) as int) as Year 
,           cast(MONTH([Invoice Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM(([Rebate Rate] + [Admin Fee Rate])*[Inv Amt])) as Amount
from        v_Rebates
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Invoice Date])
,           MONTH([Invoice Date])

UNION ALL

SELECT      '733010' as [GL Account]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR([Invoice Date]) as int) as Year 
,           cast(MONTH([Invoice Date]) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM([Commission Amt])) as Amount
from        v_Commissions_All
WHERE       [Commission Division] = 'Consumer'
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           YEAR([Invoice Date])
,           MONTH([Invoice Date])

UNION ALL

SELECT      '431010' AS [GL Account]
,           cast(LE.CUNO as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR(LE.ACDT) as int) as Year 
,           cast(MONTH(LE.ACDT) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM(CRAM)) as Amount
FROM        M3.FSLEDG LE
JOIN        M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO  collate database_default = IV.EXIN collate database_default
JOIN		M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOCHRG CH ON ODH.ORNO = CH.ORNO
WHERE       CRID = 'FRE002'
GROUP BY    LE.CUNO
,           YEAR(LE.ACDT)
,           MONTH(LE.ACDT)

UNION ALL

SELECT      '711020' AS [GL Account]
,           cast(LE.CUNO as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR(LE.ACDT) as int) as Year 
,           cast(MONTH(LE.ACDT) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM(CRAM)) as Amount
FROM        M3.FSLEDG LE
JOIN        M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN
JOIN		M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOCHRG CH ON ODH.ORNO = CH.ORNO
WHERE       CH.CRID = 'FRE003'
GROUP BY    LE.CUNO
,           YEAR(LE.ACDT)
,           MONTH(LE.ACDT)

UNION ALL

SELECT      '749010' AS [GL Account]
,           cast([CUNO] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer ID]
,           cast(YEAR(ACDT) as int) as Year 
,           cast(MONTH(ACDT) as int) as Month
,           ABS(SUM(VTAM)) as Amount
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
GROUP BY    CUNO
,           YEAR(ACDT)
,           MONTH(ACDT)

JOIN M3.OCUSMA OC2 on SUBSTRING(VTXT,0, CHARINDEX(' ',VTXT)) = OC2.CUNO

'421060',
