Create view v_FreightOutProfitLoss
as
SELECT      AIT1
,           CUNO
,           [Item Number]
,           Month
,           Year
,           SUM([Total Weight]/NULLIF(InvWeightTotal, 0)*Amount) as Amount
FROM
(
SELECT      '711020' as [AIT1]
,           [Invoice ID]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [CUNO]
,           SD.[Part ID - Actual] as [Item Number]
,           COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty] as [Total Weight]
,           [Sales Qty]
,           SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Customer ID], [Invoice ID]) as InvWeightTotal
,           MONTH(ACDT) as Month
,           YEAR(ACDT) as Year
,           SUM([ACAM]) as Amount
FROM        M3.FGLEDG FG
JOIN        a_SalesData SD on LEFT(SUBSTRING(FG.VTXT,CHARINDEX(' 24',FG.VTXT)+1,LEN(FG.VTXT)),10) = SD.[Invoice ID]
LEFT JOIN BI_ItemMaster MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS IM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = IM.ITNO
WHERE      FG.AIT1 = '711020'
AND         AIT7 = 'OI201411'
AND         YEAR(ACDT) = 2024
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           [Invoice ID]
,           SD.[Part ID - Actual]
,           [Sales Qty]
,          YEAR([ACDT])
,           MONTH([ACDT])
,           COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty]
) A
GROUP BY AIT1
,           CUNO
,           [Item Number]
,           Month
,           Year
*/

CREATE VIEW v_RMAs
-- drop view v_RMAs
-- 1700
as
SELECT      DISTINCT OCH.REPN as             [RMA Number]
,            TRY_CAST(
                LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), NULLIF(OCH.EPDT, 0)), 4) + '-' +  
                SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), NULLIF(OCH.EPDT, 0)), 5, 2) + '-' + 
                RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), NULLIF(OCH.EPDT, 0)), 2) AS DATE) AS [RMA Date]
--,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OCH.EPDT,0) AS varchar(MAX)) AS DATE) as             [RMA Date]
,           OCH.RERE as             [Responsible]
,           OC.CUNO as              [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM as              [Customer Name]
,           OCL.RSCD as             [Reason Code]
,           CASE WHEN OCL.RSCD = '' THEN 'Undefined' 
            else CS.TX40 END as     [Reason Description]
,           OCL.WHLO as             [Warehouse]
,           OCH.YREF as             [Reference 1]
,           OCH.RESL as             [Low Status]
,           OCH.RESH as             [High Status]
,           OCH.CRSB as             [Low Credit Status]
,           OCH.CRSH as             [High Credit Status]
,           OCH.RORN as             [Sales Order]
,           OCL.RELI as             [Line Number]
,           OCL.ITNO as             [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS as              [Item Name]
,           MM.ITCL as              [Brand]
,           OCL.SERN as             [Serial Number]
,           OCL.REQ0/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as             [Notified Qty]
,           OCL.REQ1/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as             [Returned Qty]
,           OCL.SAPR as             [Unit Price]
,           OCL.REQ2 as             [Inspect Qty]
,           (OCL.SAPR*OCL.REQ1)/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as    [Return Amt]
,           (OCL.SAPR*OCL.REQ0)/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as    [Notified Amt]
,           OCL.RPA5 as             [Inspection Officer]
,           OCL.REQ3/CASE WHEN (COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI)) = 0 then 1 else COUNT(ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO)) OVER (PARTITION BY OCH.REPN, OCL.RELI) end as             [Approved Qty]
,           OCL.REQ4 as             [Returned to Supplier Qty]
,           OCL.REQ5 as             [Returned to Customer Qty]
,           OCL.REQ8 as             [Repairable Qty]
,           OCL.REQ6 as             [Rejected Qty]
,           OCL.REQ7 as             [Credited Qty]
--,           OH.ORNO as              [Credit Memo]
--,           FS.CINO as              [Invoice]
--,           OH.CUOR as              [Customer PO]
,           ISNULL(OH.ORNO, OH2.ORNO) as              [Credit Memo]
,           ISNULL(FS.CINO, FS2.CINO) as              [Invoice]
,           ISNULL(OH.CUOR, OH2.CUOR) as              [Customer PO]
FROM        M3.OCHEAD OCH
JOIN        M3.OCLINE OCL on OCH.REPN = OCL.REPN
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC on OCH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on OCL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS on OCL.RSCD = CS.STKY and CS.STCO = 'RSCD'
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOLINE OH ON OCH.REPN = RIGHT(OH.OFNO,9) AND OCL.ITNO = OH.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODHEAD OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.FSLEDG FS ON OD.EXIN = FS.CINO AND OD.CUNO = FS.CUNO AND FS.TRCD = 10
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOLINE OH2 on OCH.REPN = OH2.REPN AND OCL.ITNO = OH2.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODHEAD OD2 ON OH2.ORNO = OD2.ORNO AND LEFT(OH2.ORNO,1) = '5'
LEFT JOIN   M3.FSLEDG FS2 ON OD2.EXIN = FS2.CINO AND OD2.CUNO = FS2.CUNO AND FS2.TRCD = 10

UNION ALL

SELECT      'Blanket RMA' as [RMA Number]
,           OH.ORDT as [RMA Date]
,           OH.RESP as [Responsible]
,           OC.CUNO as [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           NULL as [Reason Code]
,           NULL as [Reason Description]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           NULL as [Reference 1]
,           NULL as [Low Status]
,           NULL as [High Status]
,           OL.ORST as [Low Credit Status]
,           NULL as [High Credit Status]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS as [Item Name]
,           MM.ITCL as [Brand]
,           NULL as [Serial Number]
,           NULL as [Notified Qty]
,           (OL.ORQT * -1) as [Returned Qty]
,           OL.NEPR as [Unit Price]
,           NULL as [Inspect Qty]
,           (OL.ORQT * -1) * OL.NEPR as [Return Amt]
,           NULL as [Notified Amt]
,           NULL as [Inspection Officer]
,           NULL as [Approved Qty]
,           NULL as [Returned to Supplier Qty]
,           NULL as [Returned to Customer Qty]
,           NULL as [Repairable Qty]
,           NULL as [Rejected Qty]
,           (OL.ORQT * -1) as  [Credited Qty]
,           OH.ORNO as [Credit Memo]
,           LE.CINO as [Invoice]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH ON ODH.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS MM ON ODL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE           OH.ORTP = 'RMA'

CREATE VIEW     v_Rebates
-- drop view v_Rebates
as
SELECT      A.*, B.Region, [Ship to State], [Ship to City], [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM
(
SELECT          [Sales Type] as             [Invoice Type]
,               CS3.TX40 AS                  [Buying Group]
,                                           [Customer ID]
,                                           [Customer Name]
,              ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS [External Rep ID]
,               CS.TX40 AS                  [External Rep Name]
,               OC.RESP AS                  [Sales Manager]
,               [Order ID] AS               [Sales Order]
,                                           [Customer PO]
,               [Invoice ID] AS             [Invoice Number]
,               [Date] AS                   [Invoice Date]
,               [Part ID - Actual] AS       [Item Number]
,               [Sales Qty] AS              [Inv Qty]
,               [Net Sales Amt] AS          [Inv Amt]
,               OH.ORTP as                  [Order Type]
,               OH.TEDL as                  [Freight Terms]
,               RIGHT(OH.ADID,4) as         [Address ID]
,               CASE WHEN OC.SDST = 'EXL' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.18
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'NIS' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.18
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'SF1' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.05
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'SF2' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.12
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'SF3' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.00
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'PRI' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.15
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'NAF' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.08
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'TRI' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.06
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'EDD' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.15
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'RD1' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.12
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'IFE' AND [Customer Name] not like '%NR%' THEN 0.14
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM03002' THEN 0.15
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02448' THEN 0.09
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02415' THEN 0.10
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM01843' THEN 0.03
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02943' THEN 0.15
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02596' THEN 0.02
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM02112' THEN 0.05
                WHEN [Customer ID] = 'COM03589' THEN 0.05
                WHEN [Customer ID] IN ('COM02872', 'COM02878', 'COM02875', 'COM02876', 'COM02873') THEN 0.07
                ELSE 0 END AS [Rebate Rate]
,               CASE WHEN OC.SDST = 'EXL' THEN 0.05
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'NIS' THEN 0.05
                WHEN OC.SDST IN ('SF1', 'SF2', 'SF3', 'RD1', 'RD2') THEN 0.02
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'PRI' THEN 0.01
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'NAF' THEN 0.06
                WHEN OC.SDST = 'IFE' THEN 0.02
                ELSE 0 END AS [Admin Fee Rate]
FROM            a_SalesData SD
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH ON SD.[Order ID] = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON SD.[Customer ID] =  OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 =CX2.OBV1 AND MM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND cs.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB AS CS2 ON MM.ITGR = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB AS CS3 ON OC.SDST = CS3.STKY AND CS3.STCO = 'SDST'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CRPDLN SC ON MM.PDLN = SC.PDLN
WHERE           [Date] >= '2024-01-01'
) A

LEFT JOIN


(
select     distinct CUNO as [Customer ID]
,           ADID as [Address ID]
,           CASE WHEN MVXD = 'COM03153' then 'East'
            WHEN MVXD = 'COM03154' THEN 'Midwest'
            WHEN MVXD = 'COM03155' THEN 'West'
            else MVXD End as Region
,           ECAR as [Ship to State]
,           TOWN as [Ship to City]
,           PONO as [Ship to Zip Code]
from        M3.OCUSAD OA
LEFT JOIN   M3.MBMTRD RE on OA.ADID = RIGHT(MBMD, 4) and IDTR = 240 and OA.CUNO = RE.MVXD 
where MVXD IN ('COM03153', 'COM03154', 'COM03155')

UNION ALL

select     distinct 'COM03156' as [Customer ID]
,           RIGHT(MBMD, 4) as [Address ID]
,           CASE WHEN MVXD = 'COM03153' then 'East'
            WHEN MVXD = 'COM03154' THEN 'Midwest'
            WHEN MVXD = 'COM03155' THEN 'West'
            else MVXD End as Region
,           ECAR as [Ship to State]
,           TOWN as [Ship to City]
,           PONO as [Ship to Zip Code]
from        M3.OCUSAD OA
LEFT JOIN   M3.MBMTRD RE on OA.ADID = RIGHT(MBMD, 4) and IDTR = 240 and OA.CUNO = RE.MVXD
where MVXD IN ('COM03153', 'COM03154', 'COM03155')
) B         ON A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] and A.[Address ID] = B.[Address ID]



/*
LEFT JOIN

(
select      CUNO as [Customer ID]
,           ADID as [Address ID]
,           ECAR as [Ship to State]
,           TOWN as [Ship to City]
,           PONO as [Ship to Zip Code]
from        M3.OCUSAD OA
WHERE       CUNO = 'COM03156'
)
*/

CREATE VIEW			v_ReceivingPOs
as
SELECT				ML.WHLO as Warehouse
,           		MM.ITCL as Brand
,           		MM.ITNO as ItemNumber
,           		MM.ITDS as ItemDescription
,           		ML.RVQA as Qty
,					cast(CAST(NULLIF(ML.RCDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date) as [Received Date]
FROM        		M3.MPHEAD MP 	
JOIN        		M3.MPLINE ML ON MP.PUNO = ML.PUNO
JOIN        		M3.MITMAS MM ON ML.ITNO = MM.ITNO

CREATE VIEW     v_SCA_AE_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCA_AE_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost ECM]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX([Cost AFS]) as [Cost AFS], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_ECM
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand = 'OMEGA' THEN 'OMEGA AFS'
                WHEN DF.Brand = 'EXCALIBUR' THEN 'EXCALIBUR AFS'
				ELSE DF.Brand END AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND             DF.Brand = 'OMEGA'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'A' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(CPC.COST) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('OMEGA')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('ASB001')
AND             COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2021-05-01'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('OMEGA AFS')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'A' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(CPC.COST) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('OMEGA')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('ASB001')
AND             COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2021-05-01'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_ECM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW v_SCA_AL_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCA_AL_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost L]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX([Cost AFS]) as [Cost AFS], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_L
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand = 'OMEGA' THEN 'OMEGA AFS'
                WHEN DF.Brand = 'EXCALIBUR' THEN 'EXCALIBUR AFS'
				ELSE DF.Brand END AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND				DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'A' as Company
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES') then 'Commercial'
				ELSE 'Countertop' END as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('ASBURBL', 'ASBURBV', 'ASBUREX', 'ASBURKD', 'ASBURZE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode, CASE WHEN DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES') then 'Commercial'
				ELSE 'Countertop' END
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'EXCALIBUR AFS', 'ZEROLL')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'A' as Company
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES') then 'Commercial'
				ELSE 'Countertop' END as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('ASBURBL', 'ASBURBV', 'ASBUREX', 'ASBURKD', 'ASBURZE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode, CASE WHEN DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES') then 'Commercial'
				ELSE 'Countertop' END
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_L = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW v_SCA_AO_Cost
AS

--drop view v_SCA_AO_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost O]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX([Cost AFS]) as [Cost AFS], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_O
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand = 'OMEGA' THEN 'OMEGA AFS'
                WHEN DF.Brand = 'EXCALIBUR' THEN 'EXCALIBUR AFS'
				ELSE DF.Brand END AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'A' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('ASB001')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
AND             ATD.InvoiceDate <= '2021-04-30'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('OMEGA AFS')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'A' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('ASB001')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
AND             ATD.InvoiceDate <= '2021-04-30'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_O = Y.Date

-- View for CommercialWarranty Repair Report v20220707
-- v20220801 Updated for Schema Change to System ID in Schema
-- 
-- DROP VIEW [dbo].[SCA_WarrantyRepairReport]
--

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SCA_WarrantyRepairReport]

	AS 

SELECT TransactionDate [Date], SCA.GenTransaction.Reference [Warranty Order Number], ItemNumber, SerialNumber, 
         SCA.InvMaster.Supplier, SubModSupplier [Service Company], EntryValue, ProblemDescription
FROM SCA.GenTransaction LEFT JOIN 
     SCA.ApInvoice ON SubModApInvoice = Invoice LEFT JOIN 
	 SCR.set_Service_Ticket ON CONVERT(NUMERIC,SCA.GenTransaction.Reference)=ServiceTicketNumber LEFT JOIN
	 SCA.InvMaster ON ItemNumber=StockCode
WHERE GlCode LIKE '2375%' AND Source='AP' AND ISNUMERIC(SCA.GenTransaction.Reference)=1 AND TransactionDate >= datefromparts(2021,3,1)

UNION ALL

SELECT TransactionDate [Date], SCA.GenTransaction.Reference [Warranty Order Number], '' ItemNumber, '' SerialNumber, 
       '' Supplier, SubModSupplier [Service Company], EntryValue, '' ProblemDescription
FROM SCA.GenTransaction LEFT JOIN 
     SCA.ApInvoice ON SubModApInvoice = Invoice 
WHERE GlCode LIKE '2375%' AND Source='AP' AND ISNUMERIC(SCA.GenTransaction.Reference)=0 AND TransactionDate >= datefromparts(2021,3,1)

-- View for CommercialWarranty Report v20220707
-- v20220801 Updated for Schema Change to System ID in Schema
--
-- DROP VIEW [dbo].[SCA_WarrantyReport]
--

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SCA_WarrantyReport]
	
	AS 

SELECT TransactionDate GLDate, '' RMADate, '' RMANum, SubModCustomer Customer, '' StockCode, 
       '' Supplier, '' Serial, '' [Initial Serial Number], EntryValue Price, 0 CostValue,
	  '' ProblemDesc, '' ProblemDetails, SubModArInvoice Invoice
FROM SCA.GenTransaction 
WHERE GlCode LIKE '4950%' AND TransactionDate >= datefromparts(2021,1,1) AND SubModArInvoice NOT IN 
	(SELECT SCA.ArTrnDetail.Invoice FROM SCA.ArTrnDetail LEFT JOIN SCA.RmaDetail ON substring(CustomerPoNumber,5,8) = RmaNumber  
    WHERE InvoiceDate >= datefromparts(2021,1,1) AND SCA.RmaDetail.RmaNumber IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT InvoiceDate GLDate, IssueDate RMADate, substring(CustomerPoNumber,5,8) RMANum, Customer, SCA.ArTrnDetail.StockCode, 
       Supplier, SCA.RmaDetailSer.Serial, SCA.RmaDetailPlus.InitialSerialNumbe [Initial Serial Number], Price, CostValue, 
	  ProblemDesc, ProblemDetails, SCA.ArTrnDetail.Invoice
FROM SCA.ArTrnDetail LEFT JOIN 
     SCA.RmaDetail ON substring(CustomerPoNumber,5,8) = RmaNumber AND SCA.ArTrnDetail.StockCode=SCA.RmaDetail.StockCode LEFT JOIN
     SCA.RmaDetailSer ON SCA.RmaDetailSer.RmaNumber = SCA.RmaDetail.RmaNumber AND SCA.RmaDetailSer.RmaLineNumber = SCA.RmaDetail.RmaLineNumber LEFT JOIN
     SCA.RmaDetailPlus ON SCA.RmaDetailPlus.RmaNumber = SCA.RmaDetail.RmaNumber AND SCA.RmaDetailPlus.RmaLineNumber = SCA.RmaDetail.RmaLineNumber LEFT JOIN
     SCA.RmaProblemCodes ON SCA.RmaProblemCodes.ProblemCode = SCA.RmaDetail.ProblemCode LEFT JOIN
	SCA.InvMaster ON SCA.ArTrnDetail.StockCode = SCA.InvMaster.StockCode 
WHERE InvoiceDate >= datefromparts(2021,1,1) AND SCA.ArTrnDetail.LineType = 1 AND SCA.RmaDetail.RmaNumber IS NOT NULL

-- View for SCG_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard Report v20220802
--
-- DROP VIEW dbo.SCG_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard
--

CREATE VIEW dbo.SCG_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard AS 
SELECT 
  'Company G' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'GWT' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 
  SCG.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCG.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode 
WHERE 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) BETWEEN DATEADD(
    MM, 
    DATEDIFF(
      MM, 
      0, 
      CAST(
        GETDATE() AS Date
      )
    ), 
    0
  ) 
  AND DATEADD(
    DD, 
    -1, 
    DATEADD(
      MM, 
      DATEDIFF(
        MM, 
        0, 
        CAST(
          GETDATE() AS Date
        )
      ) + 1, 
      0
    )
  ) 
  AND OrderStatus IN ('9') 
  AND IM.ProductClass IN (
    'CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 
    'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP'
  ) 
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty >= 0

CREATE VIEW v_SCG_GAV_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCG_GAV_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost APR]
FROM
(
SELECT			distinct A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
--AND				DF.Division <> 'Countertop'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
AND				DF.Brand IN ('AVANTI')
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Compact' as Division
,				aii.[item-code] as [Part ID]
,				MAX(aih.[ref-date]) as [Date]
,				AVG(aii.[total-sales-cost]) as CostValue
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
WHERE			aih.[cust-key] IN ('00066745')
AND             aih.[ref-num] not like 'CM%'
AND				qty > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(aih.[ref-date], 'yyyy-MM'), aii.[item-code]
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('AVANTI')
AND				ISNULL(B.Date, A.Date) <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Compact' as Division
,				aii.[item-code] as [Part ID]
,				MAX(aih.[ref-date]) as [Date]
,				AVG(aii.[total-sales-cost]/NULLIF(aii.qty,0)) as CostValue
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
WHERE			aih.[cust-key] IN ('00066745')
AND             aih.[ref-num] not like 'CM%'
AND				qty > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(aih.[ref-date], 'yyyy-MM'), aii.[item-code]
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW     v_SCG_GA_Cost
AS

,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS

and				DF.Company = 'G'

) A

LEFT JOIN

(

,				'Commercial' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('MAXX ICE', 'MAXX COLD', 'GENERAL')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('GREEWOR')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('MAXX ICE', 'MAXX COLD', 'GENERAL')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('MAXX ICE', 'MAXX COLD', 'GENERAL')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('GREEWOR')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW     v_SCG_GE_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCG_GE_Cost
SELECT *
FROM
(
SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost ECM]
FROM
(
SELECT			distinct A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				DF.Brand
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID]
,				ISNULL(P.Description, IM.Description) as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P on GV.VisualPartID collate database_default = P.ID
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
AND				DF.Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(Cost) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC ON P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('AR5569', 'AT6708', 'AZ1111', 'BL3456', 'CO1703', 'CO4930', 'DA5333', 'DA6180',
										 'DE8888', 'DU2913', 'E527663', 'EN1111', 'FAR682', 'GE2828', 'GI0815', 'GR1111',
										 'GR7336', 'GR7337', 'GR7338', 'GWT-LANDIG', 'HB0445', 'HO2804', 'IFA111', 'JA2345',
										 'JA6001', 'KA0142', 'KI3040', 'KI6616', 'KU0951', 'LA1111', 'LI0909', 'MA6040', 'N200000',
										 'N200001', 'NA4484', 'NEX380', 'OP4886', 'RB6760', 'RE1503', 'RI3390', 'RO6500', 'SH2772',
										 'SI1732', 'TA1100', 'TO3145', 'TOM111', 'TR2660', 'V200000', 'V200001', 'VA7855', 'WB1000',
										 'Y200000', 'Y200001')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(Cost) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC ON P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('AR5569', 'AT6708', 'AZ1111', 'BL3456', 'CO1703', 'CO4930', 'DA5333', 'DA6180',
										 'DE8888', 'DU2913', 'E527663', 'EN1111', 'FAR682', 'GE2828', 'GI0815', 'GR1111',
										 'GR7336', 'GR7337', 'GR7338', 'GWT-LANDIG', 'HB0445', 'HO2804', 'IFA111', 'JA2345',
										 'JA6001', 'KA0142', 'KI3040', 'KI6616', 'KU0951', 'LA1111', 'LI0909', 'MA6040', 'N200000',
										 'N200001', 'NA4484', 'NEX380', 'OP4886', 'RB6760', 'RE1503', 'RI3390', 'RO6500', 'SH2772',
										 'SI1732', 'TA1100', 'TO3145', 'TOM111', 'TR2660', 'V200000', 'V200001', 'VA7855', 'WB1000',
										 'Y200000', 'Y200001')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date
) a
where A.[Part ID] = '0312070'

,				'Commercial' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('GREWOBE', 'GREWOBL', 'GREWOEX', 'GREWOKD', 'GREWOZE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('GREWOBE', 'GREWOBL', 'GREWOEX', 'GREWOKD', 'GREWOZE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW v_SCG_GO_Cost

,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM

(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID]
,				ISNULL(P.Description, IM.Description) as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode

LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P on GV.VisualPartID collate database_default = P.ID
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
AND				DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND             NetSalesValue > 0

) A

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue

GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(

,				'Countertop' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue

,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]

LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode

and				DF.Company = 'G'

) A

LEFT JOIN

,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue

JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID

-- View for SCL_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard Report v20220802
--
-- DROP VIEW dbo.SCL_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard
--

CREATE VIEW dbo.SCL_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard AS 
SELECT 
  'Company L' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC.Category as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 
  SCL.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer 
WHERE 
  SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX') 
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) BETWEEN DATEADD(
    MM, 
    DATEDIFF(
      MM, 
      0, 
      CAST(
        GETDATE() AS Date
      )
    ), 
    0
  ) 
  AND DATEADD(
    DD, 
    -1, 
    DATEADD(
      MM, 
      DATEDIFF(
        MM, 
        0, 
        CAST(
          GETDATE() AS Date
        )
      ) + 1, 
      0
    )
  ) 
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty >= 0 
  AND AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND AC.Category <> 'GWT' 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'

CREATE VIEW     v_SCO_OA_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCO_OA_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost AFS]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				DF.Brand
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost O]
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCO.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCO.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.UserField1 NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY', 'INTERCOMPA')
AND				AC.Customer <> 'ASB001'
AND				DF.Company = 'O'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND             DF.Brand IN ('MAXX ICE')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('MAXX ICE')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('OMEGPRO')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('MAXX ICE')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('MAXX ICE')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('OMEGPRO')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(Cost) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC ON P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005','OM7336', 'OM7337', 'OM8050', 'V555005', 'Y555005', 'Z119021', 'ZZOMADV', 'ZZOMREP', 
									    'ZZOMWAP', 'ZZREP', 'ZZWARCN', 'ZZWARR', 'ZZWARRC')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(Cost) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC ON P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005','OM7336', 'OM7337', 'OM8050', 'V555005', 'Y555005', 'Z119021', 'ZZOMADV', 'ZZOMREP', 
									    'ZZOMWAP', 'ZZREP', 'ZZWARCN', 'ZZWARR', 'ZZWARRC')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW     v_SCO_OL_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCO_OL_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost L]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_L
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				DF.Brand
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost O]
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCO.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCO.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.UserField1 NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY', 'INTERCOMPA')
AND				AC.Customer <> 'ASB001'
AND				DF.Company = 'O'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND             DF.Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('OMEGABV', 'OMEGABL', 'OMEGAEX', 'OMEGAKD', 'OMEGAZE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0)) as CostValue
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('OMEGABV', 'OMEGABL', 'OMEGAEX', 'OMEGAKD', 'OMEGAZE')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_L = Y.Date

CREATE VIEW     v_SCO_OW_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCO_OW_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost WBM]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				DF.Brand
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost O]
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCO.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCO.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.UserField1 NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY', 'INTERCOMPA')
AND				AC.Customer <> 'ASB001'
AND				DF.Company = 'O'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND				DF.Brand IN ('YONANAS', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('WESTBEND') AND PS.SITE_ID = '20'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO

JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID

										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
