,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR] as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost VINO]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost VINO]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'e' as test
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct CASE WHEN P.USER_1 = 'VINOTEMP' THEN 'Vinotemp'  WHEN P.USER_1 = 'AVANTI' THEN 'Compact' ELSE 'Countertop' END as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               CPC.COST as [Cost ECM]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
) A

(

FROM            v_ECM_EL_Cost

,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]

create view v_SalesData_OpenOrders
as
SELECT      distinct CASE WHEN IM.ITCL IN ('BEV', 'BLA', 'DUUR', 'GEN', 'MXC', 'MXI', 'PGEN', 'PMXC', 'PMXI', 'POME', 'SAP') then 'Commercial'
            WHEN IM.ITCL IN ('AVA') then 'Compact' else 'Countertop' end as Division
,         'M3' as Company
,          OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,          OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,          OH.ORNO AS [Order ID]
,          OL.ORST AS [Line Status]
,          OH.ORDT  as [Date]
,          CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END  as Brand
--,          CS.TX40 as [Product Category]
,           IM.ITNO as [Part ID]
,           IM.ITDS as [Part Description]
,           IM.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,           OL.NEPR*OL.ORQT as [Order Amt]
,           OL.ORQT as [Order Qty]
,           OL.UCOS*OL.ORQT as [Cost M3]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
--LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS on IM.ITGR = CS.STKY and STCO = 'ITGR'
AND         OL.ORST >= '22'
AND         OL.ORST < '66'

CREATE VIEW     v_SalesForecast_Sales
-- drop view v_SalesForecast_Sales
as
SELECT          Sales.[Company]
,               Sales.[Customer ID]
,               Sales.[Customer PO]
,               Sales.[Customer Name]
,               Sales.[Order ID]
,               Sales.[Invoice ID]
,               Sales.[Date]
,               Sales.Warehouse
,               CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END AS [DI]
,               Sales.[Part ID - Actual]
,               Sales.[Part ID - Actual] as [Part ID]
,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[description], Item.[Description], Item2.[Description], Sales.[Part Description]) as [Description Fixed]
,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Status], Item.[ItemType], Item2.[ItemType]) as [Status Fixed]
,               Salsify2.[Updated Customer Available Date] as [NPD Avail Date]
,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Product Subcategory], Item.[Sub-Category], Item2.[Sub-Category]) as [Sub Category Fixed]
,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Family (Product Line)], Item.[Category], Item2.[Category]) as [Category Fixed]
,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Brand], Sales.[Brand]) as [Brand Fixed]
,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Channel], Sales.[Division]) as [Div Fixed]
,               ISNULL(CASE WHEN Salsify2.Status IN ('NEW', 'PRE-LAUNCH') THEN 'NPD' ELSE 'Base' END, 'Base') AS [Type Fixed]
,               (Sales.[Part ID - Actual])+'-'+CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END AS [Part ID - DI]
,               CASE WHEN Salsify2.[Manufactured / Purchased] = 'Manufactured' then 'Make'
                WHEN Salsify2.[Manufactured / Purchased] = 'Purchased' then 'Buy'
                WHEN UPPER(Item.[Make or Buy]) = '1|MAKE' then 'Make'
                WHEN UPPER(Item.[Make or Buy]) = '1|BUY' then 'Buy'
                WHEN UPPER(Item2.[Make or Buy]) = '1|MAKE' then 'Make'
                WHEN UPPER(Item2.[Make or Buy]) = '1|BUY' then 'Buy'
                else NULL end as [Make or Buy Fixed]
,               CASE WHEN Salsify2.[Product Type] in ('FINISHED', 'BUNDLE', 'Finished Good') then 'FG'
                WHEN Salsify2.[Product Type] in ('SPARE PARTS', 'ACCESORY', 'Spare Part', 'Component') then 'CP'
                WHEN Item.[Comp or FG] = 'FG|FINISHED GOOD' then 'FG'
                WHEN Item.[Comp or FG] in ('CP|COMPONENT', 'SP|SERVICE PART') then 'CP'
                WHEN Item2.[Comp or FG] = 'FG|FINISHED GOOD' then 'FG'
                WHEN Item2.[Comp or FG] in ('CP|COMPONENT', 'SP|SERVICE PART') then 'CP'
                else NULL end as [CP or FG Fixed]
,               Sales.[Sales Qty]
,               Sales.[Sales Amt]
,               Sales.[Cost]
,               Sales.[Sales Type]
,               COALESCE(Salsify.SKU, Sales.[Part ID - Actual])+'-'+CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END+'-'+ISNULL(CASE WHEN Salsify2.Status = 'NEW' THEN 'NPD' ELSE 'Base' END, 'Base') as [Cube Key]

FROM            a_SalesData     Sales
LEFT JOIN       SLS.Products_SingleSKU Salsify on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Salsify.[Lookup SKU] and Salsify.[Status] NOT IN ('DEAD', 'DISCONTINUED', 'ON HOLD')
LEFT JOIN       SLS.Products_SingleSKU Salsify2 on COALESCE(Salsify.SKU, Sales.[Part ID - Actual]) = Salsify2.[Lookup SKU] and Salsify2.[Status] NOT IN ('DEAD', 'DISCONTINUED', 'ON HOLD')
LEFT JOIN       v_ItemMaster Item on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Item.ItemNumber
LEFT JOIN       v_ItemMaster Item2 on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Item2.OriginalItemNumber


WHERE           Sales.[Sales Qty] <> 0
AND             Sales.[Date] >= '2023-01-01'
AND             Sales.[Brand] NOT IN ('EMC', 'ORIEN')

CREATE VIEW     v_SalesForecast_Sales2
-- drop view v_SalesForecast_Sales2
as
SELECT          Sales.[Company]
,               Sales.[Customer ID]
,               Sales.[Customer PO]
,               Sales.[Customer Name]
,               Sales.[Order ID]
,               Sales.[Invoice ID]
,               Sales.[Date]
,               Sales.Warehouse
,               CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END AS [DI]
,               Sales.[Part ID - Actual] as [Part ID]
,               Sales.[Part Description]
--,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Product Subcategory], Item.[Sub-Category], Item2.[Sub-Category]) as [Sub Category Fixed]
--,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Family (Product Line)], Item.[Category], Item2.[Category]) as [Category Fixed]
,               Sales.[Brand]
,               Sales.[Division]
--,               ISNULL(CASE WHEN Salsify2.Status IN ('NEW', 'PRE-LAUNCH') THEN 'NPD' ELSE 'Base' END, 'Base') AS [Type Fixed]
--,               (Sales.[Part ID - Actual])+'-'+CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END AS [Part ID - DI]
/*,               CASE WHEN Salsify2.[Manufactured / Purchased] = 'Manufactured' then 'Make'
                WHEN Salsify2.[Manufactured / Purchased] = 'Purchased' then 'Buy'
                WHEN UPPER(Item.[Make or Buy]) = '1|MAKE' then 'Make'
                WHEN UPPER(Item.[Make or Buy]) = '1|BUY' then 'Buy'
                WHEN UPPER(Item2.[Make or Buy]) = '1|MAKE' then 'Make'
                WHEN UPPER(Item2.[Make or Buy]) = '1|BUY' then 'Buy'
                else NULL end as [Make or Buy Fixed]
,               CASE WHEN Salsify2.[Product Type] in ('FINISHED', 'BUNDLE', 'Finished Good') then 'FG'
                WHEN Salsify2.[Product Type] in ('SPARE PARTS', 'ACCESORY', 'Spare Part', 'Component') then 'CP'
                WHEN Item.[Comp or FG] = 'FG|FINISHED GOOD' then 'FG'
                WHEN Item.[Comp or FG] in ('CP|COMPONENT', 'SP|SERVICE PART') then 'CP'
                WHEN Item2.[Comp or FG] = 'FG|FINISHED GOOD' then 'FG'
                WHEN Item2.[Comp or FG] in ('CP|COMPONENT', 'SP|SERVICE PART') then 'CP'
                else NULL end as [CP or FG Fixed]*/
,               Sales.[Sales Qty]
,               Sales.[Sales Amt]
,               Sales.[Cost]
,               Sales.[Sales Type]
--,               COALESCE(Salsify.SKU, Sales.[Part ID - Actual])+'-'+CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END+'-'+ISNULL(CASE WHEN Salsify2.Status = 'NEW' THEN 'NPD' ELSE 'Base' END, 'Base') as [Cube Key]

FROM            a_SalesData     Sales
--LEFT JOIN       SLS.Products_SingleSKU Salsify on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Salsify.[Lookup SKU] and Salsify.[Status] NOT IN ('DEAD', 'DISCONTINUED', 'ON HOLD')
--LEFT JOIN       SLS.Products_SingleSKU Salsify2 on COALESCE(Salsify.SKU, Sales.[Part ID - Actual]) = Salsify2.[Lookup SKU] and Salsify2.[Status] NOT IN ('DEAD', 'DISCONTINUED', 'ON HOLD')
--LEFT JOIN       v_ItemMaster Item on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Item.ItemNumber
--LEFT JOIN       v_ItemMaster Item2 on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Item2.OriginalItemNumber
WHERE           Sales.[Sales Qty] > 0
AND             Sales.[Date] >= '2023-01-01'
AND             Sales.[Brand] NOT IN ('EMC', 'ORIEN')

create view     v_Sales_Eric
as
SELECT			DISTINCT /*'Commercial' Division
,				*/'Syspro Company A' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
--,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
--,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
--,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
--,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
--,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,               SD.MWarehouse as ShipFromWarehouse
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as ShipToState
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as ShipToZip
,               AC.DeliveryTerms as [Freight Terms]
--,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				AVG(MerchandiseValue) as [Product Sales Amt]
,               AVG(FreightValue) as [Freight Amt]
--,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
--,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
--JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN            SCA.SorMaster SM on ATS.CustomerPoNumber = SM.CustomerPoNumber
JOIN            SCA.SorDetail SD on SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= GETDATE() - 365
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				SD.MStockCode <> ' '
GROUP BY        AC.Customer, AC.Name, ATD.InvoiceDate, SD.MWarehouse, SM.ShipAddress4, SM.ShipPostalCode, AC.DeliveryTerms

union ALL

SELECT			DISTINCT /*'Commercial' Division
,				*/'Syspro Company L' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
--,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
--,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
--,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
--,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
--,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,               SD.MWarehouse as ShipFromWarehouse
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as ShipToState
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as ShipToZip
,               AC.DeliveryTerms as [Freight Terms]
--,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				AVG(MerchandiseValue) as [Product Sales Amt]
,               AVG(FreightValue) as [Freight Amt]
--,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
--,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
--JOIN			SCL.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN            SCL.SorMaster SM on ATS.CustomerPoNumber = SM.CustomerPoNumber
JOIN            SCL.SorDetail SD on SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= GETDATE() - 365
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				SD.MStockCode <> ' '
GROUP BY        AC.Customer, AC.Name, ATD.InvoiceDate, SD.MWarehouse, SM.ShipAddress4, SM.ShipPostalCode, AC.DeliveryTerms

union ALL

SELECT			DISTINCT /*'Commercial' Division
,				*/'Syspro Company G' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
--,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
--,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
--,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
--,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
--,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,               SD.MWarehouse as ShipFromWarehouse
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as ShipToState
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as ShipToZip
,               AC.DeliveryTerms as [Freight Terms]
--,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				AVG(MerchandiseValue) as [Product Sales Amt]
,               AVG(FreightValue) as [Freight Amt]
--,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
--,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
--JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN            SCG.SorMaster SM on ATS.CustomerPoNumber = SM.CustomerPoNumber
JOIN            SCG.SorDetail SD on SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= GETDATE() - 365
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				SD.MStockCode <> ' '
GROUP BY        AC.Customer, AC.Name, ATD.InvoiceDate, SD.MWarehouse, SM.ShipAddress4, SM.ShipPostalCode, AC.DeliveryTerms

UNION ALL

SELECT          distinct 'Edgecraft' as Company
,               C.ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
--,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
--,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
--,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
--,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
--,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
--,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               COL.WAREHOUSE_ID as ShipFromWarehouse
,               CA.STATE AS ShipToState
,               CA.ZIPCODE AS ShipToZip
,               C.FREIGHT_TERMS as [Freight Terms]
--,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               sum(COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED) as [Product Sales Amt]
,               sum(COL.TOTAL_ACT_FREIGHT) as [Freight Amt]
--,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
--,               CPC.COST as [Cost ECM]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
--JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ADDRESS CA ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = CA.CUSTOMER_ID AND CO.SHIP_TO_ADDR_NO = CA.ADDR_NO
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= GETDATE() - 365
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
GROUP BY        C.ID, C.Name, COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, COL.WAREHOUSE_ID, CA.STATE, CA.ZIPCODE, C.FREIGHT_TERMS

UNION ALL

SELECT			Distinct 'Apprise' as Company
,				aih.[cust-key] as [Customer ID]
,				[cust-name] as [Customer Name]
--,				[cust-po-number] as [Customer PO]
--,				aih.[ref-num] as [Order ID]
,				aih.[ref-date] as [Date]
--,				'AVANTI' as [Brand]
--,				c.[short-description] as [Product Category]
--,				aii.[item-key] as [Part ID]
--,				aii.[item-name] as [Part Description]
,               aii.[shipping-location-key] as ShipFromWarehouse
,               oe.[user-defined-05] AS ShipToState
,               oe.[user-defined-06] AS ShipToZip
,               oe.[freight-collection-terms] as [Freight Terms]
--,				p.[primary-supplier-key] as [Supplier ID]
,				AVG(aih.[merch-amt]) as [Product Sales Amt]
,               AVG(aih.[freight-amt]) as [Freight Amt]
--,				qty as [Sales Qty]
--,				aii.[total-sales-cost] as [Cost APR]
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
JOIN			APR.custname cn on aih.[cust-key] = cn.[cust-key]
--LEFT JOIN		APR.product p on aii.[item-key] = p.[product-key]
JOIN            APR.[oe-header] oe on aih.[cust-po-number] = oe.[cust-po-number]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= GETDATE() - 365
AND				aih.[cust-key] NOT IN ('23117', '23124')
AND             aih.[ref-num] NOT LIKE 'CM%'
GROUP BY        aih.[cust-key], [cust-name], aih.[ref-date], aii.[shipping-location-key], oe.[user-defined-05], oe.[user-defined-06], oe.[freight-collection-terms]

union all

SELECT    'M3' as Company
,          OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
--,          OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
--,          OH.ORNO AS [Order ID]
,          cast(cast(ORDT as char(8)) as date) as [Date]
--,          'VINOTEMP' as Brand
--,          NULL as [Product Category]
--,           IM.ITNO as [Part ID]
--,           IM.ITDS as [Part Description]
,           OL.WHLO as ShipFromWarehouse
,           OA.ECAR as ShipToState
,           OA.PONO as ShipToZip
,           OH.TEDL as [Freight Terms]
--,           IM.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,           OL.NEPR*OL.IVQT as [Product Sales Amt]
,           NULL as [Freight Amt]
--,           OL.IVQT as [Sales Qty]
--,           OL.UCOS*OL.IVQT as [Cost VINO]
FROM                DBO.M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN                DBO.M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN                DBO.M3_OCUSAD OA on OH.CUNO = OA.CUNO and OH.ADID = OA.ADID
WHERE     cast(cast(ORDT as char(8)) as date) >= GETDATE() - 365
and       OL.NEPR*OL.IVQT > 0
and     OL.ORNO not like '6%'

CREATE VIEW     v_SerialTracking
AS

SELECT          'M3' as ERP
,               IM.BUAR as Division
,               IM.ITCL as Brand
,               BREF as Serial
,               OH.ORNO as SalesOrder
,               OL.PONR AS SalesOrderLine
,               OH.CUNO as Customer
,               OH.CUOR AS CustomerPoNumber
,               IM.ITNO AS Item
,               IM.ITDS AS ItemDescription
,               IT.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               OL.IVQT AS QtyInvoiced
,               OL.ORQT AS QtyOrdered
,               OL.NEPR AS UnitPrice
,               OL.IVQT*OL.NEPR as NetSalesValue
,               CAST(OD.IVNO AS VARCHAR(255)) as Invoice
,               CAST(CAST(OD.IVDT AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE) as InvoiceDate
,               OC.SMCD as Salesperson
FROM            M3_MITTRA IT 
JOIN            M3_MITMAS IM ON IT.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_OOHEAD OH ON IT.RIDN = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND IT.RIDL = OL.PONR
JOIN            M3_OCUSMA OC on OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3_ODHEAD OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO AND OD.WHLO = OH.WHLO
WHERE           1=1
AND             TTYP = 93
AND             IT.WHSL LIKE CONCAT('%', IT.WHLO, '%')
AND             LEN(BREF) >= 2
AND             TRQT > 0
AND             BREF <> IM.ITNO

CREATE VIEW     v_ServiceTickets
-- drop view v_ServiceTickets
as
SELECT      distinct AC.ORNO AS [Ticket Number]
,           AC.RESP as [Responsible]
,           AL.AOST as [Status]
,           AL.RSCD as [Trans Reason Code]
,           CASE WHEN AL.RSCD IN ('T10', 'TST', 'ZZZ', '') THEN 'NA' ELSE CS.TX40 end as [Trans Reason]
,           AL.BANO as [Serial Number]
,           COALESCE(OC.CUNO, ARC.Customer, OC2.CUNO) as [Customer ID]
,           COALESCE(OC.CUNM, ARC.Name, OC2.CUNM) as [Customer Name]
,           AC.ORDT as [Ticket Date]
,           AC.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           AL.AORQ as [Service Qty]
,           ML.FLNO as [Item Number]
,           BIM.[Description]
,           BIM.[Sub-Brand]
,           BIM.Brand
,           BIM.[Finance Brand]
,           BIM.Division
,           BIM.[Business Unit]
,           BIM.[Item Type]
,           BIM.[Manufactured or Purchased]
,           COALESCE(NULLIF(LEFT(MO.BRE2, 10),''), SM.[SalesOrder]) as [Sales Order Number]
,           COALESCE(NULLIF(OH.ORDT,''), SM.OrderDate)  as [Sales Order Date]
,           BIM.[Supplier Code] as [Supplier ID]
,           BIM.[Supplier Short Name] as [Supplier Name]
,           MP.PUPR as [Service Amount]
FROM        M3.ACUORH AC
JOIN        M3.ACUORL AL on AC.ORNO = AL.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MILOIN ML on AL.BANO = ML.SERN
LEFT JOIN   M3.MILOMA MO on AL.BANO = MO.BANO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOHEAD OH on LEFT(MO.BRE2, 10) = OH.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OCUSMA OC2 ON AC.CUNO = OC2.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON AL.RSCD = CS.STKY and STCO = 'RSCD'

LEFT JOIN   SCA.SorDetailSerRep SDS on AL.BANO = SDS.Serial
LEFT JOIN   SCA.SorMaster SM on SDS.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN   SCA.ArCustomer ARC on SM.Customer = ARC.Customer
/*
LEFT JOIN   SCA.InvMaster IM ON ML.FLNO = IM.StockCode
LEFT JOIN   SCA.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
*/
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITMAS MM on ML.FLNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster BIM on ML.FLNO = BIM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDMAS CM on MM.SUNO = CM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPLIRE MPL ON AL.BANO = MPL.BANO and MPL.BANO <> 'NO SERIAL NUMBER'
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPLINE MP ON MP.PUNO = MPL.PUNO AND MP.PNLI = MPL.PNLI AND MP.PNLS = MPL.PNLS

CREATE VIEW		v_ShipDays_ConsumerDashboard
AS

SELECT 			COUNT(DISTINCT Date) as Month_Ship_Days
, 				COUNT(CASE WHEN Date < CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ) THEN 1 END) as Elapsed_Ship_Days
, 				COUNT(CASE WHEN Date >= CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ) THEN 1 END) as Remaining_Ship_Days
FROM 			ECM.HOLIDAYS
WHERE 			Date BETWEEN DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			Weekday NOT IN ('1', '7')
AND 			Holiday = '0'

CREATE VIEW		v_ShipmentsPY_ConsumerDashboard
AS

(
SELECT 			'All' as Company, NULL as [Customer ID], NULL as [Customer Name]
, 				NULL as [Budget Category], NULL as [Ship Date], NULL as [Order ID]
,				NULL as [Customer PO], Brand, NULL as [Part ID]
,				Shipment as [Shipment]
FROM 			ECM.YTD_SHIPMENTS
WHERE			MONTH = MONTH(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ))
AND 			Year = 2021

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], C.NAME as [Customer Name]
, 				C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], CO.ID as [Order ID]
,				CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO], P.USER_1 AS [Brand], PART_ID as [Part ID]
,				COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED AS Shipment
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2021-10-01'
AND  			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2021
AND	 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ))
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)
AND				COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0


UNION ALL


SELECT 			'Company L' as Company, AC.Customer as [Customer ID], AC2.Name as [Customer Name]
, 				AC.Category as [Budget Category], COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)  as [Ship Date], SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 'Zeroll' as [Brand], MStockCode as [Part ID]
,				MPrice*MOrderQty as [Shipment]
FROM 			SCL.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on SM.Customer = AC2.Customer
WHERE 			SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX')
AND 			COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2021-10-01'
AND 			YEAR(COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)) = 2021
AND	 			MONTH(COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)) = MONTH(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ))
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0
AND 			AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			AC.Category <> 'GWT'
AND 			OrderStatus = '9'


UNION ALL


SELECT 			'Company G' as Company, AC.Customer as [Customer ID], AC.Name as [Customer Name], 
  				'GWT' as [Budget Category],  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  				CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
				CASE WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'CHEF' then 'Chefs Choice'
				WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'EXCL' then 'Excalibur'
				WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'OMEG' then 'Omega'
  				WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'VINT' then 'Vinturi'
  				WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'WEST' then 'WestBend'
  				WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'ZERO' then 'Zeroll'
  				ELSE 'Yonanas' END as [Brand],
  				MStockCode as [Part ID], 
				MPrice*MOrderQty as [Shipment]
FROM 			SCG.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCG.InvMaster IM ON SD.MStockCode=IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
WHERE 			COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2021-10-01'
AND 			YEAR(COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)) = 2021
AND	 			MONTH(COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)) = MONTH(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ))
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0
AND 			OrderStatus = '9'
AND   			IM.ProductClass IN ('CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP')
)

CREATE VIEW		v_ShipmentsYTDPY_ConsumerDashboard
AS

SELECT 			Brand, sum(SHIPMENT) AS [YTD Shipments Prior Year]
FROM 			ECM.YTD_SHIPMENTS
WHERE 			YEAR = YEAR(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) - 1
AND 			MONTH <= MONTH(CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ))
GROUP BY		Brand

CREATE VIEW		v_ShipmentsYTD_ConsumerDashboard
AS

(
SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE())
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN 			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN 			ECM.CUSTOMER C on CO.CUSTOMER_ID=C.ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE 			YEAR(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = 2022
AND 			MONTH(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1
AND 			CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND 			CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT 			'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO

SELECT 			 'Company L' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC.Category as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  'Zeroll' as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			SCL.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on SM.Customer = AC2.Customer
JOIN			SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE 			SD.MWarehouse in ('ZK', 'ZF', 'ZX')
AND 			YEAR(COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)) = 2022
AND 			COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) <= DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0
AND 			AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY'
AND 			AC.Category <> 'GWT'
AND 			OrderStatus = '9'


UNION ALL


SELECT 			 'Company G' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'GWT' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  CASE WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'CHEF' then 'Chefs Choice'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'EXCL' then 'Excalibur'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'OMEG' then 'Omega'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'VINT' then 'Vinturi'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'WEST' then 'WestBend'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'ZERO' then 'Zeroll'
  ELSE 'Yonanas' END as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 			SCG.SorMaster SM
JOIN 			SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder=SD.SalesOrder
JOIN 			SCG.InvMaster IM ON SD.MStockCode=IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer
WHERE 			YEAR(COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate)) = 2022
AND 			COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) <= DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			MPrice*MOrderQty > 0
AND 			OrderStatus = '9'
AND   			IM.ProductClass IN ('CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP')
)

CREATE VIEW v_Supplier_MasterData
-- drop view v_Supplier_MasterData
as
SELECT          CI.SUNO AS              [Supplier ID]
,               CI.SUNM AS              [Supplier Name]
,               CI.STAT AS              [Status]
,               CA.ADR1 AS              [Address 1]
,               CA.ADR2 AS              [Address 2]
,               CA.TOWN as              [City]
,               CA.ECAR as              [State]
,               CA.CSCD as              [Country]
,               CS.TX15 as              [Payment Terms]
,               CS2.TX15 as             [Payment Method]
,               CS3.TX40 AS             [Category]
, CASE WHEN CI.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN CI.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CI.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            WHEN CI.CFI3 in ('CMP', 'CNR') then 'Consumer'
            else 'Pending' end as       Division
,           CASE WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial' 
            WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CI.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            else 'Pending' end as       [Business Unit]
,           CV.RESP AS                  [Responsible]
FROM            M3.CIDMAS CI
LEFT JOIN       M3.CIDVEN CV ON CI.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CIDADR CA on CI.SUNO = CA.SUNO AND CA.ADTE = '1' and CA.ADID = '1'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.TEPY = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'TEPY'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON CV.PYME = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'PYME'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON CV.SUCL = CS3.STKY AND CS3.STCO = 'SUCL'

create view v_SysproPaidInvoicesFromM3
as
SELECT inv.cuno AS CustomerNumber, oc.cunm as CustomerName, inv.cino as Invoice, inv.acdt as PaidDate, inv.cuam*-1 as PaidAmt
FROM M3.FSLEDG inv
join M3.ocusma oc on inv.cuno = oc.cuno
WHERE TRCD = '20'
and (CINO LIKE 'L%' OR CINO LIKE 'AAS%')

CREATE VIEW     v_TradeAgreementMatrix
as
SELECT          FW.*
,               A.[Priority 3 - Customer]
,               C.[Priority 3 - Sales Territory]
,               B.[Priority 5 - Brand]
,               D.[Priority 5 - Sales Territory]
FROM
(
SELECT          TA.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement]
,               TA.TX40 as [Trade Agreeement Description]
,               TR.TREC as [Sales Rep ID]
,               CS.TX40 as [Sales Rep Name]
,               TR.RATE as [Commission Rate]
,               TA.STDE as [Start Date]
,               TA.LVDT as [End Date]
FROM            M3.OBTRAG TA
JOIN            M3.OBTREC TR on TA.TAGN = TR.TAGN
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS ON TR.TREC = CS.STKY 
WHERE           STCO = 'SMCD'
AND             TA.TATB = 'COML-01'
) FW

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          TX.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement]
,               TX.OBV1 as [Priority 3 - Customer]
FROM            M3.OBTMTX TX
WHERE           PREX = 3
) A             on FW.[Trade Agreement] = A.[Trade Agreement]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          TX.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement]
,               TX.OBV2 as [Priority 5 - Brand]
FROM            M3.OBTMTX TX
WHERE           PREX = 5
) B             on FW.[Trade Agreement] = B.[Trade Agreement]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          SMD1 as [Sales Rep ID]
,               OBV1 as [Priority 3 - Sales Territory]
FROM            M3.CSMCDX
WHERE           PREX = 3
) C             on FW.[Sales Rep ID] = C.[Sales Rep ID] and A.[Priority 3 - Customer] is not null

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          SMD1 as [Sales Rep ID]
,               OBV1 as [Priority 5 - Sales Territory]
,               OBV2 as [Priority 5 - Brand]
FROM            M3.CSMCDX
WHERE           PREX = 4
) D             on FW.[Sales Rep ID] = D.[Sales Rep ID] and B.[Priority 5 - Brand] = D.[Priority 5 - Brand] and B.[Priority 5 - Brand] is not null

CREATE VIEW v_TransactionsByUser
as
SELECT      RESP AS [User]
,           TTYP AS [Transaction Type]
,           TRDT AS [Transaction Date]
,           RIDN AS [Order Number]
,           RIDL AS [Order Line]
,           ITNO AS [Item]
,           WHSL AS [Warehouse Location]
,           TRQT AS [Transaction Qty]
FROM        M3.MITTRA

CREATE VIEW v_TransferOrders
-- drop view v_TransferOrders
as
SELECT      A.*
--,           B.[In Transit Date]
--,           B.[In Transit Qty]
,           C.[Receipt Date]
,           C.[Received Qty]
,           [Received Qty] - [Transfer Qty] as [Open Qty]
FROM
(
SELECT      DISTINCT RIDN AS         [Transfer Order]
,           TRDT AS         [Create Date]
,           RIDL AS         [Order Line]
,           MT.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS AS      [Description]
,           ABS(MT.TRQT) AS   [Transfer Qty]
,           MT.RESP AS         [User]
,           LEFT(WHSL,3) as [Originating Warehouse]
,           RIGHT(WHSL,3) as [Destination Warehouse]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on MT.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       TTYP = '51'
) A

/*LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT RIDN AS         [Transfer Order]
,           TRDT AS         [In Transit Date]
,           RIDL AS         [Order Line]
,           MT.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,           ABS(MT.TRQT) AS   [In Transit Qty]
,           LEFT(WHSL,3) as [Originating Warehouse]
,           RIGHT(WHSL,3) as [Destination Warehouse]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on MT.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       TTYP = '52'
) B on A.[Transfer Order] = B.[Transfer Order] and A.[Originating Warehouse] = B.[Originating Warehouse] 
    and A.[Destination Warehouse] = B.[Destination Warehouse] and A.[Order Line] = B.[Order Line]
*/
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT RIDN AS         [Transfer Order]
,           TRDT AS         [Receipt Date]
,           RIDL AS         [Order Line]
,           MT.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,           ABS(MT.TRQT) AS   [Received Qty]
,           LEFT(RFTX,3) as [Originating Warehouse]
,           RIGHT(RFTX,3) as [Destination Warehouse]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on MT.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       TTYP = '50'
) C on A.[Transfer Order] = C.[Transfer Order] and A.[Originating Warehouse] = C.[Originating Warehouse] 
    and A.[Destination Warehouse] = C.[Destination Warehouse] and A.[Order Line] = C.[Order Line]

WHERE [Received Qty] - [Transfer Qty] < 0 or [Received Qty] - [Transfer Qty] is null

Create view     v_UpcomingShipments
-- drop view v_UpcomingShipments
as
SELECT          *
FROM            v_OpenOrdersByStatus
WHERE           [Qty Status] NOT IN
(
    '6 - Shipped',
    '7 - Invoiced',
    '9 - Cancelled'
)

CREATE VIEW      v_Usage
-- drop view v_Usage
as
/*
SELECT          'Sales' as [Usage Type]
--,               OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
--,               OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,               OH.ORNO as [Order Number]
--,               OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
--,               OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,               cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)  as [Tran Date]
,               IM.ITCL as Brand
--,               OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,               OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               IM.ITDS as [Item Name]
,               OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,               IM.PRGP as [Procurement Group]
--,               OL.NEPR as [Unit Price]
,               SUM(ODL.IVQT) as [Quantity]
,               0 as [Cost]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.PYNO = ODH.PYNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH on OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
AND				LE.IVTP <> 'CN'
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
and             OH.ORNO NOT LIKE '5%'
GROUP BY        OH.ORNO, ODH.ACDT, IM.ITCL, OL.ITNO, IM.ITDS, OL.WHLO, IM.PRGP

UNION ALL       
*/

SELECT			A.*
,				B.Cost
FROM
(
SELECT			'Manufacturing' as [Usage Type]
,				MWH.MFNO AS [Order Number]
,				CAST(CAST(MWH.RPDT AS varchar(10)) AS date) AS [Tran Date]
,				MI.ITCL as Brand
,				MWM.MTNO as [Item Number]
,				MI.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,				MWH.WHLO AS Warehouse
,				MI.PRGP AS [Procurement Group]
,				SUM(RPQT) AS Quantity
FROM            M3.MWOHED AS MWH
JOIN			M3.MWOMAT AS MWM on MWH.MFNO = MWM.MFNO and MWH.ITNO = MWM.PRNO
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS MI ON MWM.MTNO = MI.ITNO 
WHERE			(MWH.WHHS IN (60, 80, 90)) AND (MWH.MAQA <> 0)
GROUP BY		MWM.MTNO, MI.ITDS, MI.PRGP, MWH.WHLO, MWH.MFNO, MWH.RPDT, MI.ITCL
) A 

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			RIDN AS [Order Number]
,				MTNO as [Item Number]
,				AVG(TOAF) AS Cost
FROM            M3.CPOMAT
GROUP BY		RIDN, MTNO
) B ON A.[Order Number] = B.[Order Number] and A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number]

CREATE VIEW     v_VNT_OpenPOs
as
SELECT          DISTINCT POH.PUNO AS [PO Number]
,               POH.PUDT AS [PO Date]
,               SUP.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,               SUP.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               ITM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,               ORQA as [Order Qty]
,               RVQA as [Received Qty]
,               ORQA - RVQA as [Open Qty]
,               POL.RCDT as [Receipt Date]
,               POH.DWDT as [Requested Delviery Date]
FROM            dbo.M3_MPHEAD POH
JOIN            dbo.M3_MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            dbo.M3_MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            dbo.M3_CIDMAS SUP on POL.SUNO = SUP.SUNO
WHERE           POL.PUSL < '66'
AND             ITM.BUAR = 'CNR'
--drop view v_M3_OpenPurchaseOrders

CREATE VIEW v_WBM_EO_Cost
AS

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost O]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct 'Countertop' as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               REPLACE(REPLACE(P.ID, 'ZT-ZR', 'ZR'),'ZT', 'ZR') as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               CPC.COST*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost WBM]
FROM            WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            WBM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		WBM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		WBM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
AND				P.USER_1 IN ('OMEGA')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'Westbend' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				REPLACE(ATD.StockCode, 'ZT', 'ZR') collate database_Default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('WESTBEN', 'YON001')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'Westbend' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				REPLACE(ATD.StockCode, 'ZT', 'ZR') collate database_Default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(ATS.InvoiceDate) as [Date]
,				AVG(CostValue/QtyInvoiced) as CostValue
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA')
AND				ATS.Customer IN ('WESTBEN', 'YON001')
AND				QtyInvoiced > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(ATS.InvoiceDate, 'yyyy-MM'), ATD.StockCode
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date

SELECT          OC.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,               OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,               ODH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,               ODH.DLIX as [Delivery Number]
,               ODL.PONR as [Line Number]
,               ODL.POSX as [Line Number - Sub]
,               MM.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,               ODL.IVQT as [Invoice Qty]
,               ODL.NEPR as [Net Price]
,               OH.UCA9 as [Carrier Type]
,               DLRM as [Carrier SCAC]
,               ETRN as [Tracking/Pro Number]
,               ODH.IVDT as [Invoice Date]
FROM            M3.ODHEAD ODH
JOIN            M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH on ODH.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON ODL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPTRNS MP on ODH.DLIX = MP.DLIX
WHERE           DLDT >= GETDATE() - 14

create view v_Warehouses_MasterData
-- drop view v_Warehouses_MasterData
as
SELECT      MW.WHLO AS      [Warehouse]
,           MW.WHNM AS      [Warehouse Name]
,           ADR1 AS         [Address 1]
,           ADR2 AS         [Address 2]
,           TOWN AS         [City]
,           MW.ECAR AS      [State]
,           CI.PONO AS      [Zip Code]
,           MW.CSCD AS      [Country]
FROM        M3.MITWHL MW
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIADDR CI ON MW.WHLO = CI.ADK2
WHERE       MW.DIVI = 'TLC'

CREATE VIEW         v_WaveReport
-- drop view v_WaveReport
as
SELECT      *
FROM
(
SELECT      PH.PLRI AS      [Wave]
--,           PH.WHLO AS      [Warehouse]
,           PH.DLIX AS      [Delivery Number]
--,           PH.PLSX AS      [Picking List Suffix]
--,           PH.PISS AS      [Picking Status]
--,           OC.CUNO AS      [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM AS      [Customer Name]
,           OC.CFC6 AS      [Document Format]
,           MI.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS AS      [Item Description]
,           MI.WHSL AS      [Location]
,           MI.RIDN AS      [Order Number]
--,           MI.RIDL AS      [Order Line]
,           MI.ALQT AS      [Picking Qty]
--,           MI.PAQT AS      [Packed Qty]
FROM        M3.MHPICH PH
JOIN        M3.MITALO MI on PH.DLIX = MI.RIDI
JOIN        M3.MHDISH MD ON PH.DLIX = MD.DLIX
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON MI.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON MD.CONA = OC.CUNO
WHERE       PH.PISS = '40'
) A

select distinct inou, count(*) from M3.MHDISH group by inou

SELECT			OrderNumber
,				CustomerOrderNumber
,				DeliveryNumber
,               PackageNumber
,				TrackingNumber
,				SUM(PubFreightCost) OVER (PARTITION BY 
                OrderNumber, CustomerOrderNumber, DeliveryNumber, PackageNumber, TrackingNumber) as PublishedFreight
,				SUM(DiscFreightCost) OVER (PARTITION BY 
                OrderNumber, CustomerOrderNumber, DeliveryNumber, PackageNumber, TrackingNumber) as DiscountedFreight
FROM			PWP.LC_SHIPMENTS
ORDER BY		ShipDate Desc, OrderNumber, DeliveryNumber, PackageNumber
